es: 1) Colócate en el lado plano del BOSU con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros.
2) Activa su core y mantén el equilibrio mientras se pone en cuclillas, manteniendo las rodillas alineadas con los dedos de los pies.
3) Haz una breve pausa en la parte inferior y luego empuje los talones para volver a ponerse de pie.
4) Repite las repeticiones deseadas, concentrándose en la estabilidad y el control.
Este ejercicio trabaja las piernas y al core.

name: BOSU - Squats (On Dome)
instructions: 1) Stand on the dome side of the BOSU ball with feet shoulder-width apart.
2) Engage your core and lower into a squat, keeping your knees aligned with your toes.
3) Pause briefly at the bottom, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
4) Focus on stability and balance throughout the movement.
5) Repeat for desired repetitions.

es: 1) Colócate en el lado de la cupula de la pelota BOSU con los pies separados al ancho de los hombros.
2) Activa su core y bájese hasta ponerse en cuclillas, manteniendo las rodillas alineadas con los dedos de los pies.
3) Haz una breve pausa en la parte inferior y luego empuje los talones para volver a la posición inicial.

name: BOSU - Side To Side Press Ups
instructions: To start this exercise kneel down on the floor, and lean forward so that you are now bearing weight on your arms. Have your hands placed where your chest would be on dome side. Now you should come up onto your feet so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be your feet and your hands on the BOSU. Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.
Place your right hand out to the right of the BOSU.

Pause for a brief moment, exhale and press through your palms to return your body along the same path to the starting position. Bring your right hand to the centre of the BOSU to meet the left and then place your left hand out to the left of the BOSU. Tip: Squeeze your pectoral muscles and triceps as you do so and when you get to the top of the movement, do not lock your elbows out.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Press or Press Ups.

name.en: BOSU - Side To Side Press Ups

Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.
Place your right hand out to the right of the BOSU.

Pause for a brief moment, exhale and press through your palms to return your body along the same path to the starting position. Bring your right hand to the centre of the BOSU to meet the left and then place your left hand out to the left of the BOSU. Tip: Squeeze your pectoral muscles and triceps as you do so and when you get to the top of the movement, do not lock your elbows out.

Variations: Bench Press or Press Ups.
es: Para comenzar este ejercicio, arrodíllate en el suelo e inclínate hacia adelante de modo que ahora soportes el peso sobre tus brazos. Coloca las manos donde estaría el pecho en el lado de la cupula. Ahora debes ponerte de pie para que tu cuerpo quede suspendido sobre el piso, los únicos puntos de contacto (con el piso) deben ser tus pies y tus manos sobre el BOSU. Su cuerpo debe estar en línea recta desde la cabeza hasta los pies y los brazos perpendiculares al suelo debajo de el pecho. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Coloca su mano derecha a la derecha del BOSU.

Haz una pausa por un breve momento, exhala y presione con las palmas de las manos para que el cuerpo vuelve por el mismo camino a la posición inicial. Lleve su mano derecha al centro del BOSU para encontrarse con la izquierda y luego coloca su mano izquierda a la izquierda del BOSU. Consejo: apriete los músculos pectorales y los triceps mientras lo hace y cuando llegue a la cima del movimiento, no bloquee los codos.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca o flexiones.

name: BOSU - Power Press Ups
instructions: To start this exercise kneel down on the floor, and lean forward so that you are now bearing weight on your arms. Have your hands placed on each side of the BOSU (flat side). Now you should come up onto your feet so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be your feet and your hands on the BOSU. Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, slowly lower your chest towards the ground whilst keeping your elbows by your side.
Exhale and explosively press hard enough through your palms to return your body not only along the same path but to enable you to lift the BOSU off the floor.
When your body weight is on its descent, land into the next repetition.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Press or Press Ups.

es: Para comenzar este ejercicio, arrodíllate en el suelo e inclínate hacia adelante de modo que ahora soportes el peso sobre tus brazos. Coloca las manos a cada lado del BOSU (lado plano). Ahora debes ponerte de pie para que tu cuerpo quede suspendido sobre el piso, los únicos puntos de contacto (con el piso) deben ser tus pies y tus manos sobre el BOSU. Su cuerpo debe estar en línea recta desde la cabeza hasta los pies y los brazos perpendiculares al suelo debajo de el pecho. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras inhala, baja lentamente el pecho hacia el suelo manteniendo los codos a los lados.
Exhala y presione explosivamente con suficiente fuerza a través de las palmas para que el cuerpo vuelve no solo por el mismo camino sino que le permite levantar el BOSU del suelo.
Cuando el peso de tu cuerpo esté descendiendo, aterriza en la siguiente repetición.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca o flexiones.

name: BOSU - Press Ups (Feet On Flat Side)
instructions: To start this exercise kneel down on the floor, and lean forward so that you are now bearing weight on your arms. Have your hands placed just outside of where your chest would be. Now lift both feet up onto the BOSU (flat side) so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be your hands and your feet on the BOSU (flat side). Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, slowly lower your chest towards the ground whilst keeping your elbows by your side.

Pause for a brief moment, exhale and press through your palms to return your body along the same path to the starting position. Tip: Squeeze your pectoral muscles and triceps as you do so and when you get to the top of the movement, do not lock your elbows out.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Press or Dumbbell Chest Press.

name: BOSU - Plank (Feet On)
instructions: 1) Begin in a plank position with your feet on the dome side of the BOSU ball and your forearms on the ground.
2) Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels, engaging your core muscles.
3) Keep shoulders over elbows and hips down.
4) Hold this position for the desired amount of time, focusing on stability and control.
5) Remember to breathe steadily throughout the exercise.
This plank variation targets your core muscles and improves balance and stability.

en: 1) Begin in a plank position with your feet on the dome side of the BOSU ball and your forearms on the ground.
2) Keep your body in a straight line from head to heels, engaging your core muscles.
3) Keep shoulders over elbows and hips down.
4) Hold this position for the desired amount of time, focusing on stability and control.
5) Remember to breathe steadily throughout the exercise.
This plank variation targets your core muscles and improves balance and stability.
es: 1) Comienza en posición de tabla con los pies en el lado del domo de la pelota BOSU y los antebrazos en el suelo.
2) Mantén el cuerpo en línea recta desde la cabeza hasta los talones, activando los core.
3) Mantén los hombros sobre los codos y las caderas hacia abajo.
4) Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo deseado, concentrándose en la estabilidad y el control.
5) Recuerda respirar de forma constante durante todo el ejercicio.
Esta variación de la tabla trabaja los core y mejora el equilibrio y la estabilidad.

name: BOSU - Press Up Plank (Feet On)
instructions: To start this exercise kneel down on the floor, and lean forward so that you are now bearing weight on your arms. Have your hands placed just outside of where your chest would be. Now lift both feet up onto the BOSU (dome side) so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be your hands and your feet on the BOSU (dome side). Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.

Keep your abdominal muscles tight throughout this exercise and keep your pelvis in line with the rest of your body to minimise risk of injury to your lower back (you can elevate your pelvis slightly to reduce lower back pain).
Hold this position for as long as you can or for the recommended amount of time.
Variations: Plank.

Mantén los músculos abdominales tensos durante este ejercicio y mantén la pelvis alineada con el resto del cuerpo para minimizar el riesgo de lesiones en la zona lumbar (puedes elevar ligeramente la pelvis para reducir el dolor lumbar).
Mantén esta posición todo el tiempo que puedas o durante el tiempo recomendado.
Variaciones: Plancha.

name: BOSU - Plank (Forearms On)
instructions: Firstly, adopt an 'all-fours' position above on the floor. From here you will need to bend your elbows to a 90 degree angle and place your upper body weight onto your forearms on top of the BOSU (dome side). After you have done that, take a step backwards with your feet and place your remaining bodyweight through your toes. At this point your body should be suspended (in a straight line) above the floor with just your forearms and toes as points of contact. This will be your starting position.

Keep your abdominal muscles tight throughout this exercise and keep your pelvis in line with the rest of your body to minimise risk of injury to your lower back (you can elevate your pelvis slightly to reduce lower back pain).
Hold this position for as long as you can or for the recommended amount of time.
Variations: Plank.

es: En primer lugar, adopte una posición "a cuatro patas" arriba del suelo. Desde aquí, deberá doblar los codos en un ángulo de 90 grados y colocar el peso de la parte superior del cuerpo sobre los antebrazos encima del BOSU (lado del domo). Una vez hecho esto, da un paso hacia atrás con los pies y coloca el peso corporal restante entre los dedos de los pies. En este punto, tu cuerpo debe estar suspendido (en línea recta) sobre el suelo con solo los antebrazos y los dedos de los pies como puntos de contacto. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mantén los músculos abdominales tensos durante este ejercicio y mantén la pelvis alineada con el resto del cuerpo para minimizar el riesgo de lesiones en la zona lumbar (puedes elevar ligeramente la pelvis para reducir el dolor lumbar).
Mantén esta posición todo el tiempo que puedas o durante el tiempo recomendado.
Variaciones: Plancha.

name: Double Kettlebell Split Snatch
instructions: 1) Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at arms length.
2) Swing the kettlebells through the legs and explosively push through your legs and hips to drive the kettlebells overhead, simultaneously splitting your stance so one foot is forward and one back.
3) Lower the kettlebells back down to shoulder height and return to the starting position.
4) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
5) Focus on explosive power and stability throughout the movement.

en: 1) Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand at arms length.
2) Swing the kettlebells through the legs and explosively push through your legs and hips to drive the kettlebells overhead, simultaneously splitting your stance so one foot is forward and one back.
3) Lower the kettlebells back down to shoulder height and return to the starting position.
4) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
5) Focus on explosive power and stability throughout the movement.
es: 1) Colócate con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros, sosteniendo una pesa rusa en cada mano con los brazos extendidos.

2) Balancee las kettlebells a través de las piernas y empújelas explosivamente a través de las piernas y las caderas para impulsar las kettlebells por encima de la cabeza, dividiendo simultáneamente su postura de modo que un pie esté hacia adelante y el otro hacia atrás.
3) Baja las kettlebells hasta la altura de los hombros y vuelve a la posición inicial.
4) Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones.
5) Centrarse en el poder explosivo y la estabilidad durante todo el movimiento.

name: Treadmill
instructions: Step on to the treadmill and make sure before you press anything, you are in the middle of the band with the safety clip attached to your top.
Next, select the desired settings. If possible, enter your statistics (age, sex, weight ect.) so you get more precise readings.
Continue until you have completed the prescribed amount of exercise.

es: Súbete a la cinta de correr y asegúrate, antes de presionar cualquier cosa, de estar en el medio de la banda con el clip de seguridad sujeto a tu parte superior.
A continuación, seleccione la configuración deseada. Si es posible, introduce tus estadísticas (edad, sexo, peso, etc.) para obtener lecturas más precisas.
Continúa hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de ejercicio.

name: Facepulls
instructions: 1) Stand facing a cable machine with a rope attachment set up at shoulder height.
2) Grab the ends of the rope with an overhand grip.
3) Step back slightly and position your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent.
4) Pull the rope towards your face, keeping elbows up high and spreading it apart as you pull.
5)  Squeeze your shoulder blades together.
6) Pause briefly at the peak contraction, then slowly return to the starting position.
7) Keep your core engaged and maintain a tall posture throughout the movement.
8) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
This exercise targets your rear deltoids and upper back muscles.

en: 1) Stand facing a cable machine with a rope attachment set up at shoulder height.
2) Grab the ends of the rope with an overhand grip.
3) Step back slightly and position your feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent.
4) Pull the rope towards your face, keeping elbows up high and spreading it apart as you pull.
5)  Squeeze your shoulder blades together.
6) Pause briefly at the peak contraction, then slowly return to the starting position.
7) Keep your core engaged and maintain a tall posture throughout the movement.
8) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
This exercise targets your rear deltoids and upper back muscles.
es: 1) Colócate frente a una máquina de polea con un accesorio de cuerda colocado a la altura de los hombros.
2) Agarre los extremos de la cuerda con un agarre por encima de la cabeza.
3) Retroceda un poco y coloca los pies separados a la altura de los hombros y las rodillas ligeramente flexionadas.
4) Tire de la cuerda hacia su cara, manteniendo los codos en alto y separándolos mientras tira.
5) Apriete los omóplatos.
6) Haz una breve pausa en el pico de contracción y luego vuelve lentamente a la posición inicial.
7) Mantén el core activo y mantén una postura erguida durante todo el movimiento.
8) Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones.
Este ejercicio trabaja los deltoides posteriores y los músculos de la parte superior de la espalda.

name: Cable Squats
instructions: 1) Stand facing a cable machine set up with a low pulley.
2) Grab onto the rope attachment and have feet just wider than shoulder width, toes slightly turned out.
3) Lower into a squat, keeping your back straight and chest up.
4) Pause briefly at the bottom, then push through your heels and squeeze the glutes to return to the starting position.
5) Focus on keeping tension on the cable throughout the movement.
6) Repeat for desired reps.
This exercise targets your legs and glutes while also engaging your core for stability.

en: 1) Stand facing a cable machine set up with a low pulley.
2) Grab onto the rope attachment and have feet just wider than shoulder width, toes slightly turned out.
3) Lower into a squat, keeping your back straight and chest up.
4) Pause briefly at the bottom, then push through your heels and squeeze the glutes to return to the starting position.
5) Focus on keeping tension on the cable throughout the movement.
6) Repeat for desired reps.
This exercise targets your legs and glutes while also engaging your core for stability.
es: 1) Colócate frente a una máquina de polea montada con una polea baja.
2) Agarre el accesorio de cuerda y tenga los pies un poco más anchos que el ancho de los hombros, con los dedos ligeramente hacia afuera.
3) Baja hasta ponerse en cuclillas, manteniendo la espalda recta y el pecho hacia arriba.
4) Haz una breve pausa en la parte inferior, luego empuje los talones y apriete los gluteos para volver a la posición inicial.
5) Concéntrate en mantener la tensión del cable durante todo el movimiento.
6) Repite para las repeticiones deseadas.
Este ejercicio trabaja las piernas y los gluteos y al mismo tiempo involucra el core para lograr estabilidad.

name: TRX Curtsy Squats
instructions: 1) Stand facing the TRX straps, holding the handles with your palms facing each other. Position your feet hip-width apart and lean back slightly to create tension in the straps. This will be your starting position.
2) Engage your core muscles to maintain stability and keep your back straight throughout the movement.
3) Shift your weight to one leg and lift the opposite leg off the ground, crossing it behind your standing leg.
4) Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, allowing the rear leg to cross further behind you. Keep your front knee aligned with your toes and ensure your back remains straight.
5) Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, feeling the stretch in your glutes and thighs.
Push through your front heel to return to the starting position, bringing your rear leg back to the centre.
6) Repeat the movement on the opposite side, alternating between each leg for the recommended number of repetitions.
This exercise helps improve lower body strength, stability, and coordination.

en: 1) Stand facing the TRX straps, holding the handles with your palms facing each other. Position your feet hip-width apart and lean back slightly to create tension in the straps. This will be your starting position.
2) Engage your core muscles to maintain stability and keep your back straight throughout the movement.
3) Shift your weight to one leg and lift the opposite leg off the ground, crossing it behind your standing leg.
4) Bend your knees and lower your hips into a squat position, allowing the rear leg to cross further behind you. Keep your front knee aligned with your toes and ensure your back remains straight.
5) Pause for a moment at the bottom of the movement, feeling the stretch in your glutes and thighs.
Push through your front heel to return to the starting position, bringing your rear leg back to the centre.
6) Repeat the movement on the opposite side, alternating between each leg for the recommended number of repetitions.
This exercise helps improve lower body strength, stability, and coordination.
es: 1) Colócate frente a las correas TRX, sosteniendo las manijas con las palmas una frente a la otra. Coloca los pies separados a la altura de las caderas e inclínate ligeramente hacia atrás para crear tensión en las correas. Esta será tu posición inicial.
2) Activa el core para mantener la estabilidad y mantén la espalda recta durante todo el movimiento.
3) Cambie su peso a una pierna y levanta la pierna opuesta del suelo, cruzándola detrás de la pierna de apoyo.

4) Doble las rodillas y baja las caderas hasta quedar en cuclillas, permitiendo que la pierna trasera se cruce más detrás de ti. Mantén la rodilla delantera alineada con los dedos de los pies y asegúrate de que la espalda permanezca recta.
5) Haz una pausa por un momento en la parte inferior del movimiento, sintiendo el estiramiento en los gluteos y muslos.
Empuja con el talón delantero para volver a la posición inicial, llevando la pierna trasera al centro.
6) Repite el movimiento en el lado opuesto, alternando entre cada pierna durante el número recomendado de repeticiones.
Este ejercicio ayuda a mejorar la fuerza, la estabilidad y la coordinación de la parte inferior del cuerpo.

name: Landmine V Bar Rows
instructions: 1) Stand with feet shoulder-width apart over a landmine facing away from the anchor point.
2) Hold onto a V bar attachment with a bent over position.
3) Keep your back straight, abs braced and chest up.
4) Pull the V-bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together and drawing your elbows towards your hips.
5) Slowly lower the V-bar back to the starting position.
6) Repeat for desired reps.
7) Focus on controlled movements and engage your back muscles throughout.
This exercise targets your upper back and biceps.

name.es: Remo landmine con barra en V

en: 1) Stand with feet shoulder-width apart over a landmine facing away from the anchor point.
2) Hold onto a V bar attachment with a bent over position.
3) Keep your back straight, abs braced and chest up.
4) Pull the V-bar towards your lower chest, squeezing your shoulder blades together and drawing your elbows towards your hips.
5) Slowly lower the V-bar back to the starting position.
6) Repeat for desired reps.
7) Focus on controlled movements and engage your back muscles throughout.
This exercise targets your upper back and biceps.
es: 1) Colócate con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros sobre una mina terrestre de espaldas al punto de anclaje.
2) Sujete un accesorio de barra en V con una posición inclinada.
3) Mantén la espalda recta, los abdominales firmes y el pecho erguido.
4) Tire de la barra en V hacia la parte inferior del pecho, juntando los omóplatos y llevando los codos hacia las caderas.
5) Baja lentamente la barra en V hasta la posición inicial.
6) Repite para las repeticiones deseadas.
7) Concéntrate en movimientos controlados y active los músculos de la espalda en todo momento.
Este ejercicio trabaja la parte superior de la espalda y los biceps.

aliases: Bent Over V Bar Rows - Landmine

name: Smith Machine Reverse Lunges
instructions: 1) Position yourself under the Smith machine bar with your feet hip-width apart. The bar should be resting comfortably across your upper back and shoulders, with your hands gripping it slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.

2) Step back with one foot and lower your body into a reverse lunge, bending both knees to approximately 90-degree angles. Your front knee should be aligned with your ankle, and your back knee should hover slightly above the floor.
3) Maintain an upright torso and engage your core muscles for stability throughout the movement. Keep your chest lifted and your shoulders back.
4) Push through the heel of your front foot to return to the starting position, bringing your back foot forward to meet the other foot.
5) Repeat the movement on the same side for the desired reps before switching to the other leg.

This exercise targets your quadriceps, hamstrings, glutes, and calves, as well as engaging your core for stability. It's a great way to strengthen your lower body and improve balance and coordination.

en: 1) Position yourself under the Smith machine bar with your feet hip-width apart. The bar should be resting comfortably across your upper back and shoulders, with your hands gripping it slightly wider than shoulder-width apart.

2) Step back with one foot and lower your body into a reverse lunge, bending both knees to approximately 90-degree angles. Your front knee should be aligned with your ankle, and your back knee should hover slightly above the floor.
3) Maintain an upright torso and engage your core muscles for stability throughout the movement. Keep your chest lifted and your shoulders back.
4) Push through the heel of your front foot to return to the starting position, bringing your back foot forward to meet the other foot.
5) Repeat the movement on the same side for the desired reps before switching to the other leg.

This exercise targets your quadriceps, hamstrings, glutes, and calves, as well as engaging your core for stability. It's a great way to strengthen your lower body and improve balance and coordination.
es: 1) Colócate debajo de la barra de la maquina Smith con los pies separados a la altura de las caderas. La barra debe descansar cómodamente sobre la parte superior de la espalda y los hombros, con las manos sujetándola un poco más separadas que el ancho de los hombros.

2) Da un paso atrás con un pie y baja el cuerpo en una estocada inversa, doblando ambas rodillas en ángulos de aproximadamente 90 grados. La rodilla delantera debe estar alineada con el tobillo y la rodilla trasera debe flotar ligeramente por encima del suelo.
3) Mantén el torso erguido y active los core para lograr estabilidad durante todo el movimiento. Mantén el pecho levantado y los hombros hacia atrás.
4) Empuje con el talón de su pie delantero para regresar a la posición inicial, llevando su pie trasero hacia adelante para encontrarse con el otro pie.
5) Repite el movimiento en el mismo lado durante las repeticiones deseadas antes de cambiar a la otra pierna.

Este ejercicio se enfoca en los cuadriceps, los isquiosurales, los gluteos y las gemelos, además de activar el core para lograr estabilidad. Es una excelente manera de fortalecer la parte inferior del cuerpo y mejorar el equilibrio y la coordinación.

name: Glute Press Machine
instructions: 1) Stand with one leg straight and the other against the foot pad of the glute machine with your knee bent.
2) Lean forward and grasp the handles or bars for stability.
3) Extend the leg straight back, squeezing your glutes at the top.
4) Pause briefly, then return to the starting position.
5) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions on each leg.
Focus on controlled movements and squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement.

en: 1) Stand with one leg straight and the other against the foot pad of the glute machine with your knee bent.
2) Lean forward and grasp the handles or bars for stability.
3) Extend the leg straight back, squeezing your glutes at the top.
4) Pause briefly, then return to the starting position.
5) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions on each leg.
Focus on controlled movements and squeezing your glutes at the top of the movement.
es: 1) Colócate con una pierna estirada y la otra contra la almohadilla para los pies de la maquina de gluteos con la rodilla doblada.
2) Inclínate hacia adelante y agarre las manijas o barras para lograr estabilidad.
3) Extiende la pierna hacia atrás, apretando los gluteos en la parte superior.
4) Haz una breve pausa y luego vuelve a la posición inicial.
5) Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones en cada pierna.
Concéntrate en los movimientos controlados y en apretar los gluteos en la parte superior del movimiento.

name: Hack Squat Wide Stance
instructions: 1) Stand on the Hack Squat machine with your back against the pad and your feet nice and wide.
2) Place your feet higher on the platform with toes pointed slightly outward.
3) Grasp the handles and release the safety bars.
4) Lower your body by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
5) Push through your heels to return to the starting position.
6) Focus on maintaining proper form and engaging your leg muscles throughout the movement.

en: 1) Stand on the Hack Squat machine with your back against the pad and your feet nice and wide.
2) Place your feet higher on the platform with toes pointed slightly outward.
3) Grasp the handles and release the safety bars.
4) Lower your body by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel to the ground.
5) Push through your heels to return to the starting position.
6) Focus on maintaining proper form and engaging your leg muscles throughout the movement.
es: 1) Colócate en la maquina Hack Squat con la espalda apoyada en la almohadilla y los pies bien abiertos.
2) Coloca los pies más arriba en la plataforma con los dedos apuntando ligeramente hacia afuera.
3) Agarre las manijas y suelte las barras de seguridad.
4) Baja el cuerpo doblando las rodillas hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al suelo.
5) Empuja con los talones para volver a la posición inicial.
6) Concéntrate en mantener la técnica correcta y en activar los músculos de las piernas durante todo el movimiento.

name: Lateral Raise Machine
instructions: 1) Sit on the lateral raise machine with your chest against the pad and feet flat on the ground.
2) Grasp the handles with a neutral grip and position your arms by your sides.
3) Exhale as you raise the handles out to the sides until your arms are parallel to the ground.
4) Pause briefly at the top, then inhale as you lower the handles back down to the starting position.
5) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, focusing on controlled movements and maintaining proper form throughout.
This exercise targets the deltoid muscles in your shoulders.

en: 1) Sit on the lateral raise machine with your chest against the pad and feet flat on the ground.
2) Grasp the handles with a neutral grip and position your arms by your sides.
3) Exhale as you raise the handles out to the sides until your arms are parallel to the ground.
4) Pause briefly at the top, then inhale as you lower the handles back down to the starting position.
5) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions, focusing on controlled movements and maintaining proper form throughout.
This exercise targets the deltoid muscles in your shoulders.
es: 1) Siéntate en la maquina de elevación lateral con el pecho contra la almohadilla y los pies apoyados en el suelo.
2) Sujete las manijas con un agarre neutral y coloca los brazos a los costados.
3) Exhala mientras levantas las manijas hacia los lados hasta que tus brazos queden paralelos al suelo.
4) Haz una breve pausa en la parte superior, luego inhala mientras baja las manijas hasta la posición inicial.
5) Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones, concentrándose en movimientos controlados y manteniendo la técnica correcta en todo momento.
Este ejercicio trabaja los músculos deltoides de los hombros.

name: Walking Incline
instructions: 1) Begin by standing on the treadmill with your feet shoulder-width apart and your body centered on the belt. Make sure the treadmill is set to a low speed to start.
2) Engage your core muscles to maintain stability as you start the treadmill and gradually increase the speed to a comfortable walking pace.
3) Once you've established a steady walking pace, increase the incline of the treadmill. Begin with a slight incline, and adjust as needed based on your fitness level and comfort.
4) As you walk, keep your posture upright with your shoulders relaxed and your arms swinging naturally by your sides. Avoid leaning too far forward or backward.
5) Focus on pushing through your heels with each step to engage your glutes and hamstrings. This will help to tone and strengthen your lower body muscles.
6) Continue walking on the inclined treadmill for the desired duration.
Incorporating incline walking into your treadmill routine can boost calorie burn, increase cardiovascular endurance, and target different muscle groups compared to walking on a flat surface.

en: 1) Begin by standing on the treadmill with your feet shoulder-width apart and your body centered on the belt. Make sure the treadmill is set to a low speed to start.
2) Engage your core muscles to maintain stability as you start the treadmill and gradually increase the speed to a comfortable walking pace.
3) Once you've established a steady walking pace, increase the incline of the treadmill. Begin with a slight incline, and adjust as needed based on your fitness level and comfort.
4) As you walk, keep your posture upright with your shoulders relaxed and your arms swinging naturally by your sides. Avoid leaning too far forward or backward.
5) Focus on pushing through your heels with each step to engage your glutes and hamstrings. This will help to tone and strengthen your lower body muscles.
6) Continue walking on the inclined treadmill for the desired duration.
Incorporating incline walking into your treadmill routine can boost calorie burn, increase cardiovascular endurance, and target different muscle groups compared to walking on a flat surface.
es: 1) Comienza parándose en la maquina para correr con los pies separados al ancho de los hombros y el cuerpo centrado en el cinturón. Asegúrate de que la maquina para correr esté configurada a baja velocidad para comenzar.
2) Activa el core para mantener la estabilidad mientras inicia la caminadora y aumente gradualmente la velocidad hasta alcanzar un ritmo cómodo para caminar.

3) Una vez que haya establecido un ritmo constante para caminar, aumente la inclinación de la cinta de correr. Comienza con una ligera inclinación y ajuste según sea necesario según su nivel de condición física y comodidad.
4) Mientras camina, mantén la postura erguida con los hombros relajados y los brazos balanceándose naturalmente a los costados. Evite inclinarse demasiado hacia adelante o hacia atrás.
5) Concéntrate en empujar los talones con cada paso para activar los gluteos y los isquiosurales. Esto ayudará a tonificar y fortalecer los músculos de la parte inferior del cuerpo.
6) Continúa caminando en la cinta de correr inclinada durante el tiempo deseado.

Incorporar caminar inclinado en su rutina en la cinta de correr puedes aumentar la quema de calorías, aumentar la resistencia cardiovascular y apuntar a diferentes grupos de músculos en comparación con caminar sobre una superficie plana.

name: Kettlebell Swings
instructions: 1) Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell with both hands in front of you.
2) Hinge at your hips and slightly bend your knees while keeping your back straight.
3) Swing the kettlebell between your legs, then explosively thrust your hips forward and squeeze your glutes to swing it up to chest level.
4) Control the descent and repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
5) Focus on using your hips to generate momentum and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise.

en: 1) Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell with both hands in front of you.
2) Hinge at your hips and slightly bend your knees while keeping your back straight.
3) Swing the kettlebell between your legs, then explosively thrust your hips forward and squeeze your glutes to swing it up to chest level.
4) Control the descent and repeat the movement for the desired number of repetitions.
5) Focus on using your hips to generate momentum and keep your core engaged throughout the exercise.
es: 1) Colócate con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros y sostenga una pesa rusa con ambas manos frente a ti.
2) Doble las caderas y doble ligeramente las rodillas mientras mantiene la espalda recta.
3) Balancee la pesa rusa entre las piernas, luego empuje explosivamente las caderas hacia adelante y apriete sus gluteos para balancearla hasta el nivel del pecho.
4) Controlar el descenso y repetir el movimiento el número de repeticiones deseado.
5) Concéntrate en usar tus caderas para generar impulso y mantener tu core comprometido durante todo el ejercicio.

name: Cable Front Squats
instructions: 1) Stand facing a cable machine with a small bar attachment on a low pulley.
2) Grab the handle with an overhand grip, palms facing the ceiling in a clean positions and step back to create tension in the cable.
3) Keep the bar close to the chest and elbows lifted.
4) Position your feet shoulder-width apart with toes slightly turned out.
5) Lower into a squat, keeping your chest up and knees tracking over your toes.
6) Pause briefly at the bottom, then push through your heels and squeeze the glutes to return to the starting position.
7) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
8) Focus on maintaining proper form and control throughout the exercise.
Cable front squats target your quads, glutes, and core muscles.

en: 1) Stand facing a cable machine with a small bar attachment on a low pulley.
2) Grab the handle with an overhand grip, palms facing the ceiling in a clean positions and step back to create tension in the cable.
3) Keep the bar close to the chest and elbows lifted.
4) Position your feet shoulder-width apart with toes slightly turned out.
5) Lower into a squat, keeping your chest up and knees tracking over your toes.
6) Pause briefly at the bottom, then push through your heels and squeeze the glutes to return to the starting position.
7) Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
8) Focus on maintaining proper form and control throughout the exercise.
Cable front squats target your quads, glutes, and core muscles.
es: 1) Colócate frente a una máquina de polea con un pequeño accesorio de barra en una polea baja.
2) Agarre el mango con un agarre por encima de la cabeza, con las palmas hacia el techo en posiciones limpias y retroceda para crear tensión en el cable.
3) Mantén la barra cerca del pecho y los codos levantados.
4) Coloca los pies separados a la altura de los hombros y con los dedos ligeramente hacia afuera.
5) Baja hasta ponerse en cuclillas, manteniendo el pecho erguido y las rodillas sobre los dedos de los pies.
6) Haz una breve pausa en la parte inferior, luego empuje los talones y apriete los gluteos para volver a la posición inicial.
7) Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones.
8) Concéntrate en mantener la forma y el control adecuados durante todo el ejercicio.
Las sentadillas frontales con cable apuntan a los cuadriceps, los gluteos y los core.

name: alternating barbell curtsy squats
instructions: 1) Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a barbell across your shoulders.
2) Step one foot diagonally behind and across the opposite leg, bending both knees into a curtsy position.
3) Push through your front heel to return to standing, then alternate sides.
4) Keep your chest up and core engaged throughout.
5) Repeat for desired repetitions. This exercise targets your glutes and legs.

name.es: Sentadillas de reverencia alternas con barra

en: 1) Stand with your feet hip-width apart, holding a barbell across your shoulders.
2) Step one foot diagonally behind and across the opposite leg, bending both knees into a curtsy position.
3) Push through your front heel to return to standing, then alternate sides.
4) Keep your chest up and core engaged throughout.
5) Repeat for desired repetitions. This exercise targets your glutes and legs.
es: 1) Colócate con los pies separados a la altura de las caderas y sostenga una barra sobre los hombros.
2) Pase un pie en diagonal detrás y a través de la pierna opuesta, doblando ambas rodillas en posición de reverencia.
3) Empuje con el talón delantero para volver a ponerse de pie, luego alterne los lados.
4) Mantén el pecho erguido y el core activo en todo momento.
5) Repite para las repeticiones deseadas. Este ejercicio trabaja tus gluteos y piernas.

name: Barbell Squats (Low Bar)
instructions: 1) Position a barbell across your upper back, resting it below your neck on your traps.
2) Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointed slightly outward.
3) Brace your core and squat down by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight.
4) Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
5) Keep your chest up and back straight throughout the movement.
6) Repeat for desired reps, focusing on proper form and control.

en: 1) Position a barbell across your upper back, resting it below your neck on your traps.
2) Stand with your feet shoulder-width apart, toes pointed slightly outward.
3) Brace your core and squat down by bending your knees and hips, keeping your back straight.
4) Lower until your thighs are parallel to the ground, then push through your heels to return to the starting position.
5) Keep your chest up and back straight throughout the movement.
6) Repeat for desired reps, focusing on proper form and control.
es: 1) Coloca una barra en la parte superior de la espalda, apoyándola debajo del cuello sobre los trapecios.
2) Colócate con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros y los dedos apuntando ligeramente hacia afuera.
3) Apoye su core y agáchese doblando las rodillas y las caderas, manteniendo la espalda recta.
4) Baja hasta que sus muslos queden paralelos al suelo, luego empuje con los talones para volver a la posición inicial.
5) Mantén el pecho erguido y la espalda recta durante todo el movimiento.
6) Repite para las repeticiones deseadas, concentrándose en la forma y el control adecuados.

name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlifts
instructions: 1) Stand with feet hip-width apart, holding dumbbells in front of thighs.
2) Hinge at hips with a slight bend in the knees, keeping back straight, and lower dumbbells towards shins.
3) Pause when you feel a stretch in hamstrings, then drive through the heels and return to standing position squeezing the glutes.
4) Keep core engaged throughout.
This exercise targets hamstrings and lower back.

en: 1) Stand with feet hip-width apart, holding dumbbells in front of thighs.
2) Hinge at hips with a slight bend in the knees, keeping back straight, and lower dumbbells towards shins.
3) Pause when you feel a stretch in hamstrings, then drive through the heels and return to standing position squeezing the glutes.
4) Keep core engaged throughout.
This exercise targets hamstrings and lower back.
es: 1) Colócate con los pies separados a la altura de las caderas, sosteniendo las mancuernas frente a los muslos.
2) Gire las caderas con una ligera flexión de las rodillas, mantén la espalda recta y baja las mancuernas hacia las espinillas.
3) Haz una pausa cuando sienta un estiramiento en los isquiosurales, luego impulse los talones y vuelve a la posición de pie apretando los gluteos.
4) Mantén el core comprometido en todo momento.
Este ejercicio trabaja los isquiosurales y la espalda baja.

sourceClip.title: How to do a Dumbbell RDL / Romanian Deadlift

name: Chest Supported Alternating Dumbbell Front Raises
instructions: 1) Lie face down on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, arms hanging straight down with an overhand grip.
2) Keeping your chest pressed against the bench, lift one dumbbell up to shoulder level while maintaining a slight bend in your elbow.
3) Lower the dumbbell back down and repeat on the opposite side.
4) Alternate between each arm for the desired number of repetitions.
5) Focus on controlled movements and engage your shoulder muscles throughout.
This exercise targets your front deltoids.

name.en: Chest Supported Alternating Dumbbell Front Raises
name.es: Elevaciones frontales alternas con mancuernas y apoyo en el pecho

en: 1) Lie face down on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand, arms hanging straight down with an overhand grip.
2) Keeping your chest pressed against the bench, lift one dumbbell up to shoulder level while maintaining a slight bend in your elbow.
3) Lower the dumbbell back down and repeat on the opposite side.
4) Alternate between each arm for the desired number of repetitions.
5) Focus on controlled movements and engage your shoulder muscles throughout.
This exercise targets your front deltoids.
es: 1) Túmbate boca abajo en un banco inclinado con una mancuerna en cada mano y los brazos colgando hacia abajo con un agarre por encima de la cabeza.
2) Manteniendo el pecho presionado contra el banco, levanta una mancuerna hasta el nivel del hombro mientras mantiene una ligera flexión del codo.
3) Baja la mancuerna hacia abajo y repite en el lado opuesto.
4) Alterne entre cada brazo para obtener el número deseado de repeticiones.
5) Concéntrate en movimientos controlados y active los músculos de los hombros en todo momento.
Este ejercicio trabaja los deltoides frontales.

aliases: Chest Supported Alternating Dumbbell Front Raises

name: Dumbbell Concentration Curls Hammer
instructions: 1) Place one arm against an incline bench with a dumbbell in hand, elbow resting on the bench and palm facing inward.
2) Keep your back straight and core engaged.
3) Curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary squeezing the bicep.
4) Pause briefly at the top, then lower the dumbbell back down.
5) Repeat for required repetitions and then swap arms.
6) Focus on controlled movements and avoid swinging the weight.
This exercise targets your biceps.

name.es: Curl de concentracion martillo con mancuerna

en: 1) Place one arm against an incline bench with a dumbbell in hand, elbow resting on the bench and palm facing inward.
2) Keep your back straight and core engaged.
3) Curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder while keeping your upper arm stationary squeezing the bicep.
4) Pause briefly at the top, then lower the dumbbell back down.
5) Repeat for required repetitions and then swap arms.
6) Focus on controlled movements and avoid swinging the weight.
This exercise targets your biceps.
es: 1) Coloca un brazo contra un banco inclinado con una mancuerna en la mano, el codo apoyado en el banco y la palma hacia adentro.
2) Mantén la espalda recta y el core comprometido.
3) Doble la mancuerna hacia su hombro mientras mantiene la parte superior del brazo inmóvil apretando el biceps.
4) Haz una breve pausa en la parte superior y luego baja la mancuerna nuevamente.
5) Repite las repeticiones necesarias y luego intercambie brazos.
6) Concéntrate en movimientos controlados y evita balancear el peso.
Este ejercicio trabaja tus biceps.

name: Press Ups
instructions: To start this exercise kneel down on the floor, and lean forward so that you are now weight baring on your arms. Have your hands placed just outside of where your chest would be. Now you should come up onto your feet so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be your hands and feet. Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.

Whilst inhaling, slowly lower your chest towards the ground whist flaring your elbows out wide. When you are about an inch or so from the ground, you should have created a triangle with your hand positions and your eye line.

Pause for a brief movement, exhale and press through your palms to return your body along the same path to the starting position. Tip: Squeeze your pectoral muscles as you do so and when you get to the top of the movement, do not lock your elbows out.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Press or Dumbbell Chest Press.

Variations: Bench Press or Dumbbell Chest Press.
es: Para comenzar este ejercicio, arrodíllate en el suelo e inclínate hacia adelante de modo que ahora quedes con el peso al descubierto en tus brazos. Coloca las manos justo afuera de donde estaría el pecho. Ahora debes ponerte de pie de manera que tu cuerpo quede suspendido sobre el suelo, los únicos puntos de contacto (con el suelo) deben ser tus manos y pies. Su cuerpo debe estar en línea recta desde la cabeza hasta los pies y los brazos perpendiculares al suelo debajo de el pecho. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras inhala, baja lentamente el pecho hacia el suelo mientras abre los codos. Cuando esté aproximadamente a una pulgada del suelo, debería haber creado un triángulo con las posiciones de las manos y la línea de sus ojos.

Haz una pausa para un breve movimiento, exhala y presione con las palmas para que el cuerpo vuelve por el mismo camino a la posición inicial. Consejo: apriete los músculos pectorales mientras lo hace y cuando llegue a la cima del movimiento, no bloquee los codos.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca o Press de pecho con mancuernas.

name: Seated Hammer Curls
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and take a seat on a bench which is just off vertical (70-80 degrees), and allow your arms to hang by your sides, perpendicular to the floor.
The palms of your hands should be facing each other. This will be your starting position. Tip: Throughout this movement your elbows should stay pinned to the sides of your torso.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl both the dumbbells upward, contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps. (Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back along the same path, down to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Hammer Curls or Cable Curls.

en: Grab two dumbbells and take a seat on a bench which is just off vertical (70-80 degrees), and allow your arms to hang by your sides, perpendicular to the floor.
The palms of your hands should be facing each other. This will be your starting position. Tip: Throughout this movement your elbows should stay pinned to the sides of your torso.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl both the dumbbells upward, contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps. (Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back along the same path, down to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Hammer Curls or Cable Curls.
es: Toma dos mancuernas y siéntate en un banco que esté justo fuera de la vertical (70-80 grados) y deje que los brazos cuelguen a los lados, perpendiculares al piso.
Las palmas de tus manos deben estar enfrentadas. Esta será tu posición inicial. Consejo: durante todo este movimiento, los codos deben permanecer inmovilizados a los lados del torso.

Mientras mantienes inmóvil la parte superior del brazo, exhala mientras flexionas ambas mancuernas hacia arriba, contrayendo los biceps. Continúa el movimiento hasta que tus biceps estén completamente contraídos y las mancuernas a la altura de los hombros. Mantén la posición contraída por un segundo mientras aprietas los biceps. (Consejo: sólo deben moverse los antebrazos).
Inhala mientras comienzas a llevar lentamente las mancuernas por el mismo camino, hasta la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl de martillo sentado o Curl de cable.

name: Standing Hammer Curls
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and adopt a shoulder width, upright standing position with your back straight and arms by your side.
The palms of your hands should be facing your torso. This will be your starting position.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl both dumbbells upward, contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the dumbbells are at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps. (Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to bring the dumbbells back along the same path, down to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Hammer Curls or Cable Curls.

en: Grab two dumbbells and adopt a shoulder width, upright standing position with your back straight and arms by your side.
The palms of your hands should be facing your torso. This will be your starting position.

es: Agarre dos mancuernas y adopte una posición erguida a la altura de los hombros, con la espalda recta y los brazos a los lados.
Las palmas de tus manos deben mirar hacia tu torso. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantienes inmóvil la parte superior del brazo, exhala mientras flexionas ambas mancuernas hacia arriba, contrayendo los biceps. Continúa el movimiento hasta que tus biceps estén completamente contraídos y las mancuernas a la altura de los hombros. Mantén la posición contraída por un segundo mientras aprietas los biceps. (Consejo: sólo deben moverse los antebrazos).
Inhala mientras comienzas a llevar lentamente las mancuernas por el mismo camino, hasta la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl de martillo sentado o Curl de cable.

name: Kettlebell Jump Squats
instructions: Grab two kettlebells and stand with a shoulder width stance, toes pointing slightly outward (palms facing the side of your legs).
Throughout the movement you should keep your head up and maintain a stright back. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and descend slowly by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, exhale and push hard through your heels to drive your hips forward. Extend at your knee and ankle joints in order to jump as high as you can before landing into your next rep.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always be aware of your posture with this exercise as if performed incorrectly, could cause injury.
Variations: Dumbbell Jump Squats or Barbell Jump Squats.

name.es: Sentadillas con salto con pesa rusa

en: Grab two kettlebells and stand with a shoulder width stance, toes pointing slightly outward (palms facing the side of your legs).
Throughout the movement you should keep your head up and maintain a stright back. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and descend slowly by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, exhale and push hard through your heels to drive your hips forward. Extend at your knee and ankle joints in order to jump as high as you can before landing into your next rep.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always be aware of your posture with this exercise as if performed incorrectly, could cause injury.
Variations: Dumbbell Jump Squats or Barbell Jump Squats.
es: Toma dos kettlebells y colócate con una postura a la altura de los hombros, con los dedos de los pies apuntando ligeramente hacia afuera (con las palmas hacia los costados de las piernas).
Durante todo el movimiento debes mantener la cabeza erguida y la espalda erguida. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inhala y desciende lentamente doblando las rodillas hasta que tus muslos queden paralelos al suelo. Mantén la espalda recta para que su postura no se vea comprometida. Consejo: cuando estés en la parte inferior del movimiento, tus rodillas deben estar detrás de los dedos de los pies.

Una vez que hayas llegado al final del movimiento, exhala y empuja con fuerza los talones para impulsar las caderas hacia adelante. Extiende las articulaciones de la rodilla y el tobillo para saltar lo más alto que puedas antes de aterrizar en tu siguiente repetición.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: Esté siempre consciente de su postura al realizar este ejercicio, ya que, si se realiza incorrectamente, podría causar lesiones.
Variaciones: sentadillas con salto con mancuernas o sentadillas con salto con barra.

name: Dumbbell Jump Squats
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and stand with a shoulder width stance, toes pointing slightly outward (palms facing the side of your legs).
Throughout the movement you should keep your head up and maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and descend slowly by bending your knees until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Variations: Kettlebell Jump Squats or Barbell Jump Squats.

name: Single Arm Clean & Press (Dumbbell)
instructions: Grab a dumbbell and adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance. Bend at your knees and hips (more so with your hips than knees), maintaining a straight back and allowing your arm (with which you are holding the dumbbell) to hang perpendicular to the floor between your knees. Your chest, shoulders and head should be facing forward at this point. This will be your starting position.

Your first movement will be to drive through your heels and quads in order to start elevating the dumbbell, exhale as you do so. Your back should remain straight and your arm should still be perpendicular to the floor at this point.

Next comes the acceleration from your pelvis, you need to drive your pelvis forward when the dumbbell gets to the middle of your thighs. This coupled with the extension through your knee and ankle joints, will propel the dumbbell upward.
Once you have thrusted your hips forward, it is time to shrug as hard as you can in order to lift the dumbbell further. Flare your elbow up and outward until your body is at full extension.
When at full extension, aggressively squat under the dumbbell and rotate your elbow under and in so that you can take the load on your front deltoids (shoulders).
Drive upward until you are in a standing position, inhale at this point.

Once you are in a standing position, exhale and bend at your knees to generate power to press the dumbbell above your head until your elbow is locked out. Tip: Maintaining a straight back throughout is paramount.
Inhale and descend the dumbbell back into the starting position by reversing this movement, making sure to keep the dumbbell close to your body throughout and maintaining good posture.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap arms.
Variation: Barbell Clean & Press or Barbell Cleans.

name.es: Limpieza y press con un solo brazo (con mancuernas)

en: Grab a dumbbell and adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance. Bend at your knees and hips (more so with your hips than knees), maintaining a straight back and allowing your arm (with which you are holding the dumbbell) to hang perpendicular to the floor between your knees. Your chest, shoulders and head should be facing forward at this point. This will be your starting position.

Your first movement will be to drive through your heels and quads in order to start elevating the dumbbell, exhale as you do so. Your back should remain straight and your arm should still be perpendicular to the floor at this point.

Next comes the acceleration from your pelvis, you need to drive your pelvis forward when the dumbbell gets to the middle of your thighs. This coupled with the extension through your knee and ankle joints, will propel the dumbbell upward.
Once you have thrusted your hips forward, it is time to shrug as hard as you can in order to lift the dumbbell further. Flare your elbow up and outward until your body is at full extension.
When at full extension, aggressively squat under the dumbbell and rotate your elbow under and in so that you can take the load on your front deltoids (shoulders).
Drive upward until you are in a standing position, inhale at this point.

Once you are in a standing position, exhale and bend at your knees to generate power to press the dumbbell above your head until your elbow is locked out. Tip: Maintaining a straight back throughout is paramount.
Inhale and descend the dumbbell back into the starting position by reversing this movement, making sure to keep the dumbbell close to your body throughout and maintaining good posture.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap arms.
Variation: Barbell Clean & Press or Barbell Cleans.
es: Coge una mancuerna y adopta una postura ligeramente más ancha que el ancho de los hombros. Doble las rodillas y las caderas (más las caderas que las rodillas), manteniendo la espalda recta y permitiendo que el brazo (con el que sostiene la mancuerna) cuelgue perpendicular al suelo entre las rodillas. En este punto, tu pecho, hombros y cabeza deben mirar hacia adelante. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Tu primer movimiento será impulsar los talones y los cuadriceps para comenzar a elevar la mancuerna, exhala mientras lo haces. Tu espalda debe permanecer recta y tu brazo aún debe estar perpendicular al suelo en este punto.

Luego viene la aceleración de la pelvis, debes impulsar la pelvis hacia adelante cuando la mancuerna llegue a la mitad de los muslos. Esto, junto con la extensión a través de las articulaciones de la rodilla y el tobillo, impulsará la mancuerna hacia arriba.

Una vez que hayas empujado las caderas hacia adelante, es momento de encogerte de hombros lo más fuerte que puedas para poder levantar más la mancuerna. Ensancha el codo hacia arriba y hacia afuera hasta que tu cuerpo esté completamente extendido.
Cuando esté en extensión completa, agáchese agresivamente debajo de la mancuerna y gire el codo hacia abajo y hacia adentro para que puedas soportar la carga sobre los deltoides frontales (hombros).
Conduce hacia arriba hasta que estés en posición de pie, inhala en este punto.

Una vez que esté de pie, exhala y doble las rodillas para generar energía para presionar la mancuerna sobre la cabeza hasta que su codo esté bloqueado. Consejo: Mantener la espalda recta en todo momento es primordial.
Inhala y descienda la mancuerna nuevamente a la posición inicial invirtiendo este movimiento, asegurándose de mantener la mancuerna cerca de el cuerpo en todo momento y manteniendo una buena postura.
Repite la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones y cambie de brazo.
Variación: Barbell Clean & Press o Barbell Cleans.

aliases: Single Arm Dumbbell Clean And Press

name: Dumbbell 21's
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and take a neutral grip (palms facing each other). Curl the dumbbells up half way so your elbows are at 90 degrees, adopt a standing position with a shoulder width stance and a straight back. Keep your elbows pinned in close to your torso for the duration of the exercise. Tip: Only your forearms should move and your torso remain rigid. If you are struggling with balance, split your stance so you have one foot in front of the other. This will be your starting position.

This exercise is split up into 3 different elements. The bottom half, top half and a full range bicep curl. Firstly, using your biceps, lower the dumbbells down until your arms are straight (Inhale as you go). Once your arms are straight, use your biceps once more to curl the dumbbells back along the same path into their starting position, exhaling as you do so.

Once you have completed 7 repetitions, curl the dumbbells up (from half way) towards your shoulders. Exhale as you lift the dumbbells and continue until your biceps are squeezed tightly and you cannot elevate your forearms anymore without bringing your elbows away from your body. Once you have reached this point, return the dumbbells along the same path to their starting position whilst inhaling.

Once you have completed 7 repetitions, perform 7 full curls. Inhale as you lower the dumbbells towards your thighs so your arms are hanging perpendicular to the floor. Exhale and use your biceps to curl the dumbbells up towards your shoulders. Once your biceps are fully contracted, inhale and lower the dumbbells back along the same path into their starting position.
Variations: Cable 21's or EZ Bar 21's.

Curl the dumbbells up half way so your elbows are at 90 degrees, adopt a standing position with a shoulder width stance and a straight back. Keep your elbows pinned in close to your torso for the duration of the exercise. Tip: Only your forearms should move and your torso remain rigid. If you are struggling with balance, split your stance so you have one foot in front of the other. This will be your starting position.

es: Coge dos mancuernas y haz un agarre neutral (con las palmas una frente a la otra). Doble las mancuernas hasta la mitad para que los codos queden a 90 grados, adopte una posición de pie con una postura a la altura de los hombros y la espalda recta. Mantén los codos inmovilizados cerca del torso durante todo el ejercicio. Consejo: Sólo deben moverse tus antebrazos y tu torso permanecer rígido. Si tiene dificultades con el equilibrio, divida su postura para tener un pie delante del otro. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Este ejercicio se divide en 3 elementos diferentes. La mitad inferior, la mitad superior y una flexión de biceps de rango completo. En primer lugar, usando tus biceps, baja las mancuernas hasta que tus brazos estén rectos (inhala mientras avanzas). Una vez que tus brazos estén rectos, usa tus biceps una vez más para doblar las mancuernas hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial, exhalando mientras lo haces.

Una vez que hayas completado 7 repeticiones, flexiona las mancuernas hacia arriba (desde la mitad) hacia tus hombros. Exhala mientras levantas las mancuernas y continúa hasta que tus biceps estén fuertemente apretados y ya no puedas elevar los antebrazos sin alejar los codos del cuerpo. Una vez llegado a este punto, regresa las mancuernas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial mientras inhalas.

Una vez que hayas completado 7 repeticiones, realiza 7 flexiones completas. Inhala mientras baja las mancuernas hacia los muslos para que los brazos cuelguen perpendiculares al suelo. Exhala y usa tus biceps para doblar las mancuernas hacia tus hombros. Una vez que sus biceps estén completamente contraídos, inhala y baja las mancuernas por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Variaciones: Cable 21 o EZ Bar 21.

name: Cable 21s
instructions: Attach a straight bar to the low pulley and take an underhand (supinated) grip about shoulder-width apart; stand facing the machine with feet hip- to shoulder-width, knees slightly bent and torso upright. Let your arms hang straight down and keep your elbows pinned to your sides — only your forearms should move.

The 21s set is three consecutive segments of 7 reps each: the lower half, the upper half, then full-range. First, perform 7 lower-half reps: from full arm extension curl the bar up only to the halfway point (approximately elbows at 90°), exhaling on the concentric, then lower back to full extension.
Next, perform 7 upper-half reps: start at the halfway position (elbows ~90°) and curl to full contraction (shoulders), exhaling as you curl, then lower back to the halfway point for each rep.

Finally, perform 7 full-range curls: from full extension curl through the entire range to full contraction, pausing briefly at the top to squeeze the biceps before lowering under control. Keep elbows fixed at your sides and avoid using torso swing—use a split stance if you need extra balance.

Coaching tips/variations: choose a load that allows strict form for all 21 reps; alternatives include using a straight bar on a low pulley, an EZ bar, or performing 21s with dumbbells (seated or standing single-arm).

Finally, perform 7 full-range curls: from full extension curl through the entire range to full contraction, pausing briefly at the top to squeeze the biceps before lowering under control. Keep elbows fixed at your sides and avoid using torso swing—use a split stance if you need extra balance.

Coaching tips/variations: choose a load that allows strict form for all 21 reps; alternatives include using a straight bar on a low pulley, an EZ bar, or performing 21s with dumbbells (seated or standing single-arm).
es: Coloca una barra recta en la polea baja y sujétala con agarre supinado (palmas hacia arriba) a la anchura de los hombros; ponte frente a la máquina con los pies a la anchura de las caderas o los hombros, rodillas ligeramente flexionadas y torso erguido. Deja los brazos colgando y mantén los codos pegados al costado: sólo deben moverse los antebrazos.

La serie de 21 se compone de tres segmentos consecutivos de 7 repeticiones: la mitad inferior, la mitad superior y el rango completo. Primero realiza 7 repeticiones de la mitad inferior: desde los brazos totalmente extendidos, eleva la barra sólo hasta la mitad (aprox. codos a 90°), exhalando al subir, y baja de nuevo hasta la extensión completa.

A continuación realiza 7 repeticiones de la mitad superior: comienza en la posición de la mitad (codos ~90°) y sube hasta la contracción completa (hombros), exhalando en la fase concéntrica; baja de nuevo sólo hasta la mitad en cada repetición.

Por último, realiza 7 repeticiones en todo el recorrido: desde la extensión completa sube hasta la contracción máxima, haciendo una breve pausa y apretando el bíceps en la parte alta antes de bajar controladamente. Mantén los codos inmóviles junto al torso y evita el balanceo del cuerpo; adopta una postura partida si necesitas más estabilidad.

Consejos/variaciones: elige una carga que permita técnica estricta durante las 21 repeticiones; puedes usar barra recta en polea, barra EZ o hacer 21s con mancuernas (sentado o de pie, un brazo a la vez).

name: EZ Bar 21's
instructions: Grab an EZ curl bar with a narrow, underhand grip (palms facing forward). Allow your arms the hang perpendicular to the floor and adopt a standing position with a shoulder width stance and a straight back. Keep your elbows pinned in close to your torso for the duration of the exercise. Tip: Only your forearms should move and your torso remain rigid. If you are struggling with balance, split your stance so you have one foot in front of the other. This will be your starting position.

This exercise is split up into 3 different elements. The bottom half, top half and a full range bicep curl. Firstly, whilst keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the bar upward towards your shoulders by flexing your biceps (exhale as you do so). Once you are at your shoulders perform the top half of the movement. In order to do so, lower the bar whilst inhaling but stop once your elbows are at 90 degrees. Exhale and curl the bar back along the same path to the starting position (shoulders).

After 7 repetitions, Lower the bar down towards your thighs until your arms are straight (inhale as you do so). Now, exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders but stop once you get half way. Return the bar along the same path back to the starting position as you inhale.

After 7 repetitions, perform 7 full range movements. In order to do so, curl the bar up to your shoulders on an arced path, keeping your elbows pinned to your torso, exhaling as you go. Once you have paused for a brief moment and squeezed your biceps, return the bar along the same path back into the starting position.
Variations: Dumbbell 21's or Cable 21's.

Once you have paused for a brief moment and squeezed your biceps, return the bar along the same path back into the starting position.
Variations: Dumbbell 21's or Cable 21's.
es: Agarre una barra de curl EZ con un agarre estrecho y por debajo (con las palmas hacia adelante). Deje que los brazos cuelguen perpendiculares al piso y adopte una posición de pie con una postura a la altura de los hombros y la espalda recta. Mantén los codos inmovilizados cerca del torso durante todo el ejercicio. Consejo: Sólo deben moverse tus antebrazos y tu torso permanecer rígido. Si tiene dificultades con el equilibrio, divida su postura para tener un pie delante del otro. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Este ejercicio se divide en 3 elementos diferentes. La mitad inferior, la mitad superior y una flexión de biceps de rango completo. En primer lugar, mientras mantiene la parte superior de los brazos inmóviles, doble la barra hacia los hombros flexionando los biceps (exhala mientras lo hace). Una vez que estés sobre tus hombros, realiza la mitad superior del movimiento. Para hacerlo, baja la barra mientras inhala, pero deténgase una vez que los codos estén a 90 grados. Exhala y flexiona la barra hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial (hombros).

Después de 7 repeticiones, baja la barra hacia tus muslos hasta que tus brazos estén rectos (inhala mientras lo haces). Ahora, exhala y dobla la barra hacia tus hombros, pero detente una vez que llegues a la mitad. Vuelve la barra por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial mientras inhala.

Después de 7 repeticiones, realiza 7 movimientos de rango completo. Para hacerlo, doble la barra hasta los hombros formando un arco, manteniendo los codos pegados al torso y exhalando a medida que avanza. Una vez que hayas hecho una breve pausa y hayas apretado los biceps, regresa la barra por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Variaciones: Mancuerna 21's o Cable 21's.

name: Barbell 21's
instructions: Grab a barbell with a shoulder width, underhand grip (palms facing forward). Allow your arms the hang perpendicular to the floor and adopt a standing position with a shoulder width stance and a straight back. Keep your elbows pinned in close to your torso for the duration of the exercise. Tip: Only your forearms should move and your torso remain rigid. If you are struggling with balance, split your stance so you have one foot in front of the other. This will be your starting position.

This exercise is split up into 3 different elements. The bottom half, top half and a full range bicep curl. Firstly, whilst keeping your upper arms stationary, curl the bar upward towards your shoulders by flexing your biceps (exhale as you do so). Once you are at your shoulders perform the top half of the movement. In order to do so, lower the bar whilst inhaling but stop once your elbows are at 90 degrees. Exhale and curl the bar back along the same path to the starting position (shoulders).

After 7 repetitions, Lower the bar down towards your thighs until your arms are straight (inhale as you do so). Now, exhale and curl the bar up towards your shoulders but stop once you get half way. Return the bar along the same path back to the starting position as you inhale.

After 7 repetitions, perform 7 full range movements. In order to do so, curl the bar up to your shoulders on an arced path, keeping your elbows pinned to your torso, exhaling as you go. Once you have paused for a brief moment and squeezed your biceps, return the bar along the same path back into the starting position.
Variations: Dumbbell 21's or Cable 21's.
