Take a step forward (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
As you exhale, push off the floor with your rear foot to return your body into a standing position.
Alternate legs as you go (as you walk forwards) and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bodyweight Walking Lunges or Barbell Walking Lunges.

en: Whilst in a standing position, grab two dumbbells and keep your arms by your sides. This will be your starting position.

Take a step forward (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
As you exhale, push off the floor with your rear foot to return your body into a standing position.
Alternate legs as you go (as you walk forwards) and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bodyweight Walking Lunges or Barbell Walking Lunges.
es: Mientras estás de pie, toma dos mancuernas y mantén los brazos a los lados. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Da un paso hacia adelante (un poco más grande que un paso normal) y, cuando aterrices, deja caer el cuerpo para crear dos ángulos rectos en las rodillas. Inhala mientras lo haces manteniendo el torso recto.
Asegúrate de mantener la rodilla delantera sobre el talón y no sobre los dedos de los pies. Tu espinilla delantera ahora debería estar perpendicular al suelo.
Mientras exhala, empuje el suelo con el pie trasero para que el cuerpo vuelve a la posición de pie.
Alterne las piernas a medida que avanza (mientras camina hacia adelante) y repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: zancadas caminando con peso corporal o zancadas caminando con barra.

name: TRX Split Squats
instructions: Suspend your straps so the handles are 18-30 inches from the floor.
Facing away from the setup, place your rear foot into the handle behind you. Keep your head looking forward and your chest up, with your knee slightly bent. This will be your starting position.
Descend by flexing the knee and hips, lowering yourself to the ground. Keep your weight on the heel of your foot and maintain your posture throughout the exercise.
At the bottom of the movement, reverse the motion, extending through the hip and knee to return to the starting position.

en: Suspend your straps so the handles are 18-30 inches from the floor.
Facing away from the setup, place your rear foot into the handle behind you. Keep your head looking forward and your chest up, with your knee slightly bent. This will be your starting position.
Descend by flexing the knee and hips, lowering yourself to the ground. Keep your weight on the heel of your foot and maintain your posture throughout the exercise.
At the bottom of the movement, reverse the motion, extending through the hip and knee to return to the starting position.
es: Suspenda las correas de modo que las manijas queden a entre 18 y 30 pulgadas del piso.

De espaldas a la configuración, coloca el pie trasero en el mango detrás de ti. Mantén la cabeza mirando hacia adelante y el pecho hacia arriba, con la rodilla ligeramente flexionada. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Desciende flexionando la rodilla y la cadera, descendiendo hasta el suelo. Mantén tu peso sobre el talón del pie y mantén tu postura durante todo el ejercicio.
En la parte inferior del movimiento, invierta el movimiento, extendiéndose a través de la cadera y la rodilla para volver a la posición inicial.

name: TRX Rows
instructions: Suspend your straps at around chest height. Take a handle in each hand and lean back. Keep your body erect and your head and chest up. Your arms should be fully extended. This will be your starting position.
Begin by flexing the elbow to initiate the movement. Protract your shoulder blades as you do so.
At the completion of the motion pause, and then return to the starting position.

en: Suspend your straps at around chest height. Take a handle in each hand and lean back. Keep your body erect and your head and chest up. Your arms should be fully extended. This will be your starting position.
Begin by flexing the elbow to initiate the movement. Protract your shoulder blades as you do so.
At the completion of the motion pause, and then return to the starting position.
es: Suspenda las correas a la altura del pecho. Toma un asa en cada mano e inclínate hacia atrás. Mantén el cuerpo erguido y la cabeza y el pecho erguidos. Tus brazos deben estar completamente extendidos. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Comienza flexionando el codo para iniciar el movimiento. Prolonga los omóplatos mientras lo haces.
Al finalizar el movimiento, haz una pausa y luego vuelve a la posición inicial.

name: TRX Press Ups Feet Suspended
instructions: Anchor your suspension straps securely to the top of a rack or other object.

Leaning into the straps, take a handle in each hand and move into a push-up plank position. You should be as close to parallel to the ground as you can manage with your arms fully extended, maintaining good posture.
Maintaining a straight, rigid torso, descend slowly by allowing the elbows to flex.
Continue until your elbows break 90 degrees, pausing before you extend to return to the starting position.

en: Anchor your suspension straps securely to the top of a rack or other object.

Leaning into the straps, take a handle in each hand and move into a push-up plank position. You should be as close to parallel to the ground as you can manage with your arms fully extended, maintaining good posture.
Maintaining a straight, rigid torso, descend slowly by allowing the elbows to flex.
Continue until your elbows break 90 degrees, pausing before you extend to return to the starting position.
es: Ancle sus correas de suspensión de forma segura a la parte superior de un estante u otro objeto.

Inclinándose hacia las correas, toma un asa en cada mano y colócate en una posición de plancha de flexión. Debes estar lo más paralelo al suelo que puedas con los brazos completamente extendidos y manteniendo una buena postura.
Manteniendo el torso recto y rígido, descienda lentamente permitiendo que los codos se flexionen.
Continúa hasta que sus codos rompan 90 grados, haciendo una pausa antes de extenderse para regresar a la posición inicial.

name: TRX Good Mornings
instructions: Setup: Position the TRX handles at hip height, then stand facing away from the anchor point. Grip & Stance: Place your hands on the handles, which should be around your quad area, slightly above the knees. Step back to take some tension out of the straps, creating a slight forward angle. Keep your feet about hip-width apart. Hip Hinge: Hinge at your hips, pushing your hips backward as if you're trying to touch the wall behind you. Maintain Position: Keep your legs mostly straight, with just a slight bend in the knees, and maintain weight on your heels. Keep your back straight with a slight arch and your core braced. Descending: Lower your torso forward, letting the TRX assist in providing a gentle stretch in your hamstrings and the posterior chain. Stop when you feel a good stretch or when your upper body is almost parallel to the floor. Ascending: Drive through your heels, squeeze your glutes, and push your hips forward to return to the starting upright position. Repeat: Continue the motion for the desired number of repetitions.

en: Setup: Position the TRX handles at hip height, then stand facing away from the anchor point. Grip & Stance: Place your hands on the handles, which should be around your quad area, slightly above the knees. Step back to take some tension out of the straps, creating a slight forward angle. Keep your feet about hip-width apart. Hip Hinge: Hinge at your hips, pushing your hips backward as if you're trying to touch the wall behind you. Maintain Position: Keep your legs mostly straight, with just a slight bend in the knees, and maintain weight on your heels. Keep your back straight with a slight arch and your core braced. Descending: Lower your torso forward, letting the TRX assist in providing a gentle stretch in your hamstrings and the posterior chain. Stop when you feel a good stretch or when your upper body is almost parallel to the floor. Ascending: Drive through your heels, squeeze your glutes, and push your hips forward to return to the starting upright position. Repeat: Continue the motion for the desired number of repetitions.
es: Configuración: Coloca las manijas TRX a la altura de la cadera, luego colócate de espaldas al punto de anclaje. Agarre y postura: coloca las manos en las manijas, que deben estar alrededor del área del cuadriceps, ligeramente por encima de las rodillas. Da un paso atrás para quitar algo de tensión de las correas, creando un ligero ángulo hacia adelante. Mantén los pies separados a la altura de las caderas. Bisagra de cadera: Bisagra a la altura de las caderas, empujándolas hacia atrás como si intentara tocar la pared detrás de ti. Mantén la posición: mantén las piernas casi rectas, con solo una ligera flexión de las rodillas y mantén el peso sobre los talones. Mantén la espalda recta con un ligero arco y el core reforzado. Descendente: baja el torso hacia adelante, dejando que el TRX le ayude a estirar suavemente los isquiosurales y la cadena posterior. Detente cuando sientas un buen estiramiento o cuando la parte superior de tu cuerpo esté casi paralela al suelo. Ascendente: impulsa los talones, aprieta los gluteos y empuja las caderas hacia adelante para volver a la posición erguida inicial. Repetir: continúa el movimiento durante el número deseado de repeticiones.

name: TRX Fallouts
instructions: Adjust the straps so the handles are at an appropriate height, below waist level.
Begin standing and grasping the handles. Lean into the straps, moving to an incline push-up position. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your arms straight, lean further into the suspension straps, bringing your body closer to the ground, allowing your shoulders to extend, raising your arms up and over your head.
Maintain a neutral spine and keep the rest of your body straight, your shoulders being the only joints allowed to move.
Pause during the peak contraction, and then return to the starting position.

en: Adjust the straps so the handles are at an appropriate height, below waist level.
Begin standing and grasping the handles. Lean into the straps, moving to an incline push-up position. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your arms straight, lean further into the suspension straps, bringing your body closer to the ground, allowing your shoulders to extend, raising your arms up and over your head.
Maintain a neutral spine and keep the rest of your body straight, your shoulders being the only joints allowed to move.
Pause during the peak contraction, and then return to the starting position.
es: Ajuste las correas para que las asas queden a una altura adecuada, por debajo del nivel de la cintura.
Comienza a pararse y agarrar las manijas. Inclínate hacia las correas y muévete a una posición de flexión inclinada. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Manteniendo los brazos rectos, inclínate más hacia las correas de suspensión, acercando el cuerpo al suelo, permitiendo que los hombros se extiendan, levantando los brazos hacia arriba y por encima de la cabeza.
Mantén una columna neutra y el resto del cuerpo recto, siendo los hombros las únicas articulaciones a las que se les permite moverse.
Haz una pausa durante la contracción máxima y luego vuelve a la posición inicial.

name: Chained Barbell Squats
instructions: To set up the chains, begin by looping the leader chain over the sleeves of the bar. The heavy chain should be attached using a snap hook. Adjust the length of the lead chain so that a few links are still on the floor at the top of the movement.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wide for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings. Keep your head facing forward.

With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips as much as possible. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Lower bar position necessitates a greater torso lean to keep the bar over the heels. Continue until you break parallel, which is defined as the crease of the hip being in line with the top of the knee.

Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe, until you have returned to the starting position.

en: To set up the chains, begin by looping the leader chain over the sleeves of the bar. The heavy chain should be attached using a snap hook. Adjust the length of the lead chain so that a few links are still on the floor at the top of the movement.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wide for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings. Keep your head facing forward.

With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips as much as possible. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Lower bar position necessitates a greater torso lean to keep the bar over the heels. Continue until you break parallel, which is defined as the crease of the hip being in line with the top of the knee.

Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe, until you have returned to the starting position.
es: Para configurar las cadenas, comienza enrollando la cadena guía sobre las mangas de la barra. La cadena pesada debe fijarse mediante un mosquetón. Ajuste la longitud de la cadena principal de modo que algunos eslabones todavía queden en el suelo en la parte superior del movimiento.

Comienza pasando por debajo de la barra y colocándola sobre la parte posterior de los hombros. Apriete los omóplatos y gire los codos hacia adelante, intentando doblar la barra sobre los hombros. Retire la barra de la rejilla, creando un arco apretado en la parte baja de la espalda y vuelve a colocarse en su posición. Coloca los pies abiertos para hacer más énfasis en la espalda, los gluteos, los aductores y los isquiosurales. Mantén la cabeza mirando hacia adelante.

Con la espalda, los hombros y el core tensos, empuja las rodillas y el trasero y comienza el descenso. Siéntate con las caderas tanto como sea posible. Lo ideal es que tus espinillas estén perpendiculares al suelo. La posición de la barra más baja requiere una mayor inclinación del torso para mantener la barra sobre los talones. Continúa hasta romper el paralelo, que se define como el pliegue de la cadera alineado con la parte superior de la rodilla.

Manteniendo el peso sobre los talones y empujando los pies y las rodillas hacia afuera, conduzca hacia arriba mientras dirige el movimiento con la cabeza. Continúa hacia arriba, manteniendo la tensión de la cabeza a los pies, hasta que haya regresado a la posición inicial.

name: Sled Row
instructions: Attach dual handles to a sled connected by a rope or chain. Load the sled to an appropriate weight. Face the sled, backing up until there is some tension in the line.
With a handle in each hand, bend the knees slightly, keep your head and chest up, and begin with your arms extended.
To initiate the movement, flex the elbow as you retract your shoulder blades, pulling the sled towards you.
Take a step or two back to get tension in the line and repeat.

en: Attach dual handles to a sled connected by a rope or chain. Load the sled to an appropriate weight. Face the sled, backing up until there is some tension in the line.
With a handle in each hand, bend the knees slightly, keep your head and chest up, and begin with your arms extended.
To initiate the movement, flex the elbow as you retract your shoulder blades, pulling the sled towards you.
Take a step or two back to get tension in the line and repeat.
es: Conecte dos manijas a un trineo conectado por una cuerda o cadena. Cargue el trineo hasta alcanzar un peso adecuado. Mire hacia el trineo y retroceda hasta que haya algo de tensión en la cuerda.
Con un asa en cada mano, flexiona ligeramente las rodillas, mantén la cabeza y el pecho erguidos y comienza con los brazos extendidos.
Para iniciar el movimiento, flexione el codo mientras retrae los omóplatos, tirando del trineo hacia ti.
Da uno o dos pasos hacia atrás para tensar la línea y repite.

name: Sled Reverse Flye
instructions: Attach dual handles to a sled connected by a rope or chain. Load the sled to a light weight.

Face the sled, backing up until there is some tension in the line. Take both handles at arms length at about waist level. Bend the knees slightly and keep your chest and head up. This will be your starting position.
Without flexing the elbow,  pull the handles upward and apart, performing a reverse fly with some external rotation. Your palms should be facing forward as you do this.
Return to the starting position, taking a couple steps back to take the slack out of the line.

en: Attach dual handles to a sled connected by a rope or chain. Load the sled to a light weight.

Face the sled, backing up until there is some tension in the line. Take both handles at arms length at about waist level. Bend the knees slightly and keep your chest and head up. This will be your starting position.
Without flexing the elbow,  pull the handles upward and apart, performing a reverse fly with some external rotation. Your palms should be facing forward as you do this.
Return to the starting position, taking a couple steps back to take the slack out of the line.
es: Conecte dos manijas a un trineo conectado por una cuerda o cadena. Cargue el trineo hasta que tenga un peso ligero.

Mire hacia el trineo y retroceda hasta que haya algo de tensión en la cuerda. Toma ambas asas con los brazos extendidos aproximadamente al nivel de la cintura. Doble ligeramente las rodillas y mantén el pecho y la cabeza erguidos. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Sin flexionar el codo, tire de las manijas hacia arriba y sepárelas, realizando un vuelo inverso con cierta rotación externa. Tus palmas deben mirar hacia adelante mientras haces esto.
Vuelve a la posición inicial, dando un par de pasos hacia atrás para relajar la línea.

name: Sled Overhead Backward Walk
instructions: Attach dual handles to a sled connected by a rope or chain. Load the sled to a light weight.
Face the sled, backing up until there is some tension in the line. Hold your hands directly above your head with your elbows extended. This will be your starting position.
Walk backwards, keeping your arms raised above your head. Avoid jerky movements.
This movement is great for training the posture of your posterial shoulder girdle.

en: Attach dual handles to a sled connected by a rope or chain. Load the sled to a light weight.
Face the sled, backing up until there is some tension in the line. Hold your hands directly above your head with your elbows extended. This will be your starting position.
Walk backwards, keeping your arms raised above your head. Avoid jerky movements.
This movement is great for training the posture of your posterial shoulder girdle.
es: Conecte dos manijas a un trineo conectado por una cuerda o cadena. Cargue el trineo hasta que tenga un peso ligero.
Mire hacia el trineo y retroceda hasta que haya algo de tensión en la cuerda. Mantén las manos directamente encima de la cabeza con los codos extendidos. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Camine hacia atrás, manteniendo los brazos elevados por encima de la cabeza. Evite movimientos bruscos.
Este movimiento es excelente para entrenar la postura de la cintura escapular posterior.

name: Sledgehammer Swings
instructions: You will need a tire and a sledgehammer for this exercise. Stand in front of the tire about two feet away from it with a staggered stance. Grip the sledgehammer.
If you are right handed, your left hand should be at the bottom of the handle, and your right hand should be choking up closer to the head.

As you bring the sledge up, your right hand slides toward the head; as you swing down, your right hand will slide down to join your left hand. Slam it down as hard as you can against the tire. Control the bounce of the hammer off of the tire.
Repeat on the other side.

en: You will need a tire and a sledgehammer for this exercise. Stand in front of the tire about two feet away from it with a staggered stance. Grip the sledgehammer.
If you are right handed, your left hand should be at the bottom of the handle, and your right hand should be choking up closer to the head.

As you bring the sledge up, your right hand slides toward the head; as you swing down, your right hand will slide down to join your left hand. Slam it down as hard as you can against the tire. Control the bounce of the hammer off of the tire.
Repeat on the other side.
es: Necesitarás un neumatico y un mazo para este ejercicio. Colócate frente al neumatico a aproximadamente dos pies de distancia con una postura escalonada. Agarre el mazo.
Si es diestro, su mano izquierda debe estar en la parte inferior del mango y su mano derecha debe estar más cerca de la cabeza.

A medida que levantas el trineo, tu mano derecha se desliza hacia la cabeza; A medida que te balanceas hacia abajo, tu mano derecha se deslizará hacia abajo para unirse a tu mano izquierda. Golpéalo tan fuerte como puedas contra el neumatico. Controla el rebote del martillo en el neumatico.
Repite del otro lado.

name: Sled Overhead Tricep Extensions
instructions: Attach a dual handled chain or rope attachment to the sled. You should be facing away from the sled, holding a handle in each hand.

Begin the movement by moving forward for one step. Leaning forward, extend through the legs and hips to move, pausing with each step to extend through the elbows, pressing your hands forward. Step forward until you return to the start position prepared to press.

name.es: Extensiones de triceps por encima de la cabeza con trineo

en: Attach a dual handled chain or rope attachment to the sled. You should be facing away from the sled, holding a handle in each hand.

Begin the movement by moving forward for one step. Leaning forward, extend through the legs and hips to move, pausing with each step to extend through the elbows, pressing your hands forward. Step forward until you return to the start position prepared to press.
es: Conecte una cadena de doble mango o un accesorio de cuerda al trineo. Debes estar de espaldas al trineo, sosteniendo un asa en cada mano.

Comienza el movimiento avanzando un paso. Inclinándote hacia adelante, extiende las piernas y las caderas para moverte, deteniéndote en cada paso para extender los codos, presionando las manos hacia adelante. Da un paso adelante hasta volver a la posición inicial preparado para presionar.

name: Rope Climb
instructions: Grab the rope with both hands above your head. Pull down on the rope as you take a small jump.
Reach up as high as possible with your arms, gripping the rope tightly.
Pull yourself up with your arms, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Continue until you reach the top of the rope.
To lower yourself, reverse this process using a hand over hand motion.
Caution: Carry out safety check first. Do not attempt unattended and without the neccessary safety precautions/personnel.

en: Grab the rope with both hands above your head. Pull down on the rope as you take a small jump.
Reach up as high as possible with your arms, gripping the rope tightly.
Pull yourself up with your arms, bringing your knees towards your chest.
Continue until you reach the top of the rope.
To lower yourself, reverse this process using a hand over hand motion.
Caution: Carry out safety check first. Do not attempt unattended and without the neccessary safety precautions/personnel.
es: Agarre la cuerda con ambas manos por encima de la cabeza. Tira de la cuerda hacia abajo mientras das un pequeño salto.
Levanta los brazos lo más alto posible, agarrando la cuerda con fuerza.
Levántese con los brazos y lleve las rodillas hacia el pecho.
Continúa hasta llegar a la parte superior de la cuerda.
Para bajar, invierta este proceso usando un movimiento de mano sobre mano.
Precaución: Primero realiza una verificación de seguridad. No lo intente sin supervisión y sin las precauciones de seguridad y el personal necesarios.

name: Ring Dips
instructions: Grip a ring in each hand, and then take a small jump to help you get into the starting position with your arms locked out.
Begin by flexing the elbow, lowering your body until your arms break 90 degrees. Avoid swinging, and maintain good posture throughout the descent.
Reverse the motion by extending the elbow, pushing yourself back up into the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

en: Grip a ring in each hand, and then take a small jump to help you get into the starting position with your arms locked out.
Begin by flexing the elbow, lowering your body until your arms break 90 degrees. Avoid swinging, and maintain good posture throughout the descent.
Reverse the motion by extending the elbow, pushing yourself back up into the starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
es: Agarre un anillo en cada mano y luego dé un pequeño salto para llegar a la posición inicial con los brazos bloqueados.
Comienza flexionando el codo, bajando el cuerpo hasta que los brazos rompan los 90 grados. Evite balancearse y mantén una buena postura durante todo el descenso.
Invierta el movimiento extendiendo el codo y empujándose hacia arriba hasta la posición inicial.
Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones.

name: Sled Push
instructions: Place your sled on an appropriate surface, loaded to a suitable weight. The sled should provide enough resistance to require effort, but not so heavy that you are significantly slowed down.
You may use the upright or the low handles for this exercise. Place your hands on the handles with your arms extended, leaning into the implement.
With good posture, drive through the ground with alternating, short steps. Move as fast as you can for a short distance.

en: Place your sled on an appropriate surface, loaded to a suitable weight. The sled should provide enough resistance to require effort, but not so heavy that you are significantly slowed down.
You may use the upright or the low handles for this exercise. Place your hands on the handles with your arms extended, leaning into the implement.
With good posture, drive through the ground with alternating, short steps. Move as fast as you can for a short distance.
es: Coloca su trineo sobre una superficie adecuada, cargado con un peso adecuado. El trineo debe ofrecer suficiente resistencia como para requerir esfuerzo, pero no tan pesado como para reducir significativamente la velocidad.
Puede utilizar los mangos verticales o bajos para este ejercicio. Coloca las manos en las manijas con los brazos extendidos, apoyándose en el implemento.
Con una buena postura, conduzca por el suelo con pasos cortos y alternos. Muévete lo más rápido que puedas durante una distancia corta.

name: Sled Chest Press
instructions: Attach a dual handled chain or rope attachment to the sled. You should be facing away from the sled, holding a handle in each hand.

Begin the movement by moving forward for one step. Leaning forward, extend through the legs and hips to move, pausing with each step to extend through the elbows, pressing your hands forward. Step forward until you return to the start position prepared to press.

en: Attach a dual handled chain or rope attachment to the sled. You should be facing away from the sled, holding a handle in each hand.

Begin the movement by moving forward for one step. Leaning forward, extend through the legs and hips to move, pausing with each step to extend through the elbows, pressing your hands forward. Step forward until you return to the start position prepared to press.
es: Conecte una cadena de doble mango o un accesorio de cuerda al trineo. Debes estar de espaldas al trineo, sosteniendo un asa en cada mano.

Comienza el movimiento avanzando un paso. Inclinándote hacia adelante, extiende las piernas y las caderas para moverte, deteniéndote en cada paso para extender los codos, presionando las manos hacia adelante. Da un paso adelante hasta volver a la posición inicial preparado para presionar.

name: Bench Hops
instructions: Begin with a box or bench 1-2 feet in front of you. Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Perform a short squat in preparation for the jump; swing your arms behind you.
Rebound out of this position, extending through the hips, knees, and ankles to jump as high as possible. Swing your arms forward and up.
Jump over the bench, landing with the knees bent, absorbing the impact through the legs.
Turn around and face the opposite direction, then jump back over the bench.

en: Begin with a box or bench 1-2 feet in front of you. Stand with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Perform a short squat in preparation for the jump; swing your arms behind you.
Rebound out of this position, extending through the hips, knees, and ankles to jump as high as possible. Swing your arms forward and up.
Jump over the bench, landing with the knees bent, absorbing the impact through the legs.
Turn around and face the opposite direction, then jump back over the bench.
es: Comienza con una caja o banco a 1 o 2 pies frente a ti. Colócate con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Realiza una sentadilla corta como preparación para el salto; mueve los brazos detrás de ti.
Rebota fuera de esta posición, extendiéndote por las caderas, las rodillas y los tobillos para saltar lo más alto posible. Mueva los brazos hacia adelante y hacia arriba.
Salta sobre el banco aterrizando con las rodillas flexionadas, absorbiendo el impacto a través de las piernas.
Date la vuelta y mira en la dirección opuesta, luego salta sobre el banco.

name: Battle Rope Alternating Waves
instructions: For this exercise you will need a heavy rope anchored at its center 15-20 feet away. Standing in front of the rope, take an end in each hand with your arms extended at your side. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by rapidly raising one arm to shoulder level as quickly as you can.
As you let that arm drop to the starting position, raise the opposite side.
Continue alternating your left and right arms, whipping the ropes up and down as fast as you can.

name.es: Ondas alternas de cuerda de batalla

en: For this exercise you will need a heavy rope anchored at its center 15-20 feet away. Standing in front of the rope, take an end in each hand with your arms extended at your side. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by rapidly raising one arm to shoulder level as quickly as you can.
As you let that arm drop to the starting position, raise the opposite side.
Continue alternating your left and right arms, whipping the ropes up and down as fast as you can.
es: Para este ejercicio necesitarás una cuerda pesada anclada en su centro a una distancia de entre 15 y 20 pies. De pie frente a la cuerda, toma un extremo en cada mano con los brazos extendidos a los costados. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inicie el movimiento levantando rápidamente un brazo hasta el nivel del hombro lo más rápido que puedas.
Mientras dejas caer ese brazo a la posición inicial, levanta el lado opuesto.
Continúa alternando los brazos izquierdo y derecho, moviendo las cuerdas hacia arriba y hacia abajo lo más rápido que puedas.

name: Sled Drag
instructions: Load a sled with the desired weight, attaching a rope or straps to the sled that you can hold onto.
Begin the exercise by moving backwards for a given distance. Leaning back, extend through the legs for short steps to move as quickly as possible.

en: Load a sled with the desired weight, attaching a rope or straps to the sled that you can hold onto.
Begin the exercise by moving backwards for a given distance. Leaning back, extend through the legs for short steps to move as quickly as possible.
es: Carga un trineo con el peso deseado, fijando al trineo una cuerda o correas a las que puedas sujetarte.
Comienza el ejercicio moviéndose hacia atrás una distancia determinada. Inclinándose hacia atrás, extienda las piernas dando pasos cortos para moverse lo más rápido posible.

name: Overhead Slam
instructions: Hold a medicine ball with both hands and stand with your feet at shoulder width. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the countermovement by raising the ball above your head and fully extending your body.
Reverse the motion, slamming the ball into the ground directly in front of you as hard as you can.
Receive the ball with both hands on the bounce and repeat the movement.

name.es: Slam por encima de la cabeza

en: Hold a medicine ball with both hands and stand with your feet at shoulder width. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the countermovement by raising the ball above your head and fully extending your body.
Reverse the motion, slamming the ball into the ground directly in front of you as hard as you can.
Receive the ball with both hands on the bounce and repeat the movement.
es: Sostenga un balon medicinal con ambas manos y colócate con los pies al ancho de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inicie el contramovimiento levantando la pelota por encima de la cabeza y extendiendo completamente el cuerpo.
Invierte el movimiento, golpeando la pelota contra el suelo directamente frente a ti tan fuerte como puedas.
Recibe el balón con ambas manos en el rebote y repite el movimiento.

name: Medicine Ball Slam
instructions: Hold a medicine ball with both hands and stand with your feet at shoulder width. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the countermovement by raising the ball above your head and fully extending your body.
Reverse the motion, slamming the ball into the ground directly in front of you as hard as you can.
Receive the ball with both hands on the bounce and repeat the movement.

en: Hold a medicine ball with both hands and stand with your feet at shoulder width. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the countermovement by raising the ball above your head and fully extending your body.
Reverse the motion, slamming the ball into the ground directly in front of you as hard as you can.
Receive the ball with both hands on the bounce and repeat the movement.
es: Sostenga un balon medicinal con ambas manos y colócate con los pies al ancho de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inicie el contramovimiento levantando la pelota por encima de la cabeza y extendiendo completamente el cuerpo.
Invierte el movimiento, golpeando la pelota contra el suelo directamente frente a ti tan fuerte como puedas.
Recibe el balón con ambas manos en el rebote y repite el movimiento.

name: Blast Straps Fallout
instructions: Adjust the straps so the handles are at an appropriate height, below waist level.
Begin standing and grasping the handles. Lean into the straps, moving to an incline push-up position. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your arms straight, lean further into the suspension straps, bringing your body closer to the ground, allowing your shoulders to extend, raising your arms up and over your head.
Maintain a neutral spine and keep the rest of your body straight, your shoulders being the only joints allowed to move.
Pause during the peak contraction, and then return to the starting position.

en: Adjust the straps so the handles are at an appropriate height, below waist level.
Begin standing and grasping the handles. Lean into the straps, moving to an incline push-up position. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your arms straight, lean further into the suspension straps, bringing your body closer to the ground, allowing your shoulders to extend, raising your arms up and over your head.
Maintain a neutral spine and keep the rest of your body straight, your shoulders being the only joints allowed to move.
Pause during the peak contraction, and then return to the starting position.
es: Ajuste las correas para que las asas queden a una altura adecuada, por debajo del nivel de la cintura.
Comienza a pararse y agarrar las manijas. Inclínate hacia las correas y muévete a una posición de flexión inclinada. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Manteniendo los brazos rectos, inclínate más hacia las correas de suspensión, acercando el cuerpo al suelo, permitiendo que los hombros se extiendan, levantando los brazos hacia arriba y por encima de la cabeza.
Mantén una columna neutra y el resto del cuerpo recto, siendo los hombros las únicas articulaciones a las que se les permite moverse.
Haz una pausa durante la contracción máxima y luego vuelve a la posición inicial.

name: Underhand Cable Pulldowns
instructions: Set the weight to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is set to the correct height. Take a seat facing the machine (tuck your hips in so they are touching the leg brace) and take a shoulder width, underhand grip with your arms extended towards the ceiling. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the bar down towards your chest using the muscles across your back and your biceps. Lean back ever so slightly as your pull the weight downwards and lift your chest as much as you can. Continue to pull the bar down until either your muscles are optimally contracted or it is in contact with your chest.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Chin Ups or Horizontal Barbell Pull Ups.

name.es: Jalones en polea con agarre supino

en: Set the weight to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is set to the correct height. Take a seat facing the machine (tuck your hips in so they are touching the leg brace) and take a shoulder width, underhand grip with your arms extended towards the ceiling. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the bar down towards your chest using the muscles across your back and your biceps. Lean back ever so slightly as your pull the weight downwards and lift your chest as much as you can. Continue to pull the bar down until either your muscles are optimally contracted or it is in contact with your chest.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Chin Ups or Horizontal Barbell Pull Ups.
es: Ajuste el peso a la cantidad recomendada y verifique que la abrazadera para piernas esté ajustada a la altura correcta. Siéntate frente a la maquina (meta las caderas hacia adentro para que toquen el soporte para las piernas) y toma un agarre por debajo del ancho de los hombros con los brazos extendidos hacia el techo. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y tira de la barra hacia tu pecho usando los músculos de tu espalda y tus biceps. Inclínate ligeramente hacia atrás mientras tira del peso hacia abajo y levanta el pecho tanto como puedas. Continúa tirando de la barra hacia abajo hasta que sus músculos estén contraídos de manera óptima o esté en contacto con el pecho.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la barra por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: dominadas o dominadas horizontales con barra.

name: Lat Pulldown Behind The Head
instructions: Set the weight to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is set to the correct height. Take a seat facing the machine (tuck your hips in so they are touching the leg brace) and adopt a wide, overhand grip with your arms extended towards the ceiling. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the bar down towards the back of your neck. Lean forwards slightly (from your hips, maintaining a straight back) as you pull the bar downwards. It is paramount that the bar does not touch your neck. Continue to descend the bar until you are a few inches away from your neck.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Pull-Ups or Lat Pulldowns.

en: Set the weight to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is set to the correct height. Take a seat facing the machine (tuck your hips in so they are touching the leg brace) and adopt a wide, overhand grip with your arms extended towards the ceiling. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the bar down towards the back of your neck. Lean forwards slightly (from your hips, maintaining a straight back) as you pull the bar downwards. It is paramount that the bar does not touch your neck. Continue to descend the bar until you are a few inches away from your neck.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Pull-Ups or Lat Pulldowns.
es: Ajuste el peso a la cantidad recomendada y verifique que la abrazadera para piernas esté ajustada a la altura correcta. Siéntate frente a la maquina (meta las caderas hacia adentro para que toquen el soporte para las piernas) y adopte un agarre amplio y por encima de la cabeza con los brazos extendidos hacia el techo. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y tira de la barra hacia la nuca. Inclínate ligeramente hacia adelante (desde las caderas, manteniendo la espalda recta) mientras tira de la barra hacia abajo. Es primordial que la barra no toque tu cuello. Continúa descendiendo la barra hasta que esté a unos centímetros de su cuello.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la barra por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Pull-Ups o Lat Pulldowns.

aliases: Wide Grip Lat Pulldown (Behind The Neck)

name: Barbell Sissy Squats
instructions: Grab a barbell and place it across the back of your shoulders. Next step into the sissy squat machine, making sure that your feet are locked in and the pad reaches at least half way up your thighs. Adopt a shoulder width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. You should lean backwards into the movement so that your weight is supported through the pad that is in contact with your calves. Continue to descend until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the floor.

After a brief pause, exhale and return the bar to the starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads . Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is a very complex movement and will require a spotter. If you do not have a spotter, be cautious with your weights. If you suffer from knee issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Leg Presses.

en: Grab a barbell and place it across the back of your shoulders. Next step into the sissy squat machine, making sure that your feet are locked in and the pad reaches at least half way up your thighs. Adopt a shoulder width stance with your toes slightly pointing outward. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. You should lean backwards into the movement so that your weight is supported through the pad that is in contact with your calves. Continue to descend until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the floor.

After a brief pause, exhale and return the bar to the starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads . Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is a very complex movement and will require a spotter. If you do not have a spotter, be cautious with your weights. If you suffer from knee issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Leg Presses.
es: Toma una barra y colócala sobre la parte posterior de tus hombros. El siguiente paso es ingresar a la maquina de sentadillas sissy, asegurándose de que los pies estén bloqueados y que la almohadilla llegue al menos hasta la mitad de sus muslos. Adopte una postura a la altura de los hombros con los dedos de los pies ligeramente apuntando hacia afuera. Mantén la espalda recta durante todo el movimiento y mantén la cabeza erguida. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inhala y comienza a descender doblando las rodillas y las caderas. Debes inclinarte hacia atrás en el movimiento para que tu peso quede apoyado a través de la almohadilla que está en contacto con tus gemelos. Continúa descendiendo hasta que sus muslos estén paralelos o justo al suelo.

Después de una breve pausa, exhala y regresa la barra a la posición inicial siguiendo el mismo camino, empujando con los talones con la fuerza impulsada a través de los cuadriceps. Colócate firme con las piernas completamente extendidas, la espalda recta y los hombros relajados.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.

Precaución: este es un movimiento muy complejo y requerirá un observador. Si no tiene un observador, tenga cuidado con sus pesas. Si sufre problemas de rodilla, es posible que este ejercicio no sea adecuado.
Variaciones: sentadillas con mancuernas o prensas de piernas.

name: Weighted Pull Ups
instructions: Attach the desired weight around your waist via a belt, adopt a wide, overhand (palms facing away from you) grip of a pull up bar. After you have securely taken hold of the handles, take your feet off the floor so that your body is now hanging from your grip. Pull your heels in towards your glutes so your knees are bent to a 90 degree angle and your hips are pushed forwards. Your arms should be at full extension at this point. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement, exhale and pull your torso upward towards your hands as you contract your biceps and the muscles across your back (more so with your back). Continue to pull yourself up until your chest is as high as it can be.
After a brief pause, return your torso back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lat Pulldowns or T-Bar Rows with a Handle.

en: Attach the desired weight around your waist via a belt, adopt a wide, overhand (palms facing away from you) grip of a pull up bar. After you have securely taken hold of the handles, take your feet off the floor so that your body is now hanging from your grip. Pull your heels in towards your glutes so your knees are bent to a 90 degree angle and your hips are pushed forwards. Your arms should be at full extension at this point. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement, exhale and pull your torso upward towards your hands as you contract your biceps and the muscles across your back (more so with your back). Continue to pull yourself up until your chest is as high as it can be.
After a brief pause, return your torso back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lat Pulldowns or T-Bar Rows with a Handle.
es: Coloca el peso deseado alrededor de su cintura mediante un cinturón, adopte un agarre amplio y por encima de la cabeza (con las palmas hacia afuera) de una barra de dominadas. Después de haber agarrado firmemente las manijas, levanta los pies del piso para que el cuerpo cuelgue de su agarre. Tire de los talones hacia los gluteos para que las rodillas queden dobladas en un ángulo de 90 grados y las caderas empujadas hacia adelante. Tus brazos deben estar completamente extendidos en este punto. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar este movimiento, exhala y tire del torso hacia las manos mientras contrae los biceps y los músculos de la espalda (más aún en la espalda). Continúa levantándose hasta que el pecho esté lo más alto posible.
Después de una breve pausa, vuelve el torso por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Jalones laterales o remo con barra en T con mango.

name: V Bar Pulldowns
instructions: Attach the V-Bar, set the weight to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is set to the correct height. Take a seat facing the machine (tuck your hips in so they are touching the leg brace) and grab the V-Bar with an overhand grip, your arms extended towards the ceiling. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the V-Bar down towards your chest using the muscles across your back and your biceps. Lean back ever so slightly as your pull the weight downwards and lift your chest as much as you can. Continue to pull the V-Bar down until either your muscles are optimally contracted or it is in contact with your chest.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the V-Bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lat Pulldown or Barbell Rows.

en: Attach the V-Bar, set the weight to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is set to the correct height. Take a seat facing the machine (tuck your hips in so they are touching the leg brace) and grab the V-Bar with an overhand grip, your arms extended towards the ceiling. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the V-Bar down towards your chest using the muscles across your back and your biceps. Lean back ever so slightly as your pull the weight downwards and lift your chest as much as you can. Continue to pull the V-Bar down until either your muscles are optimally contracted or it is in contact with your chest.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the V-Bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lat Pulldown or Barbell Rows.
es: Coloque la barra V, ajuste el peso a la carga indicada y verifique que la abrazadera para piernas esté ajustada a la altura correcta. Tome asiento frente a la máquina (meta las caderas hacia adentro para que toquen el soporte para las piernas) y agarre la barra V con un agarre por encima de la cabeza, con los brazos extendidos hacia el techo. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y tira de la barra V hacia tu pecho usando los músculos de tu espalda y tus bíceps. Inclínese ligeramente hacia atrás mientras tira del peso hacia abajo y levanta el pecho tanto como pueda. Continúe tirando de la barra V hacia abajo hasta que sus músculos estén contraídos de manera óptima o esté en contacto con su pecho.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese la barra V por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Lat Pulldown o remo con barra.

name: Smith Machine Split Squats
instructions: Place a bench an exaggerated step's distance from the smith machine bar, load up the recommended weight and set its height to shoulder height. Place the un-racked bar on the back of your shoulders and position yourself so that one foot is flat on the floor (directly underneath the bar) and the other is behind you, at knee height supported by the bench. Have your arms gently holding the bar to stop it from falling. This will be your starting position.

From here, start to descend by bending at your knees (maintaining good posture) until you create a 90 degree angle at your front knee. As you descend you should be inhaling and ensuring that your front knee does not extend past your toes.
Pause for a brief moment at the bottom of the movement, before exhaling and driving up through your front heel and thigh, until you return to your starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Bulgarian Split Squats or Split Squats With Dumbbells.

en: Place a bench an exaggerated step's distance from the smith machine bar, load up the recommended weight and set its height to shoulder height. Place the un-racked bar on the back of your shoulders and position yourself so that one foot is flat on the floor (directly underneath the bar) and the other is behind you, at knee height supported by the bench. Have your arms gently holding the bar to stop it from falling. This will be your starting position.

From here, start to descend by bending at your knees (maintaining good posture) until you create a 90 degree angle at your front knee. As you descend you should be inhaling and ensuring that your front knee does not extend past your toes.
Pause for a brief moment at the bottom of the movement, before exhaling and driving up through your front heel and thigh, until you return to your starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Bulgarian Split Squats or Split Squats With Dumbbells.
es: Coloque un banco a una distancia exagerada de un paso de la barra de la máquina Smith, cargue el peso recomendado y ajuste su altura a la altura de los hombros. Coloque la barra sin soporte en la parte posterior de sus hombros y colóquese de modo que un pie quede plano sobre el piso (directamente debajo de la barra) y el otro detrás de usted, a la altura de las rodillas apoyado en el banco. Mantenga sus brazos sosteniendo suavemente la barra para evitar que caiga. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Desde aquí, comience a descender doblando las rodillas (manteniendo una buena postura) hasta crear un ángulo de 90 grados en la rodilla delantera. A medida que desciendes, debes inhalar y asegurarte de que la rodilla delantera no se extienda más allá de los dedos de los pies.
Haga una pausa por un breve momento en la parte inferior del movimiento, antes de exhalar y subir por el talón y el muslo delanteros, hasta regresar a la posición inicial.
Repita la número indicado de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variaciones: Sentadillas divididas búlgaras o Sentadillas divididas con mancuernas.

aliases: Smith Machine Single Leg Split Squat

name: Smith Machine Upright Rows
instructions: Load the smith machine with the desired weight and take a with a narrow, overhand grip. Adopt a standing position with the bar resting against your thighs, your arms hanging perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position. Tip: Maintain a straight back and keep the bar as close to your body as possible throughout the movement.

Exhale and pull the bar up towards your chin by contracting your shoulders and flaring your elbows out wide. Continue to pull the bar upward until you reach your chin. At this point your elbows should be above the bar.
Pause for a brief moment, then inhale and return the bar along the same path towards the starting position.
Variations: Dumbbell Upright Rows or Upright Barbell Rows.

en: Load the smith machine with the desired weight and take a with a narrow, overhand grip. Adopt a standing position with the bar resting against your thighs, your arms hanging perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position. Tip: Maintain a straight back and keep the bar as close to your body as possible throughout the movement.

Exhale and pull the bar up towards your chin by contracting your shoulders and flaring your elbows out wide. Continue to pull the bar upward until you reach your chin. At this point your elbows should be above the bar.
Pause for a brief moment, then inhale and return the bar along the same path towards the starting position.
Variations: Dumbbell Upright Rows or Upright Barbell Rows.
es: Cargue la máquina Smith con el peso deseado y tómela con un agarre estrecho y por encima de la cabeza. Adopte una posición de pie con la barra apoyada en los muslos y los brazos colgando perpendiculares al suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial. Consejo: mantenga la espalda recta y mantenga la barra lo más cerca posible de su cuerpo durante todo el movimiento.

Exhale y levante la barra hacia la barbilla contrayendo los hombros y abriendo los codos. Continúe tirando de la barra hacia arriba hasta llegar a la barbilla. En este punto tus codos deben estar por encima de la barra.
Haga una pausa breve, luego inhale y regrese la barra por el mismo camino hacia la posición inicial.
Variaciones: remo vertical con mancuernas o remo vertical con barra.

name: Smith Machine Stiff Leg Deadlifts
instructions: Load up the smith machine with the required amount of weight and place the bar at mid thigh height. Adopt a standing position with your feet shoulder width apart so that the bar is gently placed against your thighs. Allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor with an overhand grip (palms facing your thighs). Next, lift the bar off the rack and slightly bend your knees. Tip: Keep a straight back and legs throughout the movement. This will be your starting position.

Inhale as you lean forwards from your waist (remember to keep a straight back), keeping the bar close to your thighs as you go. Keep lowering the bar towards your feet until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.

After a brief pause bring your torso upright again by pushing your hips forward. Tip: Remember, this whole movement is performed with 'stiff' legs (slight bend at the knee, but no more) and a straight back throughout. Exhale as you perform this part of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is not an exercise for those with back issues. Avoid jerking motions as this could cause serious injury.
Variations: Dumbbell Stiff Legged Dead lifts or Barbell Stiff-Legged Deadlifts.

name.es: Peso muerto con piernas rígidas en máquina Smith

en: Load up the smith machine with the required amount of weight and place the bar at mid thigh height. Adopt a standing position with your feet shoulder width apart so that the bar is gently placed against your thighs. Allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor with an overhand grip (palms facing your thighs). Next, lift the bar off the rack and slightly bend your knees. Tip: Keep a straight back and legs throughout the movement. This will be your starting position.

Inhale as you lean forwards from your waist (remember to keep a straight back), keeping the bar close to your thighs as you go. Keep lowering the bar towards your feet until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.

After a brief pause bring your torso upright again by pushing your hips forward. Tip: Remember, this whole movement is performed with 'stiff' legs (slight bend at the knee, but no more) and a straight back throughout. Exhale as you perform this part of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is not an exercise for those with back issues. Avoid jerking motions as this could cause serious injury.
Variations: Dumbbell Stiff Legged Dead lifts or Barbell Stiff-Legged Deadlifts.
es: Cargue la máquina Smith con la cantidad de peso requerida y coloque la barra a la altura de la mitad del muslo. Adopte una posición de pie con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros para que la barra se coloque suavemente contra sus muslos. Deje que sus brazos cuelguen perpendiculares al piso con un agarre por encima de la cabeza (con las palmas hacia los muslos). Luego, levante la barra del soporte y doble ligeramente las rodillas. Consejo: Mantenga la espalda y las piernas rectas durante todo el movimiento. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inhala mientras te inclinas hacia adelante desde tu cintura (recuerda mantener la espalda recta), manteniendo la barra cerca de tus muslos a medida que avanzas. Sigue bajando la barra hacia tus pies hasta que sientas un estiramiento en los isquiosurales.

Después de una breve pausa, vuelva a enderezar el torso empujando las caderas hacia adelante. Consejo: Recuerde, todo este movimiento se realiza con las piernas "rígidas" (ligeramente doblada en la rodilla, pero no más) y la espalda recta en todo momento. Exhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Precaución: este no es un ejercicio para personas con problemas de espalda. Evite movimientos bruscos ya que esto podría causar lesiones graves.
Variaciones: levantamiento muerto con piernas rígidas con mancuernas o peso muerto con piernas rígidas con barra.

name: Smith Machine Squats
instructions: Load the smith machine with the desired amount of weight and place the bar at shoulder height. Step underneath the bar and rotate it so that the weight is resting across the back of your shoulders. You should take hold of the bar loosely just to make sure it does not fall. Stand with a wider than shoulder width stance, toes pointing (slightly) outward. Throughout the movement you should keep your head up, chest out and maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position.

Descend slowly by bending at your knees and hips until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, pause for a second before pushing your torso back into the starting position through your heels. As you descend inhale and as you ascend, exhale. You should now be at the starting position, ready to go again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always be aware of your posture with this exercise as if performed incorrectly, could cause injury.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Dumbbell Squats.

en: Load the smith machine with the desired amount of weight and place the bar at shoulder height. Step underneath the bar and rotate it so that the weight is resting across the back of your shoulders. You should take hold of the bar loosely just to make sure it does not fall. Stand with a wider than shoulder width stance, toes pointing (slightly) outward. Throughout the movement you should keep your head up, chest out and maintain a straight back. This will be your starting position.

Descend slowly by bending at your knees and hips until your thighs are parallel with the floor. Keep a straight back so that your posture is not compromised. Tip: When at the bottom of the movement your knees should be behind your toes.

Once you have hit the bottom of the movement, pause for a second before pushing your torso back into the starting position through your heels. As you descend inhale and as you ascend, exhale. You should now be at the starting position, ready to go again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always be aware of your posture with this exercise as if performed incorrectly, could cause injury.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Dumbbell Squats.
es: Cargue la máquina smith con la cantidad de peso deseada y coloque la barra a la altura de los hombros. Pase debajo de la barra y gírela para que el peso descanse sobre la parte posterior de sus hombros. Debes agarrar la barra sin apretar para asegurarte de que no se caiga. Párese con una postura más ancha que el ancho de los hombros, con los dedos de los pies apuntando (ligeramente) hacia afuera. Durante todo el movimiento debes mantener la cabeza erguida, el pecho afuera y mantener la espalda recta. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Desciende lentamente doblando las rodillas y las caderas hasta que los muslos queden paralelos al suelo. Mantenga la espalda recta para que su postura no se vea comprometida. Consejo: cuando estés en la parte inferior del movimiento, tus rodillas deben estar detrás de los dedos de los pies.

Una vez que hayas llegado al final del movimiento, haz una pausa por un segundo antes de empujar el torso hacia la posición inicial a través de los talones. Al descender, inhala y al ascender, exhala. Ahora deberías estar en la posición inicial, listo para comenzar de nuevo.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Precaución: Esté siempre consciente de su postura al realizar este ejercicio, ya que, si se realiza incorrectamente, podría causar lesiones.
Variaciones: Sentadillas con barra o Sentadillas con mancuernas.

name: Smith Machine Shrugs
instructions: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the bar so it is mid thigh. Stand with a shoulder width stance facing the bar. Adopt an overhand grip (palms facing your thighs) and keep your arms extended throughout the movement. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale, shrug your shoulders upwards and pull them in towards your ears at the same time. Keep your arms at full extension (a slight bend at your elbows) as you do so. Continue to shrug until you cannot lift your shoulders anymore.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Shrugs or Dumbbell Shrugs.

name.es: Encogimiento de hombros con máquina Smith

en: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the bar so it is mid thigh. Stand with a shoulder width stance facing the bar. Adopt an overhand grip (palms facing your thighs) and keep your arms extended throughout the movement. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale, shrug your shoulders upwards and pull them in towards your ears at the same time. Keep your arms at full extension (a slight bend at your elbows) as you do so. Continue to shrug until you cannot lift your shoulders anymore.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Shrugs or Dumbbell Shrugs.
es: Configure la máquina con el peso deseado y establezca la posición de la barra de modo que quede a mitad del muslo. Párese con una postura a la altura de los hombros frente a la barra. Adopte un agarre por encima de la cabeza (con las palmas hacia los muslos) y mantenga los brazos extendidos durante todo el movimiento. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala, encoge los hombros hacia arriba y jálalos hacia las orejas al mismo tiempo. Mantenga los brazos completamente extendidos (una ligera flexión de los codos) mientras lo hace. Continúe encogiéndose de hombros hasta que ya no pueda levantarlos.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la barra por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: encogimiento de hombros con barra o encogimiento de hombros con mancuernas.

name: Smith Machine Reverse Calf Raises
instructions: Load the smith machine with the desired amount of weight, put a step directly beneath it and place the bar at shoulder height. Step underneath the bar and rotate it so that the weight is resting across the back of your shoulders. You should take hold of the bar loosely just to make sure it does not fall. Take up your stance directly below the bar with a shoulder width stance and a straight back. Your heels should be on the step with your toes on the floor. This is your starting position.
Exhale and pull your toes up and off the floor towards you knees. Keep your legs extended throughout the movement. Continue in this fashion until you cannot pull your toes up any more.
After a brief pause, inhale and return them along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name.es: Elevaciones de gemelos inversas con máquina Smith

en: Load the smith machine with the desired amount of weight, put a step directly beneath it and place the bar at shoulder height. Step underneath the bar and rotate it so that the weight is resting across the back of your shoulders. You should take hold of the bar loosely just to make sure it does not fall. Take up your stance directly below the bar with a shoulder width stance and a straight back. Your heels should be on the step with your toes on the floor. This is your starting position.
Exhale and pull your toes up and off the floor towards you knees. Keep your legs extended throughout the movement. Continue in this fashion until you cannot pull your toes up any more.
After a brief pause, inhale and return them along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Cargue la máquina Smith con la cantidad de peso deseada, coloque un escalón directamente debajo y coloque la barra a la altura de los hombros. Pase debajo de la barra y gírela para que el peso descanse sobre la parte posterior de sus hombros. Debes agarrar la barra sin apretar para asegurarte de que no se caiga. Adopte su postura directamente debajo de la barra con una postura a la altura de los hombros y la espalda recta. Tus talones deben estar en el escalón con los dedos de los pies en el suelo. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Exhala y levanta los dedos de los pies del suelo hacia las rodillas. Mantén las piernas extendidas durante todo el movimiento. Continúe de esta manera hasta que ya no pueda levantar los dedos de los pies.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa por el mismo camino a la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.

name: Smith Machine Pistol Squats
instructions: Load up the smith machine with the prescribed amount of weight and set it at a shoulder height. Take a shoulder width stance an inch or so in front of the machine with the bar resting on the back of your shoulders. Take hold of the bar with an overhand grip (palms facing forward) for stability and lift one leg up and off the floor. This leg will remain off the floor throughout the movement. Tip: Maintain a straight back at all times to minimise the risk of injury. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and slowly descend your body by bending at both your knees and hips while maintaining good posture and pushing your chest upwards. Continue to descend until your glutes are just off the floor or are very close to your standing heel.
After a brief pause, exhale and press through your quads to return your body back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Leg Press (Single Leg) or Split Squat With Dumbbells.

en: Load up the smith machine with the prescribed amount of weight and set it at a shoulder height. Take a shoulder width stance an inch or so in front of the machine with the bar resting on the back of your shoulders. Take hold of the bar with an overhand grip (palms facing forward) for stability and lift one leg up and off the floor. This leg will remain off the floor throughout the movement. Tip: Maintain a straight back at all times to minimise the risk of injury. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and slowly descend your body by bending at both your knees and hips while maintaining good posture and pushing your chest upwards. Continue to descend until your glutes are just off the floor or are very close to your standing heel.
After a brief pause, exhale and press through your quads to return your body back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Leg Press (Single Leg) or Split Squat With Dumbbells.
es: Cargue la máquina Smith con la cantidad de peso prescrita y colóquela a la altura de los hombros. Tome una postura a lo ancho de los hombros aproximadamente una pulgada frente a la máquina con la barra apoyada en la parte posterior de los hombros. Sujete la barra con un agarre por encima de la cabeza (con las palmas hacia adelante) para mayor estabilidad y levante una pierna del suelo. Esta pierna permanecerá alejada del suelo durante todo el movimiento. Consejo: Mantenga la espalda recta en todo momento para minimizar el riesgo de lesiones. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhale y descienda lentamente su cuerpo doblando las rodillas y las caderas mientras mantiene una buena postura y empuja el pecho hacia arriba. Continúe descendiendo hasta que sus glúteos estén apenas separados del piso o muy cerca de su talón de apoyo.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y presiona tus cuádriceps para que tu cuerpo regrese por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.
Repita la número indicado de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variaciones: Press de piernas (una sola pierna) o sentadilla dividida con mancuernas.

name: Smith Machine Shoulder Press
instructions: Load up the smith machine with the prescribed amount of weight and set it at a shoulder height. Grab the bar with a wider than shoulder width overhand grip. Take a seat on an incline bench (just off vertical) so that the bar can pass just in front of your face when it descends. Set the safety hooks in the correct position and lift the bar off the rack so that your arms (which are fully extended towards the ceiling) are weight baring. This is your starting position.
To initiate the movement, inhale and slowly lower the bar down towards your shoulders (in front of your head). Pause for a brief moment when the bar gently touches your shoulders.
Exhale and press the bar back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Barbell Military Press or Seated Cable Shoulder Press.

name.es: Press de hombros con máquina Smith

en: Load up the smith machine with the prescribed amount of weight and set it at a shoulder height. Grab the bar with a wider than shoulder width overhand grip. Take a seat on an incline bench (just off vertical) so that the bar can pass just in front of your face when it descends. Set the safety hooks in the correct position and lift the bar off the rack so that your arms (which are fully extended towards the ceiling) are weight baring. This is your starting position.
To initiate the movement, inhale and slowly lower the bar down towards your shoulders (in front of your head). Pause for a brief moment when the bar gently touches your shoulders.
Exhale and press the bar back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Barbell Military Press or Seated Cable Shoulder Press.
es: Cargue la máquina Smith con la cantidad de peso prescrita y colóquela a la altura de los hombros. Agarre la barra con un agarre por encima del ancho de los hombros. Siéntate en un banco inclinado (justo fuera de la vertical) para que la barra pueda pasar justo por delante de tu cara cuando descienda. Coloque los ganchos de seguridad en la posición correcta y levante la barra del estante de modo que sus brazos (que están completamente extendidos hacia el techo) queden expuestos al peso. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala y baja lentamente la barra hacia tus hombros (frente a tu cabeza). Haga una pausa por un breve momento cuando la barra toque suavemente sus hombros.
Exhala y presiona la barra hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press militar con barra sentado o Press de hombros con cable sentado.

name: Single Arm Smith Machine Upright Rows
instructions: Load the smith machine with the desired weight and take hold of the bar with an overhand grip in your right hand. Adopt a standing position with the bar resting against your thighs, your arm should be perpendicular to the floor at this point. This will be your starting position. Tip: Maintain a straight back and keep the bar as close to your body as possible throughout the movement.

Exhale and pull the bar up towards your chin by contracting your shoulder muscles and flaring your elbow out wide. Continue to pull the bar upward until you reach your chin. At this point your elbow should be above the bar.
Pause for a brief moment, then inhale and return the bar along the same path back towards the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Dumbbell Upright Rows or Upright Barbell Rows.

name.en: Single Arm Smith Machine Upright Rows
name.es: Remo vertical con máquina Smith de un solo brazo

en: Load the smith machine with the desired weight and take hold of the bar with an overhand grip in your right hand. Adopt a standing position with the bar resting against your thighs, your arm should be perpendicular to the floor at this point. This will be your starting position. Tip: Maintain a straight back and keep the bar as close to your body as possible throughout the movement.

Exhale and pull the bar up towards your chin by contracting your shoulder muscles and flaring your elbow out wide. Continue to pull the bar upward until you reach your chin. At this point your elbow should be above the bar.
Pause for a brief moment, then inhale and return the bar along the same path back towards the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Dumbbell Upright Rows or Upright Barbell Rows.
es: Cargue la máquina Smith con el peso deseado y sujete la barra con un agarre por encima de la mano derecha. Adopta una posición de pie con la barra apoyada en tus muslos, tu brazo debe estar perpendicular al suelo en este punto. Esta será tu posición inicial. Consejo: mantenga la espalda recta y mantenga la barra lo más cerca posible de su cuerpo durante todo el movimiento.

Exhale y levante la barra hacia la barbilla contrayendo los músculos de los hombros y abriendo bien el codo. Continúe tirando de la barra hacia arriba hasta llegar a la barbilla. En este punto tu codo debe estar por encima de la barra.
Haga una pausa por un breve momento, luego inhale y regrese la barra por el mismo camino hacia la posición inicial.
Repita la número indicado de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variaciones: remo vertical con mancuernas o remo vertical con barra.

aliases: Smith Machine One Arm Upright Row
Smith Machine Single Arm Upright Row
Single Arm Smith Machine Upright Rows

name: Smith Machine Incline Bench Press
instructions: Load the machine with the desired weight and set the position of the bar so it is at chest height.
