Place an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) beneath the bar and lay down on your back so the bar is directly above your chest. Adopt an overhand grip (palms facing forwards) and lift the bar off the hooks. Press the bar upwards until your arms are at full extension (slight bend at your elbows) and make sure you have set the safety bars to the correct height. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and descend the bar towards your chest by flexing at your elbows, allowing them to flare out wide. Continue to descend the bar until either your elbows are at 90 degrees or the bar gently touches your chest.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Incline Bench Press or Incline Dumbbell Chest Press.

name.es: Press de banca inclinado con máquina Smith

en: Load the machine with the desired weight and set the position of the bar so it is at chest height. Place an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) beneath the bar and lay down on your back so the bar is directly above your chest. Adopt an overhand grip (palms facing forwards) and lift the bar off the hooks. Press the bar upwards until your arms are at full extension (slight bend at your elbows) and make sure you have set the safety bars to the correct height. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and descend the bar towards your chest by flexing at your elbows, allowing them to flare out wide. Continue to descend the bar until either your elbows are at 90 degrees or the bar gently touches your chest.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Incline Bench Press or Incline Dumbbell Chest Press.
es: Cargue la máquina con el peso deseado y ajuste la posición de la barra para que quede a la altura del pecho. Coloque un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 a 45 grados) debajo de la barra y recuéstese boca arriba de modo que la barra quede directamente sobre su pecho. Adopte un agarre por encima de la cabeza (con las palmas hacia adelante) y levante la barra de los ganchos. Presione la barra hacia arriba hasta que sus brazos estén completamente extendidos (ligeramente doblados los codos) y asegúrese de haber colocado las barras de seguridad a la altura correcta. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhale y descienda la barra hacia su pecho flexionando los codos, permitiendo que se abran ampliamente. Continúe descendiendo la barra hasta que sus codos estén a 90 grados o la barra toque suavemente su pecho.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y presiona la barra hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca inclinado con barra o Press de pecho inclinado con mancuernas.

name: Smith Machine Hip Raise
instructions: Load up a smith machine with the desired weight and adjust the height of the bar so it is waist height (make sure you set the safety bars in the correct position too). Next place a mat underneath the bar and lay down on your back. Extend your legs towards the ceiling so that the bar rests on the bridge of your feet and is above your hips. Tip: Make sure the bar stays in this position, one way to make sure it stays there is to push your heels towards the ceiling at all times. Now flex your glutes and push your hips towards the ceiling too, lifting them up and off the floor. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and descend your hips and the bar by relaxing your glutes and bending your knees. Allow your knees to flare out wide as you go. Continue to descend the bar until your hips start to lift off the floor (do not allow this to happen!).
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Leg Press or Smith Machine Squats.

name.es: Elevación de cadera con máquina Smith

en: Load up a smith machine with the desired weight and adjust the height of the bar so it is waist height (make sure you set the safety bars in the correct position too). Next place a mat underneath the bar and lay down on your back. Extend your legs towards the ceiling so that the bar rests on the bridge of your feet and is above your hips. Tip: Make sure the bar stays in this position, one way to make sure it stays there is to push your heels towards the ceiling at all times. Now flex your glutes and push your hips towards the ceiling too, lifting them up and off the floor. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and descend your hips and the bar by relaxing your glutes and bending your knees. Allow your knees to flare out wide as you go. Continue to descend the bar until your hips start to lift off the floor (do not allow this to happen!).
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Leg Press or Smith Machine Squats.
es: Cargue una máquina Smith con el peso deseado y ajuste la altura de la barra para que esté a la altura de la cintura (asegúrese de colocar las barras de seguridad en la posición correcta también). Luego coloque una colchoneta debajo de la barra y recuéstese boca arriba. Extiende las piernas hacia el techo de manera que la barra descanse sobre el puente de tus pies y quede por encima de tus caderas. Consejo: Asegúrate de que la barra se mantenga en esta posición, una forma de asegurarte de que se mantenga ahí es empujando los talones hacia el techo en todo momento. Ahora flexiona los glúteos y empuja también las caderas hacia el techo, levantándolas del suelo. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala y baja las caderas y la barra relajando los glúteos y doblando las rodillas. Permita que sus rodillas se abran a medida que avanza. Continúe descendiendo la barra hasta que sus caderas comiencen a despegarse del piso (¡no permita que esto suceda!).
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y presiona la barra hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de piernas o sentadillas con máquina Smith.

name: Smith Machine Hang Power Clean
instructions: Load the smith machine up with the desired weight and rack it just below your knee height. Adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width overhand grip (palms facing your thighs) just outside your knees. You should have a shoulder width stance bending at both your knees and hips (more so with your hips) to allow your arms to reach the bar (which should be extended at this point). Your chest, shoulders and head should be facing forward at this point. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout this movement to minimise risk of injury. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and drive through your thighs and glutes to thrust your pelvis forward whilst simultaneously shrugging as hard as you can in order to lift the bar. Flare your elbows up and outward until your body is at full extension.
When at full extension, rotate your elbows under and in so that you can take the load on your front deltoids (shoulders) in a front squat position.
After a brief pause, inhale and descend the bar back into the starting position by reversing this movement, making sure you keep the bar close to your body throughout and maintaining good posture.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Cleans or Barbell Cleans.

en: Load the smith machine up with the desired weight and rack it just below your knee height. Adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width overhand grip (palms facing your thighs) just outside your knees. You should have a shoulder width stance bending at both your knees and hips (more so with your hips) to allow your arms to reach the bar (which should be extended at this point). Your chest, shoulders and head should be facing forward at this point. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout this movement to minimise risk of injury. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and drive through your thighs and glutes to thrust your pelvis forward whilst simultaneously shrugging as hard as you can in order to lift the bar. Flare your elbows up and outward until your body is at full extension.
When at full extension, rotate your elbows under and in so that you can take the load on your front deltoids (shoulders) in a front squat position.
After a brief pause, inhale and descend the bar back into the starting position by reversing this movement, making sure you keep the bar close to your body throughout and maintaining good posture.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Cleans or Barbell Cleans.
es: Cargue la máquina Smith con el peso deseado y colóquela justo debajo de la altura de su rodilla. Adopte un agarre por encima de la cabeza ligeramente más ancho que el ancho de los hombros (con las palmas hacia los muslos) justo por fuera de las rodillas. Debes tener una postura a la altura de los hombros doblada tanto en las rodillas como en las caderas (más aún en las caderas) para permitir que tus brazos alcancen la barra (que debe estar extendida en este punto). En este punto, tu pecho, hombros y cabeza deben mirar hacia adelante. Consejo: mantenga la espalda recta durante todo este movimiento para minimizar el riesgo de lesiones. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y conduce a través de tus muslos y glúteos para empujar tu pelvis hacia adelante mientras simultáneamente te encoges de hombros lo más fuerte que puedas para levantar la barra. Expanda los codos hacia arriba y hacia afuera hasta que su cuerpo esté completamente extendido.
Cuando esté completamente extendido, gire los codos hacia abajo y hacia adentro para que pueda soportar la carga sobre los deltoides frontales (hombros) en una posición de sentadilla frontal.

Después de una breve pausa, inhala y baja la barra nuevamente a la posición inicial invirtiendo este movimiento, asegurándote de mantener la barra cerca de tu cuerpo en todo momento y manteniendo una buena postura.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: limpiezas con mancuernas o limpiezas con barra.

name: Narrow Grip Smith Machine Bench Press
instructions: Load the machine with the desired weight and set the position of the bar so it is at waist height. Place a flat bench beneath the bar and lay down on your back so the bar is directly above your chest. Adopt a shoulder width overhand grip (palms facing forwards) and lift the bar off the hooks. Press the bar upwards until your arms are at full extension (slight bend at your elbows) and make sure you have set the safety bars to the correct height. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and descend the bar towards your chest by flexing at your elbows, keeping them close to your body throughout the movement. Continue to descend the bar until it gently touches your chest.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back along the same path into its starting position using your triceps.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Dips or Close-Grip Barbell Bench Press.

name.en: Narrow Grip Smith Machine Bench Press
name.es: Press de banca con máquina Smith de agarre estrecho

en: Load the machine with the desired weight and set the position of the bar so it is at waist height. Place a flat bench beneath the bar and lay down on your back so the bar is directly above your chest. Adopt a shoulder width overhand grip (palms facing forwards) and lift the bar off the hooks. Press the bar upwards until your arms are at full extension (slight bend at your elbows) and make sure you have set the safety bars to the correct height. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and descend the bar towards your chest by flexing at your elbows, keeping them close to your body throughout the movement. Continue to descend the bar until it gently touches your chest.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back along the same path into its starting position using your triceps.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Dips or Close-Grip Barbell Bench Press.
es: Cargue la máquina con el peso deseado y ajuste la posición de la barra de modo que quede a la altura de la cintura. Coloque un banco plano debajo de la barra y recuéstese boca arriba de modo que la barra quede directamente encima de su pecho. Adopte un agarre por encima del ancho de los hombros (con las palmas hacia adelante) y levante la barra de los ganchos. Presione la barra hacia arriba hasta que sus brazos estén completamente extendidos (ligeramente doblados los codos) y asegúrese de haber colocado las barras de seguridad a la altura correcta. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala y desciende la barra hacia tu pecho flexionando los codos, manteniéndolos cerca de tu cuerpo durante todo el movimiento. Continúe descendiendo la barra hasta que toque suavemente su pecho.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y presiona la barra hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial usando tus tríceps.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: fondos en banco o press de banca con barra con agarre cerrado.

aliases: Smith Machine Close Grip Bench Press
Smith Machine Close Grip Chest Press
Narrow Grip Smith Machine Bench Press

name: Smith Machine Bent Over Rows
instructions: Load the smith machine with the desired amount of weight and allow the bar to rest as low as possible in front of you. Take hold of it with a wider than shoulder width, overhand grip by bending at your knees and waist (more so at your waist) whilst maintaining a straight back. Your arms should be hanging perpendicular to the floor at this point. This is your starting position.
Exhale and squeeze the muscles in your back to bring the bar in towards your torso. Bend at the elbow to allow the movement but try not to take any weight through your forearms/biceps.
Once the bar is as close to your body as it can be or the muscles in your back are at tight as they can be, inhale and return the barbell along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This exercise may not be suitable for people that suffer from any back pain/injuries.
Variations: Bent Over Barbell Row or Seated Row Machine (Neutral Grip).

en: Load the smith machine with the desired amount of weight and allow the bar to rest as low as possible in front of you. Take hold of it with a wider than shoulder width, overhand grip by bending at your knees and waist (more so at your waist) whilst maintaining a straight back. Your arms should be hanging perpendicular to the floor at this point. This is your starting position.
Exhale and squeeze the muscles in your back to bring the bar in towards your torso. Bend at the elbow to allow the movement but try not to take any weight through your forearms/biceps.
Once the bar is as close to your body as it can be or the muscles in your back are at tight as they can be, inhale and return the barbell along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This exercise may not be suitable for people that suffer from any back pain/injuries.
Variations: Bent Over Barbell Row or Seated Row Machine (Neutral Grip).
es: Cargue la máquina Smith con la cantidad de peso deseada y permita que la barra descanse lo más bajo posible frente a usted. Sujételo con un agarre más ancho que el ancho de los hombros, doblando las rodillas y la cintura (más aún en la cintura) mientras mantiene la espalda recta. En este punto, tus brazos deben colgar perpendiculares al suelo. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Exhala y aprieta los músculos de tu espalda para llevar la barra hacia tu torso. Doble el codo para permitir el movimiento, pero trate de no pasar ningún peso por los antebrazos o bíceps.
Una vez que la barra esté lo más cerca posible de su cuerpo o que los músculos de su espalda estén lo más tensos posible, inhale y regrese la barra por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Precaución: Este ejercicio puede no ser adecuado para personas que sufren algún dolor o lesión en la espalda.
Variaciones: Remo inclinado con barra o máquina de remo sentado (agarre neutral).

name: Smith Machine Bench Press
instructions: Load the machine with the desired weight and set the position of the bar so it is at waist height. Place a flat bench beneath the bar and lay down on your back so the bar is directly above your chest. Adopt an overhand grip (palms facing forwards) and lift the bar off the hooks. Press the bar upwards until your arms are at full extension (slight bend at your elbows) and make sure you have set the safety bars to the correct height. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and descend the bar towards your chest by flexing at your elbows, allowing them to flare out wide. Continue to descend the bar until either your elbows are at 90 degrees or the bar gently touches your chest.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Bench Press or Dumbbell Bench Press.

name.es: Press de banca con máquina Smith

en: Load the machine with the desired weight and set the position of the bar so it is at waist height. Place a flat bench beneath the bar and lay down on your back so the bar is directly above your chest. Adopt an overhand grip (palms facing forwards) and lift the bar off the hooks. Press the bar upwards until your arms are at full extension (slight bend at your elbows) and make sure you have set the safety bars to the correct height. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and descend the bar towards your chest by flexing at your elbows, allowing them to flare out wide. Continue to descend the bar until either your elbows are at 90 degrees or the bar gently touches your chest.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Bench Press or Dumbbell Bench Press.
es: Cargue la máquina con el peso deseado y ajuste la posición de la barra de modo que quede a la altura de la cintura. Coloque un banco plano debajo de la barra y recuéstese boca arriba de modo que la barra quede directamente encima de su pecho. Adopte un agarre por encima de la cabeza (con las palmas hacia adelante) y levante la barra de los ganchos. Presione la barra hacia arriba hasta que sus brazos estén completamente extendidos (ligeramente doblados los codos) y asegúrese de haber colocado las barras de seguridad a la altura correcta. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhale y descienda la barra hacia su pecho flexionando los codos, permitiendo que se abran ampliamente. Continúe descendiendo la barra hasta que sus codos estén a 90 grados o la barra toque suavemente su pecho.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y presiona la barra hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca con barra o Press de banca con mancuernas.

name: Smith Machine Shrugs Behind The Back
instructions: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the bar just below your glutes. Stand with a shoulder width stance, with your back to the bar. Adopt an overhand grip (palms facing away from you) and lean away from the machine. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale, shrug your shoulders upwards and pull them in towards your ears at the same time. Keep your arms at full extension (a slight bend at your elbows) as you do so. Continue to shrug until you cannot lift your shoulders anymore.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Shrugs or Dumbbell Shrugs.

name.en: Smith Machine Shrugs Behind The Back
name.es: máquina Smith se encoge de hombros detrás de la espalda

en: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the bar just below your glutes. Stand with a shoulder width stance, with your back to the bar. Adopt an overhand grip (palms facing away from you) and lean away from the machine. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale, shrug your shoulders upwards and pull them in towards your ears at the same time. Keep your arms at full extension (a slight bend at your elbows) as you do so. Continue to shrug until you cannot lift your shoulders anymore.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Shrugs or Dumbbell Shrugs.
es: Configure la máquina con el peso deseado y establezca la posición de la barra justo debajo de sus glúteos. Párese con una postura a la altura de los hombros, de espaldas a la barra. Adopte un agarre por encima de la cabeza (con las palmas hacia afuera) e inclínese hacia afuera de la máquina. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala, encoge los hombros hacia arriba y jálalos hacia las orejas al mismo tiempo. Mantenga los brazos completamente extendidos (una ligera flexión de los codos) mientras lo hace. Continúe encogiéndose de hombros hasta que ya no pueda levantarlos.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la barra por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: encogimiento de hombros con barra o encogimiento de hombros con mancuernas.

aliases: Smith Machine Behind the Back Shrug
Smith Machine Shrugs Behind The Back

name: Smith Machine Shoulder Raise
instructions: Place an incline bench underneath the smith machine.  Place the barbell at a height that you can reach when lying down and your arms are almost fully extended.  Once the weight you need is selected, lie down on the incline bench and make sure your shoulders are aligned right under the barbell.
Using a shoulder width pronated (palms forward) grip, lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with a slight bend at the elbows.  This will be your starting position.
As you breathe out, lift the bar up until your arms are fully extended.  Note: The contraction should be felt around the shoulders.
After a second pause, bring the bar back down to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.
Variations: You can perform this exercise with dumbbells or a barbell.

name.es: Elevación de hombros con máquina Smith

en: Place an incline bench underneath the smith machine.  Place the barbell at a height that you can reach when lying down and your arms are almost fully extended.  Once the weight you need is selected, lie down on the incline bench and make sure your shoulders are aligned right under the barbell.
Using a shoulder width pronated (palms forward) grip, lift the bar from the rack and hold it straight over you with a slight bend at the elbows.  This will be your starting position.
As you breathe out, lift the bar up until your arms are fully extended.  Note: The contraction should be felt around the shoulders.
After a second pause, bring the bar back down to the starting position as you breathe in.
Repeat the movement for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
When you are done, place the bar back in the rack.
Variations: You can perform this exercise with dumbbells or a barbell.
es: Coloque un banco inclinado debajo de la máquina Smith.  Coloca la barra a una altura que puedas alcanzar estando acostado y con los brazos casi completamente extendidos.  Una vez seleccionado el peso que necesita, acuéstese en el banco inclinado y asegúrese de que sus hombros estén alineados justo debajo de la barra.

Usando un agarre en pronación (con las palmas hacia adelante) al ancho de los hombros, levante la barra del estante y manténgala recta sobre usted con una ligera flexión de los codos.  Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras exhalas, levanta la barra hasta que tus brazos estén completamente extendidos.  Nota: La contracción debe sentirse alrededor de los hombros.
Después de una segunda pausa, baje la barra a la posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repita el movimiento durante la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Cuando haya terminado, coloque la barra nuevamente en la rejilla.
Variaciones: Puedes realizar este ejercicio con mancuernas o barra.

name: Standing Hamstring Curl Machine
instructions: Adjust the machine lever to fit your height and lie with your torso bent at the waist facing forward around 30-45 degrees (since an angled position is more favorable for hamstrings recruitment) with the pad of the lever on the back of your right leg (just a few inches under the calves) and the front of the right leg on top of the machine pad.
Keeping the torso bent forward, ensure your leg is fully stretched and grab the side handles of the machine.  Position your toes straight.  This will be your starting position.
As you exhale, curl your right leg up as far as possible without lifting the upper leg from the pad.  Once you hit the fully contracted position, hold it for a second.
As you inhale, bring the legs back to the initial position.  Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Perform the same exercise now for the left leg.

name.es: Máquina de curl de isquiosurales de pie

en: Adjust the machine lever to fit your height and lie with your torso bent at the waist facing forward around 30-45 degrees (since an angled position is more favorable for hamstrings recruitment) with the pad of the lever on the back of your right leg (just a few inches under the calves) and the front of the right leg on top of the machine pad.
Keeping the torso bent forward, ensure your leg is fully stretched and grab the side handles of the machine.  Position your toes straight.  This will be your starting position.
As you exhale, curl your right leg up as far as possible without lifting the upper leg from the pad.  Once you hit the fully contracted position, hold it for a second.
As you inhale, bring the legs back to the initial position.  Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Perform the same exercise now for the left leg.
es: Ajuste la palanca de la máquina para que se ajuste a su altura y acuéstese con el torso doblado por la cintura mirando hacia adelante entre 30 y 45 grados (ya que una posición en ángulo es más favorable para el reclutamiento de los isquiosurales) con la almohadilla de la palanca en la parte posterior de la pierna derecha (solo unos pocos centímetros debajo de las gemelos) y la parte delantera de la pierna derecha encima de la almohadilla de la máquina.

Manteniendo el torso inclinado hacia adelante, asegúrese de que la pierna esté completamente estirada y agarre las manijas laterales de la máquina.  Coloque los dedos de los pies rectos.  Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras exhala, doble la pierna derecha hacia arriba lo más que pueda sin levantar la parte superior de la pierna de la almohadilla.  Una vez que llegues a la posición completamente contraída, mantenla por un segundo.
Mientras inhalas, lleva las piernas a la posición inicial.  Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Realiza el mismo ejercicio ahora para la pierna izquierda.

name: Seated Leg Curl
instructions: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the back rest (when you sit on the machine, the back of your knees should be in contact with the edge of the seat). Next take a seat and check that when you rest your legs on the working pad, it is located just below your calves. The last guard to move is the one that gently locks your thighs in position. After you have done this, take hold of the handles in front of you and make sure your back is supported and in contact with the back rest. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale as you squeeze your heels in towards your glutes in an arcing motion by flexing your knees. Continue to do so until your hamstrings are as tight as can be or that you cannot bend your knees anymore.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the pad back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lying Hamstring Curls or Natural Glute Ham Raise.

en: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the back rest (when you sit on the machine, the back of your knees should be in contact with the edge of the seat). Next take a seat and check that when you rest your legs on the working pad, it is located just below your calves. The last guard to move is the one that gently locks your thighs in position. After you have done this, take hold of the handles in front of you and make sure your back is supported and in contact with the back rest. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale as you squeeze your heels in towards your glutes in an arcing motion by flexing your knees. Continue to do so until your hamstrings are as tight as can be or that you cannot bend your knees anymore.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the pad back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Lying Hamstring Curls or Natural Glute Ham Raise.
es: Ajuste la máquina al peso deseado y ajuste la posición del respaldo (cuando se siente en la máquina, la parte posterior de las rodillas debe estar en contacto con el borde del asiento). A continuación toma asiento y comprueba que cuando apoyes las piernas sobre la plataforma de trabajo, ésta quede justo debajo de tus gemelos. El último protector en moverse es el que bloquea suavemente los muslos en su posición. Después de haber hecho esto, agarre las manijas frente a usted y asegúrese de que su espalda esté apoyada y en contacto con el respaldo. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale mientras aprieta los talones hacia los glúteos formando un arco flexionando las rodillas. Continúe haciéndolo hasta que los isquiosurales estén lo más tensos posible o hasta que ya no pueda doblar las rodillas.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese la almohadilla por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: rizos de isquiosurales acostados o elevación natural de glúteos.

name: Seated Calf Raise Machine
instructions: Place the recommended amount of weight on the machine and take a seat. Once you are seated, place the balls of your feet on the foot plate with your toes pointed forward. Next, adjust the height of the lever pad and place your lower thighs under it. Place your hands on top of the lever pad in order to prevent it from slipping.
Lift the lever slightly by pushing through the balls of your feet and release the safety bar. This will be your starting position.
Inhale as you slowly lower your heels towards the floor and continue until your calves are fully stretched.

As you exhale, press through the balls of your feet, contracting the calves until your ankles are as high as possible. Hold and squeeze your calves for a second before repeating the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Calf Raise Machine (Toes Out) or Seated Calf Raise Machine (Toes In).

name.es: Máquina de elevación de gemelos sentado

en: Place the recommended amount of weight on the machine and take a seat. Once you are seated, place the balls of your feet on the foot plate with your toes pointed forward. Next, adjust the height of the lever pad and place your lower thighs under it. Place your hands on top of the lever pad in order to prevent it from slipping.
Lift the lever slightly by pushing through the balls of your feet and release the safety bar. This will be your starting position.
Inhale as you slowly lower your heels towards the floor and continue until your calves are fully stretched.

As you exhale, press through the balls of your feet, contracting the calves until your ankles are as high as possible. Hold and squeeze your calves for a second before repeating the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Calf Raise Machine (Toes Out) or Seated Calf Raise Machine (Toes In).
es: Coloca la cantidad de peso recomendada sobre la máquina y toma asiento. Una vez que esté sentado, coloque las puntas de los pies en el reposapiés con los dedos apuntando hacia adelante. A continuación, ajuste la altura de la palanca y coloque la parte inferior de los muslos debajo de ella. Coloque sus manos encima de la palanca para evitar que se resbale.
Levante ligeramente la palanca empujándola con las puntas de los pies y suelte la barra de seguridad. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inhala mientras bajas lentamente los talones hacia el suelo y continúa hasta que las gemelos estén completamente estiradas.

Mientras exhala, presione las puntas de los pies, contrayendo las gemelos hasta que los tobillos estén lo más altos posible. Sostenga y apriete las gemelos durante un segundo antes de repetir el movimiento durante la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Máquina de elevación de gemelos sentado (con los dedos de los pies hacia afuera) o Máquina de elevación de gemelos sentado (con los dedos de los pies hacia adentro).

name: Reverse Hyperextensions Over An Exercise Ball
instructions: 1) Lie face down on an exercise ball with your hips positioned at the top of the ball and your legs extended straight behind you. Place your hands on the floor in front of you for stability. This will be your starting position.
2) Engage your core muscles to maintain stability and ensure your spine remains in a neutral position throughout the movement.
3) In a controlled motion, lift both legs towards the ceiling by contracting your glutes and hamstrings. Keep your legs straight and avoid arching your back.
4) Pause at the top of the movement, feeling the contraction in your glutes and lower back.
5) Slowly lower your legs back to the starting position, maintaining control and stability.
6) Repeat the movement for the recommended number of repetitions, focusing on the engagement of your glutes and hamstrings.
7) Remember to breathe consistently and avoid any sudden or jerky movements.
This reverse hyperextension exercise helps target the muscles of your lower back, glutes, and hamstrings, promoting strength and stability in your posterior chain.

name.en: Reverse Hyperextensions Over An Exercise Ball
name.es: Hiperextensiones inversas sobre una pelota de ejercicio

en: 1) Lie face down on an exercise ball with your hips positioned at the top of the ball and your legs extended straight behind you. Place your hands on the floor in front of you for stability. This will be your starting position.
2) Engage your core muscles to maintain stability and ensure your spine remains in a neutral position throughout the movement.
3) In a controlled motion, lift both legs towards the ceiling by contracting your glutes and hamstrings. Keep your legs straight and avoid arching your back.
4) Pause at the top of the movement, feeling the contraction in your glutes and lower back.
5) Slowly lower your legs back to the starting position, maintaining control and stability.
6) Repeat the movement for the recommended number of repetitions, focusing on the engagement of your glutes and hamstrings.
7) Remember to breathe consistently and avoid any sudden or jerky movements.
This reverse hyperextension exercise helps target the muscles of your lower back, glutes, and hamstrings, promoting strength and stability in your posterior chain.
es: 1) Acuéstese boca abajo sobre una pelota de ejercicios con las caderas colocadas en la parte superior de la pelota y las piernas extendidas hacia atrás. Coloque sus manos en el suelo frente a usted para mayor estabilidad. Esta será tu posición inicial.
2) Involucre sus músculos centrales para mantener la estabilidad y asegúrese de que su columna permanezca en una posición neutral durante todo el movimiento.
3) Con un movimiento controlado, levanta ambas piernas hacia el techo contrayendo los glúteos y los isquiosurales. Mantenga las piernas rectas y evite arquear la espalda.
4) Haga una pausa en la parte superior del movimiento, sintiendo la contracción en los glúteos y la zona lumbar.
5) Baje lentamente las piernas hasta la posición inicial, manteniendo el control y la estabilidad.
6) Repita el movimiento durante el número recomendado de repeticiones, concentrándose en la participación de los glúteos y los isquiosurales.
7) Recuerde respira constantemente y evitar movimientos bruscos o espasmódicos.
Este ejercicio de hiperextensión inversa ayuda a trabajar los músculos de la espalda baja, los glúteos y los isquiosurales, promoviendo la fuerza y ​​la estabilidad en la cadena posterior.

aliases: Reverse Hyperextensions Over An Exercise Ball

name: Rear Delt Machine Flyes
instructions: Set the handles so they are together behind the seat. Next adjust the height of the seat so that your knees and hips are at 90 degrees and when you take hold of the handles your arms are parallel with the floor. Now sit down, facing the machine a grab the handles with an overhand grip (palms facing the floor). This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the handles back on a wide arcing motion behind you, making sure your arms are at full extension (slight bend at the elbows) and are parallel to the floor. Tip: Your chest should maintain contact with the pad in front of you throughout the movement. Continue to pull the handles back until either the muscles in your back are fully contracted or your shoulder blades cannot be retracted anymore.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Face Pulls or Barbell Rear Delt Rows.

name.es: Volantes de máquina de deltoides posteriores

en: Set the handles so they are together behind the seat. Next adjust the height of the seat so that your knees and hips are at 90 degrees and when you take hold of the handles your arms are parallel with the floor. Now sit down, facing the machine a grab the handles with an overhand grip (palms facing the floor). This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the handles back on a wide arcing motion behind you, making sure your arms are at full extension (slight bend at the elbows) and are parallel to the floor. Tip: Your chest should maintain contact with the pad in front of you throughout the movement. Continue to pull the handles back until either the muscles in your back are fully contracted or your shoulder blades cannot be retracted anymore.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Face Pulls or Barbell Rear Delt Rows.
es: Coloque las manijas de manera que queden juntas detrás del asiento. Luego ajusta la altura del asiento para que tus rodillas y caderas estén a 90 grados y cuando agarres las manijas tus brazos queden paralelos al piso. Ahora siéntese, frente a la máquina y agarre las manijas con un agarre por encima de la cabeza (con las palmas hacia el piso). Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y tire de las manijas hacia atrás con un movimiento de arco amplio detrás de usted, asegurándose de que sus brazos estén completamente extendidos (ligeramente doblados los codos) y paralelos al piso. Consejo: Tu pecho debe mantener contacto con la almohadilla frente a ti durante todo el movimiento. Continúe tirando de las manijas hacia atrás hasta que los músculos de la espalda estén completamente contraídos o los omóplatos ya no puedan retraerse.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese las manijas por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Tirones faciales o remo delt posterior con barra.

name: Pec Deck
instructions: Take a seat on the machine, facing forwards and adjust the height of the seat so that your hips and knees are at 90 degrees. Next adjust the handles to the correct position so that they gently stretch your pectoral muscles when you take hold of them. Grip the handles and make sure that your arms are parallel to the floor at this point. This is your starting position. Tip: Keep your elbows in line with your wrists and shoulders throughout the movement and they remain slightly bent.

To initiate the movement, exhale and bring your hands out on a wide arcing motion in front of you using your pectoral muscles to do so. Keep your chest as high as you can with your back in contact with the back rest. Continue to bring your hands together until they meet in the middle.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Flyes or Cable Crossovers.

en: Take a seat on the machine, facing forwards and adjust the height of the seat so that your hips and knees are at 90 degrees. Next adjust the handles to the correct position so that they gently stretch your pectoral muscles when you take hold of them. Grip the handles and make sure that your arms are parallel to the floor at this point. This is your starting position. Tip: Keep your elbows in line with your wrists and shoulders throughout the movement and they remain slightly bent.

To initiate the movement, exhale and bring your hands out on a wide arcing motion in front of you using your pectoral muscles to do so. Keep your chest as high as you can with your back in contact with the back rest. Continue to bring your hands together until they meet in the middle.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Flyes or Cable Crossovers.
es: Siéntese en la máquina, mirando hacia adelante y ajuste la altura del asiento para que sus caderas y rodillas queden a 90 grados. A continuación, ajuste las manijas a la posición correcta para que estiren suavemente los músculos pectorales cuando las agarre. Agarre las manijas y asegúrese de que sus brazos estén paralelos al piso en este punto. Esta es tu posición inicial. Consejo: Mantenga los codos alineados con las muñecas y los hombros durante todo el movimiento y permanezcan ligeramente doblados.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y extienda las manos formando un amplio arco frente a usted utilizando los músculos pectorales para hacerlo. Mantenga el pecho lo más alto que pueda con la espalda en contacto con el respaldo. Continúe juntando las manos hasta que se encuentren en el medio.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese las manijas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: aperturas con mancuernas o cruces con cable.

name: Abductor Machine External
instructions: Take a seat on the machine, placing the knee pads on the outside of your thighs with your feet in the stirrups. Make sure your knees and hips are at 90 degrees and you have the correct weight applied.
To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your knees apart until the pads are as wide as possible.
After a brief pause, inhale and reverse the movement returning the pads back along the same path into their starting position.

en: Take a seat on the machine, placing the knee pads on the outside of your thighs with your feet in the stirrups. Make sure your knees and hips are at 90 degrees and you have the correct weight applied.
To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your knees apart until the pads are as wide as possible.
After a brief pause, inhale and reverse the movement returning the pads back along the same path into their starting position.
es: Siéntate en la máquina, colocando las rodilleras en la parte exterior de los muslos con los pies en los estribos. Asegúrese de que sus rodillas y caderas estén a 90 grados y de aplicar el peso correcto.
Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y separa las rodillas hasta que las almohadillas estén lo más anchas posible.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala e invierte el movimiento devolviendo las almohadillas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.

name: Single Arm Pulldowns
instructions: Attach a handle to the machine, set the weight to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is positioned correctly. Take a seat facing the machine (tuck your hips in so they are touching the leg brace) and grab the handle with an overhand grip so your arm is extended towards the ceiling. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the handle down towards your chest using the muscles across your back and bicep. Lean back ever so slightly as your pull the weight downwards and maintain your posture throughout. Continue to pull the handle down until either your muscles are optimally contracted or it is in contact with your chest.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Dumbbell Rows or Seated One-Arm Cable Pulley Rows.

en: Attach a handle to the machine, set the weight to the recommended amount and check that the leg brace is positioned correctly. Take a seat facing the machine (tuck your hips in so they are touching the leg brace) and grab the handle with an overhand grip so your arm is extended towards the ceiling. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the handle down towards your chest using the muscles across your back and bicep. Lean back ever so slightly as your pull the weight downwards and maintain your posture throughout. Continue to pull the handle down until either your muscles are optimally contracted or it is in contact with your chest.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Dumbbell Rows or Seated One-Arm Cable Pulley Rows.
es: Coloque un mango en la máquina, ajuste el peso a la carga indicada y verifique que la abrazadera para piernas esté colocada correctamente. Tome asiento frente a la máquina (meta las caderas hacia adentro para que toquen el soporte para las piernas) y agarre el mango con un agarre por encima de la cabeza para que su brazo quede extendido hacia el techo. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y tire del mango hacia su pecho usando los músculos de la espalda y los bíceps. Inclínese ligeramente hacia atrás mientras tira del peso hacia abajo y mantenga la postura en todo momento. Continúe tirando del mango hacia abajo hasta que sus músculos estén contraídos de manera óptima o esté en contacto con su pecho.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese el mango por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita la número indicado de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variaciones: remo con mancuernas o remo sentado en polea con cable a un brazo.

name: Narrow Stance Leg Press
instructions: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the seat (you will want your knees to be at a 90 degree angle when you get into position). Next take a seat and lift your feet up onto the foot plate in front of you. Have your feet and knees together, your knees at a 90 degree angle and your lower back supported. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and press the foot plate away by putting pressure though your heels and shoes laces. Contract your thigh and glute muscles whilst simultaneously pulling your hips into the seat. Continue to press the foot plate away until your legs are fully extended (slight bend at your knees).
After a brief pause, inhale and return your legs back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Dumbbell Squats.

name.es: Press de piernas en posición estrecha

en: Set the machine to the desired weight and set the position of the seat (you will want your knees to be at a 90 degree angle when you get into position). Next take a seat and lift your feet up onto the foot plate in front of you. Have your feet and knees together, your knees at a 90 degree angle and your lower back supported. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and press the foot plate away by putting pressure though your heels and shoes laces. Contract your thigh and glute muscles whilst simultaneously pulling your hips into the seat. Continue to press the foot plate away until your legs are fully extended (slight bend at your knees).
After a brief pause, inhale and return your legs back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Dumbbell Squats.
es: Configure la máquina con el peso deseado y establezca la posición del asiento (querrá que sus rodillas estén en un ángulo de 90 grados cuando se coloque en posición). Luego, siéntese y levante los pies sobre la plataforma para pies frente a usted. Mantenga los pies y las rodillas juntos, las rodillas en un ángulo de 90 grados y la zona lumbar apoyada. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y presione la placa para los pies hacia afuera ejerciendo presión a través de los talones y los cordones de los zapatos. Contraiga los músculos de los muslos y los glúteos mientras simultáneamente empuja las caderas hacia el asiento. Continúe presionando la plataforma para los pies hasta que las piernas estén completamente extendidas (doble ligeramente las rodillas).
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa las piernas por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Sentadillas con barra o Sentadillas con mancuernas.

name: Hack Squat Narrow Stance
instructions: Place the back of your torso against the back pad of the machine and hook your shoulders under the shoulder pads provided.

Position your legs in the platform using a less than shoulder width narrow stance with the toes slightly pointed out.  Your feet should be around 3 inches or less apart. Tip: Keep your head up at all times and also maintain the back on the pad at all times.
Place your arms on the side handles of the machine and disengage the safety bars (which on most designs is done by moving the side handles from a facing front position to a diagonal position).
Now straighten your legs without locking the knees.  This will be your starting position.

Begin to slowly lower the unit by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up (back on the pad at all times).  Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor).  Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Begin to raise the unit as you exhale by pushing the floor with mainly with the heels of your feet as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

en: Place the back of your torso against the back pad of the machine and hook your shoulders under the shoulder pads provided.

Position your legs in the platform using a less than shoulder width narrow stance with the toes slightly pointed out.  Your feet should be around 3 inches or less apart. Tip: Keep your head up at all times and also maintain the back on the pad at all times.
Place your arms on the side handles of the machine and disengage the safety bars (which on most designs is done by moving the side handles from a facing front position to a diagonal position).
Now straighten your legs without locking the knees.  This will be your starting position.

Begin to slowly lower the unit by bending the knees as you maintain a straight posture with the head up (back on the pad at all times).  Continue down until the angle between the upper leg and the calves becomes slightly less than 90-degrees (which is the point in which the upper legs are below parallel to the floor).  Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Begin to raise the unit as you exhale by pushing the floor with mainly with the heels of your feet as you straighten the legs again and go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Coloque la parte posterior de su torso contra la almohadilla trasera de la máquina y enganche sus hombros debajo de las hombreras provistas.

Coloque las piernas en la plataforma utilizando una postura estrecha que tenga menos del ancho de los hombros y con los dedos de los pies ligeramente apuntados.  Tus pies deben estar separados alrededor de 3 pulgadas o menos. Consejo: Mantén la cabeza erguida en todo momento y también mantén la espalda sobre la almohadilla en todo momento.

Coloque los brazos en las manijas laterales de la máquina y desenganche las barras de seguridad (lo que en la mayoría de los diseños se hace moviendo las manijas laterales desde una posición frontal a una posición diagonal).
Ahora estire las piernas sin bloquear las rodillas.  Esta será tu posición inicial.

Comience a bajar lentamente la unidad doblando las rodillas mientras mantiene una postura recta con la cabeza hacia arriba (de espaldas a la almohadilla en todo momento).  Continúe hacia abajo hasta que el ángulo entre la parte superior de la pierna y las gemelos sea ligeramente inferior a 90 grados (que es el punto en el que la parte superior de las piernas queda paralela al suelo).  Inhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento.
Comience a elevar la unidad mientras exhala empujando el suelo principalmente con los talones de los pies mientras estira las piernas nuevamente y regresa a la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.

name: Standing Calf Raise Machine
instructions: Adjust the seat so that your legs are only slightly bent in the start position. The balls of your feet should be firmly on the platform.
Select an appropriate weight, and grasp the handles. This will be your starting position.

Straighten the legs by extending the knees, just barely lifting the weight from the stack. Your ankle should be fully flexed, toes pointing up. Execute the movement by pressing downward through the balls of your feet as far as possible.
After a brief pause, reverse the motion and repeat.

name.es: Máquina de elevación de gemelos de pie

en: Adjust the seat so that your legs are only slightly bent in the start position. The balls of your feet should be firmly on the platform.
Select an appropriate weight, and grasp the handles. This will be your starting position.

Straighten the legs by extending the knees, just barely lifting the weight from the stack. Your ankle should be fully flexed, toes pointing up. Execute the movement by pressing downward through the balls of your feet as far as possible.
After a brief pause, reverse the motion and repeat.
es: Ajuste el asiento de modo que sus piernas queden ligeramente dobladas en la posición inicial. Las puntas de los pies deben estar firmemente apoyadas en la plataforma.
Seleccione un peso adecuado y agarre las asas. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Estire las piernas extendiendo las rodillas, levantando apenas el peso de la pila. Su tobillo debe estar completamente flexionado, con los dedos apuntando hacia arriba. Ejecute el movimiento presionando hacia abajo a través de las puntas de los pies lo más que pueda.
Después de una breve pausa, invierta el movimiento y repita.

name: Bicep Curl Machine
instructions: Sit down on the Preacher Curl Machine and select the weight.

Place the back of your upper arms (your triceps) on the preacher pad provided and grab the handles using an underhand grip (palms facing up).  Tip: Make sure that when you place the arms on the pad you keep the elbows in.  This will be your starting position.

Now lift the handles as you exhale and you contract the biceps.  At the top of the position make sure that you hold the contraction for a second.  Tip: Only the forearms should move.  The upper arms should remain stationary and on the pad at all times.
Lower the handles slowly back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Variations: You can use free weights (barbells and dumbbells) to perform this exercise on a preacher bench.  Alternatively, you can use the pulley machine as well in conjunction with a preacher bench.

en: Sit down on the Preacher Curl Machine and select the weight.

Place the back of your upper arms (your triceps) on the preacher pad provided and grab the handles using an underhand grip (palms facing up).  Tip: Make sure that when you place the arms on the pad you keep the elbows in.  This will be your starting position.

Now lift the handles as you exhale and you contract the biceps.  At the top of the position make sure that you hold the contraction for a second.  Tip: Only the forearms should move.  The upper arms should remain stationary and on the pad at all times.
Lower the handles slowly back to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Variations: You can use free weights (barbells and dumbbells) to perform this exercise on a preacher bench.  Alternatively, you can use the pulley machine as well in conjunction with a preacher bench.
es: Siéntate en la máquina Preacher Curl y selecciona el peso.

Coloque la parte posterior de la parte superior de sus brazos (tríceps) sobre la almohadilla de predicador provista y agarre las manijas con las palmas hacia arriba.  Consejo: Asegúrate de que cuando coloques los brazos sobre la almohadilla mantengas los codos hacia adentro. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Ahora levanta las asas mientras exhalas y contraes el bíceps.  En la parte superior de la posición, asegúrate de mantener la contracción por un segundo.  Consejo: Sólo deben moverse los antebrazos.  La parte superior de los brazos debe permanecer fija y sobre la almohadilla en todo momento.
Baje las manijas lentamente hasta la posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.

Variaciones: Puedes utilizar pesas libres (barras y mancuernas) para realizar este ejercicio en un banco de predicador.  Alternativamente, también puede utilizar la máquina de poleas junto con un banco de predicador.

sourceClip.title: Anytime Fitness Hausman Bicep Curl Machine

name: Lying T Bar Row
instructions: Load a barbell with the desired amount of weight and place it in a Lying T-Bar Row machine. Lay face down on the machine with your head off the end so you can maintain a straight spine throughout. Grab the barbell with a wide overhand (palms facing away from you) grip, and take the bar off the rack so your arms are now taking the load. Your arms at this point should be straight and hanging below your torso. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the bar up towards your chest allowing your elbows to flare out wide as the bar ascends. Use the muscles across the top of your back and your biceps to do pull the bar upwards. Continue to do so until the muscles in your back are fully contracted.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Bent Over Rows or Barbell Rows.

name.es: Remo con barra en T acostado

en: Load a barbell with the desired amount of weight and place it in a Lying T-Bar Row machine. Lay face down on the machine with your head off the end so you can maintain a straight spine throughout. Grab the barbell with a wide overhand (palms facing away from you) grip, and take the bar off the rack so your arms are now taking the load. Your arms at this point should be straight and hanging below your torso. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the bar up towards your chest allowing your elbows to flare out wide as the bar ascends. Use the muscles across the top of your back and your biceps to do pull the bar upwards. Continue to do so until the muscles in your back are fully contracted.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Bent Over Rows or Barbell Rows.
es: Cargue una barra con la cantidad de peso deseada y colóquela en una máquina de remo con barra en T acostada. Acuéstese boca abajo en la máquina con la cabeza alejada del extremo para que pueda mantener la columna recta en todo momento. Agarre la barra con un agarre amplio por encima de la cabeza (con las palmas hacia afuera) y retire la barra del estante para que sus brazos ahora soporten la carga. En este punto, tus brazos deben estar rectos y colgando debajo de tu torso. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y tire de la barra hacia su pecho permitiendo que sus codos se abran a medida que la barra asciende. Utilice los músculos de la parte superior de la espalda y los bíceps para tirar de la barra hacia arriba. Continúe haciéndolo hasta que los músculos de la espalda estén completamente contraídos.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la barra por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: remo inclinado con mancuernas o remo con barra.

name: Lying Hamstring Curls
instructions: Set the resistance of the machine to the prescribed amount and lay on the pad, face down with your heels tucked underneath the ankle brace. Lay with your forehead facing the floor so that your spine is in one straight line. Take hold of the handles and make sure your hips do not lift off the machine whilst you perform the movement. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your heels in towards your glutes by contracting your hamstrings. Continue to pull the pad up and inwards on an arcing motion until the pad gently touches your glutes. Try to keep your hips down whilst you make this movement.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the pad back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Hamstring Curl Machine or Natural Glute Ham Raises.

en: Set the resistance of the machine to the prescribed amount and lay on the pad, face down with your heels tucked underneath the ankle brace. Lay with your forehead facing the floor so that your spine is in one straight line. Take hold of the handles and make sure your hips do not lift off the machine whilst you perform the movement. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your heels in towards your glutes by contracting your hamstrings. Continue to pull the pad up and inwards on an arcing motion until the pad gently touches your glutes. Try to keep your hips down whilst you make this movement.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the pad back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Hamstring Curl Machine or Natural Glute Ham Raises.
es: Ajuste la resistencia de la máquina a la cantidad prescrita y recuéstese sobre la almohadilla, boca abajo con los talones metidos debajo de la tobillera. Acuéstese con la frente mirando al suelo de modo que la columna esté en línea recta. Sujeta las asas y asegúrate de que tus caderas no se levanten de la máquina mientras realizas el movimiento. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y tira de los talones hacia los glúteos contrayendo los isquiosurales. Continúe tirando de la almohadilla hacia arriba y hacia adentro con un movimiento de arco hasta que la almohadilla toque suavemente sus glúteos. Intenta mantener las caderas hacia abajo mientras realizas este movimiento.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese la almohadilla por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: máquina de curl de isquiosurales de pie o elevaciones naturales de glúteos.

name: Leverage Squat
instructions: Load the machine with the desired weight and step under the shoulder pads whilst placing your feet onto the foot plate. Your feet should be shoulder width apart with your weight being supported by the shoulder pads. Take hold of the handles is possible, if not, place them where they will not assist the movement but will equally be safe. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and descend into a squatting motion by bending at your hips and knees simultaneously. Continue to descend until you reach a 90 degree bend at both joints (or just past). Tip: Keep your back straight throughout the movement to minimise the risk of injury.
After a brief pause, exhale and push through your quads and glutes to return your body back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Dumbbell Squats.

en: Load the machine with the desired weight and step under the shoulder pads whilst placing your feet onto the foot plate. Your feet should be shoulder width apart with your weight being supported by the shoulder pads. Take hold of the handles is possible, if not, place them where they will not assist the movement but will equally be safe. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and descend into a squatting motion by bending at your hips and knees simultaneously. Continue to descend until you reach a 90 degree bend at both joints (or just past). Tip: Keep your back straight throughout the movement to minimise the risk of injury.
After a brief pause, exhale and push through your quads and glutes to return your body back along the same path into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Squats or Dumbbell Squats.
es: Cargue la máquina con el peso deseado y colóquese debajo de las hombreras mientras coloca los pies en la plataforma para los pies. Tus pies deben estar separados al ancho de tus hombros y tu peso debe estar apoyado en las hombreras. Es posible agarrar las asas, si no, colocarlas en un lugar donde no faciliten el movimiento pero que sea igualmente seguro. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhale y descienda hasta ponerse en cuclillas doblando las caderas y las rodillas simultáneamente. Continúe descendiendo hasta llegar a una curva de 90 grados en ambas uniones (o justo después). Consejo: Mantenga la espalda recta durante todo el movimiento para minimizar el riesgo de lesiones.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y empuja tus cuádriceps y glúteos para que tu cuerpo regrese por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Sentadillas con barra o Sentadillas con mancuernas.

name: Leverage Shoulder Press
instructions: Load the machine up with the desired weight and adjust the height of the seat (so that the handles are just above shoulder height). Take a seat facing away from the machine and take hold of the handles (either neutral or overhand). This is your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and extend your arms up above your head towards the ceiling. Continue to press your arms towards the ceiling until they are (just off) vertical from the floor.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Cable Shoulder Press or Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press.

en: Load the machine up with the desired weight and adjust the height of the seat (so that the handles are just above shoulder height). Take a seat facing away from the machine and take hold of the handles (either neutral or overhand). This is your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and extend your arms up above your head towards the ceiling. Continue to press your arms towards the ceiling until they are (just off) vertical from the floor.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Cable Shoulder Press or Seated Dumbbell Shoulder Press.
es: Cargue la máquina con el peso deseado y ajuste la altura del asiento (de modo que las manijas queden justo por encima de la altura de los hombros). Tome asiento de espaldas a la máquina y sujete las manijas (ya sea en punto muerto o por encima de la cabeza). Esta es tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y extiende los brazos por encima de la cabeza hacia el techo. Continúe presionando los brazos hacia el techo hasta que estén (justo fuera) verticales del suelo.
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese las manijas por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de hombros con cable sentado o Press de hombros sentado con mancuernas.

name: Leverage Iso Row
instructions: Load the machine up with the desired weight and adjust the height of the seat (so that your sternum is placed upon the chest support) and the depth of the chest support (so when your reach for the handles, your arms are at full reach). Take a seat facing the handles and reach forward to take hold of them with a neutral grip. Tip: It is paramount to maintain good posture throughout this movement. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the handles in towards your lower abdominals by contracting your back muscles. Your elbows should be close to your torso and your arms should remain as passive as possible.
Once the muscles in your back are optimally contracted, pause for a brief moment before inhaling and returning the handles back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Landmine T Bar Rows or Seated Cable Rows.

en: Load the machine up with the desired weight and adjust the height of the seat (so that your sternum is placed upon the chest support) and the depth of the chest support (so when your reach for the handles, your arms are at full reach). Take a seat facing the handles and reach forward to take hold of them with a neutral grip. Tip: It is paramount to maintain good posture throughout this movement. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the handles in towards your lower abdominals by contracting your back muscles. Your elbows should be close to your torso and your arms should remain as passive as possible.
Once the muscles in your back are optimally contracted, pause for a brief moment before inhaling and returning the handles back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Landmine T Bar Rows or Seated Cable Rows.
es: Cargue la máquina con el peso deseado y ajuste la altura del asiento (de modo que su esternón quede sobre el soporte del pecho) y la profundidad del soporte del pecho (de modo que cuando alcance las manijas, sus brazos estén completamente extendidos). Siéntese frente a las manijas y estírese hacia adelante para agarrarlas con un agarre neutral. Consejo: Es primordial mantener una buena postura durante todo este movimiento. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y tire de las manijas hacia los abdominales inferiores contrayendo los músculos de la espalda. Tus codos deben estar cerca de tu torso y tus brazos deben permanecer lo más pasivos posible.
Una vez que los músculos de la espalda estén contraídos de manera óptima, haga una pausa por un breve momento antes de inhalar y regresar las manijas por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: remo con barra en T para minas terrestres o remo con cable sentado.

name: Leverage Incline Chest Press
instructions: Load the machine with the desired weight, take a seat on the machine facing forwards and adjust its height so that the handles are beside your upper chest. Take hold of the handles and make sure that your elbows are placed directly underneath your wrists. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and press the handles towards the ceiling by flexing your pectoral muscles. It is important to try and relax your shoulders, keep your chest high and make sure your back stays in contact with the back rest. Continue to press the handles upwards until either your pectoral muscles are fully contracted or your arms are fully extended (always have a slight bend when extended).
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Incline Bench Press or Smith Machine Incline Bench Press.

name.es: Aprovechar el press de pecho inclinado

en: Load the machine with the desired weight, take a seat on the machine facing forwards and adjust its height so that the handles are beside your upper chest. Take hold of the handles and make sure that your elbows are placed directly underneath your wrists. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and press the handles towards the ceiling by flexing your pectoral muscles. It is important to try and relax your shoulders, keep your chest high and make sure your back stays in contact with the back rest. Continue to press the handles upwards until either your pectoral muscles are fully contracted or your arms are fully extended (always have a slight bend when extended).
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Incline Bench Press or Smith Machine Incline Bench Press.
es: Cargue la máquina con el peso deseado, siéntese en la máquina mirando hacia adelante y ajuste su altura para que las manijas queden al lado de la parte superior del pecho. Sujete las manijas y asegúrese de que sus codos estén colocados directamente debajo de sus muñecas. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y presiona las manijas hacia el techo flexionando los músculos pectorales. Es importante intentar relajar los hombros, mantener el pecho erguido y asegurarse de que la espalda permanezca en contacto con el respaldo. Continúe presionando las manijas hacia arriba hasta que sus músculos pectorales estén completamente contraídos o sus brazos estén completamente extendidos (siempre tenga una ligera flexión cuando estén extendidos).
Después de una breve pausa, inhale y regrese las manijas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca inclinado con barra o Press de banca inclinado con máquina Smith.

name: Leverage Decline Chest Press
instructions: Load an appropriate weight onto the pins and adjust the seat for your height. The handles should be near the bottom  of the pectorals at the beginning of the motion. Your chest and head should be up and your shoulder blades retracted. This will be your starting position.
Press the handles forward by extending through the elbow.
After a brief pause at the top, return the weight just above the start position, keeping tension on the muscles by not returning the weight to the stops until the set is complete.

name.es: Press de pecho declinado con apalancamiento

en: Load an appropriate weight onto the pins and adjust the seat for your height. The handles should be near the bottom  of the pectorals at the beginning of the motion. Your chest and head should be up and your shoulder blades retracted. This will be your starting position.
Press the handles forward by extending through the elbow.
After a brief pause at the top, return the weight just above the start position, keeping tension on the muscles by not returning the weight to the stops until the set is complete.
es: Cargue un peso adecuado en los pasadores y ajuste el asiento a su altura. Los mangos deben estar cerca de la parte inferior de los pectorales al comienzo del movimiento. El pecho y la cabeza deben estar levantados y los omóplatos retraídos. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Presione las manijas hacia adelante extendiéndolas a través del codo.

Después de una breve pausa en la parte superior, regrese el peso justo por encima de la posición inicial, manteniendo la tensión en los músculos al no regresar el peso a los topes hasta que se complete la serie.

name: Chest Press Machine
instructions: Take a seat on the machine, facing forwards and adjust the height of the seat so that your hips and knees are at 90 degrees. Load the machine with the desired weight, grip the handles and make sure that your elbows are placed directly behind your wrists. This is your starting position.To initiate the movement, exhale and press the handles forward by flexing your pectoral muscles. It is important to try and relax your shoulders, keep your chest high and make sure your back stays in contact with the back rest. Continue to press the handles forward until either your pectoral muscles are fully contracted or your arms are fully extended (always have a slight bend when extended).After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path into their starting position.Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.Variations: Dumbbell Bench Press or Smith Machine Bench Press.

en: Take a seat on the machine, facing forwards and adjust the height of the seat so that your hips and knees are at 90 degrees. Load the machine with the desired weight, grip the handles and make sure that your elbows are placed directly behind your wrists. This is your starting position.To initiate the movement, exhale and press the handles forward by flexing your pectoral muscles. It is important to try and relax your shoulders, keep your chest high and make sure your back stays in contact with the back rest. Continue to press the handles forward until either your pectoral muscles are fully contracted or your arms are fully extended (always have a slight bend when extended).After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path into their starting position.Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.Variations: Dumbbell Bench Press or Smith Machine Bench Press.
es: Siéntese en la máquina, mirando hacia adelante y ajuste la altura del asiento para que sus caderas y rodillas queden a 90 grados. Cargue la máquina con el peso deseado, agarre las manijas y asegúrese de que sus codos estén colocados directamente detrás de sus muñecas. Esta es su posición inicial. Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y presione las manijas hacia adelante flexionando los músculos pectorales.
