Land straight into your next repetition so bend at your elbows and inhale on your descent until your elbows are at 90 degrees, then power up as hard as you can whilst exhaling and 'jump' your torso across to the opposite side of the kettlebell and exchange your grip once more.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Press Ups or Dumbbell Bench Press.
es: Coge a kettlebell and coloca it on el suelo delante de . A continuación, rodillal down and inclínate hacia delante so that are now peso baring on tu brazos (one of which is holding onto the kettlebell manole). Have tu manos colocad just outlado of where tu pecho would be. Now should come up onto tu pies so that tu cuerpo is suspended por encima de el suelo, the only points of contact (with el suelo) should be one of tu manos, the kettlebell and tu pies. tu cuerpo should be in one recto line from cabeza to toe and tu brazos perpendicular to el suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
mientras inhaling, lentamente baja tu pecho hacia the ground whist flaring tu codos out amplio. Continúa hasta que tu codos are at a 90 degree angle.

Haz una pausa for a brief movimiento, exhala and press through tu palmas as hard as can to generate enough fuerza so that 'jump' tu torso across to the contrario lado of the kettlebell mientras exchanging the mano that holds the manole.

Land recto into tu next repetition so flexiona at tu codos and inhala on tu descent hasta que tu codos are at 90 degrees, then power up as hard as can mientras exhaling and 'jump' tu torso across to the contrario lado of the kettlebell and exchange tu grip once more.
Repite the movimiento durante el número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press Ups or Dumbbell Bench Press.

name: Single Arm Overhead Kettlebell Squats
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in your right hand and extend it above your head vertically from the floor with an overhand grip so the kettlebell is resting on the back of your forearm. Adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance with your left arm behind your back. This will be your starting position. Tip: Your arm will remain vertical from the floor throughout!
To initiate the movement, inhale and bend at your knees and hips to descend your pelvis either in line or just past your knees. Tip: Keep a straight back throughout and maintain good posture.
Once you get to the bottom of the movement, exhale and press through your heels to extend your hip and knee joints, elevating your torso back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Overhead Squats.

name.es: A un brazo por encima de la cabeza kettlebell sentadillas

en: Grab a kettlebell in your right hand and extend it above your head vertically from the floor with an overhand grip so the kettlebell is resting on the back of your forearm. Adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance with your left arm behind your back. This will be your starting position. Tip: Your arm will remain vertical from the floor throughout!
To initiate the movement, inhale and bend at your knees and hips to descend your pelvis either in line or just past your knees. Tip: Keep a straight back throughout and maintain good posture.
Once you get to the bottom of the movement, exhale and press through your heels to extend your hip and knee joints, elevating your torso back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Dumbbell Squats or Overhead Squats.
es: Coge a kettlebell in tu derecho mano and extiende it por encima de tu cabeza vertically from el suelo with an agarre prono so the kettlebell is resting on la espalda of tu antebrazo. Adopta una slightly amplior than anchura de hombros postura con tu izquierdo brazo detrás de tu espalda. Esta será tu posición inicial. Consejo: tu brazo will remain vertical from el suelo durante todo!

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala and flexiona at tu rodillas and caderas to desciende tu pelvis either in line or just past tu rodillas. Consejo: Mantén a recto espalda durante todo and maintain good posture.
Once get to the parte baja of the movimiento, exhala and press through tu talones to extiende tu cadera and rodilla joints, elevating tu torso espalda along the same path into la posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones and swap lados.
Variaciones: Dumbbell Squats or Overcabeza Squats.

name: One-Arm Kettlebell Split Snatch
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in your right hand with a neutral grip (palm facing your thigh) and adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance. Allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor beside your torso. This will be your starting position.

To Initiate the movement, inhale and gently squat by bending at your knees and hips. As you do so bring the kettlebell between your legs and push it towards the floor. Once you are half way down into a squatting position, pull the kettlebell up and towards the ceiling until your arm is vertical from the floor and the kettlebell is resting on the back of your forearm. Simultaneously exhale and immediately press through your thighs and extend your hips forward so much so that you jump off the floor slightly. This will allow you to split your stance and descend into a lunge position (90 degrees at both knees).
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebell down towards your shoulder before returning it into its starting position as you ascend your body into your original standing position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Double Kettlebell Jerk or Kettlebell Snatch.

en: Grab a kettlebell in your right hand with a neutral grip (palm facing your thigh) and adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance. Allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor beside your torso. This will be your starting position.

To Initiate the movement, inhale and gently squat by bending at your knees and hips. As you do so bring the kettlebell between your legs and push it towards the floor. Once you are half way down into a squatting position, pull the kettlebell up and towards the ceiling until your arm is vertical from the floor and the kettlebell is resting on the back of your forearm. Simultaneously exhale and immediately press through your thighs and extend your hips forward so much so that you jump off the floor slightly. This will allow you to split your stance and descend into a lunge position (90 degrees at both knees).
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebell down towards your shoulder before returning it into its starting position as you ascend your body into your original standing position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Double Kettlebell Jerk or Kettlebell Snatch.
es: Coge a kettlebell in tu derecho mano with a agarre neutro (palma facing tu thigh) and adopt a slightly amplior than anchura de hombros postura. Allow tu brazos to hang perpendicular to el suelo belado tu torso. Esta será tu posición inicial.

To Initiate the movimiento, inhala and suavemente squat by flexionaing at tu rodillas and caderas. As do so lleva the kettlebell entre tu piernas and empuja it hacia el suelo. Once are half way down into a squatting posición, tira the kettlebell up and hacia el techo hasta que tu brazo is vertical from el suelo and the kettlebell is resting on la espalda of tu antebrazo. Simultaneously exhala and immediately press through tu thighs and extiende tu caderas hacia delante so much so that jump off el suelo slightly. This will permite to separar tu postura and desciende into a zancada posición (90 degrees at both rodillas).
Después de una breve pausa, inhala and vuelve the kettlebell down hacia tu hombro before vuelveing it into its posición inicial as ascend tu cuerpo into tu original colócate de pieing posición.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones and swap lados.
Variaciones: Double Kettlebell Jerk or Kettlebell Snatch.

name: Single Arm Kettlebell Split Jerk
instructions: Grab a kettlebell and adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance. Bring the kettlebell up to your shoulder and allow it to rest against the back of your forearm. At this point, your elbow should be bent to 90 degrees and flared out wide. Your chest, shoulders and head should be facing forward. This will be your starting position.

Your first movement is to descend into a squatting motion by bending at your knees and hips. Once you get half way down, drive upward through your heels and quads in order to start elevating your torso and kettlebell, exhale as you do so.

Generate enough force so that you jump off the floor and land in a split stance to continue descending into a lunge. Simultaneously, press the kettlebell above your head until your elbow is locked out. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout.
Return your body to a standing position with your arm and kettlebell extended towards the ceiling. After a brief pause, return the kettlebell back to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap arms.
Variations: Clean and Jerk or Kettlebell Jerk.

name.es: A un brazo kettlebell Split Jerk

en: Grab a kettlebell and adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance. Bring the kettlebell up to your shoulder and allow it to rest against the back of your forearm. At this point, your elbow should be bent to 90 degrees and flared out wide. Your chest, shoulders and head should be facing forward. This will be your starting position.

Your first movement is to descend into a squatting motion by bending at your knees and hips. Once you get half way down, drive upward through your heels and quads in order to start elevating your torso and kettlebell, exhale as you do so.

Generate enough force so that you jump off the floor and land in a split stance to continue descending into a lunge. Simultaneously, press the kettlebell above your head until your elbow is locked out. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout.
Return your body to a standing position with your arm and kettlebell extended towards the ceiling. After a brief pause, return the kettlebell back to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap arms.
Variations: Clean and Jerk or Kettlebell Jerk.
es: Coge a kettlebell and adopt a slightly amplior than anchura de hombros postura. Bring the kettlebell up to tu hombro and permite it to rest contra la espalda of tu antebrazo. At this point, tu codo should be bent to 90 degrees and flared out amplio. tu pecho, hombros and cabeza should be facing hacia delante. Esta será tu posición inicial.

tu first movimiento is to desciende into a squatting motion by flexionaing at tu rodillas and caderas. Once get half way down, drive arriba through tu talones and cuádriceps in order to start elevating tu torso and kettlebell, exhala as do so.

Generate enough fuerza so that jump off el suelo and land in a separar postura to continue desciendeing into a zancada. Simultaneously, press the kettlebell por encima de tu cabeza hasta que tu codo is locked out. Consejo: Mantén a recto espalda durante todo.
Vuelve tu cuerpo to a colócate de pieing posición con tu brazo and kettlebell extiendeed hacia el techo. Después de una breve pausa, vuelve the kettlebell espalda to its posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones and swap brazos.
Variaciones: Cinclínate and Jerk or Kettlebell Jerk.

name: Single Arm Kettlebell Rows
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in your left hand with a neutral grip (palm facing towards the right). Place this kettlebell just inside of your right foot whilst taking a big step backwards with your left foot. Bend your right knee and support your bodyweight on your thigh through your right forearm. Your back should be straight and your left arm should be hanging perpendicular to the floor as the kettlebell is now directly under your chest. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your left elbow up towards the ceiling whilst brushing your torso with it as you go. Continue to pull the kettlebell upward until the muscles in your back are as tight as they can be. Tip: Your arms should remain as passive as possible throughout.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebell back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Low Cable Row or Single Arm Row.

en: Grab a kettlebell in your left hand with a neutral grip (palm facing towards the right). Place this kettlebell just inside of your right foot whilst taking a big step backwards with your left foot. Bend your right knee and support your bodyweight on your thigh through your right forearm. Your back should be straight and your left arm should be hanging perpendicular to the floor as the kettlebell is now directly under your chest. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull your left elbow up towards the ceiling whilst brushing your torso with it as you go. Continue to pull the kettlebell upward until the muscles in your back are as tight as they can be. Tip: Your arms should remain as passive as possible throughout.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebell back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Low Cable Row or Single Arm Row.
es: Coge a kettlebell in tu izquierdo mano with a agarre neutro (palma facing hacia the derecho). Coloca this kettlebell just inlado of tu derecho pie mientras taking a big step hacia atráss con tu izquierdo pie. Flexiona tu derecho rodilla and support tu peso corporal on tu thigh through tu derecho antebrazo. tu espalda should be recto and tu izquierdo brazo should be hanging perpendicular to el suelo as the kettlebell is now directamente under tu pecho. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala and tira tu izquierdo codo up hacia el techo mientras brushing tu torso with it durante el movimiento. Continúa to tira the kettlebell arriba hasta que the muscles in tu espalda are as tight as they can be. Consejo: tu brazos should remain as passive lo máximo posible durante todo.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala and vuelve the kettlebell espalda along the same path into la posición inicial.
Repite the movimiento durante el número indicado de repeticiones and swap lados.
Variaciones: Low Cable Row or Single Arm Row.

name: Single Arm Kettlebell Push Press
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in your right hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Bring the kettlebell up so that your hand is beside your ear, elbow should be flared out wide and at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees). Make sure your palm is facing forward at this point. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and gently bend at your knees and hips so that you create a small squat. Immediately after doing this, exhale and use this power to drive through your heels and thighs to press the kettlebell above your head until your arm is nearly locked out (slight bend at the elbow).
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebell back along the same path back to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Double Kettlebell Push Press or Cable Shoulder Press.

name.es: A un brazo kettlebell Push press

es: Coge a kettlebell in tu derecho mano and adopt a anchura de hombros postura. Bring the kettlebell up so that tu mano is belado tu ear, codo should be flared out amplio and at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees). Make sure tu palma is facing hacia delante at this point. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala and suavemente flexiona at tu rodillas and caderas so that create a small squat. Immediately after doing this, exhala and use this power to drive through tu talones and thighs to press the kettlebell por encima de tu cabeza hasta que tu brazo is nearly locked out (slight flexiona at the codo).
Después de una breve pausa, inhala and vuelve the kettlebell espalda along the same path espalda to its posición inicial.

aliases: Single Arm Squat To Shoulder Press
One Arm Squat To Shoulder Press

name: Single Arm Kettlebell Shoulder Press
instructions: Clean a kettlebell to your shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces inward. This will be your starting position.
Look at the kettlebell and press it up and out until it is locked out overhead.
Lower the kettlebell back to your shoulder under control and repeat. Make sure to contract your lat, butt, and stomach forcefully for added stability and strength.

name.es: A un brazo kettlebell hombro press

en: Clean a kettlebell to your shoulder. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulder. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces inward. This will be your starting position.
Look at the kettlebell and press it up and out until it is locked out overhead.
Lower the kettlebell back to your shoulder under control and repeat. Make sure to contract your lat, butt, and stomach forcefully for added stability and strength.
es: Cinclínate a kettlebell to tu hombro. Cinclínate the kettlebell to tu hombro by extiendeing through the piernas and caderas as tira the kettlebell hacia tu hombro. Rota tu wrist as do so, so that the palma faces inward. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Look at the kettlebell and press it up and out hasta que it is locked out overcabeza.
Baja the kettlebell espalda to tu hombro under control and repeat. Make sure to contract tu lat, butt, and stomach fuerzacompletamente for added stability and strength.

aliases: One-Arm Kettlebell Military Press To The Side

name: One-Arm Kettlebell Floor Press
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in your left hand with an overhand grip (palm facing away from you) and lay on your back. Have your arm bent at a 90 degree angle with your elbow flared out wide (the kettlebell should be resting on the back of your forearm at this point). Finally have your knees bent to create a 90 degree angle whilst keeping your feet on the floor. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by exhaling and pressing the kettlebell towards the ceiling until your elbow joint is nearly at full extension.
After a brief pause, inhale and slowly return the kettlebell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Alternating Kettlebell Floor Press or Chest Press.

en: Grab a kettlebell in your left hand with an overhand grip (palm facing away from you) and lay on your back. Have your arm bent at a 90 degree angle with your elbow flared out wide (the kettlebell should be resting on the back of your forearm at this point). Finally have your knees bent to create a 90 degree angle whilst keeping your feet on the floor. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by exhaling and pressing the kettlebell towards the ceiling until your elbow joint is nearly at full extension.
After a brief pause, inhale and slowly return the kettlebell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Alternating Kettlebell Floor Press or Chest Press.
es: Coge a kettlebell in tu izquierdo mano with an agarre prono (palma facing away from ) and lay on tu espalda. Have tu brazo bent at a 90 degree angle con tu codo flared out amplio (the kettlebell should be resting on la espalda of tu antebrazo at this point). Finally have tu rodillas bent to create a 90 degree angle mientras manténing tu pies on el suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Initiate the movimiento by exhaling and pressing the kettlebell hacia el techo hasta que tu codo joint is nearly at full extensión.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala and lentamente vuelve the kettlebell along the same path, espalda into its posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Alternating Kettlebell Floor Press or Chest Press.

name: Kettlebell Lunge Pass Through
instructions: To begin this movement, stand with a kettlebell in your left hand (neutral grip), arms by your sides with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement, inhale and stride forward with your right foot, descend your left knee until it nearly touches the floor creating a 90 degree angle at both knee joints. At this point your right knee should stay over the top of your right foot, with your torso upright. As you drop your bodyweight down into this position you are going to pass the kettlebell through the gap created underneath your right thigh and hand it over to your right hand.
After a brief pause, exhale and push through the heel of your front foot to bring your torso back along the same path into the starting position again.
Repeat the movement with the opposite leg and repeat until you have completed the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Lunges or Dumbbell Walking Lunges.

en: To begin this movement, stand with a kettlebell in your left hand (neutral grip), arms by your sides with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement, inhale and stride forward with your right foot, descend your left knee until it nearly touches the floor creating a 90 degree angle at both knee joints. At this point your right knee should stay over the top of your right foot, with your torso upright. As you drop your bodyweight down into this position you are going to pass the kettlebell through the gap created underneath your right thigh and hand it over to your right hand.
After a brief pause, exhale and push through the heel of your front foot to bring your torso back along the same path into the starting position again.
Repeat the movement with the opposite leg and repeat until you have completed the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Lunges or Dumbbell Walking Lunges.
es: To begin this movimiento, colócate de pie with a kettlebell in tu izquierdo mano (agarre neutro), brazos by tu lados con tu pies anchura de hombros apart. Esta será tu posición inicial.

To initiate this movimiento, inhala and stride hacia delante con tu derecho pie, desciende tu izquierdo rodilla hasta que it nearly touches el suelo creating a 90 degree angle at both rodilla joints. At this point tu derecho rodilla should stay over the parte superior of tu derecho pie, con tu torso erguido. As drop tu peso corporal down into this posición are going to pass the kettlebell through the gap created debajo de tu derecho thigh and mano it over to tu derecho mano.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala and empuja through the talón of tu delantero pie to lleva tu torso espalda along the same path into la posición inicial again.
Repite the movimiento with the contrario pierna and repeat hasta que have completed the número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Barbell Lunges or Dumbbell Walking Lunges.

name: Leg-Over Floor Press
instructions: Lie on the floor with a kettlebell in your left hand. Bend your left leg to a 90-degree angle and bring this over your body so your knee is close to the floor.
Whilst in this position, exhale and extend your left-hand (and kettlebell) towards the ceiling. Continue with this movement until your elbow is nearly at full extension.
Once at the top of the movement, pause for a brief moment before inhaling and returning the kettlebell along the same path, back to it's starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

en: Lie on the floor with a kettlebell in your left hand. Bend your left leg to a 90-degree angle and bring this over your body so your knee is close to the floor.
Whilst in this position, exhale and extend your left-hand (and kettlebell) towards the ceiling. Continue with this movement until your elbow is nearly at full extension.
Once at the top of the movement, pause for a brief moment before inhaling and returning the kettlebell along the same path, back to it's starting position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
es: Túmbate on el suelo with a kettlebell in tu izquierdo mano. Flexiona tu izquierdo pierna to a 90-degree angle and lleva this over tu cuerpo so tu rodilla is cerca de el suelo.
mientras in this posición, exhala and extiende tu izquierdo-mano (and kettlebell) hacia el techo. Continúa with this movimiento hasta que tu codo is nearly at full extensión.
Once at the parte superior of the movimiento, pause for a brief moment before inhaling and vuelveing the kettlebell along the same path, espalda to it's posición inicial.
Repite for the deseado number of repeticiones.

name: Single Arm Kettlebell Windmill
instructions: Place a kettlebell in front of your lead foot and clean and press it overhead with your opposite arm. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulders. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. Press it overhead by extending the elbow.

Keeping the kettlebell locked out at all times, push your butt out in the direction of the locked out kettlebell. Turn your feet out at a forty-five degree angle from the arm with the locked out kettlebell. Bending at the hip to one side, sticking your butt out, slowly lean until you can touch the floor with your free hand. Keep your eyes on the kettlebell that you hold over your head at all times.
Pause for a second after reaching the ground and reverse the motion back to the starting position.

en: Place a kettlebell in front of your lead foot and clean and press it overhead with your opposite arm. Clean the kettlebell to your shoulder by extending through the legs and hips as you pull the kettlebell towards your shoulders. Rotate your wrist as you do so, so that the palm faces forward. Press it overhead by extending the elbow.

Keeping the kettlebell locked out at all times, push your butt out in the direction of the locked out kettlebell. Turn your feet out at a forty-five degree angle from the arm with the locked out kettlebell. Bending at the hip to one side, sticking your butt out, slowly lean until you can touch the floor with your free hand. Keep your eyes on the kettlebell that you hold over your head at all times.
Pause for a second after reaching the ground and reverse the motion back to the starting position.
es: Coloca a kettlebell delante de tu lead pie and cinclínate and press it overcabeza con tu contrario brazo. Cinclínate the kettlebell to tu hombro by extiendeing through the piernas and caderas as tira the kettlebell hacia tu hombros. Rota tu wrist as do so, so that the palma faces hacia delante. Press it overcabeza by extiendeing the codo.

Manténing the kettlebell locked out at all times, empuja tu butt out in the direction of the locked out kettlebell. Turn tu pies out at a forty-five degree angle from the brazo with the locked out kettlebell. Flexionaing at the cadera to one lado, sticking tu butt out, lentamente inclínate hasta que can touch el suelo con tu free mano. Mantén tu eyes on the kettlebell that hold over tu cabeza at all times.
Haz una pausa for a second after reaching the ground and reverse the motion espalda to la posición inicial.

name: Kettlebell Thruster
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Bring the kettlebells up so that your hands are beside your ears, elbows are flared out wide and at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees). Make sure your palms are facing forward at this point. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout this movement to minimise the risk of an injury. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and bend at your knees and hips so that you descend into a squat. Once your thighs are either parallel to the floor, or just past, immediately exhale and use the power you have generated in your legs to drive through your heels and thighs to press the kettlebells above your head until your arms are nearly locked out.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebells back along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Single Arm Kettlebell Push Press or Cable Shoulder Press.

en: Grab a kettlebell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Bring the kettlebells up so that your hands are beside your ears, elbows are flared out wide and at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees). Make sure your palms are facing forward at this point. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout this movement to minimise the risk of an injury. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and bend at your knees and hips so that you descend into a squat. Once your thighs are either parallel to the floor, or just past, immediately exhale and use the power you have generated in your legs to drive through your heels and thighs to press the kettlebells above your head until your arms are nearly locked out.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebells back along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Single Arm Kettlebell Push Press or Cable Shoulder Press.
es: Coge a kettlebell in each mano and adopt a anchura de hombros postura. Bring the kettlebells up so that tu manos are belado tu ears, codos are flared out amplio and at an acute angle (less than 90 degrees). Make sure tu palmas are facing hacia delante at this point. Consejo: Mantén a recto espalda durante todo this movimiento to minimise the risk of an injury. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala and flexiona at tu rodillas and caderas so that desciende into a squat. Once tu thighs are either parallel to el suelo, or just past, immediately exhala and use the power have generated in tu piernas to drive through tu talones and thighs to press the kettlebells por encima de tu cabeza hasta que tu brazos are nearly locked out.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala and vuelve the kettlebells espalda along the same path espalda to their posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Single Arm Kettlebell Empuja Press or Cable Shoulder Press.

name: Single Arm Kettlebell Swings
instructions: Grab a kettlebell with your right hand and adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance. Take hold of the kettlebell with an overhand grip (palm facing behind you) and stand upright with the weight in front of you. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and bend at your knees and hips so that your thighs are parallel to the floor. At the same time bring the kettlebell between your legs and push your hand towards the floor to emphasise the power generated in your legs.
Immediately after doing this, exhale and use this power to drive through your heels, thighs and hips to pull the kettlebell to head height with your arm full extended as you go.
Inhale and return the kettlebell along the same path back between your legs as you squat into the next repetition.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Dumbbell Squat Jumps or TRX Squat Jumps.

en: Grab a kettlebell with your right hand and adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance. Take hold of the kettlebell with an overhand grip (palm facing behind you) and stand upright with the weight in front of you. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and bend at your knees and hips so that your thighs are parallel to the floor. At the same time bring the kettlebell between your legs and push your hand towards the floor to emphasise the power generated in your legs.
Immediately after doing this, exhale and use this power to drive through your heels, thighs and hips to pull the kettlebell to head height with your arm full extended as you go.
Inhale and return the kettlebell along the same path back between your legs as you squat into the next repetition.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Dumbbell Squat Jumps or TRX Squat Jumps.
es: Coge a kettlebell con tu derecho mano and adopt a slightly amplior than anchura de hombros postura. Agarra the kettlebell with an agarre prono (palma facing detrás de ) and colócate de pie erguido with the peso delante de . Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala and flexiona at tu rodillas and caderas so that tu thighs are parallel to el suelo. At the same time lleva the kettlebell entre tu piernas and empuja tu mano hacia el suelo to emphasise the power generated in tu piernas.
Immediately after doing this, exhala and use this power to drive through tu talones, thighs and caderas to tira the kettlebell to cabeza height con tu brazo full extiendeed durante el movimiento.
Inhala and vuelve the kettlebell along the same path espalda entre tu piernas as squat into the next repetition.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones and swap lados.
Variaciones: Dumbbell Squat Jumps or TRX Squat Jumps.

name: Kettlebell Sumo High Pulls
instructions: Take hold of a kettlebell by its handle in both hands (overhand grip) and stand up straight. Maintain this straight posture throughout the movement and allow your arms to hang straight towards the floor in front of your torso. Adopt a wide stance with your toes slightly facing outwards, this will be your starting position.

Inhale as you descend by bending at your knees and hips. Remember to keep your knees behind your toes and put most of your weight through your heels. Continue in this descent until your thighs are either parallel to the floor or just past.

After a brief pause, exhale and simultaneously push through your heels, thighs and hips to drive your torso back along the same path into the starting position whilst pulling the kettlebell up towards your chin. Keep your elbows higher than the kettlebell at all times and keep it close to your body.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebell back along the same path in to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Make sure to maintain posture as failure to do so could result in injury.
Variations: Barbell Sumo Squats or Dumbbell Sumo Squats.

en: Take hold of a kettlebell by its handle in both hands (overhand grip) and stand up straight. Maintain this straight posture throughout the movement and allow your arms to hang straight towards the floor in front of your torso. Adopt a wide stance with your toes slightly facing outwards, this will be your starting position.

Inhale as you descend by bending at your knees and hips. Remember to keep your knees behind your toes and put most of your weight through your heels. Continue in this descent until your thighs are either parallel to the floor or just past.

After a brief pause, exhale and simultaneously push through your heels, thighs and hips to drive your torso back along the same path into the starting position whilst pulling the kettlebell up towards your chin. Keep your elbows higher than the kettlebell at all times and keep it close to your body.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebell back along the same path in to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Make sure to maintain posture as failure to do so could result in injury.
Variations: Barbell Sumo Squats or Dumbbell Sumo Squats.
es: Agarra a kettlebell by its manole in both manos (agarre prono) and colócate de pie up recto. Mantén this recto posture durante todo the movimiento and permite tu brazos to hang recto hacia el suelo delante de tu torso. Adopta una amplio postura con tu toes slightly facing outwards, this will be tu posición inicial.

Inhala as desciende by flexionaing at tu rodillas and caderas. Remember to mantén tu rodillas detrás de tu toes and put most of tu peso through tu talones. Continúa in this descent hasta que tu thighs are either parallel to el suelo or just past.

Después de una breve pausa, exhala and simultaneously empuja through tu talones, thighs and caderas to drive tu torso espalda along the same path into la posición inicial mientras tiraing the kettlebell up hacia tu chin. Mantén tu codos higher than the kettlebell at all times and mantén it cerca de tu cuerpo.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala and vuelve the kettlebell espalda along the same path in to its posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones.
Precaución: Make sure to maintain posture as failure to do so could result in injury.
Variaciones: Barbell Sumo Squats or Dumbbell Sumo Squats.

aliases: Kettlebell Sumo Squats To Upright Row
Kettlebell Sumo Squats To High Pull

name: Kettlebell Goblet Squat
instructions: Take hold of a kettlebell by its handle in both hands (overhand grip) and stand up straight. Maintain this straight posture throughout the movement and keep your arms as close to your chest as possible. Adopt a wide stance with your toes slightly facing outwards, this will be your starting position.

Inhale as you descend by bending at your knees. Remember to keep your knees behind your toes and put most of your weight through your heels. Continue in this descent until your thighs are either parallel to the floor or just past.
After a brief pause, exhale and push through your heels, thighs and hips to bring your torso back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Make sure to maintain posture as failure to do so could result in injury.
Variations: Sumo Dumbbell Squats or Barbell Side Lunges.

es: Agarra a kettlebell by its manole in both manos (agarre prono) and colócate de pie up recto. Mantén this recto posture durante todo the movimiento and mantén tu brazos as cerca de tu pecho lo máximo posible. Adopta una amplio postura con tu toes slightly facing outwards, this will be tu posición inicial.

Inhala as desciende by flexionaing at tu rodillas. Remember to mantén tu rodillas detrás de tu toes and put most of tu peso through tu talones. Continúa in this descent hasta que tu thighs are either parallel to el suelo or just past.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala and empuja through tu talones, thighs and caderas to lleva tu torso espalda along the same path into la posición inicial.

name: Single Arm Kettlebell Snatch
instructions: Grab a kettlebell with your right hand and adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance. Take hold of the kettlebell with a neutral grip (palm facing your pocket) and stand upright with the weight by your side. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and bend at your knees and hips so that your thighs are parallel to the floor. At the same time bring the kettlebell between your legs and rotate it so you have an overhand grip (palm facing behind you). You should feel as though you are pushing your hand towards the floor to emphasise the power generated in your legs.

Immediately after doing this, exhale and use this power to drive through your heels, thighs and hips to pull the kettlebell above your head until your arm is nearly locked out. As you do so, flip the kettlebell so that your palm is facing forward with the weight running down the back of your forearm.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the kettlebell along the same path back between your legs as you squat into the next repetition.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variation: Double Kettlebell Snatch or Single Arm Dumbbell Clean And Press.

es: Coge a kettlebell con tu derecho mano and adopt a slightly amplior than anchura de hombros postura. Agarra the kettlebell with a agarre neutro (palma facing tu pocket) and colócate de pie erguido with the peso by tu lado. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala and flexiona at tu rodillas and caderas so that tu thighs are parallel to el suelo. At the same time lleva the kettlebell entre tu piernas and rota it so have an agarre prono (palma facing detrás de ). should feel as though are empujaing tu mano hacia el suelo to emphasise the power generated in tu piernas.

name: Kettlebell Seesaw Press
instructions: Clean two kettlebells two your shoulders.
Press one kettlebell.
Lower the kettlebell and immediately press the other kettlebell. Make sure to do the same amount of reps on both sides.

en: Clean two kettlebells two your shoulders.
Press one kettlebell.
Lower the kettlebell and immediately press the other kettlebell. Make sure to do the same amount of reps on both sides.
es: Cinclínate two kettlebells two tu hombros.
Press one kettlebell.
Baja the kettlebell and immediately press the other kettlebell. Make sure to do the same cantidad of reps on both lados.

name: Seated Kettlebell Shoulder Press
instructions: Sit on the floor and spread your legs out comfortably.
Clean one kettlebell to your shoulder.
Press the kettlebell up and out until it is locked out overhead. Return to the starting position.

en: Sit on the floor and spread your legs out comfortably.
Clean one kettlebell to your shoulder.
Press the kettlebell up and out until it is locked out overhead. Return to the starting position.
es: Siéntate on el suelo and spread tu piernas out comfortably.
Cinclínate one kettlebell to tu hombro.
Press the kettlebell up and out hasta que it is locked out overcabeza. Vuelve to la posición inicial.

name: Kettlebell Pirate Ships
instructions: With a wide stance, hold a kettlebell with both hands. Allow it to hang at waist level with your arms extended. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by turning to one side, swinging the kettlebell to head height. Briefly pause at the top of the motion.
Allow the bell to drop as you rotate to the opposite side, again raising the kettlebell to head height.
Repeat for the desired amount of repetitions.

en: With a wide stance, hold a kettlebell with both hands. Allow it to hang at waist level with your arms extended. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by turning to one side, swinging the kettlebell to head height. Briefly pause at the top of the motion.
Allow the bell to drop as you rotate to the opposite side, again raising the kettlebell to head height.
Repeat for the desired amount of repetitions.
es: With a amplio postura, hold a kettlebell with both manos. Allow it to hang at waist level con tu brazos extiendeed. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Initiate the movimiento by turning to one lado, swinging the kettlebell to cabeza height. Briefly pause at the parte superior of the motion.
Allow the bell to drop as rota to the contrario lado, again raising the kettlebell to cabeza height.
Repite for the deseado cantidad of repeticiones.

name: Single Leg Kettlebell Deadlifts
instructions: Grab a kettlebell in your left hand with a neutral grip (palm facing inwards) and adopt a single leg stance on your right leg. This will be your starting position.
To initiate this movement, inhale and slowly lean your torso forward and push the kettlebell down towards the floor, maintaining a straight back.
As your descend your torso towards the floor, lift your left leg up behind you and keep your right leg straight.
Once the kettlebell is an inch off the floor, exhale and return your torso along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap arms.
Variations: Dumbbell Stiff Leg Dead Lifts or Barbell Stiff-Legged Deadlifts.

name.es: A una pierna kettlebell peso muerto

en: Grab a kettlebell in your left hand with a neutral grip (palm facing inwards) and adopt a single leg stance on your right leg. This will be your starting position.
To initiate this movement, inhale and slowly lean your torso forward and push the kettlebell down towards the floor, maintaining a straight back.
As your descend your torso towards the floor, lift your left leg up behind you and keep your right leg straight.
Once the kettlebell is an inch off the floor, exhale and return your torso along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap arms.
Variations: Dumbbell Stiff Leg Dead Lifts or Barbell Stiff-Legged Deadlifts.
es: Coge a kettlebell in tu izquierdo mano with a agarre neutro (palma facing inwards) and adopt a single pierna postura on tu derecho pierna. Esta será tu posición inicial.
To initiate this movimiento, inhala and lentamente inclínate tu torso hacia delante and empuja the kettlebell down hacia el suelo, maintaining a recto espalda.
As tu desciende tu torso hacia el suelo, eleva tu izquierdo pierna up detrás de and mantén tu derecho pierna recto.
Once the kettlebell is an inch off el suelo, exhala and vuelve tu torso along the same path espalda into its posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones and swap brazos.
Variaciones: Dumbbell Stiff Leg Dead Elevas or Barbell Stiff-Legged Deadelevas.

name: Single Arm Kettlebell Jerk
instructions: Grab a kettlebell and adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance. Bring the kettlebell up to your shoulder and allow it to rest against the back of your forearm. At this point, your elbow should be bent to 90 degrees and flared out wide. Your chest, shoulders and head should be facing forward. This will be your starting position.

Your first movement is to descend into a squatting motion by bending at your knees and hips. Once you get half way down, drive upward through your heels and quads in order to start elevating your torso and kettlebell, exhale as you do so.

Generate enough force so that you jump off the floor and press the kettlebell above your head until your elbow is locked out. Simultaneously, land into a deep squatting position to cushion the downward force. Tip: Maintaining a straight back throughout is paramount.
Return your body to a standing position with your arm and kettlebell extended towards the ceiling. After a brief pause, return the kettlebell back to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap arms.
Variations: Clean and Jerk or Kettlebell Clean and Jerk.

At this point, your elbow should be bent to 90 degrees and flared out wide. Your chest, shoulders and head should be facing forward. This will be your starting position.

Return your body to a standing position with your arm and kettlebell extended towards the ceiling. After a brief pause, return the kettlebell back to its starting position.

Variations: Clean and Jerk or Kettlebell Clean and Jerk.
es: Coge a kettlebell and adopt a slightly amplior than anchura de hombros postura. Bring the kettlebell up to tu hombro and permite it to rest contra la espalda of tu antebrazo. At this point, tu codo should be bent to 90 degrees and flared out amplio. tu pecho, hombros and cabeza should be facing hacia delante. Esta será tu posición inicial.

tu first movimiento is to desciende into a squatting motion by flexionaing at tu rodillas and caderas. Once get half way down, drive arriba through tu talones and cuádriceps in order to start elevating tu torso and kettlebell, exhala as do so.

Generate enough fuerza so that jump off el suelo and press the kettlebell por encima de tu cabeza hasta que tu codo is locked out. Simultaneously, land into a deep squatting posición to cushion the downward fuerza. Consejo: Manténing a recto espalda durante todo is parcantidad.
Vuelve tu cuerpo to a colócate de pieing posición con tu brazo and kettlebell extiendeed hacia el techo. Después de una breve pausa, vuelve the kettlebell espalda to its posición inicial.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones and swap brazos.
Variaciones: Cinclínate and Jerk or Kettlebell Cinclínate and Jerk.

name: Kettlebell Front Squats
instructions: Take hold of a kettlebell in each hand with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) so that they are running down the back of each forearm. Keep them close to your body throughout the movement.
Adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance with your toes gently pointing outward. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. Your weight should be put predominantly through your heels as you sit back into the movement until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the floor.

After a brief pause, exhale and return the kettlebells to the starting position along the same path, push through your heels with the force being driven through your quads to do so. Stand to attention with your legs fully extended, back straight and shoulders relaxed.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This is a very complex movement and if you suffer from back issues, this exercise may not be suitable.
Variation: Barbell Front Squats.

en: Take hold of a kettlebell in each hand with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) so that they are running down the back of each forearm. Keep them close to your body throughout the movement.
Adopt a slightly wider than shoulder width stance with your toes gently pointing outward. Maintain a straight back throughout the movement and keep your head up. This will be your starting position.

Inhale and begin to descend by bending at your knees and hips. Your weight should be put predominantly through your heels as you sit back into the movement until your thighs are either parallel or just past to the floor.
