name: Cable Crossovers
instructions: Attach handles to two high cables. Take one in each hand and face away from the machine. Bring the handles down to your shoulders and press them forward in front of you until your arms are (nearly) straight. Adopt a standing, split stance, maintaining a straight back throughout the movement. Your palms should be facing each other. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, bring your arms back on a wide arc until your arms are out wide to sides. Have a slight bend at your elbows and allow the weight to stretch your pectoral muscles.
After a brief pause, exhale and return the handles back along the same path to the starting position.
Complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Flyes or Flye Machine

en: Attach handles to two high cables. Take one in each hand and face away from the machine. Bring the handles down to your shoulders and press them forward in front of you until your arms are (nearly) straight. Adopt a standing, split stance, maintaining a straight back throughout the movement. Your palms should be facing each other. This will be your starting position.
Whilst inhaling, bring your arms back on a wide arc until your arms are out wide to sides. Have a slight bend at your elbows and allow the weight to stretch your pectoral muscles.
After a brief pause, exhale and return the handles back along the same path to the starting position.
Complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Flyes or Flye Machine
es: Sujeta asas to two high poleas. Take one in each mano and face away from the máquina. Bring the asas down to your hombros and press them forward in front of you until your brazos are (nearly) straight. Adopt a standing, split stance, maintaining a straight espalda throughout the movimiento. Your palms should be facing each other. Esta será la posición inicial.
Whilst inhaling, bring your brazos espalda on a wide arc until your brazos are out wide to sides. Have a slight bend at your codos and allow the peso to stretch your pectoral muscles.
Tras una breve pausa, espira and return the asas espalda along the same path to the posición inicial.
Complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variaciones: mancuerna Flyes or Flye Machine

name: Cable Curls
instructions: Attach a straight bar to a low cable pulley and take hold of it with an underhand grip (palms facing upwards). Stand upright around 12 inches away from the cable, maintaining a straight back throughout.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl the bar up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps.
(Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to return the bar along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Hammer Curls or Barbell Bicep Curls.

en: Attach a straight bar to a low cable pulley and take hold of it with an underhand grip (palms facing upwards). Stand upright around 12 inches away from the cable, maintaining a straight back throughout.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl the bar up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps.
(Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to return the bar along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Hammer Curls or Barbell Bicep Curls.
es: Sujeta a straight barra to a low polea pulley and take hold of it with an undermano grip (palms facing upwards). Colócate de pie upright around 12 inches away from the polea, maintaining a straight espalda throughout.

Whilst holding the upper brazo stationary, espira as you curl the barra up hacia your hombros by contracting your bíceps. Continue the movimiento until your bíceps are fully contracted and the barra is at hombro level. Hold the contracted posición for a second as you squeeze your bíceps.
(Consejo: Only the forebrazos should move.)
Inspira as you slowly begin to return the barra along the same path to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Colócate de pieing Hammer Curls or barra Bicep Curls.

name: Single Arm Cable Crossover
instructions: Attach two handles to high cable pulleys and adopt a shoulder width standing standing between them. Take a cable in each hand and face away from the machine. Bring the handles down to your waist until your arms are (nearly) straight and vertical from the floor. Your palms should be facing each other. This will be your starting position. Tip: Maintain a straight back through out the movement.

Whilst inhaling, bring one of your arms up and out (to your side) on a wide arcing motion until your arm is parallel with the floor. Have a slight bend at your elbow and allow the weight to stretch your pectoral muscles.
After a brief pause, exhale and return the handles back along the same path to the starting position.
Alternate as you go and repeat until you complete for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Pec Deck or Press Ups.

en: Attach two handles to high cable pulleys and adopt a shoulder width standing standing between them. Take a cable in each hand and face away from the machine. Bring the handles down to your waist until your arms are (nearly) straight and vertical from the floor. Your palms should be facing each other. This will be your starting position. Tip: Maintain a straight back through out the movement.

Whilst inhaling, bring one of your arms up and out (to your side) on a wide arcing motion until your arm is parallel with the floor. Have a slight bend at your elbow and allow the weight to stretch your pectoral muscles.
After a brief pause, exhale and return the handles back along the same path to the starting position.
Alternate as you go and repeat until you complete for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Pec Deck or Press Ups.
es: Sujeta two asas to high polea pulleys and adopt a hombro width standing standing between them. Take a polea in each mano and face away from the máquina. Bring the asas down to your waist until your brazos are (nearly) straight and vertical from the suelo. Your palms should be facing each other. Esta será la posición inicial. Consejo: Mantén a straight espalda through out the movimiento.

Whilst inhaling, bring one of your brazos up and out (to your side) on a wide arcing motion until your brazo is parallel with the suelo. Have a slight bend at your codo and allow the peso to stretch your pectoral muscles.
Tras una breve pausa, espira and return the asas espalda along the same path to the posición inicial.
Alternate as you go and repeat until you complete for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variaciones: Pec Deck or Press Ups.

name: Cable Shotgun Rows
instructions: Attach a handle to a low cable pulley and adjust the weight accordingly. Take hold of the handle with a neutral grip and take a big step backwards. Split your stance, bend your front knee and lean forwards from your hips (maintaining a straight back however) allowing the muscles across your upper back and shoulder to stretch. Your arm should be at full extension at this point. This is your starting position.

To initiate this movement, exhale and pull your elbow backwards in to the side of your torso whilst retracting your shoulder joint and contracting the muscles across your mid-upper back. Continue to squeeze these muscles and draw the handle in closer to your body until they are optimally contracted.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle back along the same path to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Dumbbell Row or Seated One-Arm Cable Pulley Rows.

en: Attach a handle to a low cable pulley and adjust the weight accordingly. Take hold of the handle with a neutral grip and take a big step backwards. Split your stance, bend your front knee and lean forwards from your hips (maintaining a straight back however) allowing the muscles across your upper back and shoulder to stretch. Your arm should be at full extension at this point. This is your starting position.

To initiate this movement, exhale and pull your elbow backwards in to the side of your torso whilst retracting your shoulder joint and contracting the muscles across your mid-upper back. Continue to squeeze these muscles and draw the handle in closer to your body until they are optimally contracted.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle back along the same path to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Dumbbell Row or Seated One-Arm Cable Pulley Rows.
es: Sujeta a asa to a low polea pulley and adjust the peso accordingly. Take hold of the asa with a agarre neutro and take a big step espaldawards. Split your stance, bend your front rodilla and lean forwards from your caderas (maintaining a straight espalda however) allowing the muscles across your upper espalda and hombro to stretch. Your brazo should be at full extension at this point. Esta es la posición inicial.

To initiate this movimiento, espira and pull your codo espaldawards in to the side of your torso mientras retracting your hombro joint and contracting the muscles across your mid-upper espalda. Continue to squeeze these muscles and draw the asa in closer to your body until they are optimally contracted.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the asa espalda along the same path to its posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap sides.
Variaciones: mancuerna Row or Seated One-Arm Polea Pulley Rows.

name: Seated Single Arm Cable Rows
instructions: Attach a handle to a low cable pulley, take hold of it with a nuetral grip and take a seat about 2 feet away from the pulley system. Once seated, you should have your working arm and legs out infront of you (slightly bent) with your posture held in an upright position (this is paramount to maintain throughout the movement) with your chest pushed out. This is your starting position.

Exhale and pull the handle in towards your lower abdominals by contracting your back muscles. Your posture should remain upright throughout the movement and your arm should remain as passive as possible.
Once the handle touches your abdominals, pause for a brief moment before inhaling and returning your arm along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from back pain, this may not be a suitable movement for you.
Variations: Seated Cable Rows or Landmine Single arm Rows.

name.es: Sentado a una mano polea remos

en: Attach a handle to a low cable pulley, take hold of it with a nuetral grip and take a seat about 2 feet away from the pulley system. Once seated, you should have your working arm and legs out infront of you (slightly bent) with your posture held in an upright position (this is paramount to maintain throughout the movement) with your chest pushed out. This is your starting position.

Exhale and pull the handle in towards your lower abdominals by contracting your back muscles. Your posture should remain upright throughout the movement and your arm should remain as passive as possible.
Once the handle touches your abdominals, pause for a brief moment before inhaling and returning your arm along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from back pain, this may not be a suitable movement for you.
Variations: Seated Cable Rows or Landmine Single arm Rows.
es: Sujeta a asa to a low polea pulley, take hold of it with a nuetral grip and take a seat about 2 pies away from the pulley system. Once seated, you should have your working brazo and legs out infront of you (slightly bent) with your posture held in an upright posición (this is paramount to maintain throughout the movimiento) with your pecho pushed out. Esta es la posición inicial.

Espira and pull the asa in hacia your lower abdominals by contracting your espalda muscles. Your posture should remain upright throughout the movimiento and your brazo should remain as passive as possible.
Once the asa touches your abdominals, pause for a brief moment before inhaling and returning your brazo along the same path espalda into the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Precaución: If you suffer from espalda pain, this may not be a suitable movimiento for you.
Variaciones: Seated Polea Rows or Landmine Single brazo Rows.

name: Seated Cable Shoulder Press
instructions: Attach handles to two low opposing cables and place an incline bench (around 70-80 degrees) between them facing forward. Take a seat and take hold a handle in each hand. Bring the handles up to shoulder height with your elbows are flared out wide and at a 90 degree angle. Your palms should be facing forward. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, press both handles towards the ceiling until your elbows become fully extended (straight).
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Shoulder Press or Seated Shoulder Press.

en: Attach handles to two low opposing cables and place an incline bench (around 70-80 degrees) between them facing forward. Take a seat and take hold a handle in each hand. Bring the handles up to shoulder height with your elbows are flared out wide and at a 90 degree angle. Your palms should be facing forward. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, press both handles towards the ceiling until your elbows become fully extended (straight).
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Shoulder Press or Seated Shoulder Press.
es: Sujeta asas to two low opposing poleas and place an incline banco (around 70-80 degrees) between them facing forward. Take a seat and take hold a asa in each mano. Bring the asas up to hombro height with your codos are flared out wide and at a 90 degree angle. Your palms should be facing forward. Esta será la posición inicial.
Whilst exhaling, press both asas hacia the techo until your codos become fully extended (straight).
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the asas espalda along the same path to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: mancuerna Shoulder Press or Seated Shoulder Press.

name: Reverse Grip Tricep Pushdowns
instructions: Attach a straight bar to a high cable pulley. Adopt a shoulder width, upright stance (about 18 inches away from the machine) and take hold of the bar with an underhand grip (palms facing upwards).

Once you have hold of the bar, take the weight by tucking your elbow into the side of your torso. Your forearms and upper arms should create an acute angle (less than 90 degrees) when ready to go. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the bar down towards your thighs on an arcing motion. Use your triceps to do this and contract fully when your arms are by your thighs. At this point, your arms should be perpendicular to the floor. Tip: Keep your elbows tucked in to your sides as only the forearms should move.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dips - Triceps Version or Dumbbell Kickbacks.

name.es: Agarre inverso tríceps empujes hacia abajo

en: Attach a straight bar to a high cable pulley. Adopt a shoulder width, upright stance (about 18 inches away from the machine) and take hold of the bar with an underhand grip (palms facing upwards).

Once you have hold of the bar, take the weight by tucking your elbow into the side of your torso. Your forearms and upper arms should create an acute angle (less than 90 degrees) when ready to go. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the bar down towards your thighs on an arcing motion. Use your triceps to do this and contract fully when your arms are by your thighs. At this point, your arms should be perpendicular to the floor. Tip: Keep your elbows tucked in to your sides as only the forearms should move.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dips - Triceps Version or Dumbbell Kickbacks.
es: Sujeta a straight barra to a high polea pulley. Adopt a hombro width, upright stance (about 18 inches away from the máquina) and take hold of the barra with an undermano grip (palms facing upwards).

Once you have hold of the barra, take the peso by tucking your codo into the side of your torso. Your forebrazos and upper brazos should create an acute angle (less than 90 degrees) when ready to go. Esta será la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and pull the barra down hacia your thighs on an arcing motion. Use your tríceps to do this and contract fully when your brazos are by your thighs. At this point, your brazos should be perpendicular to the suelo. Consejo: Mantén your codos tucked in to your sides as only the forebrazos should move.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the barra along the same path espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Dips - Triceps Version or mancuerna Kickespaldas.

name: Reverse Grip Cable Curls
instructions: Attach a straight bar to a low cable pulley and take hold of it with an overhand grip (palms facing the floor). Stand upright around 12 inches away from the cable, maintaining a straight back throughout.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl the bar up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps.
(Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Inhale as you slowly begin to return the bar along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Reverse Plate Curls or Reverse Barbell Curls.

en: Attach a straight bar to a low cable pulley and take hold of it with an overhand grip (palms facing the floor). Stand upright around 12 inches away from the cable, maintaining a straight back throughout.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl the bar up towards your shoulders by contracting your biceps. Continue the movement until your biceps are fully contracted and the bar is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your biceps.

Inhale as you slowly begin to return the bar along the same path to the starting position.

es: Sujeta a straight barra to a low polea pulley and take hold of it with an overmano grip (palms facing the suelo). Colócate de pie upright around 12 inches away from the polea, maintaining a straight espalda throughout.

Whilst holding the upper brazo stationary, espira as you curl the barra up hacia your hombros by contracting your bíceps. Continue the movimiento until your bíceps are fully contracted and the barra is at hombro level. Hold the contracted posición for a second as you squeeze your bíceps.

name: Rear Delt Cable Fly
instructions: Remove the handles from two parallel cables. Adjust the height of the pulleys so they are above your head and adopt a standing, shoulder width stance between them.

Once you have done this take hold of the left cable with your right hand and the right cable with your left hand. Your arms should be at full extension with a slight bend at your elbows. This will be your starting position.

Now exhale and pull the cables back (crossing the cables over and keeping them around shoulder height) on a wide arcing motion. Tip: You should be leaning backward to help lift the weights nor should your back come out of a straight position.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your hands to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Rear Delt Flyes or Rear Delt Flyes (Machine).

en: Remove the handles from two parallel cables. Adjust the height of the pulleys so they are above your head and adopt a standing, shoulder width stance between them.

Once you have done this take hold of the left cable with your right hand and the right cable with your left hand. Your arms should be at full extension with a slight bend at your elbows. This will be your starting position.

Now exhale and pull the cables back (crossing the cables over and keeping them around shoulder height) on a wide arcing motion. Tip: You should be leaning backward to help lift the weights nor should your back come out of a straight position.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your hands to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Rear Delt Flyes or Rear Delt Flyes (Machine).
es: Remove the asas from two parallel poleas. Adjust the height of the pulleys so they are above your cabeza and adopt a standing, hombro width stance between them.

Once you have done this take hold of the left polea with your right mano and the right polea with your left mano. Your brazos should be at full extension with a slight bend at your codos. Esta será la posición inicial.

Now espira and pull the poleas espalda (crossing the poleas over and keeping them around hombro height) on a wide arcing motion. Consejo: You should be leaning espaldaward to help lift the pesos nor should your espalda come out of a straight posición.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return your manos to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Seated Rear Delt Flyes or Rear Delt Flyes (Machine).

name: Cable Pull Through
instructions: Begin standing a few feet in front of a low pulley with a rope or handle attached. Face away from the machine, straddling the cable, with your feet set wide apart.

Begin the movement by reaching through your legs as far as possible, bending at the hips. Keep your knees slightly bent. Keeping your arms straight, extend through the hip to stand straight up. Avoid pulling upward through the shoulders; all of the motion should originate through the hips.

en: Begin standing a few feet in front of a low pulley with a rope or handle attached. Face away from the machine, straddling the cable, with your feet set wide apart.

Begin the movement by reaching through your legs as far as possible, bending at the hips. Keep your knees slightly bent. Keeping your arms straight, extend through the hip to stand straight up. Avoid pulling upward through the shoulders; all of the motion should originate through the hips.
es: Empieza standing a few pies in front of a low pulley with a rope or asa attached. Face away from the máquina, straddling the polea, with your pies set wide apart.

Empieza the movimiento by reaching through your legs as far as possible, bending at the caderas. Mantén your rodillas slightly bent. Manténing your brazos straight, extend through the cadera to stand straight up. Avoid pulling upward through the hombros; all of the motion should originate through the caderas.

name: Pallof Press With Rotation
instructions: Attach a handle to a cable pulley that is at chest height and adopt a shoulder width stance adjacent to the cable machine (on your right side) about a foot away.
Take hold of the handle with an both hands, bend your elbows and keep your hands tucked in to your chest at this point. This will be your starting position. Tip: Maintain good posture throughout.
Exhale and press your hands out in front of your torso, keeping them parallel to the floor as you go. Continue to press forwards until your arms are at full extension.

Once at full extension, you then need to twist your torso (and the cable) away from the machine as far as you can without moving your hips. Your arms should remain parallel to the floor throughout and your head following your shoulders.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle back along the same path to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Cable Russian Twists or Plate Twists.

en: Attach a handle to a cable pulley that is at chest height and adopt a shoulder width stance adjacent to the cable machine (on your right side) about a foot away.
Take hold of the handle with an both hands, bend your elbows and keep your hands tucked in to your chest at this point. This will be your starting position. Tip: Maintain good posture throughout.
Exhale and press your hands out in front of your torso, keeping them parallel to the floor as you go. Continue to press forwards until your arms are at full extension.

Once at full extension, you then need to twist your torso (and the cable) away from the machine as far as you can without moving your hips. Your arms should remain parallel to the floor throughout and your head following your shoulders.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle back along the same path to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Cable Russian Twists or Plate Twists.
es: Sujeta a asa to a polea pulley that is at pecho height and adopt a hombro width stance adjacent to the polea máquina (on your right side) about a pie away.
Take hold of the asa with an both manos, bend your codos and keep your manos tucked in to your pecho at this point. Esta será la posición inicial. Consejo: Mantén good posture throughout.
Espira and press your manos out in front of your torso, keeping them parallel to the suelo as you go. Continue to press forwards until your brazos are at full extension.

Once at full extension, you then need to twist your torso (and the polea) away from the máquina as far as you can without moving your caderas. Your brazos should remain parallel to the suelo throughout and your cabeza following your hombros.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the asa espalda along the same path to its posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap sides.
Variaciones: Polea Russian Twists or Plate Twists.

name: Pallof Press
instructions: Attach a handle to a cable pulley that is at chest height and adopt a shoulder width stance adjacent to the cable machine (on your right side) about a foot away.
Take hold of the handle with an both hands, bend your elbows and keep your hands tucked in to your chest at this point. This will be your starting position. Tip: Maintain good posture throughout.
Exhale and press your hands out in front of your torso, keeping them parallel to the floor as you go. Continue to press forwards until your arms are at full extension.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle back along the same path to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

en: Attach a handle to a cable pulley that is at chest height and adopt a shoulder width stance adjacent to the cable machine (on your right side) about a foot away.
Take hold of the handle with an both hands, bend your elbows and keep your hands tucked in to your chest at this point. This will be your starting position. Tip: Maintain good posture throughout.
Exhale and press your hands out in front of your torso, keeping them parallel to the floor as you go. Continue to press forwards until your arms are at full extension.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle back along the same path to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
es: Sujeta a asa to a polea pulley that is at pecho height and adopt a hombro width stance adjacent to the polea máquina (on your right side) about a pie away.
Take hold of the asa with an both manos, bend your codos and keep your manos tucked in to your pecho at this point. Esta será la posición inicial. Consejo: Mantén good posture throughout.
Espira and press your manos out in front of your torso, keeping them parallel to the suelo as you go. Continue to press forwards until your brazos are at full extension.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the asa espalda along the same path to its posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap sides.

name: Cable Kickbacks
instructions: Attach an ankle cuff to both a low cable pulley and your ankle. Whilst facing the machine, take one step backwards and hold onto the metal structure for support. Lift your ankle so that you have a 90 degree bend at your hip. Tip: You should lean forwards from your hips and maintain a straight back throughout. This will be your starting position.
Exhale and kick backwards whilst maintaining a stationary torso. Squeeze the glute of the leg you have the cuff attached to and keep going until you have a peak contraction within the glute.
Once you have achieved a peak contraction, pause for a brief moment, inhale and return the ankle along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap legs.
Variation: Hip Thrusts.

en: Attach an ankle cuff to both a low cable pulley and your ankle. Whilst facing the machine, take one step backwards and hold onto the metal structure for support. Lift your ankle so that you have a 90 degree bend at your hip. Tip: You should lean forwards from your hips and maintain a straight back throughout. This will be your starting position.
Exhale and kick backwards whilst maintaining a stationary torso. Squeeze the glute of the leg you have the cuff attached to and keep going until you have a peak contraction within the glute.
Once you have achieved a peak contraction, pause for a brief moment, inhale and return the ankle along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap legs.
Variation: Hip Thrusts.
es: Sujeta an ankle cuff to both a low polea pulley and your ankle. Whilst facing the máquina, take one step espaldawards and hold onto the metal structure for support. Lift your ankle so that you have a 90 degree bend at your cadera. Consejo: You should lean forwards from your caderas and maintain a straight espalda throughout. Esta será la posición inicial.
Espira and kick espaldawards mientras maintaining a stationary torso. Squeeze the glute of the leg you have the cuff attached to and keep going until you have a peak contraction within the glute.
Once you have achieved a peak contraction, pause for a brief moment, inspira and return the ankle along the same path espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap legs.
Variación: Hip Thrusts.

name: Single Arm High Pulley Cable Side Bends
instructions: Attach a handle to a high cable pulley and adopt a narrow stance adjacent to the cable machine (on your right side) about a foot away.

Take hold of the handle with an underhand grip, bend your elbow as you take hold and tuck it in to the side of your torso. Allow your left hand to rest across your torso so it does not interfere with the movement. This will be your starting position.
Exhale and crunch your torso laterally (sideways) towards your right side, gently pulling the weight down as you go. Tip: Only bend laterally, not forward or back.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle along the same path to its starting position.
Variations: Plate Side Bends or V-Sit Twists (Medicine Ball).

name.en: Single Arm High Pulley Cable Side Bends
name.es: A una mano High Pulley polea Side Bends

en: Attach a handle to a high cable pulley and adopt a narrow stance adjacent to the cable machine (on your right side) about a foot away.

Take hold of the handle with an underhand grip, bend your elbow as you take hold and tuck it in to the side of your torso. Allow your left hand to rest across your torso so it does not interfere with the movement. This will be your starting position.
Exhale and crunch your torso laterally (sideways) towards your right side, gently pulling the weight down as you go. Tip: Only bend laterally, not forward or back.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle along the same path to its starting position.
Variations: Plate Side Bends or V-Sit Twists (Medicine Ball).
es: Sujeta a asa to a high polea pulley and adopt a narrow stance adjacent to the polea máquina (on your right side) about a pie away.

Take hold of the asa with an undermano grip, bend your codo as you take hold and tuck it in to the side of your torso. Allow your left mano to rest across your torso so it does not interfere with the movimiento. Esta será la posición inicial.
Espira and crunch your torso laterally (sideways) hacia your right side, gently pulling the peso down as you go. Consejo: Only bend laterally, not forward or espalda.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the asa along the same path to its posición inicial.
Variaciones: Plate Side Bends or V-Sit Twists (Medicine Ball).

aliases: Single Arm High Pulley Cable Side Bends

name: Cable Skull Crushers
instructions: Place a flat bench in front of a single low cable pulley (around 12 inches away) with the straight bar attachment connected. Lay down on your back with your head the same end as the cable and have your torso flat with your knees bent at a 90 degree angle and your feet firmly placed on the floor.

Grab the bar with an overhand grip (palms facing away from you) and extend your arms above your chest so they are vertical from the floor. Tip: From now on in your elbows should remain as close as possible and your upper arm should be stationary throughout. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and bend at your elbows creating an arcing motion with the bar so that your hands are heading towards your forehead. The weight should be stretching your triceps. Remember to keep your elbows as close together as possible.
After a brief pause, exhale and return the bar and your hands along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Tricep Rope Extensions or Skull Crushers.

en: Place a flat bench in front of a single low cable pulley (around 12 inches away) with the straight bar attachment connected. es: Coloca a flat banco in front of a single low polea pulley (around 12 inches away) with the straight barra attachment connected. Túmbate down on your espalda with your cabeza the same end as the polea and have your torso flat with your rodillas bent at a 90 degree angle and your pies firmly placed on the suelo.

Coge the barra with an overmano grip (palms facing away from you) and extend your brazos above your pecho so they are vertical from the suelo. Consejo: From now on in your codos should remain as close as possible and your upper brazo should be stationary throughout. Esta será la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, inspira and bend at your codos creating an arcing motion with the barra so that your manos are cabezaing hacia your forecabeza. The peso should be stretching your tríceps. Remember to keep your codos as close together as possible.
Tras una breve pausa, espira and return the barra and your manos along the same path to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Tricep Rope Extensions or Skull Crushers.

name: Lying High Cable Curls
instructions: Place a flat bench in front of a high pulley or lat pulldown machine.
Hold the straight bar attachment using an underhand grip (palms up) that is about shoulder width.
Lie on your back with your head over the end of the bench.
Now extend your arms straight above your shoulders. Your torso and your arms should make a 90-degree angle and the elbows should be in.  This will be your starting position.

As you breathe out, curl the bar down in a semicircular motion until it touches your chin. Squeeze the biceps for a second at the top contracted position. Tip: As you execute this motion only the forearms should move.  At no time should the upper arms be moving at all.  They are to remain perpendicular throughout the movement.
Return to starting position slowly.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: You can also curl down to above your head, rather than to your chin or use an E-Z Bar Attachment instead of a straight one.

Hold the straight barra attachment using an undermano grip (palms up) that is about hombro width.
Túmbate on your espalda with your cabeza over the end of the banco.
Now extend your brazos straight above your hombros. Your torso and your brazos should make a 90-degree angle and the codos should be in.  Esta será la posición inicial.

As you breathe out, curl the barra down in a semicircular motion until it touches your chin. Squeeze the bíceps for a second at the top contracted posición. Consejo: As you execute this motion only the forebrazos should move.  At no time should the upper brazos be moving at all.  They are to remain perpendicular throughout the movimiento.
Return to posición inicial slowly.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: You can also curl down to above your cabeza, rather than to your chin or use an E-Z Bar Sujetament instead of a straight one.

aliases: Lying Close-Grip Bar Curl On High Pulley

name: Lying Cable Curls
instructions: Grab a straight bar or E-Z bar attachment that is attached to the low pulley with both hands, using an underhand (palms facing up) shoulder-width grip.
Lie flat on your back on top of an exercise mat in front of the weight stack with your feet flat against the frame of the pulley machine and your legs straight.
With your arms extended and your elbows close to your body slightly bend your arms.  This will be your starting position.
While keeping your upper arms stationary and the elbows close to your body, curl the bar up slowly toward your chest as you breathe out and you squeeze the biceps.
After a second squeeze at the top of the movement, slowly return to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: You can also perform this exercise with exercise bands.

en: Grab a straight bar or E-Z bar attachment that is attached to the low pulley with both hands, using an underhand (palms facing up) shoulder-width grip.
Lie flat on your back on top of an exercise mat in front of the weight stack with your feet flat against the frame of the pulley machine and your legs straight.
With your arms extended and your elbows close to your body slightly bend your arms.  This will be your starting position.
While keeping your upper arms stationary and the elbows close to your body, curl the bar up slowly toward your chest as you breathe out and you squeeze the biceps.

es: Coge a straight barra or E-Z barra attachment that is attached to the low pulley with both manos, using an undermano (palms facing up) hombro-width grip.
Túmbate flat on your espalda on top of an exercise mat in front of the peso stack with your pies flat against the frame of the pulley máquina and your legs straight.
With your brazos extended and your codos close to your body slightly bend your brazos.  Esta será la posición inicial.
Mientras keeping your upper brazos stationary and the codos close to your body, curl the barra up slowly toward your pecho as you breathe out and you squeeze the bíceps.
After a second squeeze at the top of the movimiento, slowly return to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: You can also perform this exercise with exercise bandas.

name: Low Cable Row To Neck
instructions: Attach a rope to a low cable pulley and adopt a standing, shoulder width stance a couple of feet away from the pulley. Face the machine and take hold of the rope with an overhand grip (little fingers on the rubber ends of the attachment). From the cable pulley to your shoulders, should be a straight line in what will be your starting position.

Exhale and pull the rope in towards your chin. Seperate the rope as much as possible by pulling your little fingers apart and flaring your elbows out, high and wide. Tip: Keep your hands above your elbows and maintain a straight back throughout this movement. Do not rock your bodyweight forward and backwards in order to generate momentum.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the rope along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Cable Rear Delt Rows Rope or Rear Delt Flyes (Machine).

name: Laying Cable Tricep Extensions
instructions: Place a mat in front of a single low cable pulley (around 18 inches away) with the rope attachment connected. Lay down on your back with your head the same end as the cable and have your torso flat with your knees bent at a confortable angle, this will support your lower back.

Grab the rope with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) and extend above your chest so your arms are vertical from the floor. Tip: From now on in your elbows should remain as close as possible and your upper arm should be stationary throughout. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and bend at your elbows creating an arcing motion with the rope so that your hands are heading towards your forehead. The weight should be stretching your triceps. Remember to keep your elbows as close together as possible.
After a brief pause, exhale and return the rope and your hands along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Tricep Rope Extensions or Skull Crushers.

name: Low Cable Crossovers
instructions: Attach handles to two opposing low cable pulleys. Take a standing, shoulder width stance between the cables facing forward. Take hold of both handles with an underhand grip (palms facing forward) and take a small step forward (around 18 inches). Allow your arms to hang by your sides, torso straight with your chest out. This will be your starting position.

To initiate this movement, exhale and lift the handles on an arcing motion in front of your body until the handles meet in the middle and cross over at shoulder height. Make sure that your elbows are slightly bent throughout and that your arms remain as passive as possible, the movement should be directed through your pectoral muscles (chest).
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles along the same path back in to the starting positions.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Pec Deck or Flat Dumbbell Flyes.

Esta será la posición inicial.

Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the asas along the same path espalda in to the posición inicials.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Pec Deck or Flat mancuerna Flyes.

name: Kneeling Single Arm High Cable Rows
instructions: Attach a handle to a high cable pulley. Adopt a kneeling position (about 18 inches away from the machine) and take hold of the handle with an overhand grip (palm facing the floor). Once you have hold of the handle, your arm should be at full extension aiming at the high cable pulley (creating a straight line from your shoulder to the pulley). Have a straight back and a 90 degree angle at your knees. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the handle down towards the side of your torso. Use your back muscles in order to activate the movement and keep your arm as passive as possible. Continue to pull the handle until your elbow is either beside or just past your torso (without twisting your body). Tip: Twist your hand as you pull the handle down and in order to get the best contraction.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap arms.
Variations: Single Arm Row or Single Arm Lat Pulldown.

name: Kneeling Oblique Cable Crunches
instructions: Adopt a kneeling position underneath a high cable with a rope attached. When setting the weight for this exercise, be cautious as if it is too heavy, your abs will not be taking the load and your lower back will play a part.
Take hold of the ropes and bring them down so they are beside your head on your upper chest. Push your hips back and lean forward to create a 90 degree angle from your lower back and thighs.

From here you should try to arch your back by taking a deep breath, pulling your shoulders back and pushing your chest out. This will be your starting position. Tip: Throughout this movement your hips and your lower limbs should remain stationary.

Exhale and flex your abs and obliques to move your shoulders (and rope) downward towards your right thigh. As you flex your abs and obliques, the arch in your back reverses so that your back is now rounding over. Your elbows should remain as close to your torso as possible throughout.
After a brief pause, inhale and return along the same path to your starting position.
Repeat the movement but this time as you crunch downward, aim towards your left thigh. Keep alternating in this fashion until you have completed the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from lower back pain, be cautious of the resistance.
Variations: Oblique Crunches or Cross Body Crunches.

From here you should try to arch your espalda by taking a deep breath, pulling your hombros espalda and pushing your pecho out. Esta será la posición inicial. Consejo: Throughout this movimiento your caderas and your lower limbs should remain stationary.

Espira and flex your abs and obliques to move your hombros (and rope) downward hacia your right thigh. As you flex your abs and obliques, the arch in your espalda reverses so that your espalda is now rounding over. Your codos should remain as close to your torso as possible throughout.

name: Kneeling High Cable Rows Rope
instructions: Attach a rope to a high cable pulley and adopt a kneeling stance facing the cable machine about a 2 feet away.

Take hold of the rope with an overhand grip and keep your arms pointing towards the cable pulley itself. Lean back slightly from your knees allowing you to keep a straight back and looking in the same direction your arms are pointing. This will be your starting position.

Exhale and pull the rope in towards your face. Separate the rope as much as possible by pulling your little fingers apart and flaring your elbows out, high and wide. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout this movement and do not rock your bodyweight forward and backwards in order to generate momentum.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the rope along the same path to the starting position.
Variations: Lat Pulldown or T-Bar Rows With Handle.

name: Kneeling Cable Tricep Extensions
instructions: Attach a bar to a high cable pulley and adopt a kneeling stance facing away from the machine about a foot away.

Grasping the bar with an overhand grip (palms facing forward), lean forward with your bodyweight so that you create a slight bend at your hips. Your knees should be at 90 degrees located under the bar. Your elbows should also be at 90 degrees, tucked in close to your ears where they should stay throughout the movement. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout, only your forearms should move. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and press the bar forwards on an arcing path whilst squeezing your triceps. Continue with this movement until your arms are fully extended.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bench Dips or Tricep Extension (Rope).

name: Kneeling Cable Crunch With Alternating Oblique Twists
instructions: Adopt a kneeling position underneath a high cable with a rope attached. When setting the weight for this exercise, be cautious as if it is too heavy, your abs will not be taking the load and your lower back will play a part.
Take hold of the ropes and bring them down so they are beside your head on your upper chest. Push your hips back and lean forward to create a 90 degree angle from your lower back and thighs.

From here you should try to arch your back by taking a deep breath, pulling your shoulders back and pushing your chest out. This will be your starting position. Tip: Throughout this movement your hips and your lower limbs should remain stationary.

Exhale and flex your abs and obliques to move your shoulders (and rope) downward towards your right thigh. As you flex your abs and obliques, the arch in your back reverses so that your back is now rounding over. Your elbows should remain as close to your torso as possible throughout.
After a brief pause, inhale and return along the same path to your starting position.
Repeat the movement but this time as you crunch downward, aim towards your left thigh. Keep alternating in this fashion until you have completed the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from lower back pain, be cautious of the resistance.
Variations: Oblique Crunches or Cross Body Crunches.

Variations: Oblique Crunches or Cross Body Crunches.
es: Adopt a rodillaling posición underneath a high polea with a rope attached. When setting the peso for this exercise, be cautious as if it is too heavy, your abs will not be taking the load and your zona lumbar will play a part.
Take hold of the ropes and bring them down so they are beside your cabeza on your upper pecho. Push your caderas espalda and lean forward to create a 90 degree angle from your zona lumbar and thighs.

From here you should try to arch your espalda by taking a deep breath, pulling your hombros espalda and pushing your pecho out. Esta será la posición inicial. Consejo: Throughout this movimiento your caderas and your lower limbs should remain stationary.

Espira and flex your abs and obliques to move your hombros (and rope) downward hacia your right thigh. As you flex your abs and obliques, the arch in your espalda reverses so that your espalda is now rounding over. Your codos should remain as close to your torso as possible throughout.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return along the same path to your posición inicial.
Repeat the movimiento but this time as you crunch downward, aim hacia your left thigh. Mantén alternating in this fashion until you have completed the recommended amount of repetitions.
Precaución: If you suffer from zona lumbar pain, be cautious of the resistencia.
Variaciones: Oblique Crunches or Cross Body Crunches.

aliases: Kneeling Cable Crunch With Alternating Oblique Twists

name: High Cable Curls
instructions: Adjust a cable pulley so it is at the top of its runner and set the weight accordingly. Attach a flat bar to the cable. Next take hold of the bar with an underhand grip (palms facing you) and stand away from the cable machine and pull the bar so that there is tension in the cable, elbows close together, above your chest. This will be the starting position of the exercise.To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the bar towards your forehead in an arcing motion. Tip: Only your forearms should move, your upper arms should remain stable. Continue to curl the bar until either your biceps are optimally contracted or you reach your forehead.After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar along the same path back into its starting position.Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.Variations: Cable Curls or Preacher Curls.

en: Adjust a cable pulley so it is at the top of its runner and set the weight accordingly. Attach a flat bar to the cable. Next take hold of the bar with an underhand grip (palms facing you) and stand away from the cable machine and pull the bar so that there is tension in the cable, elbows close together, above your chest. This will be the starting position of the exercise.To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the bar towards your forehead in an arcing motion. Tip: Only your forearms should move, your upper arms should remain stable. Continue to curl the bar until either your biceps are optimally contracted or you reach your forehead.After a brief pause, inhale and return the bar along the same path back into its starting position.Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.Variations: Cable Curls or Preacher Curls.
es: Adjust a polea pulley so it is at the top of its runner and set the peso accordingly. Sujeta a flat barra to the polea. Next take hold of the barra with an undermano grip (palms facing you) and stand away from the polea máquina and pull the barra so that there is tension in the polea, codos close together, above your pecho. This will be the posición inicial of the exercise.To initiate the movimiento, espira and pull the barra hacia your forecabeza in an arcing motion. Consejo: Only your forebrazos should move, your upper brazos should remain stable. Continue to curl the barra until either your bíceps are optimally contracted or you reach your forecabeza.Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the barra along the same path espalda into its posición inicial.Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.Variaciones: Polea Curls or Preacher Curls.

name: Cable Front Raises
instructions: Place a handle attachment on to a low cable pulley. Facing away, stand about a foot away from the machine. Adopt a shoulder width, upright standing position, maintaining a straight back throughout. Take hold of the handle in your left hand and return to your original position with your hand hanging perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.

Initiate the movement by exhaling and elevating your left arm on an arcing motion in front of you. Keep a slight bend at your elbow and continue to elevate upward until your arm is parallel with the floor.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your arm along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap arms.
Variation: Front Plate Raise or Alternating Front Raises.

en: Place a handle attachment on to a low cable pulley. Facing away, stand about a foot away from the machine. Adopt a shoulder width, upright standing position, maintaining a straight back throughout. Take hold of the handle in your left hand and return to your original position with your hand hanging perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.

Initiate the movement by exhaling and elevating your left arm on an arcing motion in front of you. Keep a slight bend at your elbow and continue to elevate upward until your arm is parallel with the floor.
After a brief pause, inhale and return your arm along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap arms.
Variation: Front Plate Raise or Alternating Front Raises.
es: Coloca a asa attachment on to a low polea pulley. Facing away, stand about a pie away from the máquina. Adopt a hombro width, upright standing posición, maintaining a straight espalda throughout. Take hold of the asa in your left mano and return to your original posición with your mano hanging perpendicular to the suelo. Esta será la posición inicial.

Initiate the movimiento by exhaling and elevating your left brazo on an arcing motion in front of you. Mantén a slight bend at your codo and continue to elevate upward until your brazo is parallel with the suelo.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return your brazo along the same path espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap brazos.
Variación: Front Plate Raise or Alternating Front Raises.

name: Flat Cable Flyes
instructions: Set two opposing cable pulleys to the bottom of the machine and attach a handle to each. Position a bench in between the two cables and lay on the bench with your chest between the cables. Take hold of the handles and press the weights directly up towards the ceiling until your arms are fully extended (slight bend at your elbows) and the handles are above your chest. This will be your starting position.
Maintaining the slight bend at your elbows, lower your arms in a wide arcing motion until you feel your chest stretching, inhale as you do so.
Following the same path as you went down, squeeze your pectoral muscles (chest) and bring your arms back to the starting position, remembering to exhale as you go.
Pause for a second and then repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Flyes or Pec Deck.

en: Set two opposing cable pulleys to the bottom of the machine and attach a handle to each. Position a bench in between the two cables and lay on the bench with your chest between the cables. Take hold of the handles and press the weights directly up towards the ceiling until your arms are fully extended (slight bend at your elbows) and the handles are above your chest. This will be your starting position.
Maintaining the slight bend at your elbows, lower your arms in a wide arcing motion until you feel your chest stretching, inhale as you do so.
Following the same path as you went down, squeeze your pectoral muscles (chest) and bring your arms back to the starting position, remembering to exhale as you go.
Pause for a second and then repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Flyes or Pec Deck.
es: Coloca two opposing polea pulleys to the bottom of the máquina and attach a asa to each. Position a banco in between the two poleas and lay on the banco with your pecho between the poleas. Take hold of the asas and press the pesos directly up hacia the techo until your brazos are fully extended (slight bend at your codos) and the asas are above your pecho. Esta será la posición inicial.
Manténing the slight bend at your codos, lower your brazos in a wide arcing motion until you feel your pecho stretching, inspira as you do so.
Following the same path as you went down, squeeze your pectoral muscles (pecho) and bring your brazos espalda to the posición inicial, remembering to espira as you go.
Pause for a second and then repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variaciones: mancuerna Flyes or Pec Deck.

name: Cable External Rotation
instructions: Attach a handle to the cable and adjust the height of the pulley so that it sits at belly button height. Stand side on to the machine and take a step away. Adopt a shoulder width, upright standing position and take hold of the handle with the hand furthest from the machine. Once you have hold of the handle, tuck your elbow in close to your torso (your elbow should be at a 90 degree angle). This will be your starting position.

Exhale and rotate your hand on an imaginary semicricle in front of you, pivoting from your elbow which, remains tight against the side of your torso. Rotate your shoulder fully so that your hand is as close to a right angle (pointing away from your body) as possible.
After a brief pause, return the handle along the same path back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap arms.
Caution: Be cautious with the weight as you could damage your rotator cuff.
Variations: Dumbbell External Rotations or Dynaband External Rotations.

en: Attach a handle to the cable and adjust the height of the pulley so that it sits at belly button height. Stand side on to the machine and take a step away. Exhale and rotate your hand on an imaginary semicricle in front of you, pivoting from your elbow which, remains tight against the side of your torso. Rotate your shoulder fully so that your hand is as close to a right angle (pointing away from your body) as possible.

es: Sujeta a asa to the polea and adjust the height of the pulley so that it sits at belly button height. Colócate de pie side on to the máquina and take a step away. Adopt a hombro width, upright standing posición and take hold of the asa with the mano furthest from the máquina. Once you have hold of the asa, tuck your codo in close to your torso (your codo should be at a 90 degree angle). Esta será la posición inicial.

Espira and rotate your mano on an imaginary semicricle in front of you, pivoting from your codo which, remains tight against the side of your torso. Rotate your hombro fully so that your mano is as close to a right angle (pointing away from your body) as possible.
Tras una breve pausa, return the asa along the same path espalda to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap brazos.
Precaución: Be cautious with the peso as you could damage your rotator cuff.
Variaciones: mancuerna External Rotations or Dynabanda External Rotations.

name: Cable Shrugs
instructions: Adjust two opposing cable pulleys so they are at the bottom of their runners and set the weights accordingly. Position yourself in between these runners with a shoulder width stance. Attach a handle to each cable and (whilst maintaining good posture (a straight back)), bend at your knees and hips to lower your torso, enabling you to take hold of each. Press through your heels and quads whilst simultaneously using the muscles in your back to bring your torso into a vertical position. This will be the starting position of the exercise.
To initiate the movement, exhale and elevate your shoulders by pulling them in towards your ears. Continue to elevate until the muscles around your neck (trapezius) are optimally contracted.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles along the same path back into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Shrugs or Smith Machine Shrugs.

en: Adjust two opposing cable pulleys so they are at the bottom of their runners and set the weights accordingly. Position yourself in between these runners with a shoulder width stance. Attach a handle to each cable and (whilst maintaining good posture (a straight back)), bend at your knees and hips to lower your torso, enabling you to take hold of each. Press through your heels and quads whilst simultaneously using the muscles in your back to bring your torso into a vertical position. This will be the starting position of the exercise.
To initiate the movement, exhale and elevate your shoulders by pulling them in towards your ears. Continue to elevate until the muscles around your neck (trapezius) are optimally contracted.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles along the same path back into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Shrugs or Smith Machine Shrugs.
es: Adjust two opposing polea pulleys so they are at the bottom of their runners and set the pesos accordingly. Position yourself in between these runners with a hombro width stance. Sujeta a asa to each polea and (mientras maintaining good posture (a straight espalda)), bend at your rodillas and caderas to lower your torso, enabling you to take hold of each. Press through your talones and cuádriceps mientras simultaneously using the muscles in your espalda to bring your torso into a vertical posición. This will be the posición inicial of the exercise.
To initiate the movimiento, espira and elevate your hombros by pulling them in hacia your ears. Continue to elevate until the muscles around your neck (trapezius) are optimally contracted.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the asas along the same path espalda into their posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: mancuerna Shrugs or multipower Shrugs.

name: Standing Cable Shoulder Press
instructions: Attach handles to two low cables. Take one in each hand and face away from the machine. Bring the handles up to shoulder height with your elbows are flared out wide and at a 90 degree angle. Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance (you can split your stance for more stability), maintaining a straight back throughout the movement. Your palms should be facing forward. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, press both handles towards the ceiling until your elbow becomes fully extended (straight).
After a brief pause, return the handles back along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Shoulder Press or Seated Shoulder Press.

name.es: De pie polea press de hombro

en: Attach handles to two low cables. Take one in each hand and face away from the machine. Bring the handles up to shoulder height with your elbows are flared out wide and at a 90 degree angle. Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance (you can split your stance for more stability), maintaining a straight back throughout the movement. Your palms should be facing forward. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, press both handles towards the ceiling until your elbow becomes fully extended (straight).
After a brief pause, return the handles back along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Shoulder Press or Seated Shoulder Press.
es: Sujeta asas to two low poleas. Take one in each mano and face away from the máquina. Bring the asas up to hombro height with your codos are flared out wide and at a 90 degree angle. Adopt a standing, hombro width stance (you can split your stance for more stability), maintaining a straight espalda throughout the movimiento. Your palms should be facing forward. Esta será la posición inicial.
Whilst exhaling, press both asas hacia the techo until your codo becomes fully extended (straight).
Tras una breve pausa, return the asas espalda along the same path to the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: mancuerna Shoulder Press or Seated Shoulder Press.

name: Seated Cable Rear Delt Flyes
instructions: Adjust two opposing cable pulleys so they are at the bottom of their runners and set the weights accordingly. Next, attach handles to each cable and place a flat bench length ways between the cables. Take a seat on the bench facing away from the machines with your knees bent at a 90 degree angle and your torso leaning forwards whilst maintaining a straight back. Next you will need to cross the cables over underneath the bench so your left hand takes hold of the right cable and vice versa. Adopt underhand grips and allow your elbows to flare out wide. This is your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the back of your hands out and away from one another on a wide arcing path by flexing the muscles in the rear of your shoulders or across your upper back.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Lateral Raises or Seated Side Lateral Raises.

en: Adjust two opposing cable pulleys so they are at the bottom of their runners and set the weights accordingly. Next, attach handles to each cable and place a flat bench length ways between the cables. Take a seat on the bench facing away from the machines with your knees bent at a 90 degree angle and your torso leaning forwards whilst maintaining a straight back. Next you will need to cross the cables over underneath the bench so your left hand takes hold of the right cable and vice versa. Adopt underhand grips and allow your elbows to flare out wide. This is your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the back of your hands out and away from one another on a wide arcing path by flexing the muscles in the rear of your shoulders or across your upper back.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handles back along the same path to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Lateral Raises or Seated Side Lateral Raises.
es: Adjust two opposing polea pulleys so they are at the bottom of their runners and set the pesos accordingly. Next, attach asas to each polea and place a flat banco length ways between the poleas. Take a seat on the banco facing away from the máquinas with your rodillas bent at a 90 degree angle and your torso leaning forwards mientras maintaining a straight espalda. Next you will need to cross the poleas over underneath the banco so your left mano takes hold of the right polea and vice versa. Adopt undermano grips and allow your codos to flare out wide. Esta es la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and pull the espalda of your manos out and away from one another on a wide arcing path by flexing the muscles in the rear of your hombros or across your upper espalda.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the asas espalda along the same path to their posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: mancuerna Lateral Raises or Seated Side Lateral Raises.

name: Seated Cable Crunch
instructions: Adjust a cable pulley so that it is at the top of its runner and set the weight accordingly. Next, attach a rope to the cable and place a flat bench adjacent to the runner (around a foot away). Take a seat on the bench facing away from the machine with your knees and hips at 90 degree angles and your torso upright. Reach up and grab the rope with both hands, pulling it down to sit either side of your head on your upper chest. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and flex your abs to move your shoulders (and rope) downward towards your thighs. As you flex your abs, the arch in your back reverses so that your back is now rounding over. Your elbows should remain as close to your torso as possible throughout.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the rope back along the same path to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Cable Crunch or Cocoons.

en: Adjust a cable pulley so that it is at the top of its runner and set the weight accordingly. Next, attach a rope to the cable and place a flat bench adjacent to the runner (around a foot away). Take a seat on the bench facing away from the machine with your knees and hips at 90 degree angles and your torso upright. Reach up and grab the rope with both hands, pulling it down to sit either side of your head on your upper chest. This is your starting position.

Reach up and grab the rope with both manos, pulling it down to sit either side of your cabeza on your upper pecho. Esta es la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and flex your abs to move your hombros (and rope) downward hacia your thighs. As you flex your abs, the arch in your espalda reverses so that your espalda is now rounding over. Your codos should remain as close to your torso as possible throughout.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the rope espalda along the same path to its posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.
Variaciones: Polea Crunch or Cocoons.

name: Cable Russian Twists
instructions: Adjust a cable pulley so that it is 2/3 of the way up its runner and set the weight accordingly. Take a large step away from the cable and set your stance at shoulder width. Take hold of the cable in both hands and extend your arms in front of you. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and rotate through your core to turn your shoulders away from the cable machine. Keep your arms extended as you rotate and continue until your arms are pointing away from the cable machine.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Russian Twists or Hip Crossovers.

en: Adjust a cable pulley so that it is 2/3 of the way up its runner and set the weight accordingly. Take a large step away from the cable and set your stance at shoulder width. Take hold of the cable in both hands and extend your arms in front of you. This is your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and rotate through your core to turn your shoulders away from the cable machine. Keep your arms extended as you rotate and continue until your arms are pointing away from the cable machine.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the handle along the same path back into its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Russian Twists or Hip Crossovers.
es: Adjust a polea pulley so that it is 2/3 of the way up its runner and set the peso accordingly. Take a large step away from the polea and set your stance at hombro width. Take hold of the polea in both manos and extend your brazos in front of you. Esta es la posición inicial.

To initiate the movimiento, espira and rotate through your core to turn your hombros away from the polea máquina. Mantén your brazos extended as you rotate and continue until your brazos are pointing away from the polea máquina.
Tras una breve pausa, inspira and return the asa along the same path espalda into its posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado and swap sides.
Variaciones: Russian Twists or Hip Crossovers.

name: Seated Cable Rows
instructions: Attach two handles to a low cable pulley, take hold of them with a neutral grip and sit about 2 feet away from the pulley system. Once seated, you should have your arms and legs out in front of you (slightly bent) with your posture held in an upright position (this is paramount to maintain throughout the movement) with your chest pushed out. This is your starting position.

Exhale and pull the handles in towards your lower abdominals by contracting your back muscles. Your posture should remain upright throughout the movement and your arms should remain as passive as possible.
Once the handles touch your abdominals, pause for a brief moment before inhaling and returning them along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: If you suffer from back pain, this may not be a suitable movement for you.
Variations: Landmine T Bar Rows or Underhand Cable Pulldowns.

Once seated, you should have your arms and legs out in front of you (slightly bent) with your posture held in an upright position (this is paramount to maintain throughout the movement) with your chest pushed out. Once seated, you should have your brazos and legs out in front of you (slightly bent) with your posture held in an upright posición (this is paramount to maintain throughout the movimiento) with your pecho pushed out. Esta es la posición inicial.

Espira and pull the asas in hacia your lower abdominals by contracting your espalda muscles. Your posture should remain upright throughout the movimiento and your brazos should remain as passive as possible.
Once the asas touch your abdominals, pause for a brief moment before inhaling and returning them along the same path espalda into the posición inicial.
Repite el número de repeticiones recomendado.

Variaciones: Landmine T Bar Rows or Undermano Polea Pulldowns.

name: Cable Rear Delt Rows Rope
instructions: Attach a rope to a high cable pulley and adopt a standing, shoulder width stance a couple of feet away from the pulley. Face the machine and take hold of the rope with an overhand grip (little fingers on the rubber ends of the attachment).
Elevate your arms so that they are just above parallel with the floor. This will be your starting position.

Exhale and pull the rope in towards your upper chest. Seperate the rope as much as possible by pulling your little fingers apart and flaring your elbows out high and wide. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout this movement and do not rock your bodyweight forward and backwards in order to generate momentum.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the rope along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Facepulls or Rear Delt Flyes (Machine)

Elevate your arms so that they are just above parallel with the floor. This will be your starting position.

Exhale and pull the rope in towards your upper chest. Seperate the rope as much as possible by pulling your little fingers apart and flaring your elbows out high and wide. Tip: Maintain a straight back throughout this movement and do not rock your bodyweight forward and backwards in order to generate momentum.

Espira and pull the rope in hacia your upper pecho. Seperate the rope as much as possible by pulling your little fingers apart and flaring your codos out high and wide.
