instructions: Grab two dumbbells with an underhand grip (palms facing forward) and stand with a shoulder width stance. Make sure you are standing upright with a slight bend at your knees and elbows. Let your arms hang infront of you, perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling and maintaining a stationary torso, lift the dumbbells out to your side, taking them as wide as you can. Continue to lift until your arms are parallel to the floor.
Pause at the top of the movement for a split second.
As you inhale, lower the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

en: Grab two dumbbells with an underhand grip (palms facing forward) and stand with a shoulder width stance. Make sure you are standing upright with a slight bend at your knees and elbows. Let your arms hang infront of you, perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling and maintaining a stationary torso, lift the dumbbells out to your side, taking them as wide as you can. Continue to lift until your arms are parallel to the floor.
Pause at the top of the movement for a split second.
As you inhale, lower the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Agarra dos mancuernas con un agarre supino (con las palmas hacia adelante) y párese con una postura a la altura de los hombros. Asegúrate de estar de pie con una ligera flexión de rodillas y codos. Deja que tus brazos cuelguen frente a ti, perpendiculares al suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras exhalas y mantienes el torso inmóvil, levanta las mancuernas hacia un lado, alejándolas lo más que puedas. Continúa levantando hasta que sus brazos queden paralelos al suelo.
Haz una pausa en la parte superior del movimiento durante una fracción de segundo.
Mientras inhala, baje las mancuernas por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.

name: Single Arm Rows
instructions: Grab two dumbbells and place them next a flat bench. With your right knee, kneel on one end of the bench with your left leg remaining straight and on the floor for support. Lean on the bench with your right hand whilst taking hold of the dumbbell with your left hand. Your torso at this point should be parallel with the floor with a neutral spine. This will be your starting position.

Keeping your upper arm close to your body, pull the dumbbell up to the side of your hip whilst maintaining a stationary torso. Exhale as you lift the dumbbell. Tip: Contract your back muscles in order to create this movement. Your arms should remain as passive as possible.
Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this step.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and then switch sides.
Variations: Seated Cable Row or Alternating Kettlebell Row.

en: Grab two dumbbells and place them next a flat bench. With your right knee, kneel on one end of the bench with your left leg remaining straight and on the floor for support. Lean on the bench with your right hand whilst taking hold of the dumbbell with your left hand. Your torso at this point should be parallel with the floor with a neutral spine. This will be your starting position.

Keeping your upper arm close to your body, pull the dumbbell up to the side of your hip whilst maintaining a stationary torso. Exhale as you lift the dumbbell. Tip: Contract your back muscles in order to create this movement. Your arms should remain as passive as possible.
Lower the dumbbell back down to the starting position. Inhale as you perform this step.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and then switch sides.
Variations: Seated Cable Row or Alternating Kettlebell Row.
es: Coge dos mancuernas y colócalas junto a un banco plano. Con la rodilla derecha, arrodíllate en un extremo del banco con la pierna izquierda estirada y apoyada en el suelo. Apóyate en el banco con la mano derecha mientras agarras la mancuerna con la mano izquierda. Su torso en este punto debe estar paralelo al suelo con la columna neutra. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Manteniendo la parte superior del brazo cerca del cuerpo, tire de la mancuerna hacia el costado de la cadera mientras mantiene el torso estacionario. Exhala mientras levantas la mancuerna. Consejo: Contrae los músculos de la espalda para crear este movimiento. Tus brazos deben permanecer lo más pasivos posible.
Baja la mancuerna hasta la posición inicial. Inhala mientras realizas este paso.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones y luego cambie de lado.
Variaciones: remo con cable sentado o remo alterno con pesas rusas.

name: Alternating Reverse Dumbbell Lunges
instructions: Whilst in a standing position, grab two dumbbells and keep your arms by your sides. This will be your starting position.

Take a step backwards (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your hell and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
As you exhale, use mainly the heel of your front foot and push off the floor towards the starting position again.
Alternate legs as you go and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Walking Lunges or Alternating Barbell Lunges.

en: Whilst in a standing position, grab two dumbbells and keep your arms by your sides. This will be your starting position.

Take a step backwards (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your hell and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
As you exhale, use mainly the heel of your front foot and push off the floor towards the starting position again.
Alternate legs as you go and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Walking Lunges or Alternating Barbell Lunges.
es: Mientras estás de pie, toma dos mancuernas y mantén los brazos a los lados. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Da un paso hacia atrás (un poco más grande que un paso normal) y, cuando aterrices, deja caer tu cuerpo hacia abajo para crear dos ángulos rectos en tus rodillas. Inhala mientras lo haces manteniendo el torso recto.
Asegúrate de mantener la rodilla delantera sobre el talón y no sobre los dedos de los pies. Tu espinilla delantera ahora debería estar perpendicular al suelo.
Mientras exhalas, utiliza principalmente el talón del pie delantero y empuja el suelo hacia la posición inicial nuevamente.
Alterne las piernas durante el movimiento y repita hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: estocadas caminando con mancuernas o estocadas alternas con barra.

name: Dumbbell Rear Delt Raise
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your left hand and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your left arm to hang perpendicular to the floor. Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported with your right arm, placed behind your back. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and pull the back of your left hand towards the ceiling.
Once the dumbbell is horizontal to the floor, pause for a brief second, exhale and slowly return the dumbbell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Rear Delt Machine Flyes or Cable Rear Delt Fly.

name.es: Elevación de deltoide posterior con mancuernas

en: Grab a dumbbell in your left hand and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your left arm to hang perpendicular to the floor. Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported with your right arm, placed behind your back. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and pull the back of your left hand towards the ceiling.
Once the dumbbell is horizontal to the floor, pause for a brief second, exhale and slowly return the dumbbell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Rear Delt Machine Flyes or Cable Rear Delt Fly.
es: Coge una mancuerna en su mano izquierda y recuéstese boca abajo en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 a 45 grados) y permita que tu brazo izquierdo cuelgue perpendicular al suelo. Mantén la cabeza alejada del extremo del banco de modo que solo el torso quede apoyado con el brazo derecho, colocado detrás de la espalda. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inhala y tira el dorso de tu mano izquierda hacia el techo.
Una vez que la mancuerna esté horizontal con respecto al suelo, haga una pausa por un breve segundo, exhale y lentamente regrese la mancuerna por el mismo camino, nuevamente a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variaciones: Flyes con máquina de deltoides traseros o Flyes de deltoides traseros con cable.

name: Dumbbell Raise
instructions: Grab a couple of dumbbells and adopt a shoulder width stance. Allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor with a neutral grip (palms facing your thighs). This will be your starting position.

Whilst exhaling, contract your shoulders to elevate the dumbbells towards your arm pits. Your elbows should flare out wide as you go and always stay above the dumbbells. Continue until your shoulders are at peak contraction.
Pause for a brief moment, Inhale and lower the dumbbells along the same path towards the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Upright Barbell Rows or Upright Cable Rows.

en: Grab a couple of dumbbells and adopt a shoulder width stance. Allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor with a neutral grip (palms facing your thighs). This will be your starting position.

Whilst exhaling, contract your shoulders to elevate the dumbbells towards your arm pits. Your elbows should flare out wide as you go and always stay above the dumbbells. Continue until your shoulders are at peak contraction.
Pause for a brief moment, Inhale and lower the dumbbells along the same path towards the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Upright Barbell Rows or Upright Cable Rows.
es: Coge un par de mancuernas y adopta una postura a la altura de los hombros. Deja que sus brazos cuelguen perpendiculares al suelo con un agarre neutral (con las palmas hacia los muslos). Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras exhala, contraiga los hombros para elevar las mancuernas hacia las axilas. Tus codos deben expandirse durante el movimientos y permanecer siempre por encima de las mancuernas. Continúa hasta que sus hombros estén en máxima contracción.
Haz una breve pausa, inhala y baja las mancuernas por el mismo camino hacia la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: remo vertical con barra o remo vertical con cable.

name: Chest Supported Dumbbell Spider Curls
instructions: Grab a couple of dumbbells and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor with an underhand grip (palms facing forward). Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, contract your biceps and curl the dumbbells up to shoulder height. Hold the contraction for a second as you squeeze your biceps. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Inhale as you lower the dumbbells along the same path towards the starting position.
Continue for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Curls or Cable Curls.

name.es: Curl araña con apoyo de pecho con mancuernas

en: Grab a couple of dumbbells and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor with an underhand grip (palms facing forward). Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, contract your biceps and curl the dumbbells up to shoulder height. Hold the contraction for a second as you squeeze your biceps. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Inhale as you lower the dumbbells along the same path towards the starting position.
Continue for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Curls or Cable Curls.
es: Coge un par de mancuernas y recuéstese boca abajo en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 a 45 grados) y permita que sus brazos cuelguen perpendiculares al suelo con un agarre desde abajo (con las palmas hacia adelante). Mantén la cabeza alejada del extremo del banco para que solo se apoye su torso. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras exhalas, contrae los bíceps y flexiona las mancuernas hasta la altura de los hombros. Mantén la contracción por un segundo mientras aprietas el bíceps. Consejo: Sólo deben moverse los antebrazos.
Inhala mientras bajas las mancuernas por el mismo camino hacia la posición inicial.
Continúa con la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl con barra o Curl con cable.

name: Dumbbell Power Clean
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance with your arms hanging perpendicular to the floor, by your sides.This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, bend at your knees and hips (more so with your hips than knees) descending into a squat position whilst maintaining a straight back. Your chest, shoulders and head should be facing forward at this point.
Next, drive through your heels and quads and start elevating the dumbbells towards your shoulders.
Next you need to drive your pelvis forward when the dumbbells get to your mid thigh. This coupled with the extension through your knee and ankle joints, will propel the dumbbells upward.
Once you have thrusted your hips forward, it is time to shrug as hard as you can in order to lift the dumbbells further.

When at full extension, aggressively squat under the dumbbells so that you can take the load on your front deltoids (shoulders) in a front squat position. Continue to squat until you are comfortable to drive upward through your heels, quads and glutes.
Keep driving upward until you are in a standing position.
Whilst maintaining good posture, bring the dumbbells down to their starting position, reset, and go again!
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Cleans or Kettlebell Cleans.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance with your arms hanging perpendicular to the floor, by your sides.This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, bend at your knees and hips (more so with your hips than knees) descending into a squat position whilst maintaining a straight back. Your chest, shoulders and head should be facing forward at this point.
Next, drive through your heels and quads and start elevating the dumbbells towards your shoulders.
Next you need to drive your pelvis forward when the dumbbells get to your mid thigh. This coupled with the extension through your knee and ankle joints, will propel the dumbbells upward.
Once you have thrusted your hips forward, it is time to shrug as hard as you can in order to lift the dumbbells further.

When at full extension, aggressively squat under the dumbbells so that you can take the load on your front deltoids (shoulders) in a front squat position. Continue to squat until you are comfortable to drive upward through your heels, quads and glutes.
Keep driving upward until you are in a standing position.
Whilst maintaining good posture, bring the dumbbells down to their starting position, reset, and go again!
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Cleans or Kettlebell Cleans.
es: Agarra una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una postura a la altura de los hombros con los brazos colgando perpendiculares al suelo, a los lados. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, doble las rodillas y las caderas (más las caderas que las rodillas) y descienda a una posición en cuclillas mientras mantiene la espalda recta. En este punto, tu pecho, hombros y cabeza deben mirar hacia adelante.
A continuación, avanza sobre los talones y los cuádriceps y comienza a elevar las mancuernas hacia los hombros.

A continuación, debes impulsar la pelvis hacia adelante cuando las mancuernas lleguen a la mitad del muslo. Esto, junto con la extensión a través de las articulaciones de la rodilla y el tobillo, impulsará las mancuernas hacia arriba.
Una vez que hayas empujado las caderas hacia adelante, es momento de encogerte de hombros lo más fuerte que puedas para poder levantar más las mancuernas.

Cuando esté en extensión completa, agáchese agresivamente debajo de las mancuernas para que pueda soportar la carga sobre los deltoides frontales (hombros) en una posición de sentadilla frontal. Continúa en cuclillas hasta que se sienta cómodo impulsando hacia arriba los talones, los cuádriceps y los glúteos.
Continúa conduciendo hacia arriba hasta que esté de pie.
Mientras mantienes una buena postura, baja las mancuernas a su posición inicial, reinícialas y ¡vuelve a empezar!
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: cargadas con barra o cargadas con pesas rusas.

name: Single Arm Dumbbell Upright Rows
instructions: Grab a dumbbell with an overhand grip and adopt a standing position allowing your arm to hang perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position. Tip: Maintain a straight back and keep the dumbbell as close to your body as possible throughout the movement.

Exhale and pull the dumbbell up towards your chin by contracting your shoulders and flaring your elbow out wide. Continue to pull the dumbbell upward until you reach your chin. At this point your elbow should be above the weight.
Pause for a brief moment, then inhale and return the dumbbell along the same path towards the starting position.
Variations: Upright Barbell Rows or Smith Machine One-Arm Upright Row.

name.es: Remo al mentón a un brazo con mancuerna

en: Grab a dumbbell with an overhand grip and adopt a standing position allowing your arm to hang perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position. Tip: Maintain a straight back and keep the dumbbell as close to your body as possible throughout the movement.

Exhale and pull the dumbbell up towards your chin by contracting your shoulders and flaring your elbow out wide. Continue to pull the dumbbell upward until you reach your chin. At this point your elbow should be above the weight.
Pause for a brief moment, then inhale and return the dumbbell along the same path towards the starting position.
Variations: Upright Barbell Rows or Smith Machine One-Arm Upright Row.
es: Agarra una mancuerna con un agarre prono y adopte una posición de pie permitiendo que tu brazo cuelgue perpendicular al suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial. Consejo: mantenga la espalda recta y mantenga la mancuerna lo más cerca posible de tu cuerpo durante todo el movimiento.

Exhale y levante la mancuerna hacia la barbilla contrayendo los hombros y abriendo el codo. Continúa tirando de la mancuerna hacia arriba hasta llegar a la barbilla. En este punto tu codo debe estar por encima del peso.
Haz una pausa por un breve momento, luego inhale y regrese la mancuerna por el mismo camino hacia la posición inicial.
Variaciones: remo vertical con barra o remo vertical con un brazo con máquina Smith.

name: Dumbbell One-Arm Triceps Extension
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your left hand and kneel on the end of a bench with your right knee. Place your left leg out wide on the floor for support. Lean on the bench with your right hand keeping your torso parallel to the floor with a neutral spine. Bend your left elbow and pull it in close to your torso so that your forearm is hanging perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.

Whilst keeping your upper arm stationary, use your tricep to lift the dumbbell on an arcing motion behind you. Exhale as you do so and continue to lift the dumbbell until your forearm is parallel to the floor and your elbow is fully extended. Tip: Only your forearm should move.
After a brief pause, slowly lower the dumbbell along the same path back into its starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Tricep Extension (Rope) or Cable Skull Crushers.

name.es: Extensión de tríceps a un brazo con mancuerna

en: Grab a dumbbell in your left hand and kneel on the end of a bench with your right knee. Place your left leg out wide on the floor for support. Lean on the bench with your right hand keeping your torso parallel to the floor with a neutral spine. Bend your left elbow and pull it in close to your torso so that your forearm is hanging perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.

Whilst keeping your upper arm stationary, use your tricep to lift the dumbbell on an arcing motion behind you. Exhale as you do so and continue to lift the dumbbell until your forearm is parallel to the floor and your elbow is fully extended. Tip: Only your forearm should move.
After a brief pause, slowly lower the dumbbell along the same path back into its starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Tricep Extension (Rope) or Cable Skull Crushers.
es: Toma una mancuerna con tu mano izquierda y arrodíllate al final de un banco con tu rodilla derecha. Coloca la pierna izquierda bien extendida en el suelo para apoyarse. Apóyate en el banco con la mano derecha manteniendo el torso paralelo al suelo con la columna neutra. Doble el codo izquierdo y jálelo cerca del torso para que el antebrazo cuelgue perpendicular al suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantienes la parte superior del brazo inmóvil, usa el tríceps para levantar la mancuerna con un movimiento de arco detrás de ti. Exhala mientras lo haces y continúa levantando la mancuerna hasta que tu antebrazo quede paralelo al suelo y tu codo esté completamente extendido. Consejo: solo debe moverse tu antebrazo.
Después de una breve pausa, baje lentamente la mancuerna por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variaciones: Extensión de tríceps (cuerda) o trituradores de cráneo con cable.

name: Single Arm Standing Dumbbell Shoulder Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Without leaning backward or putting your posture into jeopardy, press one of the dumbbells above your head so that you arm is fully extended, yet slightly flexed/bent at your elbow. Make sure your palm is facing forward at this point. Allow your other arm to hang perpendicular to the floor by your side. This will be your starting position.

Slowly and in a controlled fashion, descend the dumbbell until it reaches the side of your head (parallel with your ear), creating a 90 degree angle at your elbow. Inhale throughout this motion and flare your elbow out wide.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the dumbbell back along this path to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Alternating Kettlebell Press or Arnold Press.

name.en: Single Arm Standing Dumbbell Shoulder Press
name.es: Press de hombro a un brazo de pie con mancuerna

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Without leaning backward or putting your posture into jeopardy, press one of the dumbbells above your head so that you arm is fully extended, yet slightly flexed/bent at your elbow. Make sure your palm is facing forward at this point. Allow your other arm to hang perpendicular to the floor by your side. This will be your starting position.

Slowly and in a controlled fashion, descend the dumbbell until it reaches the side of your head (parallel with your ear), creating a 90 degree angle at your elbow. Inhale throughout this motion and flare your elbow out wide.
After a brief pause, exhale and press the dumbbell back along this path to its starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Alternating Kettlebell Press or Arnold Press.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una postura a la altura de los hombros. Sin inclinarse hacia atrás ni poner en peligro su postura, presione una de las mancuernas sobre su cabeza para que tu brazo esté completamente extendido, pero ligeramente flexionado/doblado a la altura del codo. Asegúrate de que su palma esté mirando hacia adelante en este punto. Deja que su otro brazo cuelgue perpendicular al suelo a su lado. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Lentamente y de forma controlada, desciende la mancuerna hasta que llegue al costado de tu cabeza (paralela a tu oreja), creando un ángulo de 90 grados en tu codo. Inhale durante este movimiento y abra bien el codo.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y empuja la mancuerna hacia atrás a lo largo de este camino hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press con pesas rusas alterno o Arnold Press.

aliases: Single Arm Standing Dumbbell Shoulder Press

name: Dumbbell Lying Rear Lateral Raise
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your left hand and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your left arm to hang perpendicular to the floor. Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported with your right arm, placed behind your back. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and pull the back of your left hand towards the ceiling.
Once the dumbbell is horizontal to the floor, pause for a brief second, exhale and slowly return the dumbbell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Face Pulls or Cable Rear Delt Fly.

name.es: Elevación lateral posterior tumbado con mancuernas

en: Grab a dumbbell in your left hand and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your left arm to hang perpendicular to the floor. Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported with your right arm, placed behind your back. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and pull the back of your left hand towards the ceiling.
Once the dumbbell is horizontal to the floor, pause for a brief second, exhale and slowly return the dumbbell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Face Pulls or Cable Rear Delt Fly.
es: Coge una mancuerna en su mano izquierda y recuéstese boca abajo en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 a 45 grados) y permita que tu brazo izquierdo cuelgue perpendicular al suelo. Mantén la cabeza alejada del extremo del banco de modo que solo el torso quede apoyado con el brazo derecho, colocado detrás de la espalda. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inhala y tira el dorso de tu mano izquierda hacia el techo.
Una vez que la mancuerna esté horizontal con respecto al suelo, haga una pausa por un breve segundo, exhale y lentamente regrese la mancuerna por el mismo camino, nuevamente a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variaciones: Face Pulls o Cable Rear Delt Fly.

name: Dumbbell Lying Pronation
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand and lay on a bench (on your right side). Lay with your left arm across your body for stability. Hold the dumbbell with your palm facing your right shoulder. This is your starting position.
Exhale and rotate your forearm so that your palm is facing away from you.
After a brief pause, inhale and slowly return the dumbbell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions and swap sides.

en: Grab a dumbbell in your right hand and lay on a bench (on your right side). Lay with your left arm across your body for stability. Hold the dumbbell with your palm facing your right shoulder. This is your starting position.
Exhale and rotate your forearm so that your palm is facing away from you.
After a brief pause, inhale and slowly return the dumbbell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions and swap sides.
es: Toma una mancuerna en tu mano derecha y recuéstate en un banco (a tu lado derecho). Acuéstese con el brazo izquierdo sobre el cuerpo para mayor estabilidad. Sujeta la mancuerna con la palma hacia el hombro derecho. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Exhale y gire el antebrazo de modo que la palma quede en dirección opuesta a ti.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa lentamente la mancuerna por el mismo camino, hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones y cambie de lado.

name: Dumbbell Lying One-Arm Rear Lateral Raise
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in your left hand and lay on a bench (on your right side). Lay with your left arm across your body, allowing the dumbbell to lay next to your right shoulder, palm facing your torso. This is your starting position.
Inhale and pull the back of your left hand towards the wall behind you, therefore opening up your torso.
Once the dumbbell is vertical from the floor, pause for a brief second, exhale and slowly return the dumbbell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Face Pulls or Rear Delt Machine Flyes.

name.en: Dumbbell Lying One-Arm Rear Lateral Raise
name.es: Elevación lateral posterior a un brazo tumbado con mancuerna

en: Grab a dumbbell in your left hand and lay on a bench (on your right side). Lay with your left arm across your body, allowing the dumbbell to lay next to your right shoulder, palm facing your torso. This is your starting position.
Inhale and pull the back of your left hand towards the wall behind you, therefore opening up your torso.
Once the dumbbell is vertical from the floor, pause for a brief second, exhale and slowly return the dumbbell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions and swap sides.
Variations: Face Pulls or Rear Delt Machine Flyes.
es: Toma una mancuerna con tu mano izquierda y recuéstate en un banco (a tu lado derecho). Acuéstese con el brazo izquierdo sobre el cuerpo, permitiendo que la mancuerna quede al lado de su hombro derecho, con la palma hacia el torso. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Inhala y tira del dorso de tu mano izquierda hacia la pared detrás de ti, abriendo así tu torso.
Una vez que la mancuerna esté vertical desde el suelo, haga una pausa por un breve segundo, exhale y lentamente regrese la mancuerna por el mismo camino, nuevamente a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones y cambie de lado.
Variaciones: Face Pulls o Flyes con máquina de deltoides posteriores.

aliases: Dumbbell Lying One-Arm Rear Lateral Raise

name: Alternating Dumbbell Lunges
instructions: Whilst in a standing position, grab two dumbbells and keep your arms by your sides. This will be your starting position.

Take a step forward (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
As you exhale, use mainly the heel of your front foot and push off the floor towards the starting position again.
Alternate legs as you go and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Walking Lunges or Alternating Barbell Lunges.

en: Whilst in a standing position, grab two dumbbells and keep your arms by your sides. This will be your starting position.

Take a step forward (slightly larger than a normal step) and as you land, drop your body down so that you create two right angles at your knees. Inhale as you do so whilst maintaining a straight torso.
Make sure that you keep your front knee over your heel and not over your toes. Your front shin should now be perpendicular to the floor.
As you exhale, use mainly the heel of your front foot and push off the floor towards the starting position again.
Alternate legs as you go and repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Walking Lunges or Alternating Barbell Lunges.
es: Mientras estás de pie, toma dos mancuernas y mantén los brazos a los lados. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Da un paso hacia adelante (un poco más grande que un paso normal) y, cuando aterrices, deja caer el cuerpo para crear dos ángulos rectos en las rodillas. Inhala mientras lo haces manteniendo el torso recto.
Asegúrate de mantener la rodilla delantera sobre el talón y no sobre los dedos de los pies. Tu espinilla delantera ahora debería estar perpendicular al suelo.
Mientras exhalas, utiliza principalmente el talón del pie delantero y empuja el suelo hacia la posición inicial nuevamente.
Alterne las piernas durante el movimiento y repita hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: estocadas caminando con mancuernas o estocadas alternas con barra.

name: Standing Dumbbell Lat Raises
instructions: Grab two dumbbells with a neutral grip and stand with a shoulder width stance. Make sure you are standing upright with a slight bend at your knees and elbows. Let your arms hang infront of you, perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling and maintaining a stationary torso, lift the dumbbells out to your side, taking them as wide as you can. Continue to lift until your arms are parallel to the floor.
Pause at the top of the movement for a split second.
As you inhale, lower the dumbbells to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Seated Lateral Raises or Cable Lateral Raises.

name.es: Elevaciones laterales con mancuernas de pie

en: Grab two dumbbells with a neutral grip and stand with a shoulder width stance. Make sure you are standing upright with a slight bend at your knees and elbows. Let your arms hang infront of you, perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling and maintaining a stationary torso, lift the dumbbells out to your side, taking them as wide as you can. Continue to lift until your arms are parallel to the floor.
Pause at the top of the movement for a split second.
As you inhale, lower the dumbbells to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Seated Lateral Raises or Cable Lateral Raises.
es: Agarra dos mancuernas con un agarre neutral y párese con una postura a la altura de los hombros. Asegúrate de estar de pie con una ligera flexión de rodillas y codos. Deja que tus brazos cuelguen frente a ti, perpendiculares al suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras exhalas y mantienes el torso inmóvil, levanta las mancuernas hacia un lado, alejándolas lo más que puedas. Continúa levantando hasta que sus brazos queden paralelos al suelo.
Haz una pausa en la parte superior del movimiento durante una fracción de segundo.
Mientras inhala, baje las mancuernas a la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variación: Elevaciones laterales sentado o Elevaciones laterales con cable.

name: Bent Over Tricep Kickbacks
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Whilst maintaining a straight back, you should lean forward from your hips until your torso is almost parallel with the floor. Have your knees slightly bent and your elbows pinned in to the sides of your body. Your elbows should be at 90 degrees at this point. This is your starting position.

Whilst keeping your upper arms stationary, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells on an arcing motion behind you. Exhale as you do so and continue to lift the dumbbells until your forearms are parallel to the floor and your elbows are fully extended. Tip: Only your forearms should move.
After a brief pause, slowly lower the dumbbells along the same path back into their starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Overhead Rope Tricep Extensions or Narrow Grip Barbell Bench Press.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance. Whilst maintaining a straight back, you should lean forward from your hips until your torso is almost parallel with the floor. Have your knees slightly bent and your elbows pinned in to the sides of your body. Your elbows should be at 90 degrees at this point. This is your starting position.

Whilst keeping your upper arms stationary, use your triceps to lift the dumbbells on an arcing motion behind you. Exhale as you do so and continue to lift the dumbbells until your forearms are parallel to the floor and your elbows are fully extended. Tip: Only your forearms should move.
After a brief pause, slowly lower the dumbbells along the same path back into their starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Overhead Rope Tricep Extensions or Narrow Grip Barbell Bench Press.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una postura a la altura de los hombros. Mientras mantienes la espalda recta, debes inclinarte hacia adelante desde las caderas hasta que tu torso quede casi paralelo al suelo. Mantén las rodillas ligeramente dobladas y los codos pegados a los lados del cuerpo. En este punto, tus codos deben estar a 90 grados. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantienes la parte superior de los brazos inmóviles, usa los tríceps para levantar las mancuernas con un movimiento de arco detrás de ti. Exhala mientras lo haces y continúa levantando las mancuernas hasta que tus antebrazos queden paralelos al suelo y tus codos completamente extendidos. Consejo: solo deben moverse tus antebrazos.
Después de una breve pausa, baje lentamente las mancuernas por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Extensiones de tríceps con cuerda sobre la cabeza o Press de banca con barra con agarre estrecho.

name: Dumbbell Incline Shoulder Raise
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay down on an incline bench (around 30 degrees), bringing the dumbbells beside your chest. Keep your elbows at a 90-degree angle and your forearms perpendicular to the floor. Once here, keep your palms facing away from you, exhale and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling.
Keeping your arms fully extended towards the ceiling, exhale and press your shoulders towards the ceiling too, allowing your shoulder blades to separate.
After a brief pause, inhale and slowly return the dumbbells along the same path, back into their starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Incline Shoulder Raise or Machine Shoulder (Military) Press.

name.es: Elevación de hombro inclinada con mancuerna

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay down on an incline bench (around 30 degrees), bringing the dumbbells beside your chest. Keep your elbows at a 90-degree angle and your forearms perpendicular to the floor. Once here, keep your palms facing away from you, exhale and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling.
Keeping your arms fully extended towards the ceiling, exhale and press your shoulders towards the ceiling too, allowing your shoulder blades to separate.
After a brief pause, inhale and slowly return the dumbbells along the same path, back into their starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Incline Shoulder Raise or Machine Shoulder (Military) Press.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y recuéstate en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 grados), colocando las mancuernas al lado de tu pecho. Mantén los codos en un ángulo de 90 grados y los antebrazos perpendiculares al suelo. Una vez aquí, mantén las palmas de las manos alejadas de ti, exhala y presiona las mancuernas hacia el techo.
Manteniendo los brazos completamente extendidos hacia el techo, exhala y presiona los hombros también hacia el techo, permitiendo que los omóplatos se separen.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa lentamente las mancuernas por el mismo camino, hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Elevación de hombros inclinada con barra o Press de hombros con máquina (militar).

name: Flat Dumbbell Flyes
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on a flat bench. Lay down and bring the weights by the side of your chest. Press the dumbbells towards the ceiling with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) until you have nearly locked out your elbows, a slight bend should be present to preserve your joints. This will be your starting position.
Maintaining this slight flex at your elbows, lower your arms in a wide arcing motion until you feel your chest stretching, inhale as you do so.
Following the same path as you went down, squeeze your pectoral muscles and bring your arms back to the starting position, remembering to exhale as you go.
Pause for a second and then repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Flat Bench Cable Flyes or Pec Deck.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on a flat bench. Lay down and bring the weights by the side of your chest. Press the dumbbells towards the ceiling with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) until you have nearly locked out your elbows, a slight bend should be present to preserve your joints. This will be your starting position.
Maintaining this slight flex at your elbows, lower your arms in a wide arcing motion until you feel your chest stretching, inhale as you do so.
Following the same path as you went down, squeeze your pectoral muscles and bring your arms back to the starting position, remembering to exhale as you go.
Pause for a second and then repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Flat Bench Cable Flyes or Pec Deck.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y siéntate en un banco plano. Acuéstate y lleva las pesas al costado de tu pecho. Empuja las mancuernas hacia el techo con un agarre neutral (las palmas una frente a la otra) hasta que casi haya bloqueado los codos; debe haber una ligera flexión para preservar las articulaciones. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Manteniendo esta ligera flexión en los codos, baje los brazos formando un amplio arco hasta que sienta que el pecho se estira, inhale mientras lo haces.
Siguiendo el mismo camino por el que bajaste, aprieta los músculos pectorales y lleva los brazos a la posición inicial, recordando exhalar durante el movimientos.
Haz una pausa por un segundo y luego repita hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Cable Flyes de banco plano o Pec Deck.

name: Dumbbell Floor Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on your back. Have your elbows bent at a 90 degree angle, flared out wide with your forearms vertical from the floor. Your palms should be facing your lower body. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by exhaling and pressing the dumbbells towards the ceiling until your elbow joint is nearly at full extension.
After a brief pause, inhale and slowly return the dumbbells along the same path, back into their starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Bench Press or Chest Press.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on your back. Have your elbows bent at a 90 degree angle, flared out wide with your forearms vertical from the floor. Your palms should be facing your lower body. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by exhaling and pressing the dumbbells towards the ceiling until your elbow joint is nearly at full extension.
After a brief pause, inhale and slowly return the dumbbells along the same path, back into their starting position.
Repeat until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Bench Press or Chest Press.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y acuéstate boca arriba. Mantén los codos doblados en un ángulo de 90 grados, ensanchados con los antebrazos verticales desde el suelo. Tus palmas deben mirar hacia la parte inferior de tu cuerpo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inicie el movimiento exhalando y presionando las mancuernas hacia el techo hasta que la articulación del codo esté casi en extensión completa.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa lentamente las mancuernas por el mismo camino, hasta su posición inicial.
Repite hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca con barra o Press de pecho.

name: Dumbbell Curls
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance with your arms hanging perpendicular to the floor, by your sides.This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and curl the dumbbells both up and outward whilst rotating your palms to face the ceiling.
Continue on an upward motion until your biceps are optimally contracted.
After this, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Concentration Curls or Concentration Curls.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance with your arms hanging perpendicular to the floor, by your sides.This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale and curl the dumbbells both up and outward whilst rotating your palms to face the ceiling.
Continue on an upward motion until your biceps are optimally contracted.
After this, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Concentration Curls or Concentration Curls.
es: Agarra una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una postura a la altura de los hombros con los brazos colgando perpendiculares al suelo, a los lados. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, exhale y doble las mancuernas hacia arriba y hacia afuera mientras gira las palmas de las manos hacia el techo.
Continúa con un movimiento ascendente hasta que sus bíceps estén óptimamente contraídos.
Después de esto, inhala y regresa las mancuernas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curls de concentración de pie o Curls de concentración.

name: Dumbbell Clean
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance with your arms hanging perpendicular to the floor, by your sides.This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, bend at your knees and hips (more so with your hips than knees) descending into a squat position whilst maintaining a straight back. Your chest, shoulders and head should be facing forward at this point.
Next, drive through your heels and quads and start elevating the dumbbells towards your shoulders.
Next you need to drive your pelvis forward when the dumbbells get to your mid thigh. This coupled with the extension through your knee and ankle joints, will propel the dumbbells upward.
Once you have thrusted your hips forward, it is time to shrug as hard as you can in order to lift the dumbbells further.

When at full extension, aggressively squat under the dumbbells so that you can take the load on your front deltoids (shoulders) in a front squat position. Continue to squat until you are comfortable to drive upward through your heels, quads and glutes.
Keep driving upward until you are in a standing position.
Whilst maintaining good posture, bring the dumbbells down to their starting position, reset, and go again!
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Cleans or Kettlebell Cleans.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a shoulder width stance with your arms hanging perpendicular to the floor, by your sides.This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, bend at your knees and hips (more so with your hips than knees) descending into a squat position whilst maintaining a straight back. Your chest, shoulders and head should be facing forward at this point.
Next, drive through your heels and quads and start elevating the dumbbells towards your shoulders.
Next you need to drive your pelvis forward when the dumbbells get to your mid thigh. This coupled with the extension through your knee and ankle joints, will propel the dumbbells upward.
Once you have thrusted your hips forward, it is time to shrug as hard as you can in order to lift the dumbbells further.

When at full extension, aggressively squat under the dumbbells so that you can take the load on your front deltoids (shoulders) in a front squat position. Continue to squat until you are comfortable to drive upward through your heels, quads and glutes.
Keep driving upward until you are in a standing position.
Whilst maintaining good posture, bring the dumbbells down to their starting position, reset, and go again!
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Cleans or Kettlebell Cleans.
es: Agarra una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una postura a la altura de los hombros con los brazos colgando perpendiculares al suelo, a los lados. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, doble las rodillas y las caderas (más las caderas que las rodillas) y descienda a una posición en cuclillas mientras mantiene la espalda recta. En este punto, tu pecho, hombros y cabeza deben mirar hacia adelante.
A continuación, avanza sobre los talones y los cuádriceps y comienza a elevar las mancuernas hacia los hombros.

A continuación, debes impulsar la pelvis hacia adelante cuando las mancuernas lleguen a la mitad del muslo. Esto, junto con la extensión a través de las articulaciones de la rodilla y el tobillo, impulsará las mancuernas hacia arriba.
Una vez que hayas empujado las caderas hacia adelante, es momento de encogerte de hombros lo más fuerte que puedas para poder levantar más las mancuernas.

Cuando esté en extensión completa, agáchese agresivamente debajo de las mancuernas para que pueda soportar la carga sobre los deltoides frontales (hombros) en una posición de sentadilla frontal. Continúa en cuclillas hasta que se sienta cómodo impulsando hacia arriba los talones, los cuádriceps y los glúteos.
Continúa conduciendo hacia arriba hasta que esté de pie.
Mientras mantienes una buena postura, baja las mancuernas a su posición inicial, reinícialas y ¡vuelve a empezar!
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: cargadas con barra o cargadas con pesas rusas.

name: Standing Bicep Curls
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand, in a standing position, with your arms at full length, palms facing away from you. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, contract your biceps and bring the dumbbells up to shoulder height. Hold the contraction for a second as you squeeze your biceps. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Inhale as you lower the dumbbells toward the starting position.
Continue for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Rotating Bicep Curls or Standing Barbell Curls.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand, in a standing position, with your arms at full length, palms facing away from you. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, contract your biceps and bring the dumbbells up to shoulder height. Hold the contraction for a second as you squeeze your biceps. Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Inhale as you lower the dumbbells toward the starting position.
Continue for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Rotating Bicep Curls or Standing Barbell Curls.
es: Agarra una mancuerna en cada mano, en posición de pie, con los brazos extendidos y las palmas hacia afuera. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Whilst exhaling, contract your biceps and bring the dumbbells up to shoulder height. Mantén la contracción por un segundo mientras aprietas el bíceps. Consejo: Sólo deben moverse los antebrazos.
Inhala mientras bajas las mancuernas hacia la posición inicial.
Continúa con la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl de bíceps giratorio sentado o Curl de pie con barra.

name: Flat Dumbbell Chest Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay down on a bench, bringing the dumbbells beside your chest. Keep your elbows at a 90-degree angle and your forearms perpendicular to the floor. Once here, keep your palms facing away from you, exhale and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling.
Squeeze your pectoral muscles when your arms are at full extension. Once you have completed this, inhale and bring your arms back down beside your chest until your elbows are at 90-degrees once more.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always have a spotter with you to help you throughout the movement and to help unload the dumbbells after completion.
Variations: Neutral Grip Dumbbell Chest Press or Barbell Bench Press.

name.es: Press de pecho plano con mancuernas

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay down on a bench, bringing the dumbbells beside your chest. Keep your elbows at a 90-degree angle and your forearms perpendicular to the floor. Once here, keep your palms facing away from you, exhale and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling.
Squeeze your pectoral muscles when your arms are at full extension. Once you have completed this, inhale and bring your arms back down beside your chest until your elbows are at 90-degrees once more.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: Always have a spotter with you to help you throughout the movement and to help unload the dumbbells after completion.
Variations: Neutral Grip Dumbbell Chest Press or Barbell Bench Press.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y recuéstate en un banco, colocando las mancuernas al lado de tu pecho. Mantén los codos en un ángulo de 90 grados y los antebrazos perpendiculares al suelo. Una vez aquí, mantén las palmas de las manos alejadas de ti, exhala y presiona las mancuernas hacia el techo.

Apriete los músculos pectorales cuando los brazos estén completamente extendidos. Una vez que haya completado esto, inhale y baje los brazos al lado del pecho hasta que los codos estén a 90 grados una vez más.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: siempre tenga un observador contigo para ayudarte durante todo el movimiento y para ayudar a descargar las mancuernas una vez finalizado.
Variaciones: Press de pecho con mancuernas con agarre neutro o Press de banca con barra.

name: Decline Dumbbell Tricep Extensions
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on a decline bench. Lay down and bring the weights by the side of your chest. Press the dumbbells towards the ceiling with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) until you have nearly locked out your elbows, a slight bend should be present to preserve your joints. This will be your starting position.

Maintaining this slight flex at your elbows, inhale and bend at your elbows creating an arcing motion with the dumbbells so that your hands are heading towards your forehead. The weight should be stretching your triceps. Remember to keep your elbows as close together as possible and that your upper arms shouldn't move throughout.
After a brief pause, exhale and return the dumbbells and your hands along the same path to the starting position.
Pause for a second and then repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Decline EZ Bar Triceps Extension or Bench Dips.

name.es: Extensiones de tríceps con mancuernas en banco declinado

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on a decline bench. Lay down and bring the weights by the side of your chest. Press the dumbbells towards the ceiling with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) until you have nearly locked out your elbows, a slight bend should be present to preserve your joints. This will be your starting position.

Maintaining this slight flex at your elbows, inhale and bend at your elbows creating an arcing motion with the dumbbells so that your hands are heading towards your forehead. The weight should be stretching your triceps. Remember to keep your elbows as close together as possible and that your upper arms shouldn't move throughout.
After a brief pause, exhale and return the dumbbells and your hands along the same path to the starting position.
Pause for a second and then repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Decline EZ Bar Triceps Extension or Bench Dips.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y siéntate en un banco declinado. Acuéstate y lleva las pesas al costado de tu pecho. Empuja las mancuernas hacia el techo con un agarre neutral (las palmas una frente a la otra) hasta que casi haya bloqueado los codos; debe haber una ligera flexión para preservar las articulaciones. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Manteniendo esta ligera flexión en los codos, inhale y doble los codos creando un movimiento de arco con las mancuernas de modo que sus manos se dirijan hacia la frente. El peso debe estirar los tríceps. Recuerde mantener los codos lo más juntos posible y que la parte superior de los brazos no debe moverse en todo momento.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y regresa las mancuernas y las manos por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Haz una pausa por un segundo y luego repita hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Disminución de la extensión de tríceps con barra EZ o fondos en banco.

name: Decline Flyes
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on a decline bench. Lay down and bring the weights by the side of your chest. Press the dumbbells towards the ceiling with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) until you have nearly locked out your elbows, a slight bend should be present to preserve your joints. This will be your starting position.
Maintaining this slight flex at your elbows, lower your arms in a wide arcing motion until you feel your chest stretching, inhale as you do so.
Following the same path as you went down, squeeze your pectoral muscles and bring your arms back to the starting position, remembering to exhale as you go.
Pause for a second and then repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Flat Bench Cable Flyes or Pec Deck.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on a decline bench. Lay down and bring the weights by the side of your chest. Press the dumbbells towards the ceiling with a neutral grip (palms facing each other) until you have nearly locked out your elbows, a slight bend should be present to preserve your joints. This will be your starting position.
Maintaining this slight flex at your elbows, lower your arms in a wide arcing motion until you feel your chest stretching, inhale as you do so.
Following the same path as you went down, squeeze your pectoral muscles and bring your arms back to the starting position, remembering to exhale as you go.
Pause for a second and then repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Flat Bench Cable Flyes or Pec Deck.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y siéntate en un banco declinado. Acuéstate y lleva las pesas al costado de tu pecho. Empuja las mancuernas hacia el techo con un agarre neutral (las palmas una frente a la otra) hasta que casi haya bloqueado los codos; debe haber una ligera flexión para preservar las articulaciones. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Manteniendo esta ligera flexión en los codos, baje los brazos formando un amplio arco hasta que sienta que el pecho se estira, inhale mientras lo haces.
Siguiendo el mismo camino por el que bajaste, aprieta los músculos pectorales y lleva los brazos a la posición inicial, recordando exhalar durante el movimientos.
Haz una pausa por un segundo y luego repita hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Cable Flyes de banco plano o Pec Deck.

name: Decline Dumbbell Chest Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and secure your legs on a decline bench. Once you have done this, lay down on the decline bench bringing the dumbbells to the side of your chest at shoulders width. Have your palms facing away from you. This will be your starting position.

Whilst breathing out, press the dumbbells towards the ceiling using your pectoral muscles until your elbows are fully extended. Tip: Throughout the motion, the forearms should always be perpendicular to the floor.
Squeeze your chest at the top of the movement for a second and then descend the dumbbells back into their starting position, whilst inhaling.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: When you have completed your set, have a spotter help you with your dumbbells.
Variations: Decline Barbell Press.

name.es: Press de pecho declinado con mancuernas

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and secure your legs on a decline bench. Once you have done this, lay down on the decline bench bringing the dumbbells to the side of your chest at shoulders width. Have your palms facing away from you. This will be your starting position.

Whilst breathing out, press the dumbbells towards the ceiling using your pectoral muscles until your elbows are fully extended. Tip: Throughout the motion, the forearms should always be perpendicular to the floor.
Squeeze your chest at the top of the movement for a second and then descend the dumbbells back into their starting position, whilst inhaling.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: When you have completed your set, have a spotter help you with your dumbbells.
Variations: Decline Barbell Press.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y asegura tus piernas en un banco declinado. Una vez que hayas hecho esto, túmbate en el banco de descenso llevando las mancuernas al costado de tu pecho a la altura de los hombros. Mantén las palmas de las manos alejadas de ti. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras exhala, presione las mancuernas hacia el techo usando los músculos pectorales hasta que los codos estén completamente extendidos. Consejo: Durante todo el movimiento, los antebrazos siempre deben estar perpendiculares al suelo.
Aprieta el pecho en la parte superior del movimiento durante un segundo y luego baja las mancuernas a su posición inicial, mientras inhalas.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: cuando haya completado su serie, pide a un observador que lo ayude con sus mancuernas.
Variaciones: Press declinado con barra.

name: Cuban Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a standing position with your arms relaxed by your sides. This will be your starting position.
To initiate this movement you will need to elevate your elbows so that they are at shoulder height (allow your forearms to hang perpendicular to the floor).

Once you have done this, externally rotate your shoulder joints 180 degrees, to bring your forearms upright from the floor. This will maintain the 90 degree bend at your elbows but instead of your palms facing behind you and aiming at the floor, they will be facing forward and aiming at the ceiling.
Next, extend your arms upward to press the dumbbells towards the ceiling, bringing them together at the top of the movement.
After a brief pause, you should reverse this movement and return the dumbbells along the same path, back into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Arnold Dumbbell Press or Smith Machine Overhead Shoulder Press.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a standing position with your arms relaxed by your sides. This will be your starting position.
To initiate this movement you will need to elevate your elbows so that they are at shoulder height (allow your forearms to hang perpendicular to the floor).

Once you have done this, externally rotate your shoulder joints 180 degrees, to bring your forearms upright from the floor. This will maintain the 90 degree bend at your elbows but instead of your palms facing behind you and aiming at the floor, they will be facing forward and aiming at the ceiling.
Next, extend your arms upward to press the dumbbells towards the ceiling, bringing them together at the top of the movement.
After a brief pause, you should reverse this movement and return the dumbbells along the same path, back into their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Arnold Dumbbell Press or Smith Machine Overhead Shoulder Press.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una posición de pie con los brazos relajados a los lados. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar este movimiento necesitarás elevar los codos para que queden a la altura de los hombros (permite que tus antebrazos cuelguen perpendiculares al suelo).

Una vez que haya hecho esto, gire externamente las articulaciones de los hombros 180 grados para levantar los antebrazos del suelo. Esto mantendrá la curvatura de 90 grados en los codos, pero en lugar de que las palmas miren hacia atrás y apunten al suelo, mirarán hacia adelante y apuntarán al techo.
A continuación, extiende los brazos hacia arriba para presionar las mancuernas hacia el techo, juntándolas en la parte superior del movimiento.
Después de una breve pausa, debes invertir este movimiento y devolver las mancuernas por el mismo camino, de nuevo a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press Arnold con mancuernas o Press de hombros con máquina Smith.

name: Cross Body Hammer Curl
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a standing position with your elbows turned outwards and palms facing your thighs. This will be your starting position.

Whilst maintaining a stationary upper arm, bend at your right elbow to bring the dumbbell up and across your body towards your left shoulder. Exhale as you do so and contract your bicep to create the movement.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell to the starting position along the same path.
Repeat the movement with your left side.
Continue alternating for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Alternate Hammer Curls or Cable Curls.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt a standing position with your elbows turned outwards and palms facing your thighs. This will be your starting position.

Whilst maintaining a stationary upper arm, bend at your right elbow to bring the dumbbell up and across your body towards your left shoulder. Exhale as you do so and contract your bicep to create the movement.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell to the starting position along the same path.
Repeat the movement with your left side.
Continue alternating for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Alternate Hammer Curls or Cable Curls.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una posición de pie con los codos hacia afuera y las palmas hacia los muslos. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantiene la parte superior del brazo inmóvil, doble el codo derecho para llevar la mancuerna hacia arriba y a través de tu cuerpo hacia el hombro izquierdo. Exhala mientras lo haces y contrae el bíceps para crear el movimiento.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la mancuerna a la posición inicial por el mismo camino.
Repite el movimiento con tu lado izquierdo.
Continúa alternando durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: rizos en martillo alternativos o rizos con cable.

name: Dumbbell Concentration Curls
instructions: Stand on the reverse side of an incline bench as if you were spotting someone. Grab a dumbbell in one hand and rest your elbow on the headrest of the bench. Have a ‘palms up’ grip and position yourself so that your arm is running down the length of the bench. Position your non-lifting hand on the incline bench for stability. Your chest should be pressed up against the top part of the incline bench and you should adopt a wide stance with your feet. This will be your starting position.

While holding the upper arm stationary, contract the bicep and curl the dumbbell upward as you exhale. Only your forearm should move. Continue the movement until your bicep is fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold this position for a second and as you inhale, slowly reverse the movement until you are in the starting position once again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Low Cable Bicep Curl.

en: Stand on the reverse side of an incline bench as if you were spotting someone. Grab a dumbbell in one hand and rest your elbow on the headrest of the bench. Have a ‘palms up’ grip and position yourself so that your arm is running down the length of the bench. Position your non-lifting hand on the incline bench for stability. Your chest should be pressed up against the top part of the incline bench and you should adopt a wide stance with your feet. This will be your starting position.

While holding the upper arm stationary, contract the bicep and curl the dumbbell upward as you exhale. Only your forearm should move. Continue the movement until your bicep is fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold this position for a second and as you inhale, slowly reverse the movement until you are in the starting position once again.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Low Cable Bicep Curl.
es: Párate en el reverso de un banco inclinado como si estuvieras viendo a alguien. Coge una mancuerna con una mano y apoya el codo en el reposacabezas del banco. Agarra las palmas hacia arriba y colóquese de modo que tu brazo corra a lo largo del banco. Coloca la mano que no levanta sobre el banco inclinado para mayor estabilidad. Tu pecho debe estar presionado contra la parte superior del banco inclinado y debes adoptar una postura amplia con los pies. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantiene inmóvil la parte superior del brazo, contraiga el bíceps y doble la mancuerna hacia arriba mientras exhala. Sólo tu antebrazo debe moverse. Continúa el movimiento hasta que tu bíceps esté completamente contraído y la mancuerna esté al nivel de los hombros. Mantén esta posición por un segundo y mientras inhalas, invierte lentamente el movimiento hasta estar nuevamente en la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variación: Curl de bíceps con cable bajo.

name: Close-Grip Push-Up off of a Dumbbell
instructions: Grab a heavy dumbbell (one that will not rock or fall over) and place it upright on the floor. Next, kneel down on the floor in front of the dumbbell and place your hands on the edges of it. Lean forward so that you are now weight baring on your arms. Now you should come up onto your feet so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be the dumbbell (with your hands on it) and feet. Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and slowly lower your chest towards the dumbbell whilst keeping your elbows close to your body.

Once your chest is around an inch off the dumbbell, pause for a brief movement, then exhale and press through your palms to return your body along the same path to the starting position. Tip: Squeeze your triceps as you do so and when you get to the top of the movement, do not lock your elbows out.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Close-Grip Barbell Bench Press or Smith Machine Close-Grip Bench Press.

name.en: Close-Grip Push-Up off of a Dumbbell
name.es: Flexión con agarre cerrado sobre mancuerna

en: Grab a heavy dumbbell (one that will not rock or fall over) and place it upright on the floor. Next, kneel down on the floor in front of the dumbbell and place your hands on the edges of it. Lean forward so that you are now weight baring on your arms. Now you should come up onto your feet so that your body is suspended above the floor, the only points of contact (with the floor) should be the dumbbell (with your hands on it) and feet. Your body should be in one straight line from head to toe and your arms perpendicular to the floor under your chest. This will be your starting position.
Inhale and slowly lower your chest towards the dumbbell whilst keeping your elbows close to your body.

Once your chest is around an inch off the dumbbell, pause for a brief movement, then exhale and press through your palms to return your body along the same path to the starting position. Tip: Squeeze your triceps as you do so and when you get to the top of the movement, do not lock your elbows out.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Close-Grip Barbell Bench Press or Smith Machine Close-Grip Bench Press.
es: Coge una mancuerna pesada (una que no se balancee ni se caiga) y colóquela en posición vertical en el suelo. Luego, arrodíllate en el suelo frente a la mancuerna y coloca tus manos en los bordes de la misma. Inclínese hacia adelante de modo que ahora el peso quede al descubierto en sus brazos. Ahora debes ponerte de pie de manera que tu cuerpo quede suspendido sobre el suelo, los únicos puntos de contacto (con el suelo) deben ser la mancuerna (con las manos sobre ella) y los pies. Su cuerpo debe estar en línea recta desde la cabeza hasta los pies y sus brazos perpendiculares al suelo debajo de tu pecho. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inhala y baja lentamente el pecho hacia la mancuerna mientras mantienes los codos cerca del cuerpo.

Una vez que tu pecho esté aproximadamente a unos 2-3 cm de la mancuerna, haga una pausa para realizar un breve movimiento, luego exhale y empuja con las palmas para que tu cuerpo regrese por el mismo camino a la posición inicial. Consejo: aprieta los tríceps mientras lo haces y cuando llegues a la parte superior del movimiento, no bloquees los codos.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca con agarre cerrado con barra o Press de banca con agarre cerrado con máquina Smith.

aliases: Close-Grip Push-Up off of a Dumbbell

name: Neutral Grip Dumbbell Chest Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on a flat bench. Have your hands by the side of your chest with a neutral grip. This will be your starting position.
Ensuring that your elbows remain as close to your body whilst remaining parallel to each other throughout the movement, press both dumbbells towards the ceiling in a controlled manner.
Squeeze your triceps at the top of the contraction for a second before reversing the movement back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Narrow Grip Barbell Bench Press.

name.es: Press de pecho con mancuernas, agarre neutro

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on a flat bench. Have your hands by the side of your chest with a neutral grip. This will be your starting position.
Ensuring that your elbows remain as close to your body whilst remaining parallel to each other throughout the movement, press both dumbbells towards the ceiling in a controlled manner.
Squeeze your triceps at the top of the contraction for a second before reversing the movement back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Narrow Grip Barbell Bench Press.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y recuéstate en un banco plano. Mantén sus manos a los lados de tu pecho con un agarre neutral. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Asegurándose de que sus codos permanezcan lo más cerca de tu cuerpo y paralelos entre sí durante todo el movimiento, presione ambas mancuernas hacia el techo de manera controlada.
Aprieta el tríceps en la parte superior de la contracción durante un segundo antes de invertir el movimiento y volver a la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variación: Press de banca con barra con agarre estrecho.

name: Chest-supported Row
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor. Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the dumbbells up to the side of your hips whilst keeping your torso in contact with the bench. Keep your upper arms close to your body as you go to activate your lats as much as possible. Tip: Contract your back muscles in order to create this movement. Your arms should remain as passive as possible.
Lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, inhaling as you go.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and then switch sides.
Variations: One Arm Dumbbell Row or Seated One-Arm Cable Pulley Row.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay face down on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees) and allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor. Have your head off the end of the bench so that only your torso is supported. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale and pull the dumbbells up to the side of your hips whilst keeping your torso in contact with the bench. Keep your upper arms close to your body as you go to activate your lats as much as possible. Tip: Contract your back muscles in order to create this movement. Your arms should remain as passive as possible.
Lower the dumbbells back to the starting position, inhaling as you go.
Repeat the movement for the recommended amount of repetitions and then switch sides.
Variations: One Arm Dumbbell Row or Seated One-Arm Cable Pulley Row.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y recuéstese boca abajo en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 a 45 grados) y permita que sus brazos cuelguen perpendiculares al suelo. Mantén la cabeza alejada del extremo del banco para que solo se apoye su torso. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala y tira de las mancuernas hacia el costado de las caderas mientras mantienes el torso en contacto con el banco. Mantén la parte superior de sus brazos cerca de tu cuerpo durante el movimiento para activar sus dorsales tanto como sea posible. Consejo: Contrae los músculos de la espalda para crear este movimiento. Tus brazos deben permanecer lo más pasivos posible.
Baja las mancuernas a la posición inicial, inhalando durante el movimiento.
Repite el movimiento durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones y luego cambie de lado.
Variaciones: remo con mancuernas a un brazo o remo en polea con cable a un brazo sentado.
