name: Chest Supported Dumbbell Rows
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lean into an incline bench, making sure your head is off the end.
Using a neutral grip, allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.
Pull your shoulder blades together and bend at your elbows in order to row the dumbbells to your side. Try to keep your elbows as close to your body as possible throughout the movement.
Pause at the contracted position, and return to the starting position in a controlled manner.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

name.es: Remo con mancuernas y apoyo de pecho

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lean into an incline bench, making sure your head is off the end.
Using a neutral grip, allow your arms to hang perpendicular to the floor. This will be your starting position.
Pull your shoulder blades together and bend at your elbows in order to row the dumbbells to your side. Try to keep your elbows as close to your body as possible throughout the movement.
Pause at the contracted position, and return to the starting position in a controlled manner.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano e inclínate sobre un banco inclinado, asegurándote de que tu cabeza esté fuera del extremo.
Usando un agarre neutral, permita que sus brazos cuelguen perpendiculares al suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Junte los omóplatos y doble los codos para remar las mancuernas hacia un lado. Intenta mantener los codos lo más cerca posible del cuerpo durante todo el movimiento.
Hacer una pausa en la posición contraída y volver a la posición inicial de forma controlada.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.

name: Car Drivers
instructions: Grab a weight plate and adopt a shoulder width, standing stance. Next, make sure that you grip the plate in a '9' and '3' O'Clock position. Now, extend your arms so that they are in front of your body at shoulder height (elbows slightly bent). This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, twist the plate clockwise until you can twist no more. Pretend you were turning a steering wheel whilst maintaining shoulder height throughout.
After a brief pause, reverse the movement and twist the weight plate anti-clockwise until you can twist no more.
Repeat these twists until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Arnold Press or Smith Machine Military Press.

en: Grab a weight plate and adopt a shoulder width, standing stance. Next, make sure that you grip the plate in a '9' and '3' O'Clock position. Now, extend your arms so that they are in front of your body at shoulder height (elbows slightly bent). This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, twist the plate clockwise until you can twist no more. Pretend you were turning a steering wheel whilst maintaining shoulder height throughout.
After a brief pause, reverse the movement and twist the weight plate anti-clockwise until you can twist no more.
Repeat these twists until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Arnold Press or Smith Machine Military Press.
es: Agarra una disco de peso y adopte una postura de pie a la altura de los hombros. A continuación, asegúrate de sujetar el disco en la posición '9' y '3' en punto. Ahora, extiende los brazos de manera que queden delante de tu cuerpo a la altura de los hombros (codos ligeramente flexionados). Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, gire el disco en el sentido de las agujas del reloj hasta que no pueda girar más. Imagina que estás girando un volante mientras mantienes la altura de los hombros en todo momento.
Después de una breve pausa, invierta el movimiento y gire el disco de pesas en el sentido contrario a las agujas del reloj hasta que no pueda girar más.
Repite estos giros hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Arnold Press o Smith Machine Military Press.

name: Dumbbell Bent Over Rows Neutral Grip
instructions: With a dumbbell in each hand (palms facing each other), bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward by bending at your hips; as you bend make sure to keep your back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep your spine in a neutral position. The weights should hang directly in front of you as your arms are perpendicular to the floor and your torso. This is your starting position.

While keeping the torso stationary, lift the dumbbells to your side (as you exhale), elevating elbows towards the ceiling (do not exert any force with the forearm other than holding the weights). At the top contracted position, squeeze the back muscles and hold for a second.
Slowly lower the weight to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution:
This exercise is not recommended for people with back issues. A Low Cable Row is a better choice for people with back pain.
Ensure perfect form and never round the back as this can cause injury.
Be cautious with the weights you are using. If you are in doubt, use a lesser weight.
Variations: Low Cable Row or a Bent Over Barbell Row

name.en: Dumbbell Bent Over Rows Neutral Grip
name.es: Remo inclinado con mancuernas, agarre neutro

en: With a dumbbell in each hand (palms facing each other), bend your knees slightly and bring your torso forward by bending at your hips; as you bend make sure to keep your back straight until it is almost parallel to the floor. Tip: Make sure that you keep your spine in a neutral position. The weights should hang directly in front of you as your arms are perpendicular to the floor and your torso. This is your starting position.

While keeping the torso stationary, lift the dumbbells to your side (as you exhale), elevating elbows towards the ceiling (do not exert any force with the forearm other than holding the weights). At the top contracted position, squeeze the back muscles and hold for a second.
Slowly lower the weight to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution:
This exercise is not recommended for people with back issues. A Low Cable Row is a better choice for people with back pain.
Ensure perfect form and never round the back as this can cause injury.
Be cautious with the weights you are using. If you are in doubt, use a lesser weight.
Variations: Low Cable Row or a Bent Over Barbell Row
es: Con una mancuerna en cada mano (con las palmas una frente a la otra), doble ligeramente las rodillas y lleve el torso hacia adelante doblando las caderas; Mientras te inclinas, asegúrate de mantener la espalda recta hasta que quede casi paralela al suelo. Consejo: asegúrate de mantener la columna en una posición neutral. Las pesas deben colgar directamente frente a ti, ya que sus brazos están perpendiculares al suelo y al torso. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Manteniendo el torso inmóvil, levanta las mancuernas hacia un lado (mientras exhalas), elevando los codos hacia el techo (no ejerzas ninguna fuerza con el antebrazo que no sea sujetar las pesas). En la posición más contraída, aprieta los músculos de la espalda y mantén la posición durante un segundo.
Baja lentamente el peso hasta la posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución:
Este ejercicio no se recomienda para personas con problemas de espalda. Un Low Cable Row es una mejor opción para las personas con dolor de espalda.
Asegúrate de que la forma sea perfecta y nunca redondee la espalda, ya que esto puede causar lesiones.
Tenga cuidado con las pesas que está utilizando. Si tienes dudas, utiliza un peso menor.
Variaciones: remo bajo con cable o remo inclinado con barra

aliases: Neutral Grip Dumbbell Bent Over Rows
Dumbbell Bent Over Rows Neutral Grip

name: Dumbbell Bent Over Rows
instructions: Grab your dumbbells and place them on the floor in front of you. Take hold of them whilst bending at your knees and waist (more so at your waist, maintaining a straight back. Your arms should be hanging perpendicular to the floor at this point. This is your starting position.
Exhale and squeeze the muscles in your back to bring the dumbbells towards your torso. Bend at the elbow to allow the movement but try not to take any weight through your forearms/ biceps.

Once the dumbbells are close to where your pocket usually are or when the muscles in your back are at tight as they can be, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This exercise may not be suitable for people that suffer from any back pain/injuries.
Variations: Bent Over Row (Reverse Grip) or Seated Cable Rows.

en: Grab your dumbbells and place them on the floor in front of you. Take hold of them whilst bending at your knees and waist (more so at your waist, maintaining a straight back. Your arms should be hanging perpendicular to the floor at this point. This is your starting position.
Exhale and squeeze the muscles in your back to bring the dumbbells towards your torso. Bend at the elbow to allow the movement but try not to take any weight through your forearms/ biceps.

Once the dumbbells are close to where your pocket usually are or when the muscles in your back are at tight as they can be, inhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Caution: This exercise may not be suitable for people that suffer from any back pain/injuries.
Variations: Bent Over Row (Reverse Grip) or Seated Cable Rows.
es: Toma tus mancuernas y colócalas en el suelo frente a ti. Sujételos mientras dobla las rodillas y la cintura (más aún la cintura, manteniendo la espalda recta. En este punto, los brazos deben colgar perpendiculares al suelo. Esta es su posición inicial.
Exhala y aprieta los músculos de tu espalda para llevar las mancuernas hacia tu torso. Doble el codo para permitir el movimiento, pero trate de no pasar ningún peso por los antebrazos o bíceps.

Una vez que las mancuernas estén cerca de donde normalmente están sus bolsillos o cuando los músculos de su espalda estén lo más tensos posible, inhale y regrese las mancuernas por el mismo camino a la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Precaución: Este ejercicio puede no ser adecuado para personas que sufren algún dolor o lesión en la espalda.
Variaciones: remo inclinado (agarre inverso) o remo con cable sentado.

name: Standing Rear Delt Flyes Head Against Bench
instructions: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, an incline bench in front of you.

While keeping your back straight and maintaining the natural arch of your back, lean forward until your forehead touches the bench in front of you. Let your arms hang in front of you perpendicular to the ground. The palms of your hands should be facing each other. This will be your starting position.

Keeping your torso forward and stationary, arms with a slight bend at the elbows, lift the dumbbells out to the side until both upper arms are parallel to the floor. Exhale as you lift the weights. Tip: avoid swinging the torso or bringing the arms back as opposed to the side.
After a brief pause at the top, slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Rear Delt Flye Machine or Dumbbell Rear Delt Flyes.

name.en: Standing Rear Delt Flyes Head Against Bench
name.es: Pájaros de pie con cabeza apoyada en banco

en: Stand up straight with a dumbbell in each hand, an incline bench in front of you.

While keeping your back straight and maintaining the natural arch of your back, lean forward until your forehead touches the bench in front of you. Let your arms hang in front of you perpendicular to the ground. The palms of your hands should be facing each other. This will be your starting position.

Keeping your torso forward and stationary, arms with a slight bend at the elbows, lift the dumbbells out to the side until both upper arms are parallel to the floor. Exhale as you lift the weights. Tip: avoid swinging the torso or bringing the arms back as opposed to the side.
After a brief pause at the top, slowly lower the dumbbells back to the starting position.
Repeat the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Rear Delt Flye Machine or Dumbbell Rear Delt Flyes.
es: Párese derecho con una mancuerna en cada mano y un banco inclinado frente a ti.

Mientras mantiene la espalda recta y el arco natural de la espalda, inclínese hacia adelante hasta que su frente toque el banco frente a ti. Deja que sus brazos cuelguen frente a ti perpendiculares al suelo. Las palmas de tus manos deben estar enfrentadas. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Manteniendo el torso hacia adelante y estacionario, con los brazos ligeramente doblados a la altura de los codos, levante las mancuernas hacia los lados hasta que ambos brazos queden paralelos al suelo. Exhala mientras levantas las pesas. Consejo: evita balancear el torso o llevar los brazos hacia atrás en lugar de a los lados.
Después de una breve pausa en la cima, baje lentamente las mancuernas hasta la posición inicial.
Repite la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Máquina de apertura de deltoides traseros o apertura de deltoides traseros con mancuernas.

aliases: Bent-Over Dumbbell Rear Delt Raise With Head On Bench
Bent Over Rear Delt Dumbbell Raises
Dumbbell Rear Delt Raises (Head On Bench)
Standing Rear Delt Flyes Head Against Bench

name: Bent-Arm Dumbbell Pullover
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on a flat bench (face up). Have your arms extended straight up towards the ceiling with your palms facing each other. Now Bend your elbows so they are at 90 degrees with the dumbbells now shoulders width apart just above your forehead. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, inhale and slowly bring your elbows towards your ears, maintaining the 90 degree bend at your elbows as you go. The dumbbells should now be below your head.
After a brief pause, exhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bent-Arm Barbell Pullover or Cable Pullover.

name.es: Pullover con mancuerna y brazos flexionados

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on a flat bench (face up). Have your arms extended straight up towards the ceiling with your palms facing each other. Now Bend your elbows so they are at 90 degrees with the dumbbells now shoulders width apart just above your forehead. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, inhale and slowly bring your elbows towards your ears, maintaining the 90 degree bend at your elbows as you go. The dumbbells should now be below your head.
After a brief pause, exhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Bent-Arm Barbell Pullover or Cable Pullover.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y recuéstate en un banco plano (boca arriba). Mantén los brazos extendidos hacia el techo con las palmas una frente a la otra. Ahora doble los codos para que queden a 90 grados con las mancuernas ahora separadas a la altura de los hombros, justo por encima de la frente. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, inhale y lleve lentamente los codos hacia las orejas, manteniendo la curvatura de 90 grados durante el movimiento. Las mancuernas ahora deberían estar debajo de tu cabeza.
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y regresa las mancuernas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Pullover con barra con brazo doblado o Pullover con cable.

name: Around The Worlds
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees). Start with your palms facing the ceiling arms at full extension (slight bend at your elbows) next to your thighs. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and draw a semi circle from your thighs to above your head whilst keeping your arms extended and stretching the pectoral muscle as you go. Tip: Feel as though you are sweeping the floor with your elbows!
After a brief pause, exhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Incline Dumbbell Flyes - With A Twist or Pec Deck.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on an incline bench (around 30-45 degrees). Start with your palms facing the ceiling arms at full extension (slight bend at your elbows) next to your thighs. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, inhale and draw a semi circle from your thighs to above your head whilst keeping your arms extended and stretching the pectoral muscle as you go. Tip: Feel as though you are sweeping the floor with your elbows!
After a brief pause, exhale and return the dumbbells along the same path back to their starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Incline Dumbbell Flyes - With A Twist or Pec Deck.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y recuéstese en un banco inclinado (alrededor de 30 a 45 grados). Empieza con las palmas mirando hacia el techo y los brazos en extensión completa (ligeramente doblados los codos) al lado de los muslos. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, inhala y dibuja un semicírculo desde tus muslos hasta encima de tu cabeza mientras mantienes los brazos extendidos y estiras el músculo pectoral durante el movimientos. Consejo: ¡Siente como si estuvieras barriendo el suelo con los codos!
Después de una breve pausa, exhala y regresa las mancuernas por el mismo camino a su posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: aperturas inclinadas con mancuernas: con giro o plataforma Pec.

name: Seated Arnold Press
instructions: Sit on a bench with the back support (just off) vertical. Hold two dumbbells vertical above your head with your palms facing forward.

To perform the movement, bring the dumbbells down towards your torso until you reach 90 degrees at the elbows. Rotate your wrists as you bring your elbows in towards each other, in front of your body. At this point your palms should be facing your torso. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.

After a second pause, reverse the movement and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling, whilst rotating your palms back to the original position (facing forward). Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Shoulder Press Machine or Bradford:Rocky Presses.

en: Sit on a bench with the back support (just off) vertical. Hold two dumbbells vertical above your head with your palms facing forward.

To perform the movement, bring the dumbbells down towards your torso until you reach 90 degrees at the elbows. Rotate your wrists as you bring your elbows in towards each other, in front of your body. At this point your palms should be facing your torso. Inhale as you perform this portion of the movement.

After a second pause, reverse the movement and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling, whilst rotating your palms back to the original position (facing forward). Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Shoulder Press Machine or Bradford:Rocky Presses.
es: Siéntese en un banco con el respaldo (justo afuera) vertical. Sujeta dos mancuernas verticales sobre su cabeza con las palmas hacia adelante.

Para realizar el movimiento, baja las mancuernas hacia tu torso hasta alcanzar los 90 grados en los codos. Gire las muñecas mientras acerca los codos entre sí, frente al cuerpo. En este punto, tus palmas deben mirar hacia tu torso. Inhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento.

Después de una segunda pausa, invierte el movimiento y presiona las mancuernas hacia el techo, mientras giras las palmas de las manos hacia la posición original (mirando hacia adelante). Exhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Máquina de press de hombros o Bradford:Rocky Press.

sourceClip.title: Dual Seated Arnold Press

name: Alternating Preacher Curl
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and place your upper arms on top and over a preacher bench. Your arms should be at full extension (slight bend at your elbows) with your palms facing forward. This will be your starting position.

Exhale and curl one of the dumbbells up towards your shoulder so that your bicep is fully contracted. Once your bicep is at peak contraction, inhale and rotate your wrist so that your palm is now facing the floor. Exhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back to it's starting position. Inhale and rotate your wrist so that your palm is back to facing forwards.
Repeat this movement for the opposing dumbbell and continue alternating until your have performed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Curls or Cable curls.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and place your upper arms on top and over a preacher bench. Your arms should be at full extension (slight bend at your elbows) with your palms facing forward. This will be your starting position.

Exhale and curl one of the dumbbells up towards your shoulder so that your bicep is fully contracted. Once your bicep is at peak contraction, inhale and rotate your wrist so that your palm is now facing the floor. Exhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back to it's starting position. Inhale and rotate your wrist so that your palm is back to facing forwards.
Repeat this movement for the opposing dumbbell and continue alternating until your have performed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Dumbbell Curls or Cable curls.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y coloque la parte superior de los brazos encima y sobre un banco de predicador. Sus brazos deben estar completamente extendidos (ligeramente doblados los codos) con las palmas hacia adelante. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Exhala y dobla una de las mancuernas hacia tu hombro para que tu bíceps quede completamente contraído. Una vez que su bíceps esté en su máxima contracción, inhale y gire la muñeca de modo que la palma quede hacia el suelo. Exhala y regresa la mancuerna por el mismo camino hasta su posición inicial. Inhale y gire la muñeca para que la palma vuelva a mirar hacia adelante.
Repite este movimiento con la mancuerna opuesta y continúe alternando hasta haber realizado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl con mancuernas o Curl con cable.

name: Alternating Front Raise
instructions: Grab a couple of dumbbells and stand with a straight torso. Keep the dumbbells in front of your thighs and at arms length, your palms facing your thighs. This will be your starting position.

While maintaining a stationary torso (no swinging), raise the left dumbbell in front of your body with a slight bend on the elbow, palm facing down. Continue contracting your deltoids until your arm is slightly above parallel to the floor. Exhale as you execute this portion of the movement and pause for a second at the top.
Inhale and lower the dumbbell back down slowly to the starting position.
Continue alternating in this fashion until you have performed the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Cable Front Raises or Bradford:Rocky Press.

en: Grab a couple of dumbbells and stand with a straight torso. Keep the dumbbells in front of your thighs and at arms length, your palms facing your thighs. This will be your starting position.

While maintaining a stationary torso (no swinging), raise the left dumbbell in front of your body with a slight bend on the elbow, palm facing down. Continue contracting your deltoids until your arm is slightly above parallel to the floor. Exhale as you execute this portion of the movement and pause for a second at the top.
Inhale and lower the dumbbell back down slowly to the starting position.
Continue alternating in this fashion until you have performed the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Cable Front Raises or Bradford:Rocky Press.
es: Coge un par de mancuernas y párate con el torso recto. Mantén las mancuernas frente a sus muslos y con los brazos extendidos, con las palmas hacia los muslos. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantiene el torso estacionario (sin balancearse), levante la mancuerna izquierda frente a tu cuerpo con una ligera flexión del codo y la palma hacia abajo. Continúa contrayendo sus deltoides hasta que tu brazo esté ligeramente por encima del paralelo al suelo. Exhala mientras ejecutas esta parte del movimiento y haz una pausa por un segundo en la parte superior.
Inhala y baja la mancuerna lentamente hasta la posición inicial.
Continúa alternando de esta manera hasta que haya realizado la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Elevaciones frontales con cable o Bradford:Rocky Press.

name: Alternating Dumbbell Floor Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on your back. Have your elbows bent at a 90 degree angle, flared out wide with your forearms vertical from the floor. Your palms should be facing your lower body. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by exhaling and pressing one of the dumbbell towards the ceiling until your elbow joint is nearly at full extension.
After a brief pause, inhale and slowly return the dumbbell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat this movement in an alternating fashion between your left and right side until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Bench Press or Chest Press.

name.es: Press de suelo alterno con mancuernas

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay on your back. Have your elbows bent at a 90 degree angle, flared out wide with your forearms vertical from the floor. Your palms should be facing your lower body. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by exhaling and pressing one of the dumbbell towards the ceiling until your elbow joint is nearly at full extension.
After a brief pause, inhale and slowly return the dumbbell along the same path, back into its starting position.
Repeat this movement in an alternating fashion between your left and right side until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Barbell Bench Press or Chest Press.
es: Toma una mancuerna en cada mano y acuéstate boca arriba. Mantén los codos doblados en un ángulo de 90 grados, ensanchados con los antebrazos verticales desde el suelo. Tus palmas deben mirar hacia la parte inferior de tu cuerpo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inicie el movimiento exhalando y presionando una de las mancuernas hacia el techo hasta que la articulación del codo esté casi en extensión completa.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa lentamente la mancuerna por el mismo camino, hasta su posición inicial.
Repite este movimiento de forma alterna entre el lado izquierdo y el derecho hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de banca con barra o Press de pecho.

name: Standing Alternate Rotating Bicep Curls
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt an upright, standing position. Have your arms at full extension, relaxed by your sides.
Next, whilst bending at your elbow, exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand up towards your shoulder, rotating your palm towards the ceiling as you go.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back to your side.
Again, exhale but this time lift the dumbbell in your left hand in the same manner.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back to your side.
Continue to alternate in this fashion until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Alternate Hammer Curl or Cable Curls.

name.es: Curl de bíceps alterno con rotación de pie

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt an upright, standing position. Have your arms at full extension, relaxed by your sides.
Next, whilst bending at your elbow, exhale and curl the dumbbell in your right hand up towards your shoulder, rotating your palm towards the ceiling as you go.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back to your side.
Again, exhale but this time lift the dumbbell in your left hand in the same manner.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the dumbbell along the same path back to your side.
Continue to alternate in this fashion until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Alternate Hammer Curl or Cable Curls.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una posición erguida y de pie. Mantén los brazos completamente extendidos, relajados a los lados.
Luego, mientras dobla el codo, exhale y doble la mancuerna en su mano derecha hacia su hombro, girando su palma hacia el techo durante el movimiento.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la mancuerna por el mismo camino hacia tu costado.
Nuevamente, exhala, pero esta vez levanta la mancuerna con la mano izquierda de la misma manera.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa la mancuerna por el mismo camino hacia tu costado.
Continúa alternando de esta manera hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl en martillo alternativo o Curl con cable.

name: Alternating Deltoid Raise
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt an upright, standing position. Have your arms at full extension, relaxed by your sides.
Next, whilst maintaining a slight bend at your elbows, exhale and lift the dumbbells out in front of you until they are at shoulder height.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the weights to your side.
Again, exhale but this time lift the dumbbells out laterally to your sides, pause when you get to shoulder level.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the weights to your side.
Continue to alternate in this fashion until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Arnold Press or Bradford:Rocky Presses.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and adopt an upright, standing position. Have your arms at full extension, relaxed by your sides.
Next, whilst maintaining a slight bend at your elbows, exhale and lift the dumbbells out in front of you until they are at shoulder height.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the weights to your side.
Again, exhale but this time lift the dumbbells out laterally to your sides, pause when you get to shoulder level.
After a brief pause, inhale and return the weights to your side.
Continue to alternate in this fashion until you have completed the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Variations: Seated Arnold Press or Bradford:Rocky Presses.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y adopta una posición erguida y de pie. Mantén los brazos completamente extendidos, relajados a los lados.
A continuación, mientras mantienes una ligera flexión en los codos, exhala y levanta las mancuernas frente a ti hasta que estén a la altura de los hombros.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa las pesas a tu costado.
Nuevamente, exhale, pero esta vez levante las mancuernas lateralmente hacia los costados, haga una pausa cuando llegue al nivel de los hombros.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa las pesas a tu costado.
Continúa alternando de esta manera hasta que haya completado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Arnold Press sentado o Bradford:Rocky Presses.

name: Rotating Alternate Incline Bicep Curls
instructions: Sit down on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand. Have the dumbbells at arms length. This will be your starting position. Tip: Keep your elbows close to your torso.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the right dumbbell forward while contracting your bicep as you exhale. As you do so, rotate your hand so that the palm is facing up. Continue the movement until your bicep is fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your bicep Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbell back to its starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement with your left hand.
Continue alternating in this manner for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Standing Alternate Hammer Curls or Alternating Cable Curls.

name.es: Curl de bíceps inclinado alterno con rotación

en: Sit down on an incline bench with a dumbbell in each hand. Have the dumbbells at arms length. This will be your starting position. Tip: Keep your elbows close to your torso.

While holding the upper arm stationary, curl the right dumbbell forward while contracting your bicep as you exhale. As you do so, rotate your hand so that the palm is facing up. Continue the movement until your bicep is fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze your bicep Tip: Only the forearms should move.
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbell back to its starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement with your left hand.
Continue alternating in this manner for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation: Standing Alternate Hammer Curls or Alternating Cable Curls.
es: Siéntate en un banco inclinado con una mancuerna en cada mano. Mantén las mancuernas con los brazos extendidos. Esta será tu posición inicial. Consejo: mantenga los codos cerca del torso.

Mientras sostiene la parte superior del brazo inmóvil, doble la mancuerna derecha hacia adelante mientras contrae el bíceps mientras exhala. Mientras lo hace, gire la mano de modo que la palma quede hacia arriba. Continúa el movimiento hasta que tu bíceps esté completamente contraído y la mancuerna esté al nivel de los hombros. Mantén la posición contraída por un segundo mientras aprietas el bíceps. Consejo: solo deben moverse los antebrazos.
Empieza lentamente a llevar la mancuerna a su posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repite el movimiento con tu mano izquierda.
Continúa alternando de esta manera durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variación: Curls de martillo alternos de pie o Curls de cable alternos.

name: Seated Alternating Hammer Curls
instructions: In a seated position, grab two dumbbells, arms by your side, torso upright leaning against a (just off) vertical bench.
The palms of your hands should be facing your torso. This will be your starting position.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl the right dumbbell forward, contracting the bicep. Continue the movement until your bicep is fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the bicep.
(Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbell back down to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement with the left hand.
Continue alternating in this manner for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Alternate Hammer Curls or Chest Supported Cable Hammer Curls.

en: In a seated position, grab two dumbbells, arms by your side, torso upright leaning against a (just off) vertical bench.
The palms of your hands should be facing your torso. This will be your starting position.

Whilst holding the upper arm stationary, exhale as you curl the right dumbbell forward, contracting the bicep. Continue the movement until your bicep is fully contracted and the dumbbell is at shoulder level. Hold the contracted position for a second as you squeeze the bicep.
(Tip: Only the forearms should move.)
Slowly begin to bring the dumbbell back down to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat the movement with the left hand.
Continue alternating in this manner for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Alternate Hammer Curls or Chest Supported Cable Hammer Curls.
es: En posición sentada, agarre dos mancuernas, con los brazos a los lados y el torso erguido apoyado contra un banco vertical (justo al lado).
Las palmas de tus manos deben mirar hacia tu torso. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras mantienes inmóvil la parte superior del brazo, exhala mientras flexionas la mancuerna derecha hacia adelante, contrayendo el bíceps. Continúa el movimiento hasta que tu bíceps esté completamente contraído y la mancuerna esté al nivel de los hombros. Mantén la posición contraída por un segundo mientras aprietas el bíceps.
(Consejo: sólo deben moverse los antebrazos).
Lentamente comience a bajar la mancuerna a la posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repite el movimiento con la mano izquierda.
Continúa alternando de esta manera durante la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Curl de martillo alternativo de pie o Curl de martillo con cable con apoyo en el pecho.

name: Kickflip
instructions: 1) Stand on a skateboard with your front foot angled across the board and your back foot positioned on the tail. Keep your shoulders aligned with the board and your knees slightly bent. This is your starting position.
2) Pop the tail of the board down sharply with your back foot while jumping straight up, allowing the board to begin rising off the ground.
3) As the board levels, slide your front foot diagonally up and off the front-side edge to flick the board into a full rotation along its long axis.
4) Track the board with your eyes, keep your body centered over it, and catch it with both feet once it has completed a single rotation. Land with knees bent to absorb the impact and roll away.

en: 1) Stand on a skateboard with your front foot angled across the board and your back foot positioned on the tail. Keep your shoulders aligned with the board and your knees slightly bent. This is your starting position.
2) Pop the tail of the board down sharply with your back foot while jumping straight up, allowing the board to begin rising off the ground.
3) As the board levels, slide your front foot diagonally up and off the front-side edge to flick the board into a full rotation along its long axis.
4) Track the board with your eyes, keep your body centered over it, and catch it with both feet once it has completed a single rotation. Land with knees bent to absorb the impact and roll away.
es: 1) Colócate de pie sobre la tabla con el pie delantero atravesado en diagonal y el pie trasero apoyado sobre el tail. Mantén los hombros alineados con la tabla y las rodillas ligeramente flexionadas. Esta es la posición inicial.
2) Golpea con fuerza el tail contra el suelo con el pie trasero a la vez que saltas verticalmente, permitiendo que la tabla empiece a despegarse del suelo.
3) Cuando la tabla se nivele, desliza el pie delantero en diagonal hacia arriba y hacia fuera por el canto delantero para imprimir un giro completo a la tabla sobre su eje longitudinal.

4) Mantén la vista en la tabla y el cuerpo centrado sobre ella, y recógela con ambos pies cuando haya completado una rotación. Aterriza con las rodillas flexionadas para absorber el impacto y continúa rodando.

sourceClip.title: How to Kickflip | Skateboard Trick Tutorial | Slow Motion

name: Back Flexion Neck Stretch
instructions: From a seated or standing position, lean your head backwards to look up towards to ceiling.
Hold the position for the recommended duration.

name.es: Estiramiento del cuello en flexión de espalda

en: From a seated or standing position, lean your head backwards to look up towards to ceiling.
Hold the position for the recommended duration.
es: Desde una posición sentada o de pie, incline la cabeza hacia atrás para mirar hacia el techo.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Forward Flexion Neck Stretch
instructions: From a seated or standing position, interlink your fingers behind your head and gently start to pull your head (and in turn your chin) down towards your chest.
Once your chin is in contact with your chest, hold the position for the recommended amount of time.

name.es: Estiramiento del cuello en flexión hacia adelante

en: From a seated or standing position, interlink your fingers behind your head and gently start to pull your head (and in turn your chin) down towards your chest.
Once your chin is in contact with your chest, hold the position for the recommended amount of time.
es: Desde una posición sentada o de pie, entrelaza los dedos detrás de la cabeza y comienza a tirar suavemente de la cabeza (y a tu vez de la barbilla) hacia el pecho.
Una vez que tu barbilla esté en contacto con tu pecho, mantén la posición durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Lateral Neck Stretch
instructions: From a standing position with your feet hip width appart, lean your head across to your left shoulder.
To increase the stretch, take hold of your head with your left hand and gently pull downward towards your shoulder.
Hold this position for recommended duration and swap sides.

en: From a standing position with your feet hip width appart, lean your head across to your left shoulder.
To increase the stretch, take hold of your head with your left hand and gently pull downward towards your shoulder.
Hold this position for recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Desde una posición de pie con los pies separados a la anchura de las caderas, incline la cabeza hacia el hombro izquierdo.
Para aumentar el estiramiento, sujeta la cabeza con la mano izquierda y neumático suavemente hacia el hombro.
Mantén esta posición durante la duración recomendada y cambia de lado.

name: Hanging Lat Stretch
instructions: Take hold of a chin up bar with both hands an overhand grip, straight arm and allow the majority of your body weight be 'hung'.
Hold for the recommended duration.

en: Take hold of a chin up bar with both hands an overhand grip, straight arm and allow the majority of your body weight be 'hung'.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Sujeta una barra de dominadas con ambas manos en pronación, con el brazo estirado y deja que la mayor parte de tu peso corporal quede "colgado".
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Reaching Lat Stretch
instructions: Take a wide stance with your torso upright and your arms by your sides.
Next, keep your legs straight, lean forward and towards your right leg so that your torso is parallel to the floor.
Bring your left arm up so that it is also parallel with the floor.
Hold for recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Take a wide stance with your torso upright and your arms by your sides.
Next, keep your legs straight, lean forward and towards your right leg so that your torso is parallel to the floor.
Bring your left arm up so that it is also parallel with the floor.
Hold for recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Adopta una postura amplia con el torso erguido y los brazos a los lados.
A continuación, mantén las piernas rectas, inclínate hacia adelante y hacia la pierna derecha para que tu torso quede paralelo al suelo.
Levanta el brazo izquierdo para que también quede paralelo al suelo.
Mantén presionado durante la duración recomendada y cambia de lado.

name: Reaching Flat Back
instructions: Take a standing position with your feet hip width appart.
Next, lean your torso forward and bring your arms straight next to your head so that you are parallel with the floor and reach forward.
Hold for recommended period of time.

en: Take a standing position with your feet hip width appart.
Next, lean your torso forward and bring your arms straight next to your head so that you are parallel with the floor and reach forward.
Hold for recommended period of time.
es: Colóquese de pie con los pies separados a la anchura de las caderas.
Luego, incline el torso hacia adelante y lleve los brazos rectos al lado de la cabeza para que quede paralelo al suelo y esneumático los brazos hacia adelante.
Mantén durante el período de tiempo recomendado.

name: Pole Grab Lean Back Stretch
instructions: Take a standing position with your feet together facing the pole. Hold the pole with both hands at shoulder height.
Then, slowly lean away for the pole.
Hold for the recommended duration.

name.es: Estiramiento de espalda inclinada con agarre de poste

en: Take a standing position with your feet together facing the pole. Hold the pole with both hands at shoulder height.
Then, slowly lean away for the pole.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Colóquese de pie con los pies juntos mirando hacia el poste. Sostenga el poste con ambas manos a la anchura de los hombros.
Luego, inclínate lentamente hacia el poste.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Reaching Lateral Side Stretch
instructions: From a standing position, shoulder width stance with your torso upright.  Keep your left arm by your side and elevate your right arm up.
Gently lean towards your left side, reaching over with your right arm. Maintain a balanced stance with your weight evenly distributed through your stance.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: From a standing position, shoulder width stance with your torso upright.  Keep your left arm by your side and elevate your right arm up.
Gently lean towards your left side, reaching over with your right arm. Maintain a balanced stance with your weight evenly distributed through your stance.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Desde una posición de pie, colóquese a la anchura de los hombros y con el torso erguido. Mantén su brazo izquierdo a tu lado y levanta tu brazo derecho.
Inclínese suavemente hacia tu lado izquierdo, extendiendo su brazo derecho. Mantén una postura equilibrada con tu peso distribuido uniformemente a lo largo de tu postura.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Sitting Knee-Up Extended Rotation Stretch
instructions: Take a seat on the floor with your right leg extended out in front of you with your left leg bent at a 90 degree angle placed over the top of your right leg.
Place your right elbow on the outside of your left knee with your left hand on the floor behind you.
Bend your right leg so that your right foot comes towards your left glute.
Rotate your torso anti clockwise. Tip: To emphasise this stretch bring your bent leg towards your torso and extend upper rotation.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento de rotación extendida sentado con las rodillas hacia arriba

en: Take a seat on the floor with your right leg extended out in front of you with your left leg bent at a 90 degree angle placed over the top of your right leg.
Place your right elbow on the outside of your left knee with your left hand on the floor behind you.
Bend your right leg so that your right foot comes towards your left glute.
Rotate your torso anti clockwise. Tip: To emphasise this stretch bring your bent leg towards your torso and extend upper rotation.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Siéntate en el suelo con la pierna derecha extendida frente a ti y la pierna izquierda doblada en un ángulo de 90 grados colocada sobre la parte superior de la pierna derecha.
Coloca tu codo derecho en la parte exterior de tu rodilla izquierda con tu mano izquierda en el suelo detrás de usted.
Dobla la pierna derecha de modo que su pie derecho acerque su glúteo izquierdo.
Gire tu torso en sentido antihorario. Consejo: Para enfatizar este estiramiento, lleve la pierna doblada hacia el torso y extiende la rotación superior.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Lying Knee Roll-Over Stretch
instructions: Lay on a mat, on your back with your arms extended out to your sides with your palms facing the floor. Lift your feet off the floor by creating a 90 degree bend at your knees and hips. Tip: Keep your knees together throughout this movement. This will be your starting position.
Next, allow your knees to descend towards the right hand side.
Hold for recommeded time.
Next, use your core muscles to bring your lower body back along the same path into the starting position and repeat on other side.

name.es: Estiramiento de giro de rodilla acostado

en: Lay on a mat, on your back with your arms extended out to your sides with your palms facing the floor. Lift your feet off the floor by creating a 90 degree bend at your knees and hips. Tip: Keep your knees together throughout this movement. This will be your starting position.
Next, allow your knees to descend towards the right hand side.
Hold for recommeded time.
Next, use your core muscles to bring your lower body back along the same path into the starting position and repeat on other side.
es: Acuéstese sobre una colchoneta, boca arriba con los brazos extendidos a los lados y las palmas hacia el suelo. Levanta los pies del suelo creando una curva de 90 grados en las rodillas y las caderas. Consejo: mantén las rodillas juntas durante este movimiento. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Luego, deja que tus rodillas desciendan hacia el lado derecho.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado.
Luego, use los core para llevar la parte inferior del cuerpo hacia atrás por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial y repite en el otro lado.

name: Kneeling Back-Slump Stretch
instructions: Your starting position will be on your hands and knees in an 'all-fours' position.
Once you are in this position, breathe normally and contract your upper back.
Hold this position for the recommended amount of time.

name.es: Estiramiento de rodillas y caída de espalda

en: Your starting position will be on your hands and knees in an 'all-fours' position.
Once you are in this position, breathe normally and contract your upper back.
Hold this position for the recommended amount of time.
es: Su posición inicial será sobre manos y rodillas en una posición de "cuatro patas".
Una vez que estés en esta posición, respira normalmente y contrae la parte superior de la espalda.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Kneeling Reach Forward Stretch
instructions: Take a kneeling positionon a matt, then lower your glutes to your heels and lean forward so that your formarms are flat on the floor.
Hold for the recommended duration.

en: Take a kneeling positionon a matt, then lower your glutes to your heels and lean forward so that your formarms are flat on the floor.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Colóquese de rodillas sobre una colchoneta, luego baje los glúteos hasta los talones e inclínate hacia adelante para que los brazos queden planos sobre el suelo.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Lying Double Knee-To-Chest Stretch
instructions: Lay down on a matt facin up with your arms out to your sides and your legs flat on the floor.
Next, bring both legs towards your chest, place your hands on each knee to stay in position.
Hold for the recommended duration.

name.es: Estiramiento dobla de rodilla a pecho acostado

en: Lay down on a matt facin up with your arms out to your sides and your legs flat on the floor.
Next, bring both legs towards your chest, place your hands on each knee to stay in position.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Acuéstese sobre una tuperficie mate boca arriba con los brazos extendidos a los lados y las piernas apoyadas en el suelo.
Luego, lleva ambas piernas hacia tu pecho, coloca tus manos en cada rodilla para mantenerte en posición.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Standing Knee To Chest Stretch
instructions: From a standing position, bring your right knee up towards your chest and interlink your fingers over your knee to hold the position. To accentuate the stretch using your hands pull your knee closer to your chest.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento de rodillas al pecho de pie

en: From a standing position, bring your right knee up towards your chest and interlink your fingers over your knee to hold the position. To accentuate the stretch using your hands pull your knee closer to your chest.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Desde una posición de pie, lleve la rodilla derecha hacia el pecho y entrelace los dedos sobre la rodilla para mantener la posición. Para acentuar el estiramiento con las manos, acerque la rodilla al pecho.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Sitting Side Reach Stretch
instructions: Take a seat on a mat with your left leg out straight, your right knee bent and relaxed out wide with the sole of your foot gently placed against the inside of your left knee.
Lean your torso towards your left leg take and reach your toes.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Take a seat on a mat with your left leg out straight, your right knee bent and relaxed out wide with the sole of your foot gently placed against the inside of your left knee.
Lean your torso towards your left leg take and reach your toes.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Siéntate en una colchoneta con la pierna izquierda estirada, la rodilla derecha doblada y relajada con la planta del pie colocada tuavemente contra el interior de la rodilla izquierda.
Inclina tu torso hacia tu pierna izquierda y alcanza los dedos de tus pies.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name.es: Alcanzar hacia adelante Empujar a través

name: Standing Lean-Back Stomach Stretch
instructions: From a standing position lift your chest towards the ceiling, squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Keeping your hips central and lean back.
Hold for the recommended duration.

name.es: Estiramiento del estómago inclinado hacia atrás de pie

en: From a standing position lift your chest towards the ceiling, squeeze your shoulder blades together.
Keeping your hips central and lean back.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Desde una posición de pie, levanta el pecho hacia el techo y junte los omódiscos.
Manteniendo las caderas centrales e inclinándose hacia atrás.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Rising Stomach Stretch
instructions: Lay down face forward on a matt, place your elbows inline underneath your shoulders.
Next, pushing down with your hands straighten your arms.
Hold for the recommended duration.

en: Lay down face forward on a matt, place your elbows inline underneath your shoulders.
Next, pushing down with your hands straighten your arms.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Acuéstese boca adelante sobre una colchoneta, coloca los codos alineados debajo de los hombros.
Luego, empujando hacia abajo con las manos, esneumático los brazos.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: On Elbows Stomach Stretch
instructions: Lay down face forward on a matt, place your elbows inline underneath your shoulders and your arms in front of you bent at 90 degrees. Ensure your hips are extended towards the floor and your shoulders are relaxed.
Hold for the recommended duration.

name.es: Estiramiento del estómago sobre los codos

en: Lay down face forward on a matt, place your elbows inline underneath your shoulders and your arms in front of you bent at 90 degrees. Ensure your hips are extended towards the floor and your shoulders are relaxed.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Acuéstese boca adelante sobre una colchoneta, coloca los codos alineados debajo de los hombros y los brazos frente a ti doblados a 90 grados. Asegúrate de que tus caderas estén extendidas hacia el suelo y tus hombros estén relajados.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Finger Stretch
instructions: Take a standing position with your feet hip width appart, place the palms of your hands together then push your fingers away from each other with your finder tips.
Hold for recommended duration.

en: Take a standing position with your feet hip width appart, place the palms of your hands together then push your fingers away from each other with your finder tips.
Hold for recommended duration.
es: Póngase de pie con los pies separados a la anchura de las caderas, junte las palmas de las manos y luego separe los dedos con las puntas del buscador.
Mantén presionado durante la duración recomendada.

name: Fingers Down Forearm Stretch
instructions: Take a standing position with your feet hip width appart.
Next, take both hands in front so your arms are parallel to the floor with your palms facing down.
Keeping your arm straight, place your right hand over your left hand and gently pull your left hand towards you.
Hold this position for recomended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento del antebrazo con los dedos hacia abajo

en: Take a standing position with your feet hip width appart.
Next, take both hands in front so your arms are parallel to the floor with your palms facing down.
Keeping your arm straight, place your right hand over your left hand and gently pull your left hand towards you.
Hold this position for recomended duration and swap sides.
es: Colóquese de pie con los pies separados a la anchura de las caderas.
Luego, coloca ambas manos al frente de modo que tus brazos queden paralelos al suelo con las palmas hacia abajo.
Manteniendo el brazo recto, coloca la mano derecha sobre la izquierda y neumático suavemente de la mano izquierda hacia usted.
Mantén esta posición durante la duración recomendada y cambia de lado.

name: Palms-Out Forearm Stretch
instructions: Take a standing position with your feet, hip width appart.
Next, take both hands in front of you and interlink your fingers. Then straighten your arms so the palms of your hands are facing away from you.
Hold this position for recommended duration.

name.es: Estiramiento del antebrazo con las palmas hacia afuera

en: Take a standing position with your feet, hip width appart.
Next, take both hands in front of you and interlink your fingers. Then straighten your arms so the palms of your hands are facing away from you.
Hold this position for recommended duration.
es: Colóquese de pie con los pies separados a la anchura de las caderas.
Luego, toma ambas manos frente a ti y entrelaza los dedos. Luego, esneumático los brazos de modo que las palmas de las manos queden en dirección opuesta a usted.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Kneeling Forearm Stretch
instructions: Adopt an 'all fours' position on a mat but have your fingers pointing your knees rather than away from your body. This will be your starting position.
Whilst maintaining a connection to the floor with your palms, gently lean your bodyweight backwards towards your heels until you create the desired stretch in your forearms.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.

en: Adopt an 'all fours' position on a mat but have your fingers pointing your knees rather than away from your body. This will be your starting position.
Whilst maintaining a connection to the floor with your palms, gently lean your bodyweight backwards towards your heels until you create the desired stretch in your forearms.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.
es: Adopta una posición a cuatro patas sobre una colchoneta, pero con los dedos apuntando hacia las rodillas en lugar de alejarse del cuerpo. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Mientras mantiene una conexión con el suelo con las palmas, incline suavemente el peso de tu cuerpo hacia los talones hasta crear el estiramiento deseado en los antebrazos.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Standing Split Side Toe Touch
instructions: Take a wide stance with your torso upright and your arms by your sides.
Next, keep your legs straight, lean forward and towards your right leg. Then reach your right foot with your left hand.
Hold for recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Toque del dedo del pie lateral dividido de pie

en: Take a wide stance with your torso upright and your arms by your sides.
Next, keep your legs straight, lean forward and towards your right leg. Then reach your right foot with your left hand.
Hold for recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Adopta una postura amplia con el torso erguido y los brazos a los lados.
A continuación, mantén las piernas rectas, inclínate hacia adelante y hacia la pierna derecha. Luego alcanza tu pie derecho con tu mano izquierda.
Mantén presionado durante la duración recomendada y cambia de lado.

name: Pole Grab Lean Forward Stretch
instructions: Take a standing position with your back to the pole. Take your hands behind you to hold the pole.
Then, slowly lean away for the pole.
Hold for the recommended duration.

name.es: Estiramiento inclinado hacia adelante con agarre del poste

en: Take a standing position with your back to the pole. Take your hands behind you to hold the pole.
Then, slowly lean away for the pole.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Colóquese de pie, de espaldas al poste. Lleva las manos detrás de ti para sostener el poste.
Luego, inclínate lentamente hacia el poste.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Laying Shoulder Turn Over Stretch
instructions: Lay on a mat, face down, with your legs fully extended and your arms out straight.

Once you are in this position, breathe normally lift your right leg up behind you and cross your left leg keeping your left shoulder on the matt. Bring your right arm towards your torso to support you.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento de giro del hombro tendido

en: Lay on a mat, face down, with your legs fully extended and your arms out straight.

Once you are in this position, breathe normally lift your right leg up behind you and cross your left leg keeping your left shoulder on the matt. Bring your right arm towards your torso to support you.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Acuéstate sobre una colchoneta, boca abajo, con las piernas completamente extendidas y los brazos estirados.

Una vez que estés en esta posición, respira normalmente, levanta la pierna derecha detrás de ti y cruza la pierna izquierda manteniendo el hombro izquierdo sobre la colchoneta. Lleva tu brazo derecho hacia tu torso para sostenerte.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Laying Shoulder Turn Over Stretch (Chest)
instructions: Lay on a mat, face down, with your legs fully extended and your arms out with your hands by your head.
Once you are in this position, breathe normally lift your right leg up behind you and cross your left leg keeping your left shoulder on the matt.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento de giro del hombro tendido (pecho)

en: Lay on a mat, face down, with your legs fully extended and your arms out with your hands by your head.
Once you are in this position, breathe normally lift your right leg up behind you and cross your left leg keeping your left shoulder on the matt.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Acuéstate sobre una colchoneta, boca abajo, con las piernas completamente extendidas y los brazos extendidos con las manos a la altura de la cabeza.
Una vez que estés en esta posición, respira normalmente, levanta la pierna derecha detrás de ti y cruza la pierna izquierda manteniendo el hombro izquierdo sobre la colchoneta.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Bent Arm Chest Stretch
instructions: Stand with a shoulder width stance either next to a wall or doorway. Elevate one of your arms so your elbow is at 90 degrees and your forearm is vertical from the floor. Place your forearm against the upright surface. This is your starting position.
Gently lean your bodyweight forward until you feel the desired stretch come through your lats.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento del pecho con el brazo doblado

en: Stand with a shoulder width stance either next to a wall or doorway. Elevate one of your arms so your elbow is at 90 degrees and your forearm is vertical from the floor. Place your forearm against the upright surface. This is your starting position.
Gently lean your bodyweight forward until you feel the desired stretch come through your lats.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Colócate de pie con una postura a la anchura de los hombros, ya sea al lado de una pared o de una puerta. Eleva uno de tus brazos de modo que su codo esté a 90 grados y su antebrazo esté vertical desde el suelo. Coloca tu antebrazo contra la tuperficie vertical. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Incline suavemente tu peso corporal hacia adelante hasta que sienta que el estiramiento deseado llega a través de tus dorsales.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Assisted Reverse Shoulder Stretch
instructions: Take a seat on a bench, with both hands flat eitherside of your hips and your fingers pointed behind you.
Next, keep your feet and hands in position and lower your body down from the bench so that your elbow is at 90 degrees.
Hold for recommended duration.

en: Take a seat on a bench, with both hands flat eitherside of your hips and your fingers pointed behind you.
Next, keep your feet and hands in position and lower your body down from the bench so that your elbow is at 90 degrees.
Hold for recommended duration.
es: Siéntate en un banco, con ambas manos planas a ambos lados de las caderas y los dedos apuntando hacia atrás.
A continuación, mantén los pies y las manos en posición y baje el cuerpo del banco para que el codo quede a 90 grados.
Mantén presionado durante la duración recomendada.

name: Reverse Shoulder Stretch
instructions: Take a standing position with your feet hip width appart.
Next, take both hand behind you and interlink your fingers. To accentuate the stretch lift your arms away from you.
Hold for recommended duraction.

en: Take a standing position with your feet hip width appart.
Next, take both hand behind you and interlink your fingers. To accentuate the stretch lift your arms away from you.
Hold for recommended duraction.
es: Colóquese de pie con los pies separados a la anchura de las caderas.
Luego, coloca ambas manos detrás de ti y entrelaza los dedos. Para acentuar el estiramiento, levanta los brazos lejos de usted.
Mantén presionado durante la duración recomendada.

name: Parallel Arm Shoulder Stretch
instructions: From a standing or seated position, bring your right arm across your chest.
Next, take your left arm under your right arm and gently pull your left arm in.
Hold for recommened time and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento paralelo de brazos y hombros

en: From a standing or seated position, bring your right arm across your chest.
Next, take your left arm under your right arm and gently pull your left arm in.
Hold for recommened time and swap sides.
es: Desde una posición de pie o sentada, cruce el brazo derecho sobre el pecho.
Luego, coloca tu brazo izquierdo debajo de tu brazo derecho y neumático suavemente de tu brazo izquierdo hacia adentro.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Standing Toe Touch
instructions: Take a standing position, shoulder width stance with your torso upright.
Gently lean forwards from your waist whilst keeping your legs straight. Continue to lean forward until you can feel the stretch come through your hamstrings.
Hold for the recommended duration.

en: Take a standing position, shoulder width stance with your torso upright.
Gently lean forwards from your waist whilst keeping your legs straight. Continue to lean forward until you can feel the stretch come through your hamstrings.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Coge una posición de pie, a la anchura de los hombros y con el torso erguido.
Inclínese suavemente hacia adelante desde la cintura mientras mantienes las piernas rectas. Continúa inclinándose hacia adelante hasta que pueda sentir el estiramiento a través de los isquiosurales.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Standing Cross Legged Hamstring Stretch
instructions: Take a standing position and cross your
Gently lean forwards from your waist whilst keeping your legs straight. Continue to lean forward until you can feel the stretch come through your hamstrings.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap legs.

name.es: Estiramiento de los isquiosurales de pie con las piernas cruzadas

en: Take a standing position and cross your
Gently lean forwards from your waist whilst keeping your legs straight. Continue to lean forward until you can feel the stretch come through your hamstrings.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap legs.
es: Colócate de pie y cruza tus
Inclínese suavemente hacia adelante desde la cintura mientras mantienes las piernas rectas. Continúa inclinándose hacia adelante hasta que pueda sentir el estiramiento a través de los isquiosurales.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de pierna.

name: Standing Reach Down Hamstring Stretch (Shoulder Width Apart)
instructions: Take a wide stance standing position with your torso upright.
Gently lean forwards from your waist whilst keeping your legs straight. Continue to lean forward until you can feel the stretch come through your hamstrings.
Hold for the recommended duration.

name.en: Standing Reach Down Hamstring Stretch (Shoulder Width Apart)
name.es: Estiramiento de los isquiosurales de pie y extendido hacia abajo (separados al ancho de los hombros)

en: Take a wide stance standing position with your torso upright.
Gently lean forwards from your waist whilst keeping your legs straight. Continue to lean forward until you can feel the stretch come through your hamstrings.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Adopta una postura amplia de pie con el torso erguido.
Inclínese suavemente hacia adelante desde la cintura mientras mantienes las piernas rectas. Continúa inclinándose hacia adelante hasta que pueda sentir el estiramiento a través de los isquiosurales.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado.

aliases: Standing Reach Down Hamstring Stretch (Shoulder Width Apart)

name: Standing High-Leg Bent Knee Hamstring Stretch
instructions: Set up a box/step/bench in front of you at the desired height. Stand upright with your arms beside your torso and adopt a shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position.
Next, take your right foot up and place ontop of the box.
Hold for recommended period and swap sides.

name.en: Standing High-Leg Bent Knee Hamstring Stretch
name.es: Estiramiento de los isquiosurales de la rodilla doblada con la pierna alta de pie

en: Set up a box/step/bench in front of you at the desired height. Stand upright with your arms beside your torso and adopt a shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position.
Next, take your right foot up and place ontop of the box.
Hold for recommended period and swap sides.
es: Coloca una caja/escalón/banco frente a ti a la altura deseada. Colócate de pie erguido con los brazos al lado del torso y adopta una postura a la anchura de los hombros. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Luego, levanta el pie derecho y colóquelo encima de la caja.
Mantén presionado durante el período recomendado y cambia de lado.

aliases: Standing High-Leg Bent Knee Hamstring Stretch

name: Lying Band Hamstring Stretch
instructions: Lay down, face up on a mat with your legs flat on the floor, take the band and loop it over your left foot and gently pull tight.
Keeping your left leg straight pull the band with both hands towards your torso that your leg comes up off the floor.
Make sure the band will not slip off your foot, slowly pull harder on the band so that the stretch becomes greater until you create the desired amount of tension.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento del isquiosurales con banda acostada

en: Lay down, face up on a mat with your legs flat on the floor, take the band and loop it over your left foot and gently pull tight.
Keeping your left leg straight pull the band with both hands towards your torso that your leg comes up off the floor.
Make sure the band will not slip off your foot, slowly pull harder on the band so that the stretch becomes greater until you create the desired amount of tension.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Acuéstate boca arriba sobre una colchoneta con las piernas apoyadas en el suelo, toma la banda, pásala sobre tu pie izquierdo y tira tuavemente.
Manteniendo la pierna izquierda estirada, neumático de la banda con ambas manos hacia el torso para que la pierna se levanta del suelo.
Asegúrate de que la banda no se resbale de tu pie, neumático lentamente de la banda con más fuerza para que el estiramiento sea mayor hasta crear la cantidad de tensión deseada.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Sitting Single Legged Hamstring Stretch
instructions: Once you've taken a seat in a crossed legged position, extend your right leg straight infront of you.
Next, lean your torso forward and reach your right foot with your right hand.
Hold for recommended period and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento de los isquiosurales sentado con una sola pierna

en: Once you've taken a seat in a crossed legged position, extend your right leg straight infront of you.
Next, lean your torso forward and reach your right foot with your right hand.
Hold for recommended period and swap sides.
es: Una vez que se haya sentado con las piernas cruzadas, extiende la pierna derecha recta frente a ti.
Luego, inclina el torso hacia adelante y alcanza el pie derecho con la mano derecha.
Mantén presionado durante el período recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Standing Leg Up Hamstring Stretch
instructions: Take a standing position in front of a bench, your feet should be shoulder width appart.
Next, take your left leg up on the bench so that your foot is flex and your leg is straight. Lean your torso forward and reach your left foot with your left hand.
Hold for recommened duration and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento de los isquiosurales con la pierna hacia arriba

en: Take a standing position in front of a bench, your feet should be shoulder width appart.
Next, take your left leg up on the bench so that your foot is flex and your leg is straight. Lean your torso forward and reach your left foot with your left hand.
Hold for recommened duration and swap sides.
es: Colóquese de pie frente a un banco, con los pies separados a la anchura de los hombros.
Luego, levanta la pierna izquierda sobre el banco para que el pie esté flexionado y la pierna recta. Inclina tu torso hacia adelante y alcanza tu pie izquierdo con tu mano izquierda.
Mantén presionado durante la duración recomendada y cambia de lado.

name: Sitting Reach Forward Hamstring Stretch
instructions: Take a seat on a matt with your legs straight infront of you and your torso upright.
Next, lean your torso forward and reach your feet with your hands.
Hold for recommended period.

name.es: Estiramiento de los isquiosurales sentado hacia adelante

en: Take a seat on a matt with your legs straight infront of you and your torso upright.
Next, lean your torso forward and reach your feet with your hands.
Hold for recommended period.
es: Siéntate sobre una colchoneta con las piernas estiradas frente a ti y el torso erguido.
Luego, inclina el torso hacia adelante y alcanza los pies con las manos.
Mantén durante el período recomendado.

name: Double Leg Lean-Back Quad Stretch
instructions: Take a kneeling position on a matt with your knees apart slightly.
Next, sit back between your feet and slowly lean back with your hands behind you for support. Be sure to keep your knees down.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento de cuádriceps inclinado hacia atrás con dos piernas

en: Take a kneeling position on a matt with your knees apart slightly.
Next, sit back between your feet and slowly lean back with your hands behind you for support. Be sure to keep your knees down.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Colóquese de rodillas sobre una colchoneta con las rodillas ligeramente separadas.
Luego, siéntate entre tus pies e inclínate lentamente hacia atrás con las manos detrás de usted para apoyarse. Asegúrate de mantener las rodillas dobladas.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Single Leg Lean-Back Quad Stretch
instructions: Lay down, face up on a mat with your legs flat on the floor.
Keeping your left leg straight the and bring your right foot towards the outside of your right hip.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento cuádruple inclinado hacia atrás con una sola pierna

en: Lay down, face up on a mat with your legs flat on the floor.
Keeping your left leg straight the and bring your right foot towards the outside of your right hip.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Acuéstate boca arriba sobre una colchoneta con las piernas apoyadas en el suelo.
Mantén la pierna izquierda estirada y lleve el pie derecho hacia la parte exterior de la cadera derecha.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Lying Quad Stretch
instructions: Lay on a mat, face down, with your legs fully extended and flat on the floor.

Next, bring your right foot towards your glute then take a hold of your right foot with your right hand so that your knee bends and your hips are extended towards the floor, stretching your thigh and hip flexors.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Lay on a mat, face down, with your legs fully extended and flat on the floor.

Next, bring your right foot towards your glute then take a hold of your right foot with your right hand so that your knee bends and your hips are extended towards the floor, stretching your thigh and hip flexors.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Acuéstate sobre una colchoneta, boca abajo, con las piernas completamente extendidas y apoyadas en el suelo.

A continuación, lleve el pie derecho hacia el glúteo y luego sujeta el pie derecho con la mano derecha para que la rodilla se dobla y las caderas se extienden hacia el suelo, estirando los flexores del muslo y la cadera.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Standing Quad Stretch
instructions: Adopt an upright standing position with your arms by your side. Next, bend your right knee (to a 90 degree angle) so that your ankle is directly behind your knee. Take hold of this ankle with your right hand and gently pull your ankle upward. Tip: To emphasise this stretch, push your knee down towards the ground and push your hips forward.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Adopt an upright standing position with your arms by your side. Next, bend your right knee (to a 90 degree angle) so that your ankle is directly behind your knee. Take hold of this ankle with your right hand and gently pull your ankle upward. Tip: To emphasise this stretch, push your knee down towards the ground and push your hips forward.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Adopta una posición erguida con los brazos a los lados. Luego, dobla la rodilla derecha (en un ángulo de 90 grados) de modo que el tobillo quede directamente detrás de la rodilla.
