Sujeta este tobillo con la mano derecha y neumático suavemente de él hacia arriba. Consejo: para enfatizar este estiramiento, empuja la rodilla hacia el suelo y empuja las caderas hacia adelante.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Kneeling Quad Stretch
instructions: To get into the starting position for this stretch, you need to drop to the bottom of a lunge position. So, take a big step to split your stance and descend so that your back knee meets the floor.
Lean forward so that your bodyweight is being driven onto your front foot and towards the floor through the extension of your pelvis.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: To get into the starting position for this stretch, you need to drop to the bottom of a lunge position. So, take a big step to split your stance and descend so that your back knee meets the floor.
Lean forward so that your bodyweight is being driven onto your front foot and towards the floor through the extension of your pelvis.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Para llegar a la posición inicial de este estiramiento, debes caer hasta el final de una posición de estocada. Entonces, da un gran paso para dividir tu postura y desciende hasta que tu rodilla trasera toque el suelo.
Inclínese hacia adelante de modo que el peso de tu cuerpo pase hacia el pie delantero y hacia el suelo a través de la extensión de la pelvis.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Squatting Achilles Stretch
instructions: Take a standing position, shoulder width stance with your torso upright.
Next, slowly squat down and ensure that your feet are flat on the floor and place your arms around the outside of your knees.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.

name.es: Estiramiento del tendón de Aquiles de sentadilla

en: Take a standing position, shoulder width stance with your torso upright.
Next, slowly squat down and ensure that your feet are flat on the floor and place your arms around the outside of your knees.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.
es: Coge una posición de pie, a la anchura de los hombros y con el torso erguido.
A continuación, agáchese lentamente y asegúrate de que los pies estén apoyados en el suelo y coloca los brazos alrededor de la parte exterior de las rodillas.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Seated Toe Pull Achilles Stretch (Bent Knee)
instructions: Once you have taken a seat on a mat with your legs straight in front of you, bend your knees slightly so that you and can comfortably reach the top of your feet with your hands.
Next, keeping your legs slightly bent gently pull your feet towards your shins.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.

name.en: Seated Toe Pull Achilles Stretch (Bent Knee)
name.es: Estiramiento del tendón de Aquiles con tracción del dedo del pie sentado (rodilla doblada)

en: Once you have taken a seat on a mat with your legs straight in front of you, bend your knees slightly so that you and can comfortably reach the top of your feet with your hands.
Next, keeping your legs slightly bent gently pull your feet towards your shins.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.
es: Una vez que te hayas sentado sobre una colchoneta con las piernas estiradas frente a ti, dobla ligeramente las rodillas para que puedas alcanzar cómodamente la parte superior de los pies con las manos.
A continuación, manteniendo las piernas ligeramente dobladas, neumático suavemente de los pies hacia las espinillas.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado.

aliases: Seated Toe Pull Achilles Stretch (Bent Knee)

name: Seated Toe Pull Calf Stretch
instructions: Once you've taken a seat in a crossed legged position, extend your right leg straight infront of you.
Next, lean your torso forward and reach your right foot with your right hand and gently pull your foot towards you.
Hold for recommended period and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento de pantorrilla sentado con puntera

en: Once you've taken a seat in a crossed legged position, extend your right leg straight infront of you.
Next, lean your torso forward and reach your right foot with your right hand and gently pull your foot towards you.
Hold for recommended period and swap sides.
es: Una vez que se haya sentado con las piernas cruzadas, extiende la pierna derecha recta frente a ti.
Luego, incline el torso hacia adelante, alcance el pie derecho con la mano derecha y neumático suavemente del pie hacia usted.
Mantén presionado durante el período recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Standing Toe Raised Calf Stretch
instructions: From a standing position slightly split stance (one foot in front of the other) keeping your front leg straight bend your back leg and lean your torso forward.
Next, lift your front foot towards you so that your heel is still on the floor and you feel the stretch in your calf. For support place your hands on you bent leg.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento de pantorrilla levantada con el dedo del pie de pie

en: From a standing position slightly split stance (one foot in front of the other) keeping your front leg straight bend your back leg and lean your torso forward.
Next, lift your front foot towards you so that your heel is still on the floor and you feel the stretch in your calf. For support place your hands on you bent leg.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Desde una posición de pie, postura ligeramente dividida (un pie delante del otro), manteniendo la pierna delantera recta, dobla la pierna trasera e incline el torso hacia adelante.
Luego, levanta el pie delantero hacia ti para que el talón todavía esté en el suelo y sientas el estiramiento en la pantorrilla. Para apoyarse, coloca las manos sobre la pierna doblada.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Standing Toe-Up Calf Stretch
instructions: Take a standing position with a slightly split stance (one foot in front of the other) facing a wall. Place you the toes of your front foot on the wall,  keeping your leg straight a slight bend your back leg.  For support place your hands on the wall.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento de pantorrilla de pie con las puntas de los pies hacia arriba

en: Take a standing position with a slightly split stance (one foot in front of the other) facing a wall. Place you the toes of your front foot on the wall,  keeping your leg straight a slight bend your back leg.  For support place your hands on the wall.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Colóquese de pie con una postura ligeramente dividida (un pie delante del otro) frente a una pared. Coloca los dedos del pie delantero en la pared, manteniendo la pierna recta y dobla ligeramente la pierna trasera. Para apoyarse, coloca las manos en la pared.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Box Glute Stretch
instructions: Set up a box/step/bench in front of you at the desired height. Stand upright with your arms beside your torso and adopt a shoulder-width stance. This will be your starting position.
Next, place your right shin ontop of the box so that your knee is bent at 45 degrees, lean your torso forwards and place your hands on the box for support.
Hold for recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Set up a box/step/bench in front of you at the desired height. Stand upright with your arms beside your torso and adopt a shoulder-width stance. This will be your starting position.
Next, place your right shin ontop of the box so that your knee is bent at 45 degrees, lean your torso forwards and place your hands on the box for support.
Hold for recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Coloca una caja/escalón/banco frente a ti a la altura deseada. Colócate de pie erguido con los brazos al lado del torso y adopta una postura a la anchura de los hombros. Esta es tu posición inicial.
A continuación, coloca la espinilla derecha encima de la caja de modo que la rodilla quede doblada a 45 grados, incline el torso hacia adelante y coloca las manos sobre la caja como apoyo.
Mantén presionado durante la duración recomendada y cambia de lado.

name: Lunge Side Stretch
instructions: To get into the starting position for this stretch, you need to drop to the bottom of a lunge position. So, take a big step with your right leg to split your stance and descend so that your back knee meets the floor.
Then, bring your left arm straight up to your head and lean to your right.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: To get into the starting position for this stretch, you need to drop to the bottom of a lunge position. So, take a big step with your right leg to split your stance and descend so that your back knee meets the floor.
Then, bring your left arm straight up to your head and lean to your right.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Para llegar a la posición inicial de este estiramiento, debes caer hasta el final de una posición de estocada. Entonces, da un gran paso con la pierna derecha para dividir tu postura y desciende hasta que tu rodilla trasera toque el suelo.
Luego, lleve el brazo izquierdo hacia la cabeza e inclínate hacia la derecha.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Seated Hip Twist
instructions: Take a wide stance and come down into a low squat.
Next, lean your torso forward and take a hold of the inside of your left ankle with your right arm and bring your shoulder to rest on the inside of your right knee.
Then bring your left arm up behind your head and turn your chest towards the ceiling.
Hold for recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Take a wide stance and come down into a low squat.
Next, lean your torso forward and take a hold of the inside of your left ankle with your right arm and bring your shoulder to rest on the inside of your right knee.
Then bring your left arm up behind your head and turn your chest towards the ceiling.
Hold for recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Adopta una postura amplia y póngase de sentadilla.
Luego, incline el torso hacia adelante y sujeta el interior del tobillo izquierdo con el brazo derecho y lleve el hombro hasta el interior de la rodilla derecha.
Luego, lleve el brazo izquierdo detrás de la cabeza y gire el pecho hacia el techo.
Mantén presionado durante la duración recomendada y cambia de lado.

name: Seated Knee In
instructions: Once you have taken a seat on a mat with your legs flat on the floor.
Keeping your left leg straight the and bring your right foot towards the outside of your right hip.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Once you have taken a seat on a mat with your legs flat on the floor.
Keeping your left leg straight the and bring your right foot towards the outside of your right hip.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Una vez que te hayas sentado sobre una colchoneta con las piernas apoyadas en el suelo.
Mantén la pierna izquierda estirada y lleve el pie derecho hacia la parte exterior de la cadera derecha.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Lying Leg Resting Glute Stretch
instructions: Lay on your back with your knees bent to a 90 degre angle.
Next, lift your right foot up and place your ankle across your left knee.

With your right arm reach through the gap you have just created with your legs and your left hand around the outside of your left thigh. Then pull your left thigh in towards your chest. Tip: Keep your shoulders and neck relaxed. Straighten your left leg if you wish to emphasise the movement or even stretch your left hamstring at the same time.
Hold for the recommended time and swap sides.
Variation: Foam Roll Glutes.

name.es: Estiramiento de glúteos en reposo con piernas acostadas

en: Lay on your back with your knees bent to a 90 degre angle.
Next, lift your right foot up and place your ankle across your left knee.

With your right arm reach through the gap you have just created with your legs and your left hand around the outside of your left thigh. Then pull your left thigh in towards your chest. Tip: Keep your shoulders and neck relaxed. Straighten your left leg if you wish to emphasise the movement or even stretch your left hamstring at the same time.
Hold for the recommended time and swap sides.
Variation: Foam Roll Glutes.
es: Acuéstese boca arriba con las rodillas dobladas en un ángulo de 90 grados.
Luego, levanta el pie derecho y coloca el tobillo sobre la rodilla izquierda.

Con el brazo derecho pase por el espacio que acaba de crear con las piernas y con la mano izquierda alrededor de la parte exterior del muslo izquierdo. Luego, jale el muslo izquierdo hacia el pecho. Consejo: Mantén los hombros y el cuello relajados. Esneumático la pierna izquierda si desea enfatizar el movimiento o incluso estirar el isquiosurales izquierdo al mismo tiempo.
Mantén presionado el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.
Variación: Glúteos en rollo de espuma.

name: Sitting Leg Resting Glute Stretch
instructions: Once you've taken a seat on a matt with your legs infront of you and a slight bend at the knee.
Next, keeping your leg bent take your right leg over your left leg.
Place your right arm down by your side for stability and place your left arm on your left leg.
Hold for recommended period of time and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento de glúteos en reposo con piernas sentadas

en: Once you've taken a seat on a matt with your legs infront of you and a slight bend at the knee.
Next, keeping your leg bent take your right leg over your left leg.
Place your right arm down by your side for stability and place your left arm on your left leg.
Hold for recommended period of time and swap sides.
es: Una vez que te hayas sentado sobre una colchoneta con las piernas frente a ti y una ligera flexión en la rodilla.
Luego, manteniendo la pierna doblada, coloca la pierna derecha sobre la izquierda.
Coloca tu brazo derecho a tu lado para mayor estabilidad y coloca tu brazo izquierdo sobre tu pierna izquierda.
Mantén presionado durante el período de tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Sitting Foot-To-Chest Glute Stretch
instructions: Once you've taken a seat, place your feet together.

Next, using your left hand bring your right leg towards your chest and take your right arm around your right knee and lock your hands together. To emphasise the stretch bring your bent leg towards your check.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento de glúteos sentado desde el pie hasta el pecho

en: Once you've taken a seat, place your feet together.

Next, using your left hand bring your right leg towards your chest and take your right arm around your right knee and lock your hands together. To emphasise the stretch bring your bent leg towards your check.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Una vez que te hayas sentado, junta los pies.

Luego, con la mano izquierda, lleve la pierna derecha hacia el pecho, rodee la rodilla derecha con el brazo derecho y junte las manos. Para enfatizar el estiramiento, lleve la pierna doblada hacia la cadera.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Sitting Knee-To-Chest Buttocks Stretch
instructions: Once you've taken a seat, place your legs straight in front of you.
Next, bring your right leg towards your chest and take your right foot over your left leg. To emphasise the stretch pull your bent leg towards your torso.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento de glúteos sentado desde la rodilla hasta el pecho

en: Once you've taken a seat, place your legs straight in front of you.
Next, bring your right leg towards your chest and take your right foot over your left leg. To emphasise the stretch pull your bent leg towards your torso.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Una vez que te hayas sentado, coloca las piernas estiradas frente a ti.
Luego, lleve la pierna derecha hacia el pecho y coloca el pie derecho sobre la pierna izquierda. Para enfatizar el estiramiento, neumático de la pierna doblada hacia el torso.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Sitting Feet-Together Reach Forward Stretch
instructions: Once you've taken a seated, place your feet together.
Next, lean your torso forward and place your hands on the floor in front of you. Ensure your back is straight and your shoulders are relaxed. To accentuate the stretch walk your hands forwards.
Hold for the recommended duration.

name.es: Sentado, con los pies juntos, estirando la mano hacia adelante

en: Once you've taken a seated, place your feet together.
Next, lean your torso forward and place your hands on the floor in front of you. Ensure your back is straight and your shoulders are relaxed. To accentuate the stretch walk your hands forwards.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Una vez que te hayas sentado, junta los pies.

Luego, inclina el torso hacia adelante y coloca las manos en el suelo frente a ti. Asegúrate de que tu espalda esté recta y tus hombros relajados. Para acentuar el estiramiento, camina con las manos hacia adelante.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Sitting Cross-Legged Reach Forward Stretch
instructions: Once you've taken a seat in a crossed legged position, lean your torso forward and place your hands flat on the floor. To accentuate the stretch walk your hands and place your forearms on the floor.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento hacia adelante sentado con las piernas cruzadas

en: Once you've taken a seat in a crossed legged position, lean your torso forward and place your hands flat on the floor. To accentuate the stretch walk your hands and place your forearms on the floor.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Una vez que te hayas sentado con las piernas cruzadas, inclina el torso hacia adelante y coloca las manos apoyadas en el suelo. Para acentuar el estiramiento camina con las manos y coloca los antebrazos en el suelo.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Standing Leg Resting Buttocks Stretch
instructions: Take a standing position parallel to a wall or pole.
Next, place your right hand on the pole and make a slight bend in your knees and place your left ankle on your right knee. To accentuate the stretch increase the bend in your supporting leg.
Hold for recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento de glúteos en reposo con piernas de pie

en: Take a standing position parallel to a wall or pole.
Next, place your right hand on the pole and make a slight bend in your knees and place your left ankle on your right knee. To accentuate the stretch increase the bend in your supporting leg.
Hold for recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Colóquese de pie paralelo a una pared o poste.

Luego, coloca tu mano derecha en el poste, dobla ligeramente las rodillas y coloca el tobillo izquierdo sobre la rodilla derecha. Para acentuar el estiramiento, aumente la flexión de la pierna de apoyo.
Mantén presionado durante la duración recomendada y cambia de lado.

name: Lying Leg Tuck Stretch
instructions: Your starting position will be on your hands and knees in an 'all-fours' position.
Once you are in this position, breathe normally and extend your right leg straight behind you and cross your left leg infront of you.
Next, lean your torso foward and plave your forearms flat on the floor.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento de flexión de piernas acostado

en: Your starting position will be on your hands and knees in an 'all-fours' position.
Once you are in this position, breathe normally and extend your right leg straight behind you and cross your left leg infront of you.
Next, lean your torso foward and plave your forearms flat on the floor.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Su posición inicial será sobre manos y rodillas en una posición de "cuatro patas".
Una vez que esté en esta posición, respire normalmente y extiende la pierna derecha hacia atrás y cruce la pierna izquierda frente a ti.
Luego, inclina el torso hacia adelante y apoya los antebrazos en el suelo.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Box Lizard Curl
instructions: Set up a box/step/bench in front of you at the desired height. Stand parallel to the box with your arms infront your torso and adopt a shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position.
Next, place your right foot ontop of the box and lean your torso forwards.
Hold for recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Set up a box/step/bench in front of you at the desired height. Stand parallel to the box with your arms infront your torso and adopt a shoulder width stance. This will be your starting position.
Next, place your right foot ontop of the box and lean your torso forwards.
Hold for recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Coloca una caja/escalón/banco frente a ti a la altura deseada. Colócate de pie paralelo a la caja con los brazos frente al torso y adopta una postura a la anchura de los hombros. Esta es tu posición inicial.
A continuación, coloca tu pie derecho encima de la caja e inclina tu torso hacia adelante.
Mantén presionado durante la duración recomendada y cambia de lado.

name: Hip and Quad Stretch
instructions: Your starting position will be on your hands and knees (in an 'all-fours' position). Lift your left leg up and off the mat and take hold of your ankle behind your body with your right hand.
At this point you should be feeling a stretch through your quadriceps and hip flexors.
Push your hips towards the floor to emphasise the stretch.
Hold for the recommended time and switch sides.

en: Your starting position will be on your hands and knees (in an 'all-fours' position). Lift your left leg up and off the mat and take hold of your ankle behind your body with your right hand.
At this point you should be feeling a stretch through your quadriceps and hip flexors.
Push your hips towards the floor to emphasise the stretch.
Hold for the recommended time and switch sides.
es: Su posición inicial será sobre manos y rodillas (en una posición de "cuatro patas"). Levanta la pierna izquierda fuera de la colchoneta y sujeta el tobillo detrás del cuerpo con la mano derecha.
En este punto deberías sentir un estiramiento en los cuádriceps y los flexores de la cadera.
Empuja tus caderas hacia el suelo para enfatizar el estiramiento.
Mantén presionado el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Deep Lunge Push And Twist
instructions: To get into the starting position for this stretch, you need to drop to the bottom of a lunge position. So, take a big step with your right leg to split your stance and descend so that your back knee meets the floor.
Next, place your left hand on the floor next to you.
Then lean your torso towards your left hand and place your right hand next to your left hand.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Empuja y giro de estocada profunda

en: To get into the starting position for this stretch, you need to drop to the bottom of a lunge position. So, take a big step with your right leg to split your stance and descend so that your back knee meets the floor.
Next, place your left hand on the floor next to you.
Then lean your torso towards your left hand and place your right hand next to your left hand.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Para llegar a la posición inicial de este estiramiento, debes caer hasta el final de una posición de estocada. Entonces, da un gran paso con la pierna derecha para dividir tu postura y desciende hasta que tu rodilla trasera toque el suelo.
Luego, coloca tu mano izquierda en el suelo junto a ti.
Luego inclina tu torso hacia tu mano izquierda y coloca tu mano derecha al lado de tu mano izquierda.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: TFL Twist
instructions: Lay down face up with your arms away from your body and your legs flat.
Next, bend your right leg and take it over your left leg so that your right foot is next to your left knee. Then bring your left foot towards your glute.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Lay down face up with your arms away from your body and your legs flat.
Next, bend your right leg and take it over your left leg so that your right foot is next to your left knee. Then bring your left foot towards your glute.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Acuéstese boca arriba con los brazos alejados del cuerpo y las piernas planas.
Luego, dobla la pierna derecha y colóquela sobre la pierna izquierda de modo que el pie derecho quede al lado de la rodilla izquierda. Luego lleva tu pie izquierdo hacia tu glúteo.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Wide Legged Side Bend
instructions: Once you have taken a seat on the floor, position your legs in a straddle ('V' shape) or as far apart as you can.
Keep your torso facing forward and lean your right shoulder towards your right leg.
Bring your right arm infront of you and your leg arm up over your head.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Once you have taken a seat on the floor, position your legs in a straddle ('V' shape) or as far apart as you can.
Keep your torso facing forward and lean your right shoulder towards your right leg.
Bring your right arm infront of you and your leg arm up over your head.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Una vez que se haya sentado en el suelo, coloca las piernas a horcajadas (forma de 'V') o lo más separadas que pueda.
Mantén el torso mirando hacia adelante e incline el hombro derecho hacia la pierna derecha.
Lleve el brazo derecho frente a ti y el brazo de la pierna por encima de la cabeza.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Wide Legged Side Fold
instructions: Once you have taken a seat on the floor, position your legs in a straddle ('V' shape) or as far apart as you can.
Lean your torso towards your right leg and place your hands on the floor either side of your leg about shoulder-width apart. Ensure your back straight and your shoulders are relaxed.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Once you have taken a seat on the floor, position your legs in a straddle ('V' shape) or as far apart as you can.
Lean your torso towards your right leg and place your hands on the floor either side of your leg about shoulder-width apart. Ensure your back straight and your shoulders are relaxed.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Una vez que se haya sentado en el suelo, coloca las piernas a horcajadas (forma de 'V') o lo más separadas que pueda.

Incline el torso hacia la pierna derecha y coloca las manos en el suelo a cada lado de la pierna, aproximadamente a la anchura de los hombros. Asegúrate de que tu espalda esté recta y tus hombros estén relajados.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Side Split Lunge Stretch
instructions: To get into the starting position for this stretch, you need to drop to the bottom of a lunge position. So, take a big step with your right leg to split your stance and descend so that your back knee meets the floor.
Lean your torso forward and place your forearms flat on the floor. Be sure to keep your elbows on the right side of your left foot.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: To get into the starting position for this stretch, you need to drop to the bottom of a lunge position. So, take a big step with your right leg to split your stance and descend so that your back knee meets the floor.
Lean your torso forward and place your forearms flat on the floor. Be sure to keep your elbows on the right side of your left foot.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Para llegar a la posición inicial de este estiramiento, debes caer hasta el final de una posición de estocada. Entonces, da un gran paso con la pierna derecha para dividir tu postura y desciende hasta que tu rodilla trasera toque el suelo.
Incline el torso hacia adelante y coloca los antebrazos apoyados en el suelo. Asegúrate de mantener los codos en el lado derecho del pie izquierdo.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Seated Half Lotus
instructions: Once you've taken a seat in a crossed legged position, lean your torso forward and place your hands on the floor in front of you. Ensure your back is straight and your shoulders are relaxed. To accentuate the stretch lean more with your torso walk your hand forwards.
Hold for the recommended duration.

en: Once you've taken a seat in a crossed legged position, lean your torso forward and place your hands on the floor in front of you. Ensure your back is straight and your shoulders are relaxed. To accentuate the stretch lean more with your torso walk your hand forwards.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Una vez que te hayas sentado con las piernas cruzadas, inclina el torso hacia adelante y coloca las manos en el suelo frente a ti. Asegúrate de que tu espalda esté recta y tus hombros relajados. Para acentuar el estiramiento, inclínate más con el torso y camina con la mano hacia adelante.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Lying Abductor Stretch
instructions: Lay on a mat, on your right side, with your right arm down supporting your upper body and your legs fully extended.
Next, bring your left foot towards your hips and place your foot flat on the floor in front of your right quad.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Lay on a mat, on your right side, with your right arm down supporting your upper body and your legs fully extended.
Next, bring your left foot towards your hips and place your foot flat on the floor in front of your right quad.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Acuéstate sobre una colchoneta, sobre tu lado derecho, con el brazo derecho hacia abajo apoyando la parte superior del cuerpo y las piernas completamente extendidas.
Luego, lleve el pie izquierdo hacia las caderas y coloca el pie plano en el suelo frente al cuádriceps derecho.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Leaning Abductor Stretch
instructions: Take a standing position next to a pole with your feet together and your right arm holding the pole.
Next, reach your left arm up above your head and take hold of the  pole.
Keeping your body aligned, lean your hips away from the pole
Hold for recommended period of time and swap sides.

en: Take a standing position next to a pole with your feet together and your right arm holding the pole.
Next, reach your left arm up above your head and take hold of the  pole.
Keeping your body aligned, lean your hips away from the pole
Hold for recommended period of time and swap sides.
es: Colóquese de pie junto a un poste con los pies juntos y el brazo derecho sosteniendo el poste.
Luego, levanta el brazo izquierdo por encima de la cabeza y sujeta el poste.
Manteniendo el cuerpo alineado, incline las caderas lejos del poste.
Mantén presionado durante el período de tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Foam Roller Hip Flexor Hang
instructions: Lay down on a mat with the foam roller placed under your lower back/top of your glutes, so that the top of your back it on the map and your hips are elevated.
Next, keep your left leg straight and relaxed, bring your right knee towards your torso and hold your knee with both hands. You should now feel the stretch in your left hip flector.
Hold for recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Colgar del flexor de la cadera con rodillo de espuma

en: Lay down on a mat with the foam roller placed under your lower back/top of your glutes, so that the top of your back it on the map and your hips are elevated.
Next, keep your left leg straight and relaxed, bring your right knee towards your torso and hold your knee with both hands. You should now feel the stretch in your left hip flector.
Hold for recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Acuéstese sobre una colchoneta con el rodillo de espuma colocado debajo de la parte inferior de la espalda/parte superior de los glúteos, de modo que la parte superior de la espalda esté en el mapa y las caderas queden elevadas.

A continuación, mantén la pierna izquierda recta y relajada, lleva la rodilla derecha hacia el torso y sujeta la rodilla con ambas manos. Ahora deberías sentir el estiramiento en el flector de la cadera izquierda.
Mantén presionado durante la duración recomendada y cambia de lado.

name: Standing Wide Legged Adductor Stretch (Toes Pointed Forward)
instructions: Take a wide stance with your torso upright and your feet forward.
Next, keep your legs straight, lean your torso forward untill your hands come to the floor.
Hold for recommended duration.

name.en: Standing Wide Legged Adductor Stretch (Toes Pointed Forward)
name.es: Estiramiento de aductores de pie con las piernas anchas (puntas de los pies apuntando hacia adelante)

en: Take a wide stance with your torso upright and your feet forward.
Next, keep your legs straight, lean your torso forward untill your hands come to the floor.
Hold for recommended duration.
es: Adopta una postura amplia con el torso erguido y los pies hacia adelante.
Luego, mantén las piernas rectas, inclina el torso hacia adelante hasta que tus manos lleguen al suelo.
Mantén presionado durante la duración recomendada.

aliases: Standing Wide Legged Adductor Stretch (Toes Pointed Forward)

name: Seated Wide Legged Adductor Stretch
instructions: Once you have taken a seat on the floor, position your legs in a straddle ('V' shape) or as far apart as you can.
Lean forward with your torso and place your hands on the floor in front of you, about shoulder width apart. Ensure your back is straight and your shoulders are relaxed.
Hold for the recommended duration.

name.es: Estiramiento de aductores sentado con las piernas anchas

en: Once you have taken a seat on the floor, position your legs in a straddle ('V' shape) or as far apart as you can.
Lean forward with your torso and place your hands on the floor in front of you, about shoulder width apart. Ensure your back is straight and your shoulders are relaxed.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Una vez que se haya sentado en el suelo, coloca las piernas a horcajadas (forma de 'V') o lo más separadas que pueda.
Inclínese hacia adelante con el torso y coloca las manos en el suelo frente a ti, aproximadamente a la anchura de los hombros. Asegúrate de que tu espalda esté recta y tus hombros relajados.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado.

name.es: Estiramiento de aductores de rodillas (boca abajo)

name: Standing Wide Knee Adductor Stretch
instructions: Take a wide stance with your torso upright and your feet forward.
Next, come down to a squat position keeping your torso upright. Place each hand on the inside of your knees and gently pull so that you feel the stretch through the adductors.
Hold for recommended duration.

name.es: Estiramiento de aductores de rodilla ancha de pie

en: Take a wide stance with your torso upright and your feet forward.
Next, come down to a squat position keeping your torso upright. Place each hand on the inside of your knees and gently pull so that you feel the stretch through the adductors.
Hold for recommended duration.
es: Adopta una postura amplia con el torso erguido y los pies hacia adelante.
Luego, baje a una posición de sentadilla manteniendo el torso erguido. Coloca cada mano en el interior de las rodillas y neumático suavemente para sentir el estiramiento a través de los aductores.
Mantén presionado durante la duración recomendada.

name: Seated Adductor Stretch (Feet Together)
instructions: Once you've taken a seat in an upright position, place your feet together, elbows over your knees and hold your ankles with your hands.
Next, lean your torso forward and apply slight pressure on your knees using your elbows. The increase in pressure will accentuate the stretch.
Hold for recommended duration.

en: Once you've taken a seat in an upright position, place your feet together, elbows over your knees and hold your ankles with your hands.
Next, lean your torso forward and apply slight pressure on your knees using your elbows. The increase in pressure will accentuate the stretch.
Hold for recommended duration.
es: Una vez que te hayas sentado en posición vertical, coloca los pies juntos, los codos sobre las rodillas y sujeta los tobillos con las manos.
A continuación, inclina el torso hacia adelante y aplica una ligera presión sobre las rodillas con los codos. El aumento de presión acentuará el estiramiento.
Mantén presionado durante la duración recomendada.

name: Sitting Rotational Hip Stretch
instructions: Once you've taken a seat in a crossed legged position, extend your right leg behind your body whilst keeping your knee at a 90-degree angle.
Next, lean your torso forward and place your forearms flat on the floor. Be sure to keep your elbows on the left side of your left foot, this will accentuate the stretch.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Once you've taken a seat in a crossed legged position, extend your right leg behind your body whilst keeping your knee at a 90-degree angle.
Next, lean your torso forward and place your forearms flat on the floor. Be sure to keep your elbows on the left side of your left foot, this will accentuate the stretch.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Una vez que se haya sentado con las piernas cruzadas, extiende la pierna derecha detrás del cuerpo mientras mantienes la rodilla en un ángulo de 90 grados.
Luego, inclina el torso hacia adelante y coloca los antebrazos apoyados en el suelo. Asegúrate de mantener los codos en el lado izquierdo del pie izquierdo, esto acentuará el estiramiento.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Arm-Up Rotator Cuff Stretch (With Stick)
instructions: From a standing position place your right hand at the top of the stick.
Next, take your right arm out to the side of your body and bend you arm to 90 degrees. Turn your wrist slightly so that the stick is behind your arm.
Then using your left arm pull the bottom of stick until you reach your desired stretch.
Hold for recommened time and swap sides.

name.es: Estiramiento del manguito rotador con el brazo hacia arriba (con bastón)

en: From a standing position place your right hand at the top of the stick.
Next, take your right arm out to the side of your body and bend you arm to 90 degrees. Turn your wrist slightly so that the stick is behind your arm.
Then using your left arm pull the bottom of stick until you reach your desired stretch.
Hold for recommened time and swap sides.
es: Desde una posición de pie, coloca tu mano derecha en la parte superior del palo.
Luego, lleve el brazo derecho hacia el costado del cuerpo y dóblelo 90 grados. Gire ligeramente la muñeca para que el palo quede detrás de tu brazo.
Luego, usando el brazo izquierdo, neumático de la parte inferior del palo hasta alcanzar el estiramiento deseado.
Mantén presionado durante el tiempo recomendado y cambia de lado.

name: Sandbag - Sit Up To Shoulder Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay down on your back on the floor bringing the dumbbells beside your chest. Keep your elbows at a 90-degree angle and your forearms perpendicular to the floor. Once here, keep your palms facing away from you, exhale and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale lift your shoulders off the floor towards your knees by contracting your abdominal muscles. Continue in this fashion until your torso is vertical to the floor and your chest is very close to your knees.

Without leaning backward or putting your posture into jeopardy, press the dumbbells above your head so that your arms are fully extended, yet slightly flexed/bent at your elbows. Make sure your palms are facing forward at this point
After a brief pause, inhale and return your body back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Crunches or Cable Crunches.

name.en: Sandbag - Sit Up To Shoulder Press
name.es: Sandbag - Sit up a press de hombros

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and lay down on your back on the floor bringing the dumbbells beside your chest. Keep your elbows at a 90-degree angle and your forearms perpendicular to the floor. Once here, keep your palms facing away from you, exhale and press the dumbbells towards the ceiling. This will be your starting position.

To initiate the movement, exhale lift your shoulders off the floor towards your knees by contracting your abdominal muscles. Continue in this fashion until your torso is vertical to the floor and your chest is very close to your knees.

Without leaning backward or putting your posture into jeopardy, press the dumbbells above your head so that your arms are fully extended, yet slightly flexed/bent at your elbows. Make sure your palms are facing forward at this point
After a brief pause, inhale and return your body back along the same path into the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Crunches or Cable Crunches.
es: Agarra una mancuerna en cada mano y recuéstate boca arriba en el suelo, llevando las mancuernas al lado de tu pecho. Mantén los codos en un ángulo de 90 grados y los antebrazos perpendiculares al suelo. Una vez aquí, mantén las palmas de las manos alejadas de ti, exhala y presiona las mancuernas hacia el techo. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala, levanta los hombros del suelo hacia las rodillas contrayendo los músculos abdominales. Continúa de esta manera hasta que tu torso esté vertical al suelo y tu pecho esté muy cerca de tus rodillas.

Sin inclinarse hacia atrás ni poner en peligro su postura, presione las mancuernas por encima de tu cabeza para que tus brazos estén completamente extendidos, pero ligeramente flexionados/doblados a la altura de los codos. Asegúrate de que tus palmas estén mirando hacia adelante en este punto.
Después de una breve pausa, inhala y regresa tu cuerpo por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repite el número recomendado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Abdominales o Abdominales con Cable.

aliases: Sandbag - Sit Up To Shoulder Press

name: Battle Ropes In And Out Waves

name.en: Battle Ropes In And Out Waves
name.es: Battle ropes con ondas hacia dentro y fuera

aliases: Battle Ropes In And Out Waves

name: Front Foot Elevated Split Squats Stretch

name.en: Front Foot Elevated Split Squats Stretch
name.es: Estiramiento de split squats elevadas con el pie delantero

aliases: Front Foot Elevated Split Squats Stretch

name.es: Estiramiento abdominal con pelota de ejercicio
Pelota de ejercicios - Estiramiento de la parte superior de la espalda
Estiramiento de la espalda baja con banda

name: Cross Body Lat Stretch - Against A Wall

name.en: Cross Body Lat Stretch - Against A Wall
name.es: Estiramiento lateral del cuerpo cruzado: contra una pared

aliases: Cross Body Lat Stretch - Against A Wall

name.es: Estiramiento del flexor de cadera con banda
Estiramiento de triceps: contra una pared
Estiramiento del pecho contra una pared
Estiramiento del sóleo contra la pared
Estiramiento de gemelo con punta del pie contra la pared

name: Seated Alternating Shoulder Press
instructions: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on a bench that is just of vertical (between 70-80 degrees). Bring the dumbbells up to the side of your shoulders so your elbows are flared out wide and at a 90 degree angle, your palms should be facing forward. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, press one of the dumbbells towards the ceiling until your elbow becomes fully extended (straight). Keep your other arm stationary in the starting position.
After a brief pause, return the dumbbell back along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the opposite side and alternate between arms.
Complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Alternating Shoulder Press or Alternating Cable Shoulder Press.

en: Grab a dumbbell in each hand and take a seat on a bench that is just of vertical (between 70-80 degrees). Bring the dumbbells up to the side of your shoulders so your elbows are flared out wide and at a 90 degree angle, your palms should be facing forward. This will be your starting position.
Whilst exhaling, press one of the dumbbells towards the ceiling until your elbow becomes fully extended (straight). Keep your other arm stationary in the starting position.
After a brief pause, return the dumbbell back along the same path to the starting position.
Repeat for the opposite side and alternate between arms.
Complete the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: Standing Alternating Shoulder Press or Alternating Cable Shoulder Press.
es: Coge una mancuerna en cada mano y siéntate en un banco que esté justo en posición vertical (entre 70 y 80 grados). Lleve las mancuernas a los lados de los hombros de modo que los codos queden abiertos y en un ángulo de 90 grados, con las palmas hacia adelante. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras exhala, presione una de las mancuernas hacia el techo hasta que el codo esté completamente extendido (recto). Mantén el otro brazo inmóvil en la posición inicial.
Después de una breve pausa, vuelve la mancuerna por el mismo camino hasta la posición inicial.
Repite para el lado opuesto y alterne entre brazos.
Completa la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.
Variaciones: Press de hombros alterno de pie o Press de hombros alterno con cable.

name: Wrist Roller
instructions: To begin, stand straight up grabbing a wrist roller using a pronated grip (palms facing down).  Your feet should be shoulder width apart.

Slowly lift both arms until they are fully extended and parallel to the floor in front of you.  Note: Make sure the rope is not wrapped around the roller.  Your entire body should be stationary except for the forearms.  This is the starting position.
Rotate one wrist at a time in an upward motion to bring the weight up to the bar by rolling the rope around the roller.
Once the weight has reached the bar, slowly begin to lower the weight back down by rotating the wrist in a downward motion until the weight reaches the starting position.
Repeat for the prescribed amount of repetitions in your program.

en: To begin, stand straight up grabbing a wrist roller using a pronated grip (palms facing down).  Your feet should be shoulder width apart.

Slowly lift both arms until they are fully extended and parallel to the floor in front of you.  Note: Make sure the rope is not wrapped around the roller.  Your entire body should be stationary except for the forearms.  This is the starting position.
Rotate one wrist at a time in an upward motion to bring the weight up to the bar by rolling the rope around the roller.
Once the weight has reached the bar, slowly begin to lower the weight back down by rotating the wrist in a downward motion until the weight reaches the starting position.
Repeat for the prescribed amount of repetitions in your program.
es: Para comenzar, colócate derecho agarrando un rodillo de muñeca con un agarre en pronación (con las palmas hacia abajo).  Tus pies deben estar separados al ancho de los hombros.

Levanta lentamente ambos brazos hasta que estén completamente extendidos y paralelos al suelo frente a ti.  Nota: Asegúrate de que la cuerda no esté enrollada alrededor del rodillo.  Todo tu cuerpo debe estar estacionario excepto los antebrazos.  Esta es la posición inicial.
Gire una muñeca a la vez con un movimiento hacia arriba para llevar el peso a la barra haciendo rodar la cuerda alrededor del rodillo.
Una vez que el peso haya llegado a la barra, comienza a bajar lentamente el peso girando la muñeca hacia abajo hasta que el peso alcance la posición inicial.
Repite la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones en su programa.

name: Tricep Extension with Chains
instructions: You will need two cable handle attachments and a flat bench, as well as chains, for this exercise. Clip the middle of the chains to the handles, and position yourself on the flat bench. Your elbows should be pointing straight up.
Begin by extending through the elbow, keeping your upper arm still, with your wrists pronated.
Pause at the lockout, and reverse the motion to return to the starting position.

en: You will need two cable handle attachments and a flat bench, as well as chains, for this exercise. Clip the middle of the chains to the handles, and position yourself on the flat bench. Your elbows should be pointing straight up.
Begin by extending through the elbow, keeping your upper arm still, with your wrists pronated.
Pause at the lockout, and reverse the motion to return to the starting position.
es: Necesitará dos accesorios de mango de cable y un banco plano, además de cadenas, para este ejercicio. Sujete la mitad de las cadenas a las manijas y colócate en el banco plano. Tus codos deben apuntar hacia arriba.
Comienza extendiendo el codo, manteniendo quieta la parte superior del brazo y con las muñecas en pronación.
Haz una pausa en el bloqueo e invierta el movimiento para regresar a la posición inicial.

name: Suspended Reverse Crunch
instructions: Secure a set of suspension straps with the handles hanging about a foot off of the ground. Move yourself into a pushup plank position facing away from the rack.
Place your feet into the handles. You should maintain a straight posture, not allowing the hips to sag. This will be your starting position.
Begin the movement by flexing the knees and hips, drawing the knees to your torso. As you do so, anteriorly tilt your pelvis, allowing your spine to flex.
At the top of the controlled motion, return to the starting position.

en: Secure a set of suspension straps with the handles hanging about a foot off of the ground. Move yourself into a pushup plank position facing away from the rack.
Place your feet into the handles. You should maintain a straight posture, not allowing the hips to sag. This will be your starting position.
Begin the movement by flexing the knees and hips, drawing the knees to your torso. As you do so, anteriorly tilt your pelvis, allowing your spine to flex.
At the top of the controlled motion, return to the starting position.
es: Asegure un juego de correas de suspensión con las manijas colgando aproximadamente a un pie del suelo. Colócate en una posición de plancha de flexión de espaldas a la rejilla.
Coloca los pies en las manijas. Debes mantener una postura recta, sin permitir que las caderas se doblen. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Comienza el movimiento flexionando las rodillas y las caderas, llevando las rodillas hacia el torso. Mientras lo hace, incline la pelvis hacia adelante, permitiendo que la columna se flexione.
En la parte superior del movimiento controlado, vuelve a la posición inicial.

name: Stride Jump Crossover
instructions: Stand to the side of a box with your inside foot on top of it, close to the edge.
Begin by swinging the arms upward as you push through the top leg, jumping upward as high as possible. Attempt to drive the opposite knee upward.
Land in the opposite position that you started, on the opposite side of the box. The foot that was initially on the box will now be on the ground, with the opposite foot now on the box.
Repeat the movement, crossing back over to the other side.

en: Stand to the side of a box with your inside foot on top of it, close to the edge.
Begin by swinging the arms upward as you push through the top leg, jumping upward as high as possible. Attempt to drive the opposite knee upward.
Land in the opposite position that you started, on the opposite side of the box. The foot that was initially on the box will now be on the ground, with the opposite foot now on the box.
Repeat the movement, crossing back over to the other side.
es: Párate al lado de una caja con el pie interior encima, cerca del borde.
Comienza balanceando los brazos hacia arriba mientras empuja la pierna superior, saltando lo más alto posible. Intente impulsar la rodilla opuesta hacia arriba.
Aterriza en la posición opuesta a la que empezaste, en el lado opuesto de la caja. El pie que inicialmente estaba en la caja ahora estará en el suelo, con el pie opuesto ahora en la caja.
Repite el movimiento, cruzando hacia el otro lado.

name: Standing Two-Arm Overhead Throw
instructions: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart holding a medicine ball in both hands.  To begin, reach the medicine ball deep behind your head as you bend the knees slightly and lean back.
Violently throw the ball forward, flexing at the hip and using your whole body to complete the movement.
The medicine ball can be thrown to a partner or to a wall, receiving it as it bounces back.

name.es: Lanzamiento por encima de la cabeza de pie a dos brazos

en: Stand with your feet shoulder width apart holding a medicine ball in both hands.  To begin, reach the medicine ball deep behind your head as you bend the knees slightly and lean back.
Violently throw the ball forward, flexing at the hip and using your whole body to complete the movement.
The medicine ball can be thrown to a partner or to a wall, receiving it as it bounces back.
es: Colócate con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros sosteniendo un balon medicinal con ambas manos.  Para comenzar, alcance el balon medicinal detrás de la cabeza mientras dobla ligeramente las rodillas y se inclina hacia atrás.
Lanza violentamente la pelota hacia adelante, flexionando la cadera y usando todo el cuerpo para completar el movimiento.
El balon medicinal se puedes lanzar a un compañero o a una pared, recibiéndolo a medida que rebota.

name: Sled Pull
instructions: To begin, load the sled with the desired weight and attach the pulling strap. You can pull with handles, use a harness, or attach the pulling strap to a weight belt.
Typically, sled drags are performed for a distance as fast as possible, from 30-100 feet. The sled can be pulled backwards to emphasize the quadriceps, or forwards to emphasize the posterior chain.
Whether pulling forwards or backwards, lean in the direction of travel and progress by extending through the hips and knees.

en: To begin, load the sled with the desired weight and attach the pulling strap. You can pull with handles, use a harness, or attach the pulling strap to a weight belt.
Typically, sled drags are performed for a distance as fast as possible, from 30-100 feet. The sled can be pulled backwards to emphasize the quadriceps, or forwards to emphasize the posterior chain.
Whether pulling forwards or backwards, lean in the direction of travel and progress by extending through the hips and knees.
es: Para empezar, carga el trineo con el peso deseado y fija la correa de tracción. Puede tirar con manijas, usar un arnés o sujetar la correa de tracción a un cinturón de pesas.

Por lo general, los arrastres de trineo se realizan a una distancia lo más rápido posible, de 30 a 100 pies. El trineo se puedes tirar hacia atrás para enfatizar los cuadriceps o hacia adelante para enfatizar la cadena posterior.
Ya sea tirando hacia adelante o hacia atrás, inclínate en la dirección de la marcha y progresa extendiendo las caderas y las rodillas.

name: Single-Leg Stride Jump
instructions: Stand to the side of a box with your inside foot on top of it, close to the edge.
Begin by swinging the arms upward as you push through the top leg, jumping upward as high as possible. Attempt to drive the opposite knee upward.
Land in the same position that you started, using your inside leg to decelerate the impact.

name.es: Salto con zancada con una sola pierna

en: Stand to the side of a box with your inside foot on top of it, close to the edge.
Begin by swinging the arms upward as you push through the top leg, jumping upward as high as possible. Attempt to drive the opposite knee upward.
Land in the same position that you started, using your inside leg to decelerate the impact.
es: Párate al lado de una caja con el pie interior encima, cerca del borde.
Comienza balanceando los brazos hacia arriba mientras empuja la pierna superior, saltando lo más alto posible. Intente impulsar la rodilla opuesta hacia arriba.
Aterriza en la misma posición en la que empezaste, usando tu pierna interior para desacelerar el impacto.

name: Single-Leg Hop Progression
instructions: Arrange a line of cones in front of you. Assume a relaxed standing position, balanced on one leg. Raise the knee of your opposite leg. This will be your starting position.
Hop forward, jumping and landing with the same leg over the cone.
Use a countermovement jump to hop from cone to cone.
At the end, turn around and go back on the other leg.

name.es: Progresión de salto con una sola pierna

en: Arrange a line of cones in front of you. Assume a relaxed standing position, balanced on one leg. Raise the knee of your opposite leg. This will be your starting position.
Hop forward, jumping and landing with the same leg over the cone.
Use a countermovement jump to hop from cone to cone.
At the end, turn around and go back on the other leg.
es: Coloca una línea de conos frente a ti. Asuma una posición de pie relajada, en equilibrio sobre una pierna. Levanta la rodilla de la pierna opuesta. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Salta hacia adelante, saltando y aterrizando con la misma pierna sobre el cono.
Utilice un salto de contramovimiento para saltar de un cono a otro.
Al final, date la vuelta y regresa con la otra pierna.

name: Single-Cone Sprint Drill
instructions: This drill teaches quick foot action. You need a single cone. Begin standing next to the cone with one arm back and one arm forward.
Chop the feet as quickly as possible, blocking with the arms. Circle the cone, keep your knees up, with violent foot action.
Rest after three trips around the cone.

name.es: Ejercicio de velocidad de un solo cono

en: This drill teaches quick foot action. You need a single cone. Begin standing next to the cone with one arm back and one arm forward.
Chop the feet as quickly as possible, blocking with the arms. Circle the cone, keep your knees up, with violent foot action.
Rest after three trips around the cone.
es: Este ejercicio enseña una acción rápida del pie. Necesitas un solo cono. Comienza de pie junto al cono con un brazo hacia atrás y otro hacia adelante.
Pica los pies lo más rápido posible, bloqueando con los brazos. Rodea el cono, mantén las rodillas levantadas, con acción violenta del pie.
Descanse después de tres vueltas alrededor del cono.

name: Side to Side Box Shuffle
instructions: Stand to one side of the box with your left foot resting on the middle of it.
To begin, jump up and over to the other side of the box, landing with your right foot on top of the box and your left foot on the floor. Swing your arms to aid your movement.
Continue shuffling back and forth across the box.

en: Stand to one side of the box with your left foot resting on the middle of it.
To begin, jump up and over to the other side of the box, landing with your right foot on top of the box and your left foot on the floor. Swing your arms to aid your movement.
Continue shuffling back and forth across the box.
es: Párate a un lado de la caja con el pie izquierdo apoyado en el medio.
Para comenzar, salta hacia el otro lado de la caja, aterrizando con el pie derecho encima de la caja y el pie izquierdo en el suelo. Balancea los brazos para ayudar en tu movimiento.
Continúa barajando hacia adelante y hacia atrás a través de la caja.

name: Seated Head Harness Neck Resistance
instructions: Place a neck strap on the floor at the end of a flat bench.  Once you have selected the weights, sit at the end of the flat bench with your feet wider than shoulder width apart from each other.  Your toes should be pointed out.

Slowly move your torso forward until it is almost parallel with the floor.  Using both hands, securely position the neck strap around your head.  Tip:  Make sure the weights are still lying on the floor to prevent any strain on the neck.  Now grab the weight with both hands while elevating your torso back until it is almost perpendicular to the floor.  Note: Your head and torso needs to be slightly tilted forward to perform this exercise.
Now place both hands on top of your knees.  This is the starting position.
Slowly lower your neck down until your chin touches the upper part of your chest while breathing in.
While exhaling, bring your neck back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Caution: This exercise puts a lot of stress on the neck muscles and should be approached with caution.  Any sudden jerk or movement can cause you to strain a neck muscle.  It is best to practice the form at first without any weights to get used to the movements required for this exercise.

name.es: Resistencia de cuello sentado con arnes de cabeza

en: Place a neck strap on the floor at the end of a flat bench.  Once you have selected the weights, sit at the end of the flat bench with your feet wider than shoulder width apart from each other.  Your toes should be pointed out.

Slowly move your torso forward until it is almost parallel with the floor.  Using both hands, securely position the neck strap around your head.  Tip:  Make sure the weights are still lying on the floor to prevent any strain on the neck.  Now grab the weight with both hands while elevating your torso back until it is almost perpendicular to the floor.  Note: Your head and torso needs to be slightly tilted forward to perform this exercise.
Now place both hands on top of your knees.  This is the starting position.
Slowly lower your neck down until your chin touches the upper part of your chest while breathing in.
While exhaling, bring your neck back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Caution: This exercise puts a lot of stress on the neck muscles and should be approached with caution.  Any sudden jerk or movement can cause you to strain a neck muscle.  It is best to practice the form at first without any weights to get used to the movements required for this exercise.
es: Coloca una correa para el cuello en el suelo al final de un banco plano.  Una vez que haya seleccionado las pesas, siéntate en el extremo del banco plano con los pies más separados que el ancho de los hombros.  Debes señalar los dedos de tus pies.

Mueve lentamente el torso hacia adelante hasta que quede casi paralelo al suelo.  Usando ambas manos, coloca firmemente la correa para el cuello alrededor de la cabeza.  Consejo: asegúrate de que las pesas todavía estén en el suelo para evitar tensiones en el cuello.  Ahora agarra el peso con ambas manos mientras elevas el torso hacia atrás hasta que quede casi perpendicular al suelo.  Nota: Para realizar este ejercicio, la cabeza y el torso deben estar ligeramente inclinados hacia adelante.
Ahora coloca ambas manos encima de tus rodillas.  Esta es la posición inicial.
Baja lentamente el cuello hasta que la barbilla toque la parte superior del pecho mientras inhala.
Mientras exhala, lleve el cuello a la posición inicial.
Repite hasta la cantidad recomendada de repeticiones.

Precaución: este ejercicio ejerce mucha presión sobre los músculos del cuello y debe realizarse con precaución.  Cualquier sacudida o movimiento repentino puedes provocar una distensión en un músculo del cuello.  Lo mejor es practicar la forma al principio sin pesas para acostumbrarse a los movimientos necesarios para este ejercicio.

name: Heavy Bag Thrust
instructions: Utilize a heavy bag for this exercise. Assume an upright stance next to the bag, with your feet staggered, fairly wide apart. Place your hand on the bag at about chest height. This will be your starting position.
Begin by twisting at the waist, pushing the bag forward as hard as possible. Perform this move quickly, pushing the bag away from your body.
Receive the bag as it swings back by reversing these steps.

en: Utilize a heavy bag for this exercise. Assume an upright stance next to the bag, with your feet staggered, fairly wide apart. Place your hand on the bag at about chest height. This will be your starting position.
Begin by twisting at the waist, pushing the bag forward as hard as possible. Perform this move quickly, pushing the bag away from your body.
Receive the bag as it swings back by reversing these steps.
es: Utilice una bolsa pesada para este ejercicio. Asuma una postura erguida junto a la bolsa, con los pies escalonados y bastante separados. Coloca su mano sobre la bolsa aproximadamente a la altura del pecho. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Comienza girando la cintura, empujando la bolsa hacia adelante lo más fuerte posible. Realiza este movimiento rápidamente, alejando la bolsa de el cuerpo.
Reciba la bolsa mientras retrocede invirtiendo estos pasos.

name: Box Jump (Multiple Response)
instructions: Stand facing a plyo box about an arm's length away, feet hip-width apart, arms relaxed at the sides.
Drop quickly into a quarter-squat and swing the arms back, loading the hips and knees.
Explode upward, swinging the arms forward and pulling the knees up to land softly with both feet on top of the box. Land in a quarter-squat — do not lock the knees.
Stand tall on the box, then immediately jump back down and absorb the landing in a quarter-squat.
Without pausing, rebound straight back into the next box jump. Continue without rest for the prescribed reps.

en: Stand facing a plyo box about an arm's length away, feet hip-width apart, arms relaxed at the sides.
Drop quickly into a quarter-squat and swing the arms back, loading the hips and knees.
Explode upward, swinging the arms forward and pulling the knees up to land softly with both feet on top of the box. Land in a quarter-squat — do not lock the knees.
Stand tall on the box, then immediately jump back down and absorb the landing in a quarter-squat.
Without pausing, rebound straight back into the next box jump. Continue without rest for the prescribed reps.
es: De pie frente al cajón a un brazo de distancia, pies a la anchura de la cadera y brazos relajados.
Baja rápido a un cuarto de sentadilla y lleva los brazos atrás, cargando cadera y rodillas.
Salta hacia arriba con explosividad, lanzando los brazos al frente y subiendo las rodillas para aterrizar con los dos pies sobre el cajón. Aterriza en cuarto de sentadilla — no bloquees las rodillas.
Extiéndete arriba sobre el cajón y baja de inmediato al suelo, absorbiendo el aterrizaje en cuarto de sentadilla.
Sin pausa, vuelve a saltar al cajón. Continúa sin descanso durante las repeticiones marcadas.

sourceClip.title: Box Jump – Multiple Response on DC Blocks

name: Bear Crawl Sled Drags
instructions: Wearing either a harness or a loose weight belt, attach the chain to the back so that you will be facing away from the sled. Bend down so that your hands are on the ground. Your back should be flat and knees bent. This is your starting position.
Begin by driving with legs, alternating left and right. Use your hands to maintain balance and to help pull. Try to keep your back flat as you move over a given distance.

name.es: Arrastre de trineo en bear crawl

en: Wearing either a harness or a loose weight belt, attach the chain to the back so that you will be facing away from the sled. Bend down so that your hands are on the ground. Your back should be flat and knees bent. This is your starting position.
Begin by driving with legs, alternating left and right. Use your hands to maintain balance and to help pull. Try to keep your back flat as you move over a given distance.
es: Con un arnés o un cinturón de peso suelto, coloca la cadena en la parte posterior de modo que quede de espaldas al trineo. Inclínate para que tus manos estén en el suelo. Tu espalda debe estar plana y las rodillas dobladas. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Comienza conduciendo con las piernas, alternando izquierda y derecha. Utilice las manos para mantener el equilibrio y ayudar a tirar. Trate de mantener la espalda plana mientras recorre una distancia determinada.

name: Supine Two-Arm Overhead Throw
instructions: Lay on the ground on your back with your knees bent.
Hold the ball with both hands, extending the arms fully behind your head. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement at the shoulder, throwing the ball directly forward of you as you sit up, attempting to go for maximum distance.
The ball can be thrown to a partner or bounced off of a wall.

name.es: Lanzamiento supino por encima de la cabeza a dos brazos

en: Lay on the ground on your back with your knees bent.
Hold the ball with both hands, extending the arms fully behind your head. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement at the shoulder, throwing the ball directly forward of you as you sit up, attempting to go for maximum distance.
The ball can be thrown to a partner or bounced off of a wall.
es: Túmbate en el suelo boca arriba con las rodillas dobladas.
Sostenga la pelota con ambas manos, extendiendo los brazos completamente detrás de la cabeza. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inicie el movimiento en el hombro, lanzando la pelota directamente hacia adelante mientras se sienta, intentando recorrer la distancia máxima.
La pelota se puedes lanzar a un compañero o rebotar en una pared.

name: Supine One-Arm Overhead Throw
instructions: Lay on the ground on your back with your knees bent. Hold the ball with one hand, extending the arm fully behind your head. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement at the shoulder, throwing the ball directly forward of you as you sit up, attempting to go for maximum distance.
The ball can be thrown to a partner or bounced off of a wall.

name.es: Lanzamiento supino por encima de la cabeza a un brazo

en: Lay on the ground on your back with your knees bent. Hold the ball with one hand, extending the arm fully behind your head. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement at the shoulder, throwing the ball directly forward of you as you sit up, attempting to go for maximum distance.
The ball can be thrown to a partner or bounced off of a wall.
es: Túmbate en el suelo boca arriba con las rodillas dobladas. Sostenga la pelota con una mano, extendiendo el brazo completamente detrás de la cabeza. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inicie el movimiento en el hombro, lanzando la pelota directamente hacia adelante mientras se sienta, intentando recorrer la distancia máxima.
La pelota se puedes lanzar a un compañero o rebotar en una pared.

name: Supine Chest Throw
instructions: This drill is great for chest passes when you lack a partner or a wall of sufficient strength. Lay on the ground on your back with your knees bent.
Begin with the ball on your chest, held with both hands on the bottom.
Explode up, extending through the elbow to throw the ball directly above you as high as possible.
Catch the ball with both hands as it comes down.

en: This drill is great for chest passes when you lack a partner or a wall of sufficient strength. Lay on the ground on your back with your knees bent.
Begin with the ball on your chest, held with both hands on the bottom.
Explode up, extending through the elbow to throw the ball directly above you as high as possible.
Catch the ball with both hands as it comes down.
es: Este ejercicio es ideal para pases de pecho cuando te falta un compañero o una pared con suficiente fuerza. Túmbate en el suelo boca arriba con las rodillas dobladas.
Comienza con la pelota en el pecho, sostenida con ambas manos en la parte inferior.
Explota hacia arriba, extendiéndote a través del codo para lanzar la pelota directamente sobre ti lo más alto posible.
Atrapa la pelota con ambas manos mientras cae.

name: Return Push from Stance
instructions: You will need a partner for this drill.
Begin in an athletic 2 or 3 point stance.
At the signal, move into a position to receive the pass from your partner.
Catch the medicine ball with both hands and immediately throw it back to your partner.
You can modify this drill by running different routes.

name.es: Empuje de retorno desde la postura

en: You will need a partner for this drill.
Begin in an athletic 2 or 3 point stance.
At the signal, move into a position to receive the pass from your partner.
Catch the medicine ball with both hands and immediately throw it back to your partner.
You can modify this drill by running different routes.
es: Necesitará un compañero para este ejercicio.
Comienza en una postura atlética de 2 o 3 puntos.
A la señal, colócate en una posición para recibir el pase de tu compañero.
Atrapa el balon medicinal con ambas manos e inmediatamente tíralo a tu compañero.
Puedes modificar este ejercicio ejecutando diferentes rutas.

name: One-Arm Medicine Ball Slam
instructions: Start in a standing position with a staggered, athletic stance. Hold a medicine ball in one hand, on the same side as your back leg. This will be your starting position.
Begin by winding the arm, raising the medicine ball above your head. As you do so, extend through the hips, knees, and ankles to load up for the slam.
At peak extension, flex the shoulders, spine, and hips to throw the ball hard into the ground directly in front of you.
Catch the ball on the bounce and continue for the desired number of repetitions.

name.es: Golpe con balon medicinal con un brazo

en: Start in a standing position with a staggered, athletic stance. Hold a medicine ball in one hand, on the same side as your back leg. This will be your starting position.
Begin by winding the arm, raising the medicine ball above your head. As you do so, extend through the hips, knees, and ankles to load up for the slam.
At peak extension, flex the shoulders, spine, and hips to throw the ball hard into the ground directly in front of you.
Catch the ball on the bounce and continue for the desired number of repetitions.
es: Comienza de pie con una postura atlética y escalonada. Sostenga un balon medicinal en una mano, del mismo lado que la pierna trasera. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Comienza enrollando el brazo, levantando el balon medicinal por encima de la cabeza. Mientras lo haces, extiende las caderas, las rodillas y los tobillos para prepararte para el golpe.
En la extensión máxima, flexione los hombros, la columna y las caderas para lanzar la pelota con fuerza al suelo directamente frente a ti.
Atrapa la pelota cuando rebote y continúa durante el número deseado de repeticiones.

name: Medicine Ball Throw with Sprint
instructions: Begin in an athletic stance with the knees bent, hips back, and back flat. Hold the medicine ball near your legs. This will be your starting position.
While taking your first step draw the medicine ball into your chest.
As you take the second step, explosively push the ball forward, immediately sprinting for 10 yards after the release. If you are really fast, you can catch your own pass!

name.es: Lanzamiento de balon medicinal con sprint

en: Begin in an athletic stance with the knees bent, hips back, and back flat. Hold the medicine ball near your legs. This will be your starting position.
While taking your first step draw the medicine ball into your chest.
As you take the second step, explosively push the ball forward, immediately sprinting for 10 yards after the release. If you are really fast, you can catch your own pass!
es: Comienza en una postura atlética con las rodillas dobladas, las caderas hacia atrás y la espalda plana. Sostenga el balon medicinal cerca de las piernas. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras das el primer paso, lleva el balon medicinal hacia tu pecho.
Al dar el segundo paso, empuja explosivamente la pelota hacia adelante, corriendo inmediatamente 10 yardas después del lanzamiento. ¡Si eres realmente rápido, podrás atrapar tu propio pase!

name: Medicine Ball Throw; Medicine Ball Snap
instructions: Begin in a three point stance, squatted down with your back flat and one hand on the ground. Place the medicine ball directly in front of you.
To begin, take your first step as you pull the ball to your chest, positioning both hands to prepare for the throw.
As you execute the second step, explosively release the ball forward as hard as possible.

name.en: Medicine Ball Throw; Medicine Ball Snap
name.es: Lanzamiento de balon medicinal; snap con balon medicinal

en: Begin in a three point stance, squatted down with your back flat and one hand on the ground. Place the medicine ball directly in front of you.
To begin, take your first step as you pull the ball to your chest, positioning both hands to prepare for the throw.
As you execute the second step, explosively release the ball forward as hard as possible.
es: Comienza en una postura de tres puntos, en cuclillas con la espalda recta y una mano en el suelo. Coloca el balon medicinal directamente frente a ti.
Para comenzar, da el primer paso mientras tiras la pelota hacia tu pecho, posicionando ambas manos para prepararte para el lanzamiento.
Mientras ejecutas el segundo paso, lanza explosivamente la pelota hacia adelante lo más fuerte posible.

aliases: Medicine Ball Throw; Medicine Ball Snap

name: Medicine Ball Throw
instructions: Begin standing while facing a wall or a partner.
Using both hands, position the ball behind your head, stretching as much as possible, and forcefully throw the ball forward.

Ensure that you follow your throw through, being prepared to receive your rebound from your throw. If you are throwing against the wall, make sure that you stand close enough to the wall to receive the rebound, and aim a little higher than you would with a partner.

en: Begin standing while facing a wall or a partner.
Using both hands, position the ball behind your head, stretching as much as possible, and forcefully throw the ball forward.

Ensure that you follow your throw through, being prepared to receive your rebound from your throw. If you are throwing against the wall, make sure that you stand close enough to the wall to receive the rebound, and aim a little higher than you would with a partner.
es: Comienza de pie frente a una pared o a un compañero.
Usando ambas manos, coloca el balón detrás de la cabeza, estirándose lo más posible y láncelo con fuerza hacia adelante.

Asegúrate de seguir tu lanzamiento y estar preparado para recibir el rebote de tu lanzamiento. Si estás lanzando contra la pared, asegúrate de pararte lo suficientemente cerca de la pared para recibir el rebote y apunta un poco más alto de lo que lo harías con un compañero.

name: Medicine Ball Scoop Throw
instructions: Assume a semisquat stance with a medicine ball in your hands. Your arms should hang so the ball is near your feet.
Begin by thrusting the hips forward as you extend through the legs, jumping up.
As you do, swing your arms up and over your head, keeping them extended, releasing the ball at the peak of your movement. The goal is to throw the ball the greatest distance behind you.

en: Assume a semisquat stance with a medicine ball in your hands. Your arms should hang so the ball is near your feet.
Begin by thrusting the hips forward as you extend through the legs, jumping up.
