As you do, swing your arms up and over your head, keeping them extended, releasing the ball at the peak of your movement. The goal is to throw the ball the greatest distance behind you.
es: Asuma una postura de semisentadilla con un balon medicinal en las manos. Tus brazos deben colgar de modo que la pelota esté cerca de tus pies.
Comienza empujando las caderas hacia adelante mientras extiende las piernas, saltando.

Mientras lo haces, mueve los brazos hacia arriba y por encima de la cabeza, manteniéndolos extendidos y soltando la pelota en el punto máximo de tu movimiento. El objetivo es lanzar la pelota a la mayor distancia detrás de ti.

name: Medicine Ball Full Twist
instructions: For this exercise you will need a medicine ball and a partner. Stand back to back with your partner, spaced 2-3 feet apart. This will be your starting position.
Hold the ball in front of the trunk. Open the hips and turn the shoulders at the same time as your partner.
For full rotation, you and your partner should twist in the same direction, i.e. counter-clockwise.
Pass the ball to your partner, and both of you can now twist in the opposite direction to repeat the procedure.

en: For this exercise you will need a medicine ball and a partner. Stand back to back with your partner, spaced 2-3 feet apart. This will be your starting position.
Hold the ball in front of the trunk. Open the hips and turn the shoulders at the same time as your partner.
For full rotation, you and your partner should twist in the same direction, i.e. counter-clockwise.
Pass the ball to your partner, and both of you can now twist in the opposite direction to repeat the procedure.
es: Para este ejercicio necesitarás un balon medicinal y un compañero. Colócate espalda con espalda con tu compañero, con una separación de 2 a 3 pies. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Sostenga la pelota frente al tronco. Abre las caderas y gira los hombros al mismo tiempo que tu pareja.
Para una rotación completa, ti y tu compañero deben girar en la misma dirección, es decir, en el sentido contrario a las agujas del reloj.
Pase la pelota a tu compañero y ahora ambos podrán girar en la dirección opuesta para repetir el procedimiento.

name: Medicine Ball Chest Pass
instructions: You will need a partner for this exercise. Lacking one, this movement can be performed against a wall.
Begin facing your partner holding the medicine ball at your torso with both hands.
Pull the ball to your chest, and reverse the motion by extending through the elbows. For sports applications, you can take a step as you throw.
Your partner should catch the ball, and throw it back to you.
Receive the throw with both hands at chest height.

name.es: Pase de pecho con balon medicinal

en: You will need a partner for this exercise. Lacking one, this movement can be performed against a wall.
Begin facing your partner holding the medicine ball at your torso with both hands.
Pull the ball to your chest, and reverse the motion by extending through the elbows. For sports applications, you can take a step as you throw.
Your partner should catch the ball, and throw it back to you.
Receive the throw with both hands at chest height.
es: Necesitará un compañero para este ejercicio. A falta de él, este movimiento se puedes realizar contra una pared.
Comienza frente a tu compañero sosteniendo el balon medicinal en el torso con ambas manos.
Tire de la pelota hacia el pecho e invierta el movimiento extendiéndola a través de los codos. Para aplicaciones deportivas, puedes dar un paso mientras lanzas.
Tu compañero debe atrapar la pelota y devolvértela.
Recibir el lanzamiento con ambas manos a la altura del pecho.

name: Kneeling Medicine Ball Throw
instructions: Begin in a kneeling position facing a wall or utilize a partner. Hold the ball with both hands tight into the chest.
Execute the pass by exploding forward and outward with the hips while pushing the ball as hard as possible.
Follow through by falling forward, catching yourself with your hands.
Immediately return to an upright position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name.es: Lanzamiento de balon medicinal de rodillas

en: Begin in a kneeling position facing a wall or utilize a partner. Hold the ball with both hands tight into the chest.
Execute the pass by exploding forward and outward with the hips while pushing the ball as hard as possible.
Follow through by falling forward, catching yourself with your hands.
Immediately return to an upright position. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
es: Comienza arrodillado frente a una pared o utilice un compañero. Sostenga la pelota con ambas manos apretada contra el pecho.
Ejecute el pase explotando hacia adelante y hacia afuera con las caderas mientras empuja el balón lo más fuerte posible.
Continúa cayendo hacia adelante y sosteniéndose con las manos.
Vuelve inmediatamente a una posición vertical. Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones.

name: Chest Push with Run Release
instructions: Begin in an athletic stance with the knees bent, hips back, and back flat. Hold the medicine ball near your legs. This will be your starting position.
While taking your first step draw the medicine ball into your chest.
As you take the second step, explosively push the ball forward, immediately sprinting for 10 yards after the release. If you are really fast, you can catch your own pass!

name.es: Empuje de pecho con liberación de carrera

en: Begin in an athletic stance with the knees bent, hips back, and back flat. Hold the medicine ball near your legs. This will be your starting position.
While taking your first step draw the medicine ball into your chest.
As you take the second step, explosively push the ball forward, immediately sprinting for 10 yards after the release. If you are really fast, you can catch your own pass!
es: Comienza en una postura atlética con las rodillas dobladas, las caderas hacia atrás y la espalda plana. Sostenga el balon medicinal cerca de las piernas. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Mientras das el primer paso, lleva el balon medicinal hacia tu pecho.
Al dar el segundo paso, empuja explosivamente la pelota hacia adelante, corriendo inmediatamente 10 yardas después del lanzamiento. ¡Si eres realmente rápido, podrás atrapar tu propio pase!

name: Catch and Overhead Throw
instructions: Begin standing while facing a wall or a partner.
Using both hands, position the ball behind your head, stretching as much as possible, and forcefully throw the ball forward.

Ensure that you follow your throw through, being prepared to receive your rebound from your throw. If you are throwing against the wall, make sure that you stand close enough to the wall to receive the rebound, and aim a little higher than you would with a partner.

name.es: Atrapar y lanzar por encima de la cabeza

en: Begin standing while facing a wall or a partner.
Using both hands, position the ball behind your head, stretching as much as possible, and forcefully throw the ball forward.

Ensure that you follow your throw through, being prepared to receive your rebound from your throw. If you are throwing against the wall, make sure that you stand close enough to the wall to receive the rebound, and aim a little higher than you would with a partner.
es: Comienza de pie frente a una pared o a un compañero.
Usando ambas manos, coloca el balón detrás de la cabeza, estirándose lo más posible y láncelo con fuerza hacia adelante.

Asegúrate de seguir tu lanzamiento y estar preparado para recibir el rebote de tu lanzamiento. Si estás lanzando contra la pared, asegúrate de pararte lo suficientemente cerca de la pared para recibir el rebote y apunta un poco más alto de lo que lo harías con un compañero.

name: Backward Medicine Ball Throw
instructions: This exercise is best done with a partner. If you lack a partner, the ball can be thrown and retrieved or thrown against a wall.
Begin standing a few meters in front of your partner, both facing the same direction. Begin holding the ball between your legs.
Squat down and then forcefully reverse direction, coming to full extension and you toss the ball over your head to your partner.
Your partner can then roll the ball back to you. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

name.es: Lanzamiento de balon medicinal hacia atrás

en: This exercise is best done with a partner. If you lack a partner, the ball can be thrown and retrieved or thrown against a wall.
Begin standing a few meters in front of your partner, both facing the same direction. Begin holding the ball between your legs.
Squat down and then forcefully reverse direction, coming to full extension and you toss the ball over your head to your partner.
Your partner can then roll the ball back to you. Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
es: Este ejercicio se realiza mejor con un compañero. Si falta un compañero, la pelota se puedes lanzar y recuperar o tirar contra una pared.
Comienza parándote unos metros delante de tu pareja, ambos mirando en la misma dirección. Comienza a sostener la pelota entre tus piernas.
Agáchate y luego invierte con fuerza la dirección, alcanza la extensión completa y lanza la pelota por encima de tu cabeza a tu compañero.
Luego, tu compañero puedes hacer rodar la pelota hacia ti. Repite durante el número deseado de repeticiones.

name: Board Press
instructions: Begin by lying on the bench, getting your head beyond the bar if possible. One to five boards, made out of 2x6's, can be screwed together and held in place by a training partner, bands, or just tucked under your shirt.

Tuck your feet underneath you and arch your back. Using the bar to help support your weight, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your feet to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement.

You can take a standard bench grip, or shoulder width to focus on the triceps. Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting your shoulders. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart.
Lower the bar to the boards, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.

en: Begin by lying on the bench, getting your head beyond the bar if possible. One to five boards, made out of 2x6's, can be screwed together and held in place by a training partner, bands, or just tucked under your shirt.

Tuck your feet underneath you and arch your back. Using the bar to help support your weight, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your feet to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement.

You can take a standard bench grip, or shoulder width to focus on the triceps. Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting your shoulders. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart.
Lower the bar to the boards, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.
es: Comienza recostándose en el banco, llevando la cabeza más allá de la barra si es posible. De una a cinco tablas, hechas de 2x6, pueden atornillarse y mantenerse en su lugar con un compañero de entrenamiento, bandas o simplemente metidas debajo de la camisa.

Meta los pies debajo de ti y arquee la espalda. Usando la barra para ayudar a soportar su peso, levanta el hombro del banco y retírelo, apretando los omóplatos. Usa tus pies para clavar tus trampas en el banco. Mantén esta posición firme del cuerpo durante todo el movimiento.

Puede realizar un agarre de banco estándar o un ancho de hombros para concentrarse en los triceps. Saca la barra del soporte sin prolongar los hombros. La barra, la muñeca y el codo deben permanecer alineados en todo momento. Concéntrate en apretar la barra y tratar de separarla.
Baja la barra hasta las tablas y luego levanta la barra con la mayor fuerza posible. Los codos deben estar metidos hasta el bloqueo.

name: Bench Press
instructions: Begin by lying on the bench, getting your head beyond the bar if possible. Tuck your feet underneath you and arch your back. Using the bar to help support your weight, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your feet to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement. However wide your grip, it should cover the ring on the bar. Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting your shoulders. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart.
Lower the bar to your lower chest or upper stomach. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times.
Pause when the barbell touches your torso, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.

en: Begin by lying on the bench, getting your head beyond the bar if possible. Tuck your feet underneath you and arch your back. Using the bar to help support your weight, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your feet to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement. However wide your grip, it should cover the ring on the bar. Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting your shoulders. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart.
Lower the bar to your lower chest or upper stomach. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times.
Pause when the barbell touches your torso, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.
es: Comienza recostándose en el banco, llevando la cabeza más allá de la barra si es posible. Meta los pies debajo de ti y arquee la espalda. Usando la barra para ayudar a soportar su peso, levanta el hombro del banco y retírelo, apretando los omóplatos. Usa tus pies para clavar tus trampas en el banco. Mantén esta posición firme del cuerpo durante todo el movimiento. Por muy amplio que sea su agarre, debe cubrir el anillo de la barra. Saca la barra del soporte sin prolongar los hombros. Concéntrate en apretar la barra y tratar de separarla.
Baja la barra hasta la parte inferior del pecho o la parte superior del estómago. La barra, la muñeca y el codo deben permanecer alineados en todo momento.
Haz una pausa cuando la barra toque el torso y luego levanta la barra con la mayor fuerza posible. Los codos deben estar metidos hasta el bloqueo.

name: V-Bar (Neutral Grip) Pull-Up
instructions: Hook a V-bar (neutral-grip handle) over a pull-up bar so the handles hang down. Grip one handle in each hand with palms facing each other.
Hang from the handles with arms fully extended, shoulders pulled away from the ears, and chest tall. Brace the core.
Drive the elbows down and back to pull yourself up, keeping the chest open. Continue until the chest reaches handle height.
Pause for a beat at the top, then lower under control until the arms are fully extended.
Repeat for the prescribed reps. Add load with a weight belt or dip belt for progression.

en: Hook a V-bar (neutral-grip handle) over a pull-up bar so the handles hang down. Grip one handle in each hand with palms facing each other.
Hang from the handles with arms fully extended, shoulders pulled away from the ears, and chest tall. Brace the core.
Drive the elbows down and back to pull yourself up, keeping the chest open. Continue until the chest reaches handle height.
Pause for a beat at the top, then lower under control until the arms are fully extended.
Repeat for the prescribed reps. Add load with a weight belt or dip belt for progression.
es: Engancha una barra en V (agarre neutro) sobre la barra de dominadas para que los mangos cuelguen. Sujeta un mango con cada mano, palmas enfrentadas.
Cuélgate con los brazos totalmente extendidos, hombros lejos de las orejas y pecho alto. Activa el core.
Lleva los codos hacia abajo y atrás para tirar del cuerpo hacia arriba, manteniendo el pecho abierto. Continúa hasta que el pecho llegue a la altura de los mangos.
Mantén la posición un instante arriba y baja con control hasta extender los brazos del todo.
Repite las repeticiones marcadas. Para progresar añade carga con un cinturón lastrado.

name: Shrug on Calf Machine
instructions: Position yourself on the calf machine so that the shoulder pads are above your shoulders. Your torso should be straight with the arms extended normally by your side. This will be your starting position.
Raise your shoulders up towards your ears as you exhale and hold the contraction for a full second.
Slowly return to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: You can use dumbbells, barbells, smith machines and pulley machines to perform shrugging motions.

name.es: Máquina de encogimiento de hombros en la pantorrilla

en: Position yourself on the calf machine so that the shoulder pads are above your shoulders. Your torso should be straight with the arms extended normally by your side. This will be your starting position.
Raise your shoulders up towards your ears as you exhale and hold the contraction for a full second.
Slowly return to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: You can use dumbbells, barbells, smith machines and pulley machines to perform shrugging motions.
es: Colóquese en la máquina para gemelos de modo que las hombreras queden por encima de sus hombros. Tu torso debe estar recto con los brazos extendidos normalmente a los lados. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Levante los hombros hacia las orejas mientras exhala y mantenga la contracción durante un segundo completo.
Regrese lentamente a la posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: puedes utilizar mancuernas, barras, máquinas Smith y máquinas de poleas para realizar movimientos de encogimiento de hombros.

name: Machine Shoulder Shrug
instructions: Position yourself on the calf machine so that the shoulder pads are above your shoulders. Your torso should be straight with the arms extended normally by your side. This will be your starting position.
Raise your shoulders up towards your ears as you exhale and hold the contraction for a full second.
Slowly return to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: You can use dumbbells, barbells, smith machines and pulley machines to perform shrugging motions.

en: Position yourself on the calf machine so that the shoulder pads are above your shoulders. Your torso should be straight with the arms extended normally by your side. This will be your starting position.
Raise your shoulders up towards your ears as you exhale and hold the contraction for a full second.

Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: You can use dumbbells, barbells, smith machines and pulley machines to perform shrugging motions.
es: Colóquese en la máquina para gemelos de modo que las hombreras queden por encima de sus hombros. Tu torso debe estar recto con los brazos extendidos normalmente a los lados. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Levante los hombros hacia las orejas mientras exhala y mantenga la contracción durante un segundo completo.
Regrese lentamente a la posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: puedes utilizar mancuernas, barras, máquinas Smith y máquinas de poleas para realizar movimientos de encogimiento de hombros.

name: Lunge Sprint
instructions: Adjust a bar in a Smith machine to an appropriate height. Position yourself under the bar, racking it across the back of your shoulders. Unrack the bar, and then split your feet, moving one foot forward and one foot back. This will be your starting position.
Lower your back knee nearly to the ground, flexing the knees and lowering your hips as you do so.

At the bottom of the descent, immediately reverse direction. Explosively drive through the heel of your front foot with light pressure from your back foot. Jump up and reverse the position of your legs.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

en: Adjust a bar in a Smith machine to an appropriate height. Position yourself under the bar, racking it across the back of your shoulders. Unrack the bar, and then split your feet, moving one foot forward and one foot back. This will be your starting position.
Lower your back knee nearly to the ground, flexing the knees and lowering your hips as you do so.

At the bottom of the descent, immediately reverse direction. Explosively drive through the heel of your front foot with light pressure from your back foot. Jump up and reverse the position of your legs.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Ajuste una barra en una máquina Smith a una altura adecuada. Colóquese debajo de la barra, colocándola sobre la parte posterior de sus hombros. Retire la barra y luego separe los pies, moviendo un pie hacia adelante y otro hacia atrás. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Baje la rodilla trasera casi hasta el suelo, flexionando las rodillas y bajando las caderas mientras lo hace.

Al final del descenso, invierta inmediatamente la dirección. Conduce explosivamente a través del talón de tu pie delantero con una ligera presión desde tu pie trasero. Salta e invierte la posición de tus piernas.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.

name: Leverage Shrug
instructions: Load the pins to an appropriate weight. Position yourself directly between the handles.
Grasp the top handles with a comfortable grip, and then lower your hips as you take a breath. Look forward with your head and keep your chest up.

Drive through the floor with your heels, extending your hips and knees as you rise to a standing position. Keep your arms straight throughout the movement, finishing with your shoulders back. This will be your starting position.
Raise the weight by shrugging the shoulders towards your ears, moving straight up and down.
Pause at the top of the motion, and then return the weight to the starting position.

en: Load the pins to an appropriate weight. Position yourself directly between the handles.
Grasp the top handles with a comfortable grip, and then lower your hips as you take a breath. Look forward with your head and keep your chest up.

Drive through the floor with your heels, extending your hips and knees as you rise to a standing position. Keep your arms straight throughout the movement, finishing with your shoulders back. This will be your starting position.
Raise the weight by shrugging the shoulders towards your ears, moving straight up and down.
Pause at the top of the motion, and then return the weight to the starting position.
es: Cargue los pasadores con un peso adecuado. Colóquese directamente entre las manijas.
Sujete las asas superiores con un agarre cómodo y luego baje las caderas mientras respira. Mire hacia adelante con la cabeza y mantenga el pecho erguido.

Conduce por el suelo con los talones, extendiendo las caderas y las rodillas mientras te levantas hasta quedar de pie. Mantén los brazos rectos durante todo el movimiento, terminando con los hombros hacia atrás. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Levante el peso encogiendo los hombros hacia las orejas, moviéndose hacia arriba y hacia abajo.
Haga una pausa en la parte superior del movimiento y luego regrese el peso a la posición inicial.

name: Leverage Deadlift
instructions: Load the pins to an appropriate weight. Position yourself directly between the handles. Grasp the bottom handles with a comfortable grip, and then lower your hips as you take a breath. Look forward with your head and keep your chest up. This will be your starting position.
Drive through the floor with your heels, extending your hips and knees as you rise to a standing position. Keep your arms straight throughout the movement, finishing with your shoulders back.
Return the weight to the starting position.

en: Load the pins to an appropriate weight. Position yourself directly between the handles. Grasp the bottom handles with a comfortable grip, and then lower your hips as you take a breath. Look forward with your head and keep your chest up. This will be your starting position.
Drive through the floor with your heels, extending your hips and knees as you rise to a standing position. Keep your arms straight throughout the movement, finishing with your shoulders back.
Return the weight to the starting position.
es: Cargue los pasadores con un peso adecuado. Colóquese directamente entre las manijas. Sujete las asas inferiores con un agarre cómodo y luego baje las caderas mientras respira. Mire hacia adelante con la cabeza y mantenga el pecho erguido. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Conduce por el suelo con los talones, extendiendo las caderas y las rodillas mientras te levantas hasta quedar de pie. Mantén los brazos rectos durante todo el movimiento, terminando con los hombros hacia atrás.
Regrese el peso a la posición inicial.

name: Hammerstrength Shrug
instructions: Load the pins to an appropriate weight. Position yourself directly between the handles.
Grasp the top handles with a comfortable grip, and then lower your hips as you take a breath. Look forward with your head and keep your chest up.

Drive through the floor with your heels, extending your hips and knees as you rise to a standing position. Keep your arms straight throughout the movement, finishing with your shoulders back. This will be your starting position.
Raise the weight by shrugging the shoulders towards your ears, moving straight up and down.
Pause at the top of the motion, and then return the weight to the starting position.

name.es: Encogimiento de hombros con fuerza de martillo

en: Load the pins to an appropriate weight. Position yourself directly between the handles.
Grasp the top handles with a comfortable grip, and then lower your hips as you take a breath. Look forward with your head and keep your chest up.

Drive through the floor with your heels, extending your hips and knees as you rise to a standing position. Keep your arms straight throughout the movement, finishing with your shoulders back. This will be your starting position.
Raise the weight by shrugging the shoulders towards your ears, moving straight up and down.

Sujete las asas superiores con un agarre cómodo y luego baje las caderas mientras respira. Mire hacia adelante con la cabeza y mantenga el pecho erguido.

name: Calf-Machine Shoulder Shrug
instructions: Position yourself on the calf machine so that the shoulder pads are above your shoulders. Your torso should be straight with the arms extended normally by your side. This will be your starting position.
Raise your shoulders up towards your ears as you exhale and hold the contraction for a full second.
Slowly return to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: You can use dumbbells, barbells, smith machines and pulley machines to perform shrugging motions.

name.es: Encogimiento de hombros a máquina de pantorrilla

en: Position yourself on the calf machine so that the shoulder pads are above your shoulders. Your torso should be straight with the arms extended normally by your side. This will be your starting position.
Raise your shoulders up towards your ears as you exhale and hold the contraction for a full second.
Slowly return to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variations: You can use dumbbells, barbells, smith machines and pulley machines to perform shrugging motions.
es: Colóquese en la máquina para gemelos de modo que las hombreras queden por encima de sus hombros. Tu torso debe estar recto con los brazos extendidos normalmente a los lados. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Levante los hombros hacia las orejas mientras exhala y mantenga la contracción durante un segundo completo.
Regrese lentamente a la posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variaciones: puedes utilizar mancuernas, barras, máquinas Smith y máquinas de poleas para realizar movimientos de encogimiento de hombros.

name: Ab Crunch Machine
instructions: Sit on the ab crunch machine and place your feet under the pads. Grab the top handles and bend your arms at about 90 degrees, resting your triceps on the pads. This is your starting position.
Simultaneously lift your legs and crunch your upper torso toward your knees. Exhale during the movement. Use a slow, controlled motion and focus on contracting your abs to move the weight.
Pause briefly at the top, then slowly return to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the prescribed number of repetitions. Always use a manageable weight — excessive load on this machine can easily lead to injury.

en: Sit on the ab crunch machine and place your feet under the pads. Grab the top handles and bend your arms at about 90 degrees, resting your triceps on the pads. This is your starting position.
Simultaneously lift your legs and crunch your upper torso toward your knees. Exhale during the movement. Use a slow, controlled motion and focus on contracting your abs to move the weight.
Pause briefly at the top, then slowly return to the starting position as you inhale.
Repeat for the prescribed number of repetitions. Always use a manageable weight — excessive load on this machine can easily lead to injury.
es: Siéntate en la máquina de abdominales y coloca los pies debajo de las almohadillas. Agarra las asas superiores y flexiona los brazos unos 90 grados, apoyando los tríceps en los soportes. Esta es tu posición inicial.

Levanta las piernas y encoge el torso hacia las rodillas al mismo tiempo. Exhala durante el movimiento. Realiza el movimiento de forma lenta y controlada, concentrándote en contraer los abdominales para mover el peso.
Haz una breve pausa arriba y vuelve lentamente a la posición inicial mientras inhalas.
Repite durante el número indicado de repeticiones. Usa siempre un peso que puedas controlar con facilidad: una carga excesiva en esta máquina puede provocar lesiones.

sourceClip.title: Ab Crunch Machine (Upper Abs)

name: Yoke Walk
instructions: The yoke is usually done with a yoke apparatus, but is sometimes seen with refrigerators or other heavy objects.
Begin by racking the apparatus across the back of the shoulders. With your head looking forward and back arched, lift the yoke by driving through the heels.

Begin walking as quickly as possible using short, quick steps. You may hold the side posts of the yoke to help steady it and hold it in position. Continue for the given distance as fast as possible, usually 75-100 feet.

en: The yoke is usually done with a yoke apparatus, but is sometimes seen with refrigerators or other heavy objects.
Begin by racking the apparatus across the back of the shoulders. With your head looking forward and back arched, lift the yoke by driving through the heels.

Begin walking as quickly as possible using short, quick steps. You may hold the side posts of the yoke to help steady it and hold it in position. Continue for the given distance as fast as possible, usually 75-100 feet.
es: El yugo generalmente se hace con un aparato de yugo, pero a veces se ve con refrigeradores u otros objetos pesados.
Comience pasando el aparato por la parte posterior de los hombros. Con la cabeza mirando hacia adelante y la espalda arqueada, levante el yugo impulsando los talones.

Comience a caminar lo más rápido posible con pasos cortos y rápidos. Puede sujetar los postes laterales del yugo para ayudar a estabilizarlo y mantenerlo en su posición. Continúe la distancia indicada lo más rápido posible, generalmente entre 75 y 100 pies.

name: Wheel of Pain
instructions: With the weight loaded, take a zurcher hold on the end of the implement. Place the bar in the crook of the elbow and hold onto your wrist. Try to keep the weight off of the forearms.

Begin by lifting the weight from the ground. Keep a tight, upright posture as you being to walk, taking short, fast steps. Look up and away as you turn in a circle. Do not hold your breath during the event. Continue walking until you complete one or more complete turns.

en: With the weight loaded, take a zurcher hold on the end of the implement. Place the bar in the crook of the elbow and hold onto your wrist. Try to keep the weight off of the forearms.

Begin by lifting the weight from the ground. Keep a tight, upright posture as you being to walk, taking short, fast steps. Look up and away as you turn in a circle. Do not hold your breath during the event. Continue walking until you complete one or more complete turns.
es: Con el peso cargado, tomar un agarre tipo zurcher en el extremo del implemento. Coloque la barra en la curva del codo y sujétela por la muñeca. Trate de mantener el peso fuera de los antebrazos.

Comience levantando el peso del suelo. Mantenga una postura firme y erguida mientras camina, dando pasos cortos y rápidos. Mira hacia arriba y hacia otro lado mientras giras en círculo. No contenga la respiración durante el evento. Continúe caminando hasta completar una o más vueltas completas.

name: Wave Lengths
instructions: For this exercise you will need a heavy rope anchored at its center 15-20 feet away. Standing in front of the rope, take an end in each hand with your arms extended at your side. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by rapidly raising one arm to shoulder level as quickly as you can.
As you let that arm drop to the starting position, raise the opposite side.
Continue alternating your left and right arms, whipping the ropes up and down as fast as you can.

en: For this exercise you will need a heavy rope anchored at its center 15-20 feet away. Standing in front of the rope, take an end in each hand with your arms extended at your side. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by rapidly raising one arm to shoulder level as quickly as you can.
As you let that arm drop to the starting position, raise the opposite side.
Continue alternating your left and right arms, whipping the ropes up and down as fast as you can.
es: Para este ejercicio necesitarás una cuerda pesada anclada en su centro a una distancia de entre 15 y 20 pies. De pie frente a la cuerda, toma un extremo en cada mano con los brazos extendidos a los costados. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inicie el movimiento levantando rápidamente un brazo hasta el nivel del hombro lo más rápido que pueda.
Mientras dejas caer ese brazo a la posición inicial, levanta el lado opuesto.
Continúe alternando los brazos izquierdo y derecho, moviendo las cuerdas hacia arriba y hacia abajo lo más rápido que pueda.

name: Tyre Flip
instructions: Begin by gripping the bottom of the tire on the tread, and position your feet back a bit. Your chest should be driving into the tire.
To lift the tire, extend through the hips, knees, and ankles, driving into the tire and up.

As the tire reaches a 45 degree angle, step forward and drive a knee into the tire. As you do so adjust your grip to the upper portion of the tire and push it forward as hard as possible to complete the turn. Repeat as necessary.

en: Begin by gripping the bottom of the tire on the tread, and position your feet back a bit. Your chest should be driving into the tire.
To lift the tire, extend through the hips, knees, and ankles, driving into the tire and up.

As the tire reaches a 45 degree angle, step forward and drive a knee into the tire. As you do so adjust your grip to the upper portion of the tire and push it forward as hard as possible to complete the turn. Repeat as necessary.
es: Comience agarrando la parte inferior del neumático por la banda de rodadura y coloque los pies un poco hacia atrás. Tu pecho debería entrar en el neumático.
Para levantar el neumático, extiéndase a través de las caderas, las rodillas y los tobillos, introduciéndose en el neumático y hacia arriba.

Cuando el neumático alcance un ángulo de 45 grados, da un paso adelante y clava una rodilla en el neumático. Mientras lo hace, ajuste su agarre a la parte superior del neumático y empújelo hacia adelante lo más fuerte posible para completar el giro. Repita según sea necesario.

name: Sandbag Load
instructions: To load sandbags or other objects, begin with the implements placed a distance from the loading platform, typically 50 feet.

Begin by lifting the sandbag. Sandbags are extremely awkward, and the manner of lifting them can vary depending on the particular sandbag used. Reach as far around it as possible, extending through the hips and knees to pull it up high. Shouldering is usually not allowed.
Move as quickly as possible to the platform, and load it, extending through your hips, knees, and ankles to get it as high as possible. Place it onto the platform, ensuring it doesn't fall off.
Return to the starting position to retrieve the next sandbag, and repeat until the event is completed.

en: To load sandbags or other objects, begin with the implements placed a distance from the loading platform, typically 50 feet.

Begin by lifting the sandbag. Sandbags are extremely awkward, and the manner of lifting them can vary depending on the particular sandbag used. Reach as far around it as possible, extending through the hips and knees to pull it up high. Shouldering is usually not allowed.
Move as quickly as possible to the platform, and load it, extending through your hips, knees, and ankles to get it as high as possible. Place it onto the platform, ensuring it doesn't fall off.
Return to the starting position to retrieve the next sandbag, and repeat until the event is completed.
es: Para cargar sacos de arena u otros objetos, comience con los implementos colocados a una distancia de la plataforma de carga, generalmente a 50 pies.

Comience levantando el saco de arena. Los sacos de arena son extremadamente incómodos y la forma de levantarlos puede variar según el saco de arena en particular que se utilice. Estírese lo más posible alrededor de él, extendiéndose a través de las caderas y las rodillas para levantarlo hacia arriba. Por lo general, no se permite cargar con los hombros.

Muévete lo más rápido posible hacia la plataforma y cárgala, extendiéndola a lo largo de tus caderas, rodillas y tobillos para llegar lo más alto posible. Colóquelo sobre la plataforma, asegurándose de que no se caiga.
Regrese a la posición inicial para recuperar el siguiente saco de arena y repita hasta completar el evento.

name: Rickshaw Deadlift
instructions: Load the frame with the desired weight. Center yourself between the handles. You feet should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hips to grip the handles, allowing your shoulder blades to protract.

With your feet and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your hips and flex the knees. Look forward with your head, keep your chest up and your back arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the weight upward. As the weight comes up, pull your shoulder blades together as you drive your hips forward.
Lower the weight by bending at the hips and guiding it to the ground.

en: Load the frame with the desired weight. Center yourself between the handles. You feet should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hips to grip the handles, allowing your shoulder blades to protract.

With your feet and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your hips and flex the knees. Look forward with your head, keep your chest up and your back arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the weight upward. As the weight comes up, pull your shoulder blades together as you drive your hips forward.
Lower the weight by bending at the hips and guiding it to the ground.
es: Cargue el marco con el peso deseado. Céntrate entre las manijas. Tus pies deben estar separados aproximadamente al ancho de las caderas. Doble las caderas para agarrar las manijas, permitiendo que los omóplatos se prolonguen.

Con los pies y el agarre preparados, respire hondo y luego baje las caderas y flexione las rodillas. Mire hacia adelante con la cabeza, mantenga el pecho erguido y la espalda arqueada, y comience a impulsar con los talones para mover el peso hacia arriba. A medida que sube el peso, junte los omóplatos mientras impulsa las caderas hacia adelante.
Baje el peso doblando las caderas y guiándolo hacia el suelo.

name: Rickshaw Carry
instructions: Position the frame at the starting point, and load with the appropriate weight. Standing in the center of the frame, begin by gripping the handles and driving through your heels to lift the frame. Ensure your chest and head are up and your back is straight.

Immediately begin walking briskly with quick, controlled steps. Keep your chest up and head forward, and make sure you continue breathing. Bring the frame to the ground after you have reached the end point.

en: Position the frame at the starting point, and load with the appropriate weight. Standing in the center of the frame, begin by gripping the handles and driving through your heels to lift the frame. Ensure your chest and head are up and your back is straight.

Immediately begin walking briskly with quick, controlled steps. Keep your chest up and head forward, and make sure you continue breathing. Bring the frame to the ground after you have reached the end point.
es: Coloque el marco en el punto inicial y cárguelo con el peso adecuado. De pie en el centro del marco, comience agarrando las manijas y empujando con los talones para levantar el marco. Asegúrese de que su pecho y cabeza estén erguidos y su espalda recta.

Empiece inmediatamente a caminar rápidamente con pasos rápidos y controlados. Mantenga el pecho erguido y la cabeza hacia adelante y asegúrese de seguir respirando. Lleve el marco al suelo después de haber llegado al punto final.

name: Power Stairs
instructions: In the power stairs, implements are moved up a staircase.  For training purposes, these can be performed with a tire or box.

Begin by taking the implement with both hands. Set your feet wide, with your head and chest up. Drive through the ground with your heels, extending your knees and hips to raise the weight from the ground.
As you lean back, attempt to swing the weight onto the stairs, which are usually around 16-18" high. You can use your legs to help push the weight onto the stair.
Repeat for 3-5 repetitions, and continue with a heavier weight, moving as fast as possible.

en: In the power stairs, implements are moved up a staircase.  For training purposes, these can be performed with a tire or box.

Begin by taking the implement with both hands. Set your feet wide, with your head and chest up. Drive through the ground with your heels, extending your knees and hips to raise the weight from the ground.
As you lean back, attempt to swing the weight onto the stairs, which are usually around 16-18" high. You can use your legs to help push the weight onto the stair.
Repeat for 3-5 repetitions, and continue with a heavier weight, moving as fast as possible.
es: En las escaleras eléctricas los útiles se suben por una escalera.  Para fines de entrenamiento, estos se pueden realizar con un neumático o una caja.

Comienza tomando el implemento con ambas manos. Coloque los pies bien abiertos, con la cabeza y el pecho hacia arriba. Conduce por el suelo con los talones, extendiendo las rodillas y las caderas para levantar el peso del suelo.

Mientras se inclina hacia atrás, intente balancear el peso hacia las escaleras, que generalmente tienen entre 16 y 18 "de altura. Puede usar sus piernas para ayudar a empujar el peso hacia la escalera.
Repita de 3 a 5 repeticiones y continúe con un peso más pesado, moviéndose lo más rápido posible.

name: Log Lift
instructions: Begin standing with the log in front of you. Grasp the handles, and begin to clean the log. As you are bent over to start the clean, attempt to get the log as high as possible, pulling it into your chest. Extend through the hips and knees to bring it up to complete the clean.

Push your head back and look up, creating a shelf on your chest to rest the log. Begin the press by dipping, flexing slightly through the knees and reversing the motion. This push press will generate momentum to start the log moving vertically. Continue by extending through the elbows to press the log above your head. There are no strict rules on form, so use whatever techniques you are most efficient with. As the log is pressed, ensure that you push your head through on each repetition, looking forward.
Repeat as many times as possible. Attempt to control the descent of the log as it is returned to the ground.

en: Begin standing with the log in front of you. Grasp the handles, and begin to clean the log. As you are bent over to start the clean, attempt to get the log as high as possible, pulling it into your chest. Extend through the hips and knees to bring it up to complete the clean.

Push your head back and look up, creating a shelf on your chest to rest the log. Begin the press by dipping, flexing slightly through the knees and reversing the motion. This push press will generate momentum to start the log moving vertically. Continue by extending through the elbows to press the log above your head. There are no strict rules on form, so use whatever techniques you are most efficient with. As the log is pressed, ensure that you push your head through on each repetition, looking forward.
Repeat as many times as possible. Attempt to control the descent of the log as it is returned to the ground.
es: Comience a pararse con el tronco frente a usted. Agarre las manijas y comience a limpiar el tronco. Mientras estás inclinado para comenzar a limpiar, intenta llevar el tronco lo más alto posible, empujándolo hacia tu pecho. Extiende a través de las caderas y las rodillas para levantarlo y completar la limpieza.

Empuja tu cabeza hacia atrás y mira hacia arriba, creando un estante en tu pecho para apoyar el tronco. Comience la prensa sumergiéndose, flexionando ligeramente las rodillas e invirtiendo el movimiento. Esta prensa de empuje generará impulso para comenzar a mover el tronco verticalmente. Continúe extendiendo los codos para presionar el tronco sobre su cabeza. No existen reglas estrictas sobre la forma, así que utilice las técnicas con las que sea más eficiente. A medida que presiona el tronco, asegúrese de empujar la cabeza en cada repetición, mirando hacia adelante.
Repita tantas veces como sea posible. Intente controlar el descenso del tronco cuando regresa al suelo.

name: Log Clean And Press
instructions: Begin standing with the log in front of you. Grasp the handles, and begin to clean the log. As you are bent over to start the clean, attempt to get the log as high as possible, pulling it into your chest. Extend through the hips and knees to bring it up to complete the clean.

Push your head back and look up, creating a shelf on your chest to rest the log. Begin the press by dipping, flexing slightly through the knees and reversing the motion. This push press will generate momentum to start the log moving vertically. Continue by extending through the elbows to press the log above your head. There are no strict rules on form, so use whatever techniques you are most efficient with. As the log is pressed, ensure that you push your head through on each repetition, looking forward.
Repeat as many times as possible. Attempt to control the descent of the log as it is returned to the ground.

en: Begin standing with the log in front of you. Grasp the handles, and begin to clean the log. As you are bent over to start the clean, attempt to get the log as high as possible, pulling it into your chest. Extend through the hips and knees to bring it up to complete the clean.

Push your head back and look up, creating a shelf on your chest to rest the log. Begin the press by dipping, flexing slightly through the knees and reversing the motion. This push press will generate momentum to start the log moving vertically. Continue by extending through the elbows to press the log above your head. There are no strict rules on form, so use whatever techniques you are most efficient with. As the log is pressed, ensure that you push your head through on each repetition, looking forward.
Repeat as many times as possible. Attempt to control the descent of the log as it is returned to the ground.
es: Comience a pararse con el tronco frente a usted. Agarre las manijas y comience a limpiar el tronco. Mientras estás inclinado para comenzar a limpiar, intenta llevar el tronco lo más alto posible, empujándolo hacia tu pecho. Extiende a través de las caderas y las rodillas para levantarlo y completar la limpieza.

Empuja tu cabeza hacia atrás y mira hacia arriba, creando un estante en tu pecho para apoyar el tronco. Comience la prensa sumergiéndose, flexionando ligeramente las rodillas e invirtiendo el movimiento. Esta prensa de empuje generará impulso para comenzar a mover el tronco verticalmente. Continúe extendiendo los codos para presionar el tronco sobre su cabeza. No existen reglas estrictas sobre la forma, así que utilice las técnicas con las que sea más eficiente. A medida que presiona el tronco, asegúrese de empujar la cabeza en cada repetición, mirando hacia adelante.
Repita tantas veces como sea posible. Intente controlar el descenso del tronco cuando regresa al suelo.

name: Keg Load
instructions: To load kegs, place the desired number a distance from the loading platform, typically 30-50 feet.
Begin by grabbing the close handle of the first keg, tilting it onto its side to grab the opposite edge of the bottom of the keg. Lift the keg up to your chest.

The higher you can place the keg, the faster you should be able to move to the platform. Shouldering is usually not allowed. Be sure to keep a firm hold on the keg. Move as quickly as possible to the platform, and load it, extending through your hips, knees, and ankles to get it as high as possible.
Return to the starting position to retrieve the next keg, and repeat until the event is completed.

en: To load kegs, place the desired number a distance from the loading platform, typically 30-50 feet.
Begin by grabbing the close handle of the first keg, tilting it onto its side to grab the opposite edge of the bottom of the keg. Lift the keg up to your chest.

The higher you can place the keg, the faster you should be able to move to the platform. Shouldering is usually not allowed. Be sure to keep a firm hold on the keg. Move as quickly as possible to the platform, and load it, extending through your hips, knees, and ankles to get it as high as possible.
Return to the starting position to retrieve the next keg, and repeat until the event is completed.
es: Para cargar barriles, coloque el número deseado a una distancia de la plataforma de carga, generalmente entre 30 y 50 pies.
Comience agarrando el asa cercana del primer barril, inclinándolo hacia un lado para agarrar el borde opuesto de la parte inferior del barril. Levanta el barril hasta tu pecho.

Cuanto más alto puedas colocar el barril, más rápido podrás moverte hacia la plataforma. Por lo general, no se permite cargar con los hombros. Asegúrese de sujetar firmemente el barril. Muévete lo más rápido posible hacia la plataforma y cárgala, extendiéndola a lo largo de tus caderas, rodillas y tobillos para llegar lo más alto posible.
Regrese a la posición inicial para recuperar el siguiente barril y repita hasta que se complete el evento.

name: Fridge Carry
instructions: The yoke is usually done with a yoke apparatus, but is sometimes seen with refrigerators or other heavy objects.
Begin by racking the apparatus across the back of the shoulders. With your head looking forward and back arched, lift the yoke by driving through the heels.

Begin walking as quickly as possible using short, quick steps. You may hold the side posts of the yoke to help steady it and hold it in position. Continue for the given distance as fast as possible, usually 75-100 feet.

en: The yoke is usually done with a yoke apparatus, but is sometimes seen with refrigerators or other heavy objects.
Begin by racking the apparatus across the back of the shoulders. With your head looking forward and back arched, lift the yoke by driving through the heels.

Begin walking as quickly as possible using short, quick steps. You may hold the side posts of the yoke to help steady it and hold it in position. Continue for the given distance as fast as possible, usually 75-100 feet.
es: El yugo generalmente se hace con un aparato de yugo, pero a veces se ve con refrigeradores u otros objetos pesados.
Comience pasando el aparato por la parte posterior de los hombros. Con la cabeza mirando hacia adelante y la espalda arqueada, levante el yugo impulsando los talones.

Comience a caminar lo más rápido posible con pasos cortos y rápidos. Puede sujetar los postes laterales del yugo para ayudar a estabilizarlo y mantenerlo en su posición. Continúe la distancia indicada lo más rápido posible, generalmente entre 75 y 100 pies.

name: Frame Deadlift
instructions: Load the frame with the desired weight. Center yourself between the handles. You feet should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hips to grip the handles, allowing your shoulder blades to protract.

With your feet and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your hips and flex the knees. Look forward with your head, keep your chest up and your back arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the weight upward. As the weight comes up, pull your shoulder blades together as you drive your hips forward.
Lower the weight by bending at the hips and guiding it to the ground.

en: Load the frame with the desired weight. Center yourself between the handles. You feet should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hips to grip the handles, allowing your shoulder blades to protract.

With your feet and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your hips and flex the knees. Look forward with your head, keep your chest up and your back arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the weight upward. As the weight comes up, pull your shoulder blades together as you drive your hips forward.
Lower the weight by bending at the hips and guiding it to the ground.
es: Cargue el marco con el peso deseado. Céntrate entre las manijas. Tus pies deben estar separados aproximadamente al ancho de las caderas. Doble las caderas para agarrar las manijas, permitiendo que los omóplatos se prolonguen.

Con los pies y el agarre preparados, respire hondo y luego baje las caderas y flexione las rodillas. Mire hacia adelante con la cabeza, mantenga el pecho erguido y la espalda arqueada, y comience a impulsar con los talones para mover el peso hacia arriba. A medida que sube el peso, junte los omóplatos mientras impulsa las caderas hacia adelante.
Baje el peso doblando las caderas y guiándolo hacia el suelo.

name: Frame Carry
instructions: Position the frame at the starting point, and load with the appropriate weight. Standing in the center of the frame, begin by gripping the handles and driving through your heels to lift the frame. Ensure your chest and head are up and your back is straight.

Immediately begin walking briskly with quick, controlled steps. Keep your chest up and head forward, and make sure you continue breathing. Bring the frame to the ground after you have reached the end point.

en: Position the frame at the starting point, and load with the appropriate weight. Standing in the center of the frame, begin by gripping the handles and driving through your heels to lift the frame. Ensure your chest and head are up and your back is straight.

Immediately begin walking briskly with quick, controlled steps. Keep your chest up and head forward, and make sure you continue breathing. Bring the frame to the ground after you have reached the end point.
es: Coloque el marco en el punto inicial y cárguelo con el peso adecuado. De pie en el centro del marco, comience agarrando las manijas y empujando con los talones para levantar el marco. Asegúrese de que su pecho y cabeza estén erguidos y su espalda recta.

Empiece inmediatamente a caminar rápidamente con pasos rápidos y controlados. Mantenga el pecho erguido y la cabeza hacia adelante y asegúrese de seguir respirando. Lleve el marco al suelo después de haber llegado al punto final.

name: Farmer's Walk
instructions: There are various implements that can be used for the farmers walk. These can also be performed with heavy dumbbells or short bars if these implements aren't available. Begin by standing between the implements.
After gripping the handles, lift them up by driving through your heels, keeping your back straight and your head up.
Walk taking short, quick steps, and don't forget to breathe. Move for a given distance, typically 50-100 feet, as fast as possible.

en: There are various implements that can be used for the farmers walk. These can also be performed with heavy dumbbells or short bars if these implements aren't available. Begin by standing between the implements.
After gripping the handles, lift them up by driving through your heels, keeping your back straight and your head up.
Walk taking short, quick steps, and don't forget to breathe. Move for a given distance, typically 50-100 feet, as fast as possible.
es: Existen diversos implementos que se pueden utilizar para la caminata de los agricultores. También se pueden realizar con mancuernas pesadas o barras cortas si estos implementos no están disponibles. Comience colocándose entre los implementos.
Después de agarrar las manijas, levántelas empujando los talones, manteniendo la espalda recta y la cabeza erguida.
Camine dando pasos cortos y rápidos y no olvide respira. Muévase una distancia determinada, normalmente entre 50 y 100 pies, lo más rápido posible.

name: Circus Bell
instructions: The circus bell is an oversized dumbbell with a thick handle. Begin with the dumbbell between your feet, and grip the handle with both hands.
Clean the dumbbell by extending through your hips and knees to deliver the implement to the desired shoulder, letting go with the extra hand.

Ensure that you get one of the dumbbell heads behind the shoulder to keep from being thrown off balance. To raise it overhead, dip by flexing the knees, and the drive upwards as you extend the dumbbell overhead, leaning slightly away from it as you do so.
Carefully guide the bell back to the floor, keeping it under control as much as possible. It is best to perform this event on a thick rubber mat to prevent damage to the floor.

en: The circus bell is an oversized dumbbell with a thick handle. Begin with the dumbbell between your feet, and grip the handle with both hands.
Clean the dumbbell by extending through your hips and knees to deliver the implement to the desired shoulder, letting go with the extra hand.

Ensure that you get one of the dumbbell heads behind the shoulder to keep from being thrown off balance. To raise it overhead, dip by flexing the knees, and the drive upwards as you extend the dumbbell overhead, leaning slightly away from it as you do so.
Carefully guide the bell back to the floor, keeping it under control as much as possible. It is best to perform this event on a thick rubber mat to prevent damage to the floor.
es: La campana de circo es una mancuerna de gran tamaño con un mango grueso. Comience con la mancuerna entre sus pies y agarre el mango con ambas manos.
Limpia la mancuerna extendiéndola por tus caderas y rodillas para llevar el implemento al hombro deseado, soltando la mano extra.

Asegúrese de colocar una de las cabezas de las mancuernas detrás del hombro para evitar perder el equilibrio. Para levantarla por encima de la cabeza, sumérgete flexionando las rodillas y conduce hacia arriba mientras extiendes la mancuerna por encima de tu cabeza, inclinándote ligeramente hacia afuera mientras lo haces.
Guíe con cuidado la campana hacia el suelo, manteniéndola bajo control tanto como sea posible. Lo mejor es realizar este evento sobre una alfombra de goma gruesa para evitar daños al piso.

name: Car Deadlift
instructions: This event apparatus typically has neutral grip handles, however some have a straight bar that you can approach like a normal deadlift. The apparatus can be loaded with a vehicle or other heavy objects such as tractor tires or kegs.

Center yourself between the handles if you are a strong squatter, or back a couple inches if you are a strong deadlifter. You feet should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the handles. With your feet and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your hips and flex the knees.

Look forward with your head, keep your chest up and your back arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the weight upward. As the weight comes up, pull your shoulder blades together as you drive your hips forward.
Lower the weight by bending at the hips and guiding it to the floor.

en: This event apparatus typically has neutral grip handles, however some have a straight bar that you can approach like a normal deadlift. The apparatus can be loaded with a vehicle or other heavy objects such as tractor tires or kegs.

Center yourself between the handles if you are a strong squatter, or back a couple inches if you are a strong deadlifter. You feet should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the handles. With your feet and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your hips and flex the knees.

Look forward with your head, keep your chest up and your back arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the weight upward. As the weight comes up, pull your shoulder blades together as you drive your hips forward.
Lower the weight by bending at the hips and guiding it to the floor.
es: Este aparato para eventos generalmente tiene mangos de agarre neutral, sin embargo, algunos tienen una barra recta a la que puedes acercarte como un peso muerto normal. El aparato se puede cargar con un vehículo u otros objetos pesados, como neumáticos de tractor o barriles.

Céntrate entre las manijas si eres un fuerte sentadilla, o retrocede un par de pulgadas si eres un fuerte peso muerto. Tus pies deben estar separados aproximadamente al ancho de las caderas. Doble la cadera para agarrar las manijas. Con los pies y el agarre preparados, respire hondo y luego baje las caderas y flexione las rodillas.

Mire hacia adelante con la cabeza, mantenga el pecho erguido y la espalda arqueada, y comience a impulsar con los talones para mover el peso hacia arriba. A medida que sube el peso, junte los omóplatos mientras impulsa las caderas hacia adelante.
Baje el peso doblando las caderas y guiándolo hacia el suelo.

name: Box Squat with Chains
instructions: Begin in a power rack with a box at the appropriate height behind you. Typically, you would aim for a box height that brings you to a parallel squat, but you can train higher or lower if desired.

To set up the chains, begin by looping the leader chain over the sleeves of the bar. The heavy chain should be attached using a snap hook. Adjust the length of the lead chain so that a few links are still on the floor at the top of the movement.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wider for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings, or closer together for more quad development. Keep your head facing forward.

With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips until you are seated on the box. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Pause when you reach the box, and relax the hip flexors. Never bounce off of a box.
Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward off of the box as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe.

en: Begin in a power rack with a box at the appropriate height behind you. Typically, you would aim for a box height that brings you to a parallel squat, but you can train higher or lower if desired.

To set up the chains, begin by looping the leader chain over the sleeves of the bar. The heavy chain should be attached using a snap hook. Adjust the length of the lead chain so that a few links are still on the floor at the top of the movement.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wider for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings, or closer together for more quad development. Keep your head facing forward.

With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips until you are seated on the box. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Pause when you reach the box, and relax the hip flexors. Never bounce off of a box.
Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward off of the box as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe.
es: Comience en un bastidor eléctrico con una caja a la altura adecuada detrás de usted. Por lo general, apuntarás a una altura de cajón que te lleve a una sentadilla paralela, pero puedes entrenar más alto o más bajo si lo deseas.

Para configurar las cadenas, comience enrollando la cadena guía sobre las mangas de la barra. La cadena pesada debe fijarse mediante un mosquetón. Ajuste la longitud de la cadena principal de modo que algunos eslabones todavía queden en el suelo en la parte superior del movimiento.

Comience pasando por debajo de la barra y colocándola sobre la parte posterior de los hombros. Apriete los omóplatos y gire los codos hacia adelante, intentando doblar la barra sobre los hombros. Retire la barra de la rejilla, creando un arco apretado en la parte baja de la espalda y vuelva a colocarse en su posición. Coloque los pies más anchos para hacer más énfasis en la espalda, los glúteos, los aductores y los isquiosurales, o más juntos para un mayor desarrollo de los cuádriceps. Mantenga la cabeza mirando hacia adelante.

Con la espalda, los hombros y el core tensos, empuja las rodillas y el trasero y comienza el descenso. Siéntate apoyando las caderas hasta sentarte sobre la caja. Lo ideal es que tus espinillas estén perpendiculares al suelo. Haga una pausa cuando llegue a la caja y relaje los flexores de la cadera. Nunca rebotes en una caja.

Manteniendo el peso sobre los talones y empujando los pies y las rodillas hacia afuera, salga de la caja hacia arriba mientras dirige el movimiento con la cabeza. Continúe hacia arriba, manteniendo la tensión de la cabeza a los pies.

name: Axle Deadlift
instructions: Approach the bar so that it is centered over your feet. You feet should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the bar at shoulder width, allowing your shoulder blades to protract. Typically, you would use an over/under grip.

With your feet and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your hips and flex the knees until your shins contact the bar. Look forward with your head, keep your chest up and your back arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the weight upward.
After the bar passes the knees, aggressively pull the bar back, pulling your shoulder blades together as you drive your hips forward into the bar.
Lower the bar by bending at the hips and guiding it to the floor.

en: Approach the bar so that it is centered over your feet. You feet should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the bar at shoulder width, allowing your shoulder blades to protract. Typically, you would use an over/under grip.

With your feet and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your hips and flex the knees until your shins contact the bar. Look forward with your head, keep your chest up and your back arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the weight upward.
After the bar passes the knees, aggressively pull the bar back, pulling your shoulder blades together as you drive your hips forward into the bar.
Lower the bar by bending at the hips and guiding it to the floor.
es: Acércate a la barra para que quede centrada sobre tus pies. Tus pies deben estar separados aproximadamente al ancho de las caderas. Doble la cadera para agarrar la barra al ancho de los hombros, permitiendo que los omóplatos se prolonguen. Normalmente, utilizarías un agarre superior o inferior.

With your feet and your grip serie, take a big breath and then lower your hips and flex the knees until your shins contact the bar. Mire hacia adelante con la cabeza, mantenga el pecho erguido y la espalda arqueada, y comience a impulsar con los talones para mover el peso hacia arriba.
Después de que la barra pase las rodillas, tire agresivamente de la barra hacia atrás, juntando los omóplatos mientras impulsa las caderas hacia adelante hacia la barra.
Baje la barra doblándola por las caderas y guiándola hacia el suelo.

name: Atlas Stone Trainer
instructions: This trainer is effective for developing Atlas Stone strength for those who don't have access to stones, and are typically made from bar ends or heavy pipe.
Begin by loading the desired weight onto the bar. Straddle the weight, wrapping your arms around the implement, bending at the hips.

Begin by pulling the weight up past the knees, extending through the hips. As the weight clears the knees, it can be lapped by resting it on your thighs and sitting back, hugging it tightly to your chest.
Finish the movement by extending through your hips and knees to raise the weight as high as possible. The weight can be returned to the lap or to the ground for successive repetitions.

en: This trainer is effective for developing Atlas Stone strength for those who don't have access to stones, and are typically made from bar ends or heavy pipe.
Begin by loading the desired weight onto the bar. Straddle the weight, wrapping your arms around the implement, bending at the hips.

Begin by pulling the weight up past the knees, extending through the hips. As the weight clears the knees, it can be lapped by resting it on your thighs and sitting back, hugging it tightly to your chest.
Finish the movement by extending through your hips and knees to raise the weight as high as possible. The weight can be returned to the lap or to the ground for successive repetitions.
es: Este entrenador es eficaz para desarrollar la fuerza de Atlas Stone para aquellos que no tienen acceso a piedras y, por lo general, están hechos de extremos de barras o tubos pesados.
Comience cargando el peso deseado en la barra. Colóquese a horcajadas sobre el peso, envolviendo los brazos alrededor del implemento y doblando las caderas.

Comience levantando el peso más allá de las rodillas, extendiéndolo hasta las caderas. A medida que el peso supera las rodillas, se puede doblar apoyándolo sobre los muslos y sentándose hacia atrás, abrazándolo firmemente contra el pecho.
Finaliza el movimiento extendiendo las caderas y las rodillas para elevar el peso lo más alto posible. El peso se puede devolver al regazo o al suelo para repeticiones sucesivas.

name: Atlas Stones
instructions: Begin with the atlas stone between your feet. Bend at the hips to wrap your arms vertically around the Atlas Stone, attempting to get your fingers underneath the stone. Many stones will have a small flat portion on the bottom, which will make the stone easier to hold.
Pulling the stone into your torso, drive through the back half of your feet to pull the stone from the ground.
As the stone passes the knees, lap it by sitting backward, pulling the stone on top of your thighs.

Sit low, getting the stone high onto your chest as you change your grip to reach over the stone. Stand, driving through with your hips. Close distance to the loading platform, and lean back, extending the hips to get the stone as high as possible.

en: Begin with the atlas stone between your feet. Bend at the hips to wrap your arms vertically around the Atlas Stone, attempting to get your fingers underneath the stone. Many stones will have a small flat portion on the bottom, which will make the stone easier to hold.
Pulling the stone into your torso, drive through the back half of your feet to pull the stone from the ground.
As the stone passes the knees, lap it by sitting backward, pulling the stone on top of your thighs.

Sit low, getting the stone high onto your chest as you change your grip to reach over the stone. Stand, driving through with your hips. Close distance to the loading platform, and lean back, extending the hips to get the stone as high as possible.
es: Comienza con la piedra del atlas entre tus pies. Doble las caderas para envolver los brazos verticalmente alrededor de la Piedra Atlas, intentando colocar los dedos debajo de la piedra. Muchas piedras tendrán una pequeña porción plana en la parte inferior, lo que hará que sea más fácil sostenerla.
Introduciendo la piedra en tu torso, pasa por la mitad trasera de tus pies para sacar la piedra del suelo.
Cuando la piedra pase por las rodillas, regálela sentándose hacia atrás y colocando la piedra sobre los muslos.

Sit low, getting the stone high onto your chest as you change your grip to reach over the stone. Párese, avanzando con las caderas. Close distance to the loading platform, and lean back, extending the hips to get the stone as high as possible.

name: Trail Running/Walking
instructions: Running or hiking on trails will get the blood pumping and heart beating almost immediately. Make sure you have good shoes. While you use the muscles in your calves and buttocks to pull yourself up a hill, the knees, joints and ankles absorb the bulk of the pounding coming back down. Take smaller steps as you walk downhill, keep your knees bent to reduce the impact and slow down to avoid falling.
A 150 lb person can burn over 200 calories for 30 minutes walking uphill, compared to 175 on a flat surface. If running the trail, a 150 lb person can burn well over 500 calories in 30 minutes.

en: Running or hiking on trails will get the blood pumping and heart beating almost immediately. Make sure you have good shoes. While you use the muscles in your calves and buttocks to pull yourself up a hill, the knees, joints and ankles absorb the bulk of the pounding coming back down. Take smaller steps as you walk downhill, keep your knees bent to reduce the impact and slow down to avoid falling.
A 150 lb person can burn over 200 calories for 30 minutes walking uphill, compared to 175 on a flat surface. If running the trail, a 150 lb person can burn well over 500 calories in 30 minutes.
es: Correr o caminar por senderos hará que la sangre bombee y el corazón lata casi de inmediato. Asegúrate de tener buenos zapatos. Mientras utilizas los músculos de las gemelos y las nalgas para subir una colina, las rodillas, las articulaciones y los tobillos absorben la mayor parte de los golpes que regresan. Da pasos más pequeños mientras caminas cuesta abajo, mantén las rodillas dobladas para reducir el impacto y reduce la velocidad para evitar caer.

Una persona de 150 libras puede quemar más de 200 calorías durante 30 minutos caminando cuesta arriba, en comparación con 175 en una superficie plana. Si corre por el sendero, una persona de 150 libras puede quemar más de 500 calorías en 30 minutos.

name: Skating
instructions: Roller skating is a fun activity which can be effective in improving cardiorespiratory fitness and muscular endurance. It requires relatively good balance and coordination. It is necessary to learn the basics of skating including turning and stopping and to wear protective gear to avoid possible injury.

You can skate at a comfortable pace for 30 minutes straight. If you want a cardio challenge, do interval skating – speed skate two minutes of every five minutes, using the remaining three minutes to recover. A 150 lb person will typically burn about 175 calories in 30 minutes skating at a comfortable pace, similar to brisk walking.

en: Roller skating is a fun activity which can be effective in improving cardiorespiratory fitness and muscular endurance. It requires relatively good balance and coordination. It is necessary to learn the basics of skating including turning and stopping and to wear protective gear to avoid possible injury.

You can skate at a comfortable pace for 30 minutes straight. If you want a cardio challenge, do interval skating – speed skate two minutes of every five minutes, using the remaining three minutes to recover. A 150 lb person will typically burn about 175 calories in 30 minutes skating at a comfortable pace, similar to brisk walking.
es: El patinaje sobre ruedas es una actividad divertida que puede resultar eficaz para mejorar la aptitud cardiorrespiratoria y la resistencia muscular. Requiere equilibrio y coordinación relativamente buenos. Es necesario aprender los conceptos básicos del patinaje, incluidos girar y detenerse, y usar equipo de protección para evitar posibles lesiones.

Podrás patinar a un ritmo cómodo durante 30 minutos seguidos. Si quieres un desafío cardiovascular, practica patinaje a intervalos: patina velocidad dos minutos de cada cinco minutos y utiliza los tres minutos restantes para recuperarte. Una persona de 150 libras normalmente quemará alrededor de 175 calorías en 30 minutos patinando a un ritmo cómodo, similar a caminar a paso ligero.

name: Rollerblading
instructions: Roller skating is a fun activity which can be effective in improving cardiorespiratory fitness and muscular endurance. It requires relatively good balance and coordination. It is necessary to learn the basics of skating including turning and stopping and to wear protective gear to avoid possible injury.

You can skate at a comfortable pace for 30 minutes straight. If you want a cardio challenge, do interval skating – speed skate two minutes of every five minutes, using the remaining three minutes to recover. A 150 lb person will typically burn about 175 calories in 30 minutes skating at a comfortable pace, similar to brisk walking.

en: Roller skating is a fun activity which can be effective in improving cardiorespiratory fitness and muscular endurance. It requires relatively good balance and coordination. It is necessary to learn the basics of skating including turning and stopping and to wear protective gear to avoid possible injury.

You can skate at a comfortable pace for 30 minutes straight. If you want a cardio challenge, do interval skating – speed skate two minutes of every five minutes, using the remaining three minutes to recover. A 150 lb person will typically burn about 175 calories in 30 minutes skating at a comfortable pace, similar to brisk walking.

Requiere equilibrio y coordinación relativamente buenos. Es necesario aprender los conceptos básicos del patinaje, incluidos girar y detenerse, y usar equipo de protección para evitar posibles lesiones.

Podrás patinar a un ritmo cómodo durante 30 minutos seguidos. Si quieres un desafío cardiovascular, practica patinaje a intervalos: patina velocidad dos minutos de cada cinco minutos y utiliza los tres minutos restantes para recuperarte.
