Una persona de 150 libras normalmente quemará alrededor de 175 calorías en 30 minutos patinando a un ritmo cómodo, similar a caminar a paso ligero.

name: London Bridges
instructions: Attach a climbing rope to a high beam or cross member. Below it, ensure that the smith machine bar is locked in place with the safeties and cannot move. Alternatively, a secure box could also be utilized.
Stand on the bar, using the rope to balance yourself. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your body straight, lean back and lower your body by slowly going hand over hand with the rope. Continue until you are perpendicular to the ground.
Keeping your body straight, reverse the motion, going hand over hand back to the starting position.

en: Attach a climbing rope to a high beam or cross member. Below it, ensure that the smith machine bar is locked in place with the safeties and cannot move. Alternatively, a secure box could also be utilized.
Stand on the bar, using the rope to balance yourself. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your body straight, lean back and lower your body by slowly going hand over hand with the rope. Continue until you are perpendicular to the ground.
Keeping your body straight, reverse the motion, going hand over hand back to the starting position.
es: Conecte una cuerda para escalar a una viga alta o un travesaño. Debajo, asegúrese de que la barra de la máquina Smith esté bloqueada en su lugar con los seguros y no pueda moverse. Alternativamente, también se podría utilizar una caja de seguridad.
Párate sobre la barra, usando la cuerda para mantener el equilibrio. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Manteniendo el cuerpo recto, inclínese hacia atrás y baje el cuerpo pasando lentamente la cuerda de mano en mano. Continúe hasta que esté perpendicular al suelo.
Manteniendo el cuerpo recto, invierta el movimiento, volviendo mano a mano a la posición inicial.

name: Superman
instructions: To begin, lie straight and face down on the floor or exercise mat.  Your arms should be fully extended in front of you. This is the starting position.
Either simultaneously raise your arms, legs, and chest off of the floor and hold this contraction for 2 seconds. Tip: Squeeze your lower back to get the best results from this exercise.
Or, raise the opposite leg and arm, hold for a few seconds and then alternate.
Remember to exhale during this movement.  Note: When holding the contracted position, you should look like superman when he is flying.
Slowly begin to lower your arms, legs and chest back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions prescribed in your program.
Variations: You can also perform this exercise using one arm and leg at a time. Simply elevating your left leg, arm and side of your chest and do the same with the right side.

en: To begin, lie straight and face down on the floor or exercise mat.  Your arms should be fully extended in front of you. This is the starting position.
Either simultaneously raise your arms, legs, and chest off of the floor and hold this contraction for 2 seconds. Tip: Squeeze your lower back to get the best results from this exercise.
Or, raise the opposite leg and arm, hold for a few seconds and then alternate.
Remember to exhale during this movement.  Note: When holding the contracted position, you should look like superman when he is flying.
Slowly begin to lower your arms, legs and chest back down to the starting position while inhaling.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions prescribed in your program.
Variations: You can also perform this exercise using one arm and leg at a time. Simply elevating your left leg, arm and side of your chest and do the same with the right side.
es: Para comenzar, acuéstese derecho y boca abajo en el suelo o en la colchoneta de ejercicios.  Tus brazos deben estar completamente extendidos frente a ti. Esta es la posición inicial.

Levante simultáneamente los brazos, las piernas y el pecho del suelo y mantenga esta contracción durante 2 segundos. Consejo: apriete la zona lumbar para obtener los mejores resultados de este ejercicio.
O levante la pierna y el brazo opuestos, manténgalo así durante unos segundos y luego alterne.
Recuerda exhalar durante este movimiento.  Nota: Cuando mantengas la posición contraída, deberías parecer Superman cuando esté volando.
Lentamente comience a bajar los brazos, las piernas y el pecho hasta la posición inicial mientras inhala.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones prescritas en su programa.
Variaciones: También puedes realizar este ejercicio usando un brazo y una pierna a la vez. Simplemente eleva la pierna izquierda, el brazo y el costado del pecho y haz lo mismo con el lado derecho.

name: Stomach Vacuum
instructions: To begin, stand straight with your feet shoulder width apart from each other.  Place your hands on your hips.  This is the starting position.

Now slowly inhale as much air as possible and then start to exhale as much as possible while bringing your stomach in as much as possible and hold this position.  Try to visualize your navel touching your backbone.
One isometric contraction is around 20 seconds. During the 20 second hold, try to breathe normally.  Then inhale and bring your stomach back to the starting position.
Once you have practiced this exercise, try to perform this exercise for longer than 20 seconds. Tip: You can work your way up to 40-60 seconds.
Repeat for the recommended amount of sets.

en: To begin, stand straight with your feet shoulder width apart from each other.  Place your hands on your hips.  This is the starting position.

Now slowly inhale as much air as possible and then start to exhale as much as possible while bringing your stomach in as much as possible and hold this position.  Try to visualize your navel touching your backbone.
One isometric contraction is around 20 seconds. During the 20 second hold, try to breathe normally.  Then inhale and bring your stomach back to the starting position.
Once you have practiced this exercise, try to perform this exercise for longer than 20 seconds. Tip: You can work your way up to 40-60 seconds.
Repeat for the recommended amount of sets.
es: Para comenzar, párese derecho con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros.  Coloque sus manos en sus caderas.  Esta es la posición inicial.

Ahora inhale lentamente la mayor cantidad de aire posible y luego comience a exhalar tanto como sea posible mientras acerca el estómago tanto como sea posible y mantenga esta posición.  Intenta visualizar tu ombligo tocando tu columna vertebral.
Una contracción isométrica dura unos 20 segundos. Durante los 20 segundos que esperas, intenta respira normalmente.  Luego inhala y lleva el estómago a la posición inicial.
Una vez que hayas practicado este ejercicio, intenta realizarlo durante más de 20 segundos. Consejo: Puedes avanzar hasta 40-60 segundos.
Repita para la carga indicada de series.

name: Standing Towel Triceps Extension
instructions: To begin, stand up with both arms fully extended above the head holding one end of a towel with both hands.  Your elbows should be in and the arms perpendicular to the floor with the palms facing each other while your feet should be shoulder width apart from each other.  This is the starting position.

Now communicate with your partner so that he/she can grip the other side of the towel to apply resistance.  Keeping your upper arms close to your head (elbows in) and perpendicular to the floor, lower the resistance in a semicircular motion behind your head until your forearms touch your biceps. Tip: The upper arms should remain stationary and only the forearms should move.  Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go back to the starting position by using the triceps to raise the towel. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Caution: Make sure your partner does not apply to much resistance or suddenly jerks the towel as doing so could cause injury.  Start out by having your partner applying barely any resistance so you can get used to the exercise.  As you practice the exercise, then your partner can gradually begin to increase the resistance of the exercise.
Variation: You can perform this exercise with one arm at a time or even sitting down for more back support.

name.es: Extensión de tríceps con toalla de pie

en: To begin, stand up with both arms fully extended above the head holding one end of a towel with both hands.  Your elbows should be in and the arms perpendicular to the floor with the palms facing each other while your feet should be shoulder width apart from each other.  This is the starting position.

Now communicate with your partner so that he/she can grip the other side of the towel to apply resistance.  Keeping your upper arms close to your head (elbows in) and perpendicular to the floor, lower the resistance in a semicircular motion behind your head until your forearms touch your biceps. Tip: The upper arms should remain stationary and only the forearms should move.  Breathe in as you perform this step.
Go back to the starting position by using the triceps to raise the towel. Breathe out as you perform this step.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Caution: Make sure your partner does not apply to much resistance or suddenly jerks the towel as doing so could cause injury.  Start out by having your partner applying barely any resistance so you can get used to the exercise.  As you practice the exercise, then your partner can gradually begin to increase the resistance of the exercise.
Variation: You can perform this exercise with one arm at a time or even sitting down for more back support.
es: Para comenzar, levántese con ambos brazos completamente extendidos por encima de la cabeza sosteniendo un extremo de una toalla con ambas manos.  Los codos deben estar hacia adentro y los brazos perpendiculares al piso con las palmas una frente a la otra, mientras que los pies deben estar separados al ancho de los hombros.  Esta es la posición inicial.

Ahora comunícate con tu compañero para que pueda agarrar el otro lado de la toalla y aplicar resistencia.  Manteniendo la parte superior de los brazos cerca de la cabeza (codos hacia adentro) y perpendicular al piso, baje la resistencia con un movimiento semicircular detrás de la cabeza hasta que los antebrazos toquen los bíceps. Consejo: la parte superior de los brazos debe permanecer estática y solo los antebrazos deben moverse.  Inhale mientras realiza este paso.
Vuelve a la posición inicial utilizando los tríceps para levantar la toalla. Exhale mientras realiza este paso.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.

Precaución: asegúrese de que su pareja no aplique mucha resistencia o tire repentinamente de la toalla, ya que hacerlo podría causar lesiones.  Comience haciendo que su compañero apenas aplique resistencia para que usted pueda acostumbrarse al ejercicio.  A medida que practique el ejercicio, su compañero podrá comenzar gradualmente a aumentar la resistencia del ejercicio.
Variación: puedes realizar este ejercicio con un brazo a la vez o incluso sentarte para tener más apoyo para la espalda.

name: Standing Long Jump
instructions: This drill is best done in sand or other soft landing surface. Ensure that you are able to measure distance. Stand in a partial squat stance with feet shoulder width apart.
Utilizing a big arm swing and a countermovement of the legs, jump forward as far as you can.
Attempt to land with your feet out in front you, reaching as far as possible with your legs.
Measure the distance from your landing point to the starting point and track results.

en: This drill is best done in sand or other soft landing surface. Ensure that you are able to measure distance. Stand in a partial squat stance with feet shoulder width apart.
Utilizing a big arm swing and a countermovement of the legs, jump forward as far as you can.
Attempt to land with your feet out in front you, reaching as far as possible with your legs.
Measure the distance from your landing point to the starting point and track results.
es: Este ejercicio se realiza mejor en arena u otra superficie de aterrizaje suave. Asegúrese de poder medir la distancia. Párese en posición de sentadilla parcial con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros.
Utilizando un gran balanceo de brazos y un contramovimiento de las piernas, salta hacia adelante lo más que puedas.
Intente aterrizar con los pies delante de usted y llegue lo más lejos posible con las piernas.
Mida la distancia desde su punto de aterrizaje hasta el punto de partida y realice un seguimiento de los resultados.

name: Spider Crawl
instructions: Begin in a prone position on the floor. Support your weight on your hands and toes, with your feet together and your body straight. Your arms should be bent to 90 degrees. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by raising one foot off of the ground. Externally rotate the leg and bring the knee toward your elbow, as far forward as possible.
Return this leg to the starting position and repeat on the opposite side.

en: Begin in a prone position on the floor. Support your weight on your hands and toes, with your feet together and your body straight. Your arms should be bent to 90 degrees. This will be your starting position.
Initiate the movement by raising one foot off of the ground. Externally rotate the leg and bring the knee toward your elbow, as far forward as possible.
Return this leg to the starting position and repeat on the opposite side.
es: Comience en una posición boca abajo en el suelo. Apoya tu peso sobre las manos y los dedos de los pies, con los pies juntos y el cuerpo recto. Tus brazos deben estar doblados a 90 grados. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Inicia el movimiento levantando un pie del suelo. Gire externamente la pierna y lleve la rodilla hacia el codo, lo más adelante posible.
Regrese esta pierna a la posición inicial y repita en el lado opuesto.

name: Single Leg Push-off
instructions: Stand on the ground with one foot resting on the box, heel close to the edge.
Push off with your foot on top of the box, trying to gain as much height as possible by extending through the hip and knee.
Land with the same foot on top of the box, returning your other foot back to the start position.

en: Stand on the ground with one foot resting on the box, heel close to the edge.
Push off with your foot on top of the box, trying to gain as much height as possible by extending through the hip and knee.
Land with the same foot on top of the box, returning your other foot back to the start position.
es: Párese en el suelo con un pie apoyado sobre la caja y el talón cerca del borde.
Empuja con el pie encima de la caja, intentando ganar la mayor altura posible extendiendo la cadera y la rodilla.
Aterriza con el mismo pie encima de la caja y regresa el otro pie a la posición inicial.

name: Single-Arm Push-Up
instructions: Begin laying prone on the ground. Move yourself into a position supporting your weight on your toes and one arm. Your working arm should be placed directly under the shoulder, fully extended. Your legs should be extended, and for this movement you may need a wider base, placing your feet further apart than in a normal push-up.
Maintain good posture, and place your free hand behind your back. This will be your starting position.
Lower yourself by allowing the elbow to flex until you touch the ground.
Descend slowly, and reverse direction be extending the arm to return to the starting position.

en: Begin laying prone on the ground. Move yourself into a position supporting your weight on your toes and one arm. Your working arm should be placed directly under the shoulder, fully extended. Your legs should be extended, and for this movement you may need a wider base, placing your feet further apart than in a normal push-up.
Maintain good posture, and place your free hand behind your back. This will be your starting position.
Lower yourself by allowing the elbow to flex until you touch the ground.
Descend slowly, and reverse direction be extending the arm to return to the starting position.
es: Comience a recostarse boca abajo en el suelo. Colóquese en una posición que apoye su peso sobre los dedos de los pies y un brazo. Su brazo de trabajo debe colocarse directamente debajo del hombro, completamente extendido. Tus piernas deben estar extendidas, y para este movimiento es posible que necesites una base más amplia, colocando los pies más separados que en una flexión normal.
Mantenga una buena postura y coloque la mano libre detrás de la espalda. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Bájate permitiendo que el codo se flexione hasta tocar el suelo.
Desciende lentamente, e invierte la dirección extendiendo el brazo para volver a la posición inicial.

name: Side To Side Chins
instructions: Grab the pull-up bar with the palms facing forward using a wide grip.

As you have both arms extended in front of you holding the bar at a wide grip, bring your torso back around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower back and sticking your chest out.  This is your starting position.

Pull your torso up while leaning to the left hand side until the bar almost touches your upper chest by drawing the shoulders and the upper arms down and back.  Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement.  Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the full contracted position.  The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space (no swinging) and only the arms should move.  The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second of contraction, inhale as you go back to the starting position.

Now, pull your torso up while leaning to the right hand side until the bar almost touches your upper chest by drawing the shoulders and the upper arms down and back.  Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement.  Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the full contracted position.  The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the arms should move.  The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second of contraction, inhale as you go back to the starting position.
Repeat steps 3-6 until you have performed the prescribed amount of repetitions for each side.

Caution: If you are new to this exercise and do not have the strength to perform it, using a spotter to hold your legs can help being that it requires putting a lot of stress on the rotator cuffs.  Alternatively you can also use a chin assist machine.

Variations: If you have developed enough strength to perform this exercise with weights, do so with caution.  Side to side chins can be a challenging exercise and if not performed correctly, can cause injury.  Before attempting to use weights, make sure you are able to perform the exercise with good form.

You can also perform the side to side chins by doing all reps to one side and then the next or by also including the middle movement as well (in which case you would pull up first to the left hand side, then the middle and then the right side).
You can use a chin assist machine if you do not have the strength to perform the exercise on your own.

en: Grab the pull-up bar with the palms facing forward using a wide grip.

As you have both arms extended in front of you holding the bar at a wide grip, bring your torso back around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower back and sticking your chest out.  This is your starting position.

Pull your torso up while leaning to the left hand side until the bar almost touches your upper chest by drawing the shoulders and the upper arms down and back.  Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement.  Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the full contracted position.  The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space (no swinging) and only the arms should move.  The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second of contraction, inhale as you go back to the starting position.

Now, pull your torso up while leaning to the right hand side until the bar almost touches your upper chest by drawing the shoulders and the upper arms down and back.  Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement.  Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the full contracted position.  The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the arms should move.  The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second of contraction, inhale as you go back to the starting position.
Repeat steps 3-6 until you have performed the prescribed amount of repetitions for each side.

Caution: If you are new to this exercise and do not have the strength to perform it, using a spotter to hold your legs can help being that it requires putting a lot of stress on the rotator cuffs.  Alternatively you can also use a chin assist machine.

Variations: If you have developed enough strength to perform this exercise with weights, do so with caution.  Side to side chins can be a challenging exercise and if not performed correctly, can cause injury.  Before attempting to use weights, make sure you are able to perform the exercise with good form.

You can also perform the side to side chins by doing all reps to one side and then the next or by also including the middle movement as well (in which case you would pull up first to the left hand side, then the middle and then the right side).
You can use a chin assist machine if you do not have the strength to perform the exercise on your own.
es: Agarre la barra de dominadas con las palmas hacia adelante usando un agarre amplio.

Mientras tiene ambos brazos extendidos frente a usted sosteniendo la barra con un agarre amplio, lleve el torso hacia atrás unos 30 grados aproximadamente mientras crea una curvatura en la parte baja de la espalda y saca el pecho.  Esta es tu posición inicial.

Levante el torso mientras se inclina hacia el lado izquierdo hasta que la barra casi toque la parte superior del pecho tirando los hombros y la parte superior de los brazos hacia abajo y hacia atrás.  Exhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento.  Consejo: concéntrate en apretar los músculos de la espalda una vez que alcances la posición completamente contraída.  La parte superior del torso debe permanecer estacionaria mientras se mueve por el espacio (sin balancearse) y solo deben moverse los brazos.  Los antebrazos no deben realizar ningún otro trabajo más que sujetar la barra.
Después de un segundo de contracción, inhala mientras regresas a la posición inicial.

Ahora, levante el torso mientras se inclina hacia el lado derecho hasta que la barra casi toque la parte superior del pecho llevando los hombros y la parte superior de los brazos hacia abajo y hacia atrás.  Exhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento.  Consejo: concéntrate en apretar los músculos de la espalda una vez que alcances la posición completamente contraída.  La parte superior del torso debe permanecer estacionaria mientras se mueve por el espacio y solo deben moverse los brazos.  Los antebrazos no deben realizar ningún otro trabajo más que sujetar la barra.
Después de un segundo de contracción, inhala mientras regresas a la posición inicial.
Repita los pasos 3 a 6 hasta que haya realizado la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones para cada lado.

Precaución: si es nuevo en este ejercicio y no tiene la fuerza para realizarlo, usar un observador para sujetar las piernas puede ser útil, ya que requiere ejercer mucha presión sobre los manguitos rotadores.  Alternativamente, también puedes utilizar una máquina de ayuda para el mentón.

Variaciones: Si has desarrollado suficiente fuerza para realizar este ejercicio con pesas, hazlo con precaución.  Los mentones de lado a lado pueden ser un ejercicio desafiante y, si no se realizan correctamente, pueden causar lesiones.  Antes de intentar utilizar pesas, asegúrese de poder realizar el ejercicio con buena forma.

También puedes realizar dominadas de lado a lado haciendo todas las repeticiones hacia un lado y luego hacia el siguiente o incluyendo también el movimiento medio (en cuyo caso tirarías primero hacia el lado izquierdo, luego hacia el medio y luego hacia el lado derecho).
Puedes utilizar una máquina de apoyo para el mentón si no tienes la fuerza para realizar el ejercicio por tu cuenta.

name: Side Standing Long Jump
instructions: Begin standing with your feet hip width apart in an athletic stance. Your head and chest should be up, knees and hips slightly bent. This will be your starting position.
Leaning to your right, extend through your hips, knees, and ankles to jump into the air. Block with the arms to lead the movement, jumping as far to your right as you can.
Land facing the same direction with your feet hip width apart, absorbing the impact through your lower body.

en: Begin standing with your feet hip width apart in an athletic stance. Your head and chest should be up, knees and hips slightly bent. This will be your starting position.
Leaning to your right, extend through your hips, knees, and ankles to jump into the air. Block with the arms to lead the movement, jumping as far to your right as you can.
Land facing the same direction with your feet hip width apart, absorbing the impact through your lower body.
es: Comience de pie con los pies separados a la altura de las caderas en una postura atlética. La cabeza y el pecho deben estar erguidos, las rodillas y las caderas ligeramente flexionadas. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Inclinándote hacia la derecha, extiende las caderas, las rodillas y los tobillos para saltar en el aire. Bloquea con los brazos para liderar el movimiento, saltando lo más hacia la derecha que puedas.
Aterriza mirando en la misma dirección con los pies separados a la altura de las caderas, absorbiendo el impacto a través de la parte inferior del cuerpo.

name: Side Hop-Sprint
instructions: Stand to the side of a cone or hurdle.
Begin this drill by hopping sideways over the obstacle, rebounding out of your landing to hop back to where you started.
Hop for a prescribed number or repetitions as quickly as possible, and finish this drill by sprinting a short distance upon landing the last hop.

en: Stand to the side of a cone or hurdle.
Begin this drill by hopping sideways over the obstacle, rebounding out of your landing to hop back to where you started.
Hop for a prescribed number or repetitions as quickly as possible, and finish this drill by sprinting a short distance upon landing the last hop.
es: Párese al lado de un cono o una valla.
Comience este ejercicio saltando de lado sobre el obstáculo, rebotando desde su aterrizaje para regresar al punto de partida.
Salta un número determinado de repeticiones lo más rápido posible y finaliza este ejercicio corriendo una distancia corta al realizar el último salto.

name: Shoulder Raise
instructions: Relax your arms to your sides and raise your shoulders up toward your ears, then back down.

en: Relax your arms to your sides and raise your shoulders up toward your ears, then back down.
es: Relaje los brazos a los costados y levante los hombros hacia las orejas, luego vuelva a bajar.

name: Rocky Pull-Ups/Pulldowns
instructions: Grab the pull-up bar with the palms facing forward using a wide grip.

As you have both arms extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, bring your torso back around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower back and sticking your chest out.  This is your starting position.

Pull your torso up until the bar touches your upper chest by drawing the shoulders and the upper arms down and back.  Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the full contracted position.  The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the arms should move.  The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second on the contracted position, start to inhale and slowly lower your torso back to the starting position when your arms are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.

Now repeat the same movements as described above except this time your torso will remain straight as you go up and the bar will touch the back of the neck instead of the upper chest. Tip: Use the head to lean forward slightly as it will help you properly execute this portion of the exercise.
Once you have lowered yourself back down to the starting position, repeat the exercise for the prescribed amount of repetitions in your program.

Caution: The behind the neck variation can be hard on the rotator cuff due to the hyperextension created by bringing the bar behind the neck so this exercise is not recommended for people with shoulder problems.
Variations:
If you are new at this exercise and do not have the strength to perform it, use a chin assist machine if available.  These machines use weight to help you push your bodyweight.
Otherwise, a spotter holding your legs can help.
You can also use a pull-down machine.

en: Grab the pull-up bar with the palms facing forward using a wide grip.

As you have both arms extended in front of you holding the bar at the chosen grip width, bring your torso back around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower back and sticking your chest out.  This is your starting position.

Pull your torso up until the bar touches your upper chest by drawing the shoulders and the upper arms down and back.  Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement. Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the full contracted position.  The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the arms should move.  The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second on the contracted position, start to inhale and slowly lower your torso back to the starting position when your arms are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.

Now repeat the same movements as described above except this time your torso will remain straight as you go up and the bar will touch the back of the neck instead of the upper chest. Tip: Use the head to lean forward slightly as it will help you properly execute this portion of the exercise.
Once you have lowered yourself back down to the starting position, repeat the exercise for the prescribed amount of repetitions in your program.

Caution: The behind the neck variation can be hard on the rotator cuff due to the hyperextension created by bringing the bar behind the neck so this exercise is not recommended for people with shoulder problems.
Variations:
If you are new at this exercise and do not have the strength to perform it, use a chin assist machine if available.  These machines use weight to help you push your bodyweight.
Otherwise, a spotter holding your legs can help.
You can also use a pull-down machine.
es: Agarre la barra de dominadas con las palmas hacia adelante usando un agarre amplio.

Mientras tiene ambos brazos extendidos frente a usted sosteniendo la barra con el ancho de agarre elegido, lleve el torso hacia atrás unos 30 grados aproximadamente mientras crea una curvatura en la parte baja de la espalda y saca el pecho.  Esta es tu posición inicial.

Levante el torso hasta que la barra toque la parte superior del pecho llevando los hombros y la parte superior de los brazos hacia abajo y hacia atrás.  Exhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento. Consejo: concéntrate en apretar los músculos de la espalda una vez que alcances la posición completamente contraída.  La parte superior del torso debe permanecer estacionaria mientras se mueve por el espacio y solo deben moverse los brazos.  Los antebrazos no deben realizar ningún otro trabajo más que sujetar la barra.

Después de un segundo en la posición contraída, comience a inhalar y baje lentamente el torso hasta la posición inicial cuando los brazos estén completamente extendidos y los dorsales completamente estirados.

Ahora repite los mismos movimientos descritos anteriormente, excepto que esta vez tu torso permanecerá recto a medida que subes y la barra tocará la parte posterior del cuello en lugar de la parte superior del pecho. Consejo: utilice la cabeza para inclinarse ligeramente hacia adelante, ya que le ayudará a ejecutar correctamente esta parte del ejercicio.
Una vez que haya vuelto a bajar a la posición inicial, repita el ejercicio durante la cantidad de repeticiones prescrita en su programa.

Precaución: La variación detrás del cuello puede ser dura para el manguito rotador debido a la hiperextensión creada al llevar la barra detrás del cuello, por lo que este ejercicio no se recomienda para personas con problemas en el hombro.
Variaciones:

Si eres nuevo en este ejercicio y no tienes la fuerza para realizarlo, utiliza una máquina de ayuda para el mentón, si está disponible.  Estas máquinas utilizan peso para ayudarle a impulsar su peso corporal.
De lo contrario, un observador que le sujete las piernas puede resultar útil.
También puedes utilizar una máquina desplegable.

name: Rocket Jump
instructions: Begin in a relaxed stance with your feet shoulder width apart and hold your arms close to the body.
To initiate the move, squat down halfway and explode back up as high as possible.
Fully extend your entire body, reaching overhead as far as possible. As you land,  absorb your impact through the legs.

en: Begin in a relaxed stance with your feet shoulder width apart and hold your arms close to the body.
To initiate the move, squat down halfway and explode back up as high as possible.
Fully extend your entire body, reaching overhead as far as possible. As you land,  absorb your impact through the legs.
es: Comience en una postura relajada con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros y mantenga los brazos cerca del cuerpo.
Para iniciar el movimiento, agáchate hasta la mitad y explota lo más alto posible.
Extiende completamente todo tu cuerpo, extendiendo la mano lo más que puedas por encima de tu cabeza. Al aterrizar, absorbe el impacto a través de las piernas.

name: Rear Leg Raises
instructions: Place yourself on your hands knees on an exercise mat. Your head should be looking forward and the bend of the knees should create a 90-degree angle between the hamstrings and the calves. This will be your starting position.
Extend one leg up and behind you. The knee and hip should both extend. Repeat for 5-10 repetitions, and then switch sides.

en: Place yourself on your hands knees on an exercise mat. Your head should be looking forward and the bend of the knees should create a 90-degree angle between the hamstrings and the calves. This will be your starting position.
Extend one leg up and behind you. The knee and hip should both extend. Repeat for 5-10 repetitions, and then switch sides.
es: Colóquese sobre las rodillas sobre una colchoneta de ejercicios. Tu cabeza debe mirar hacia adelante y la flexión de las rodillas debe crear un ángulo de 90 grados entre los isquiosurales y las gemelos. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Extiende una pierna hacia arriba y detrás de ti. Tanto la rodilla como la cadera deben extenderse. Repita de 5 a 10 repeticiones y luego cambie de lado.

name: Quick Leap
instructions: You will need a box for this exerise.
Begin facing the box standing 1-2 feet from its edge.
By utilizing your hips, hop onto the box, landing on both legs. Ensure that you land with your legs bent and your feet flat.
Immediately upon landing, fully extend through the entire body and swing your arms overhead to explode off of the box. Use your legs to absorb the impact of landing.

en: You will need a box for this exerise.
Begin facing the box standing 1-2 feet from its edge.
By utilizing your hips, hop onto the box, landing on both legs. Ensure that you land with your legs bent and your feet flat.
Immediately upon landing, fully extend through the entire body and swing your arms overhead to explode off of the box. Use your legs to absorb the impact of landing.
es: Necesitará una caja para este ejercicio.
Comience a mirar la caja a 1 o 2 pies de su borde.
Utilizando las caderas, salta sobre la caja y aterriza con ambas piernas. Asegúrese de aterrizar con las piernas dobladas y los pies planos.

Inmediatamente después de aterrizar, extiéndase completamente por todo el cuerpo y mueva los brazos por encima de la cabeza para salir disparado de la caja. Utilice sus piernas para absorber el impacto del aterrizaje.

name: Platform Hamstring Slides
instructions: For this movement a wooden floor or similar is needed. Lay on your back with your legs extended. Place a gym towel or a light weight underneath your heel. This will be your starting position.
Begin the movement by flexing the knee, keeping your other leg straight.
Continue bringing the heel closer to you, sliding it on the floor.
At full knee flexion, reverse the movement to return to the starting position.

en: For this movement a wooden floor or similar is needed. Lay on your back with your legs extended. Place a gym towel or a light weight underneath your heel. This will be your starting position.
Begin the movement by flexing the knee, keeping your other leg straight.
Continue bringing the heel closer to you, sliding it on the floor.
At full knee flexion, reverse the movement to return to the starting position.
es: Para este movimiento se necesita un suelo de madera o similar. Acuéstese boca arriba con las piernas extendidas. Coloque una toalla de gimnasia o un peso liviano debajo del talón. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Comienza el movimiento flexionando la rodilla, manteniendo la otra pierna estirada.
Continúa acercando el talón a ti, deslizándolo por el suelo.
En flexión completa de la rodilla, invierta el movimiento para volver a la posición inicial.

name: one-arm push-up
instructions: Begin laying prone on the ground. Move yourself into a position supporting your weight on your toes and one arm. Your working arm should be placed directly under the shoulder, fully extended. Your legs should be extended, and for this movement you may need a wider base, placing your feet further apart than in a normal push-up.
Maintain good posture, and place your free hand behind your back. This will be your starting position.
Lower yourself by allowing the elbow to flex until you touch the ground.
Descend slowly, and reverse direction be extending the arm to return to the starting position.

en: Begin laying prone on the ground. Move yourself into a position supporting your weight on your toes and one arm. Your working arm should be placed directly under the shoulder, fully extended. Your legs should be extended, and for this movement you may need a wider base, placing your feet further apart than in a normal push-up.
Maintain good posture, and place your free hand behind your back. This will be your starting position.
Lower yourself by allowing the elbow to flex until you touch the ground.
Descend slowly, and reverse direction be extending the arm to return to the starting position.
es: Comience a recostarse boca abajo en el suelo. Colóquese en una posición que apoye su peso sobre los dedos de los pies y un brazo. Su brazo de trabajo debe colocarse directamente debajo del hombro, completamente extendido. Tus piernas deben estar extendidas, y para este movimiento es posible que necesites una base más amplia, colocando los pies más separados que en una flexión normal.
Mantenga una buena postura y coloque la mano libre detrás de la espalda. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Bájate permitiendo que el codo se flexione hasta tocar el suelo.
Desciende lentamente, e invierte la dirección extendiendo el brazo para volver a la posición inicial.

name: One-Arm Chin
instructions: For this exercise, start out by placing a towel around a chin up bar.
Grab the chin-up bar with your palm facing you.  One hand will be grabbing the chin-up bar and the other will be grabbing the towel.
Bring your torso back around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower back and sticking your chest out.  This is your starting position.v

Pull your torso up until the bar touches your upper chest by drawing the shoulders and the upper arms down and back.  Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement.  Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the full contracted position.  The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the arms should move.  The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second on the contracted position, start to inhale and slowly lower your torso back to the starting position when your arms are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.
Repeat this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the movement.
Variations:
If you are new at this exercise and do not have the strength to perform it, use a chin assist machine if available.  These machines use weight to help you push your bodyweight.
Otherwise, a spotter holding your legs can help.

en: For this exercise, start out by placing a towel around a chin up bar.
Grab the chin-up bar with your palm facing you.  One hand will be grabbing the chin-up bar and the other will be grabbing the towel.
Bring your torso back around 30 degrees or so while creating a curvature on your lower back and sticking your chest out.  This is your starting position.v

Pull your torso up until the bar touches your upper chest by drawing the shoulders and the upper arms down and back.  Exhale as you perform this portion of the movement.  Tip: Concentrate on squeezing the back muscles once you reach the full contracted position.  The upper torso should remain stationary as it moves through space and only the arms should move.  The forearms should do no other work other than hold the bar.
After a second on the contracted position, start to inhale and slowly lower your torso back to the starting position when your arms are fully extended and the lats are fully stretched.
Repeat this motion for the prescribed amount of repetitions.
Switch arms and repeat the movement.
Variations:
If you are new at this exercise and do not have the strength to perform it, use a chin assist machine if available.  These machines use weight to help you push your bodyweight.
Otherwise, a spotter holding your legs can help.
es: Para este ejercicio, comience colocando una toalla alrededor de una barra de dominadas.
Agarre la barra de dominadas con la palma hacia usted.  Una mano agarrará la barra de dominadas y la otra agarrará la toalla.
Lleve el torso hacia atrás unos 30 grados aproximadamente mientras crea una curvatura en la parte baja de la espalda y saca el pecho.  Esta es tu posición inicial.v

Levante el torso hasta que la barra toque la parte superior del pecho llevando los hombros y la parte superior de los brazos hacia abajo y hacia atrás.  Exhala mientras realizas esta parte del movimiento.  Consejo: concéntrate en apretar los músculos de la espalda una vez que alcances la posición completamente contraída.  La parte superior del torso debe permanecer estacionaria mientras se mueve por el espacio y solo deben moverse los brazos.  Los antebrazos no deben realizar ningún otro trabajo más que sujetar la barra.

Después de un segundo en la posición contraída, comience a inhalar y baje lentamente el torso hasta la posición inicial cuando los brazos estén completamente extendidos y los dorsales completamente estirados.
Repita este movimiento durante la cantidad prescrita de repeticiones.
Cambia de brazo y repite el movimiento.
Variaciones:

Si eres nuevo en este ejercicio y no tienes la fuerza para realizarlo, utiliza una máquina de ayuda para el mentón, si está disponible.  Estas máquinas utilizan peso para ayudarle a impulsar su peso corporal.
De lo contrario, un observador que le sujete las piernas puede resultar útil.

name: Ring Muscle-Up
instructions: Hang from gymnastic rings with a false grip — the base of your palms wraps over the top of each ring so the wrist is bent and the rings sit at heel-of-hand level.
Engage the lats and brace the core. Pull the rings down and into your chest in an explosive ring pull-up, keeping the rings close to the body throughout.
As your sternum reaches ring height, aggressively roll the shoulders forward and drive the chest through the rings. Your elbows should rotate from pointing down to pointing back.
From the transition, press out by extending the elbows and locking out the arms overhead, finishing in a stable support position with the rings turned out.
Lower under control through the dip, return through the transition, and descend to a dead hang. Repeat for the prescribed reps.

en: Hang from gymnastic rings with a false grip — the base of your palms wraps over the top of each ring so the wrist is bent and the rings sit at heel-of-hand level.
Engage the lats and brace the core. Pull the rings down and into your chest in an explosive ring pull-up, keeping the rings close to the body throughout.
As your sternum reaches ring height, aggressively roll the shoulders forward and drive the chest through the rings. Your elbows should rotate from pointing down to pointing back.
From the transition, press out by extending the elbows and locking out the arms overhead, finishing in a stable support position with the rings turned out.
Lower under control through the dip, return through the transition, and descend to a dead hang. Repeat for the prescribed reps.
es: Cuélgate de las anillas con agarre falso — la base de la palma queda por encima de cada anilla, con la muñeca flexionada y la anilla a la altura del talón de la mano.
Activa los dorsales y el core. Tira de las anillas hacia el pecho de forma explosiva en una dominada de anillas, manteniéndolas pegadas al cuerpo.

Cuando el esternón llegue a la altura de las anillas, gira los hombros hacia delante con agresividad y empuja el pecho a través de las anillas. Los codos pasan de apuntar hacia abajo a apuntar hacia atrás.
Desde la transición, empuja extendiendo los codos hasta el bloqueo en posición de apoyo arriba, con las anillas giradas hacia fuera.
Baja con control por el fondo, vuelve a pasar por la transición y termina en suspensión total. Repite las repeticiones marcadas.

name: Moving Claw Series
instructions: This move helps prepare your running form to help you excel at sprinting. As you run, be sure to flex the knee, aiming to kick your glutes as the hip extends.
Reload the quad as the leg moves back forward, attacking the ground on the next step.
Ensure that as you run, you block with the arms, punching through in a rapid 1-2 motion.

en: This move helps prepare your running form to help you excel at sprinting. As you run, be sure to flex the knee, aiming to kick your glutes as the hip extends.
Reload the quad as the leg moves back forward, attacking the ground on the next step.
Ensure that as you run, you block with the arms, punching through in a rapid 1-2 motion.
es: Este movimiento ayuda a preparar tu forma de correr para ayudarte a sobresalir en las carreras de velocidad. Mientras corres, asegúrate de flexionar la rodilla, con el objetivo de patear los glúteos mientras la cadera se extiende.
Vuelva a cargar el cuádriceps a medida que la pierna avanza hacia atrás, atacando el suelo en el siguiente paso.
Asegúrate de bloquear con los brazos mientras corres, golpeando con un movimiento rápido de 1-2.

name: Mixed Grip Pull-Up
instructions: Grip a pull-up bar with hands slightly wider than shoulder width: one hand pronated (palm facing away) and the other supinated (palm facing you).
Hang at full extension with shoulders engaged and core braced. Cross the ankles for stability.
Pull yourself up by driving the elbows down, keeping the chest tall and the shoulders square — resist the tendency to twist toward the supinated hand.
Continue until the chin clears the bar, then lower under control to a full dead hang.
On the next set, swap the grips so each side trains symmetrically. Repeat for the prescribed reps.

en: Grip a pull-up bar with hands slightly wider than shoulder width: one hand pronated (palm facing away) and the other supinated (palm facing you).
Hang at full extension with shoulders engaged and core braced. Cross the ankles for stability.
Pull yourself up by driving the elbows down, keeping the chest tall and the shoulders square — resist the tendency to twist toward the supinated hand.
Continue until the chin clears the bar, then lower under control to a full dead hang.
On the next set, swap the grips so each side trains symmetrically. Repeat for the prescribed reps.
es: Agarra la barra ligeramente más ancho que los hombros: una mano en pronación (palma hacia delante) y la otra en supinación (palma hacia ti).
Cuélgate con los brazos extendidos, hombros activos y core comprometido. Cruza los tobillos para estabilizar.
Súbete tirando con los codos hacia abajo, manteniendo el pecho alto y los hombros cuadrados — evita rotar hacia la mano en supinación.
Continúa hasta que la barbilla supere la barra y baja con control hasta la suspensión completa.
En la siguiente serie cambia los agarres para entrenar de forma simétrica. Repite las repeticiones marcadas.

name: Mixed Grip Chin
instructions: Using a spacing that is just about 1 inch wider than shoulder width, grab a pull-up bar with the palms of one hand facing forward and the palms of the other hand facing towards you.  This will be your starting position.

Now start to pull yourself up as you exhale.  Tip: With the arm that has the palms facing up concentrate on using the back muscles in order to perform the movement.  The elbow of that arm should remain close to the torso.  With the other arm that has the palms facing forward, the elbows will be away but in line with the torso.  You will concentrate on using the lats to pull your body up.
After a second contraction at the top, start to slowly come down as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

On the following set, switch grips; so if you had the right hand with the palms facing you and the left one with the palms facing forward, on the next set you will have the palms facing forward for the right hand and facing you for the left.
Variations:
If you are new at this exercise and do not have the strength to perform it, use a chin assist machine if available.  These machines use weight to help you push your bodyweight.
Otherwise, a spotter holding your legs can help.
On the other hand, more advanced lifters can add weight to the exercise by using a weight belt that allows the addition of weighted plates.

en: Using a spacing that is just about 1 inch wider than shoulder width, grab a pull-up bar with the palms of one hand facing forward and the palms of the other hand facing towards you.  This will be your starting position.

Now start to pull yourself up as you exhale.  Tip: With the arm that has the palms facing up concentrate on using the back muscles in order to perform the movement.  The elbow of that arm should remain close to the torso.  With the other arm that has the palms facing forward, the elbows will be away but in line with the torso.  You will concentrate on using the lats to pull your body up.
After a second contraction at the top, start to slowly come down as you inhale.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

On the following set, switch grips; so if you had the right hand with the palms facing you and the left one with the palms facing forward, on the next set you will have the palms facing forward for the right hand and facing you for the left.
Variations:
If you are new at this exercise and do not have the strength to perform it, use a chin assist machine if available.  These machines use weight to help you push your bodyweight.
Otherwise, a spotter holding your legs can help.
On the other hand, more advanced lifters can add weight to the exercise by using a weight belt that allows the addition of weighted plates.
es: Usando un espacio que sea aproximadamente 1 pulgada más ancho que el ancho de los hombros, agarre una barra de dominadas con las palmas de una mano hacia adelante y las palmas de la otra hacia usted.  Esta será tu posición inicial.

Ahora comience a levantarse mientras exhala.  Consejo: Con el brazo que tiene las palmas hacia arriba concéntrate en utilizar los músculos de la espalda para realizar el movimiento.  El codo de ese brazo debe permanecer cerca del torso.  Con el otro brazo que tiene las palmas hacia adelante, los codos estarán alejados pero alineados con el torso.  Te concentrarás en usar los dorsales para levantar tu cuerpo.
Después de una segunda contracción en la parte superior, comience a bajar lentamente mientras inhala.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.

En el siguiente conjunto, cambie de agarre; Entonces, si tenías la mano derecha con las palmas hacia ti y la izquierda con las palmas hacia adelante, en la siguiente serie tendrás las palmas hacia adelante para la mano derecha y hacia ti para la izquierda.
Variaciones:

Si eres nuevo en este ejercicio y no tienes la fuerza para realizarlo, utiliza una máquina de ayuda para el mentón, si está disponible.  Estas máquinas utilizan peso para ayudarle a impulsar su peso corporal.
De lo contrario, un observador que le sujete las piernas puede resultar útil.
Por otro lado, los levantadores más avanzados pueden agregar peso al ejercicio utilizando un cinturón de pesas que permite agregar placas con peso.

name: Linear Depth Jump
instructions: You will need two boxes or benches spaced a few feet away from each other. Begin by standing on one box facing towards the other platform.
To initiate the movement, gently drop down to the ground between your platforms, allowing the knees and hips to flex.
Reverse the motion by exploding, extending through the hips, knees, and ankles to jump onto the other platform.
Land softly, asborbing the impact through the legs.

en: You will need two boxes or benches spaced a few feet away from each other. Begin by standing on one box facing towards the other platform.
To initiate the movement, gently drop down to the ground between your platforms, allowing the knees and hips to flex.
Reverse the motion by exploding, extending through the hips, knees, and ankles to jump onto the other platform.
Land softly, asborbing the impact through the legs.
es: Necesitará dos cajas o bancos espaciados a unos metros de distancia entre sí. Comience parándose en una caja mirando hacia la otra plataforma.
Para iniciar el movimiento, bájese suavemente al suelo entre sus plataformas, permitiendo que las rodillas y las caderas se flexionen.
Invierte el movimiento explotando, extendiéndote por las caderas, las rodillas y los tobillos para saltar a la otra plataforma.
Aterriza suavemente, absorbiendo el impacto a través de las piernas.

name: Linear Acceleration Wall Drill
instructions: Lean at around 45 degrees against a wall. Your feet should be together, glutes contracted.
Begin by lifting your right knee quickly, pausing, and then driving it straight down into the ground.
Switch legs, raising the opposite knee, and then attacking the ground straight down.
Repeat once more with your right leg, and as soon as the right foot strikes the ground hammer them out rapidly, alternating left and right as fast as you can.

name.es: Taladro de pared de aceleración lineal

en: Lean at around 45 degrees against a wall. Your feet should be together, glutes contracted.
Begin by lifting your right knee quickly, pausing, and then driving it straight down into the ground.
Switch legs, raising the opposite knee, and then attacking the ground straight down.
Repeat once more with your right leg, and as soon as the right foot strikes the ground hammer them out rapidly, alternating left and right as fast as you can.
es: Inclínese a unos 45 grados contra una pared. Tus pies deben estar juntos y los glúteos contraídos.
Comience levantando rápidamente la rodilla derecha, haciendo una pausa y luego hundiéndola directamente en el suelo.
Cambia de pierna, levanta la rodilla opuesta y luego ataca el suelo hacia abajo.
Repita una vez más con la pierna derecha y, tan pronto como el pie derecho toque el suelo, golpéelos rápidamente, alternando izquierda y derecha lo más rápido que pueda.

name: Linear 3-Part Start Technique
instructions: This drill helps you accelerate as quickly as possible into a sprint from a dead stop. It helps to use a line to start from. Begin with two feet on the line. Place your left foot with the toe next to your right ankle. Place your right foot 4-6 inches behind the left.
Place your right hand onto the line, and thing bring your nose close to your left knee.
Squat down as you lean foward, your head being lower than your hips and your weight loaded onto the left leg. This will be your starting position.
Take your left hand up so that it is parallel to the ground, pointing behind you, and explode out when ready.

name.es: Técnica de inicio lineal de 3 partes

en: This drill helps you accelerate as quickly as possible into a sprint from a dead stop. It helps to use a line to start from. Begin with two feet on the line. Place your left foot with the toe next to your right ankle. Place your right foot 4-6 inches behind the left.
Place your right hand onto the line, and thing bring your nose close to your left knee.
Squat down as you lean foward, your head being lower than your hips and your weight loaded onto the left leg. This will be your starting position.
Take your left hand up so that it is parallel to the ground, pointing behind you, and explode out when ready.
es: Este ejercicio te ayuda a acelerar lo más rápido posible en un sprint desde un punto muerto. Es útil utilizar una línea para comenzar. Comience con dos pies en la línea. Coloque su pie izquierdo con el dedo al lado de su tobillo derecho. Coloque su pie derecho de 4 a 6 pulgadas detrás del izquierdo.
Coloque su mano derecha sobre la línea y acerque su nariz a su rodilla izquierda.
Ponte en cuclillas mientras te inclinas hacia adelante, con la cabeza más baja que las caderas y el peso cargado sobre la pierna izquierda. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Levante la mano izquierda para que quede paralela al suelo, apuntando hacia atrás y explote cuando esté listo.

name: Leg Lift
instructions: While standing up straight with both feet next to each other at around shoulder width, grab a sturdy surface such as the sides of a squat rack or the top of a chair to brace yourself and keep balance.
With or without an ankle weight, lift one leg behind you as if performing a leg curl but standing up while keeping the other leg straight. Breathe out as you perform this movement.
Slowly bring the raised leg back to the floor as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Repeat the movement with the opposite leg.
Variations: You can perform the same movement with a low pulley attached to your ankle using an ankle attachment.  Optionally, you can use exercise cables as well.

en: While standing up straight with both feet next to each other at around shoulder width, grab a sturdy surface such as the sides of a squat rack or the top of a chair to brace yourself and keep balance.
With or without an ankle weight, lift one leg behind you as if performing a leg curl but standing up while keeping the other leg straight. Breathe out as you perform this movement.
Slowly bring the raised leg back to the floor as you breathe in.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Repeat the movement with the opposite leg.
Variations: You can perform the same movement with a low pulley attached to your ankle using an ankle attachment.  Optionally, you can use exercise cables as well.
es: Mientras está de pie derecho con ambos pies uno al lado del otro a aproximadamente el ancho de los hombros, agarre una superficie resistente, como los lados de una rejilla para sentadillas o la parte superior de una silla, para apoyarse y mantener el equilibrio.
Con o sin peso en el tobillo, levante una pierna detrás de usted como si realizara una flexión de piernas pero de pie mientras mantiene la otra pierna recta. Exhale mientras realiza este movimiento.
Lentamente, lleve la pierna levantada hacia el suelo mientras inhala.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Repite el movimiento con la pierna opuesta.
Variaciones: puedes realizar el mismo movimiento con una polea baja sujeta al tobillo mediante un accesorio para el tobillo.  Opcionalmente, también puedes utilizar cables de ejercicio.

name: Lateral Cone Hops
instructions: Position a number of cones in a row several feet apart.
Stand next to the end of the cones, facing 90 degrees to the direction of travel. This will be your starting position.
Begin the jump by dipping with the knees to initiate a stretch reflex, and immediately reverse direction to push off the ground, jumping up and sideways over the cone.
Use your legs to absorb impact upon landing, and rebound into the next jump, continuing down the row of cones.

en: Position a number of cones in a row several feet apart.
Stand next to the end of the cones, facing 90 degrees to the direction of travel. This will be your starting position.
Begin the jump by dipping with the knees to initiate a stretch reflex, and immediately reverse direction to push off the ground, jumping up and sideways over the cone.
Use your legs to absorb impact upon landing, and rebound into the next jump, continuing down the row of cones.
es: Coloque varios conos en una fila a varios pies de distancia.
Párese al lado del extremo de los conos, mirando a 90 grados en la dirección de viaje. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Comience el salto sumergiendo las rodillas para iniciar un reflejo de estiramiento e inmediatamente invierta la dirección para impulsarse del suelo, saltando hacia arriba y hacia los lados sobre el cono.
Use sus piernas para absorber el impacto al aterrizar y rebote en el siguiente salto, continuando por la fila de conos.

name: Lateral Box Jump
instructions: Stand sideways next to a plyo box with your feet hip-width apart. The box should be at a height you can clear cleanly.
Dip into a quarter-squat, swinging both arms back to load the jump.
Drive through the floor and swing the arms up and across to jump laterally onto the top of the box. Pull the knees up to clear it.
Land softly in the center of the box with both feet, in an athletic quarter-squat. Stand fully tall.
Step or hop down to the opposite side and immediately repeat the jump in the other direction. Continue alternating sides.

en: Stand sideways next to a plyo box with your feet hip-width apart. The box should be at a height you can clear cleanly.
Dip into a quarter-squat, swinging both arms back to load the jump.
Drive through the floor and swing the arms up and across to jump laterally onto the top of the box. Pull the knees up to clear it.
Land softly in the center of the box with both feet, in an athletic quarter-squat. Stand fully tall.
Step or hop down to the opposite side and immediately repeat the jump in the other direction. Continue alternating sides.
es: De pie en lateral junto al cajón, pies a la anchura de la cadera. El cajón debe estar a una altura que puedas superar con holgura.
Baja a un cuarto de sentadilla y lleva los brazos atrás para cargar el salto.
Empuja contra el suelo y lanza los brazos hacia arriba y al lateral para saltar al cajón. Sube las rodillas para librarlo.
Aterriza suave en el centro del cajón con los dos pies, en cuarto de sentadilla atlético. Extiende cadera y rodillas para quedar erguido.
Baja o salta al otro lado del cajón y repite el salto en sentido contrario. Continúa alternando lados.

name: Kneeling Jump Squat
instructions: Begin kneeling on the floor with a barbell racked across the back of your shoulders, or you can use your body weight for this exercise. This can be done inside of a power rack to make unracking easier.
Sit back with your hips until your glutes touch your feet, keeping your head and chest up.
Explode up with your hips, generating enough power to land with your feet flat on the floor.
Continue with the squat by driving through your heels and extending the knees to come to a standing position.

en: Begin kneeling on the floor with a barbell racked across the back of your shoulders, or you can use your body weight for this exercise. This can be done inside of a power rack to make unracking easier.
Sit back with your hips until your glutes touch your feet, keeping your head and chest up.
Explode up with your hips, generating enough power to land with your feet flat on the floor.
Continue with the squat by driving through your heels and extending the knees to come to a standing position.
es: Comience arrodillándose en el piso con una barra colocada sobre la parte posterior de sus hombros, o puede usar su peso corporal para este ejercicio. Esto se puede hacer dentro de un bastidor eléctrico para facilitar el desmontaje.
Siéntate con las caderas hasta que los glúteos toquen los pies, manteniendo la cabeza y el pecho erguidos.
Explota con las caderas, generando suficiente potencia para aterrizar con los pies apoyados en el suelo.
Continúe con la sentadilla impulsando los talones y extendiendo las rodillas para llegar a la posición de pie.

name: Bar Muscle-Up
instructions: Hang from a pull-up bar with a thumbs-around overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder width. Shoulders active, core braced.
Initiate a kip swing: alternate between an arched (hollow-to-arch) and hollow body position, generating rhythm through the shoulders and hips.
On the front-end of the kip, drive the hips up to the bar and pull explosively, keeping the bar close to the body. Aim to bring the hips and lower chest toward the bar.
As the chest rises above the bar, push the bar away and rotate the wrists/elbows over the bar to land in a support position with arms locked out.
Lower under control by reversing the path: dip back under the bar, swing through, and return to the dead hang. Reset the kip and repeat.

en: Hang from a pull-up bar with a thumbs-around overhand grip slightly wider than shoulder width. Shoulders active, core braced.
Initiate a kip swing: alternate between an arched (hollow-to-arch) and hollow body position, generating rhythm through the shoulders and hips.
On the front-end of the kip, drive the hips up to the bar and pull explosively, keeping the bar close to the body. Aim to bring the hips and lower chest toward the bar.
As the chest rises above the bar, push the bar away and rotate the wrists/elbows over the bar to land in a support position with arms locked out.
Lower under control by reversing the path: dip back under the bar, swing through, and return to the dead hang. Reset the kip and repeat.
es: Cuélgate de una barra de dominadas en agarre prono con los pulgares por encima, ligeramente más ancho que los hombros. Hombros activos y core comprometido.
Inicia el balanceo de kipping: alterna entre posición de arco (hollow-to-arch) y hollow, generando ritmo desde hombros y caderas.
En la fase frontal del kipping, sube las caderas hacia la barra y tira con explosividad, manteniendo la barra pegada al cuerpo. Busca llevar caderas y pecho bajo hacia la barra.
Cuando el pecho pase por encima de la barra, empuja la barra alejándola y gira muñecas y codos por encima para terminar en apoyo con los brazos bloqueados.
Baja con control invirtiendo el recorrido: pasa el pecho bajo la barra, balancéate y vuelve a la suspensión muerta. Reinicia el kipping y repite.

name: Isometric Wipers
instructions: Assume a push-up position, supporting your weight on your hands and toes while keeping your body straight. Your hands should be just outside of shoulder width. This will be your starting position.
Begin by shifting your body weight as far to one side as possible, allowing the elbow on that side to flex as you lower your body.
Reverse the motion by extending the flexed arm, pushing yourself up and then dropping to the other side.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

en: Assume a push-up position, supporting your weight on your hands and toes while keeping your body straight. Your hands should be just outside of shoulder width. This will be your starting position.
Begin by shifting your body weight as far to one side as possible, allowing the elbow on that side to flex as you lower your body.
Reverse the motion by extending the flexed arm, pushing yourself up and then dropping to the other side.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
es: Asuma una posición de flexión, apoyando su peso en las manos y los dedos de los pies mientras mantiene el cuerpo recto. Tus manos deben estar justo fuera del ancho de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Comience desplazando el peso de su cuerpo lo más hacia un lado posible, permitiendo que el codo de ese lado se flexione a medida que baja el cuerpo.
Invierte el movimiento extendiendo el brazo flexionado, impulsándote hacia arriba y luego dejándote caer hacia el otro lado.
Repita hasta el número deseado de repeticiones.

name: Inverted Row with Straps
instructions: Hang a rope or suspension straps from a rack or other stable object. Grasp the ends and position yourself in a supine position hanging from the ropes. Your body should be straight with your heels on the ground with your arms fully extended. This will be your starting position.
Begin by flexing the elbow, pulling your chest to your hands. Retract your shoulder blades as you perform the movement.
Pause at the top of the motion, and return yourself to the start position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

en: Hang a rope or suspension straps from a rack or other stable object. Grasp the ends and position yourself in a supine position hanging from the ropes. Your body should be straight with your heels on the ground with your arms fully extended. This will be your starting position.
Begin by flexing the elbow, pulling your chest to your hands. Retract your shoulder blades as you perform the movement.
Pause at the top of the motion, and return yourself to the start position.
Repeat for the desired number of repetitions.
es: Cuelgue una cuerda o correas de suspensión de un estante u otro objeto estable. Agarre los extremos y colóquese en posición supina colgando de las cuerdas. Tu cuerpo debe estar recto con los talones apoyados en el suelo y los brazos completamente extendidos. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Comience flexionando el codo, acercando el pecho a las manos. Retraiga los omóplatos mientras realiza el movimiento.
Haga una pausa en la parte superior del movimiento y regrese a la posición inicial.
Repita hasta el número deseado de repeticiones.

name: Incline Push-Up Depth Jump
instructions: For this drill you will need a box about 12 inches high, and two thick mats or aerobics steps.

Place the steps just outside of your shoulders, and place your feet on top of the box so that you are in an incline pushup position, your hands just inside the steps. This will be your starting position.

Begin by bending at the elbows to lower your body, quickly reversing position to push your body off of the ground. As you leave the ground, move your hands onto the steps, bending your elbows to absorb the impact.
Repeat the motion to return to the starting position.

name.es: Salto de profundidad con flexión inclinada

en: For this drill you will need a box about 12 inches high, and two thick mats or aerobics steps.

Place the steps just outside of your shoulders, and place your feet on top of the box so that you are in an incline pushup position, your hands just inside the steps. This will be your starting position.

Begin by bending at the elbows to lower your body, quickly reversing position to push your body off of the ground. As you leave the ground, move your hands onto the steps, bending your elbows to absorb the impact.
Repeat the motion to return to the starting position.
es: Para este ejercicio necesitarás una caja de aproximadamente 12 pulgadas de alto y dos tapetes gruesos o escalones aeróbicos.

Coloque los escalones justo fuera de sus hombros y coloque sus pies encima de la caja de modo que esté en una posición de flexión inclinada, con sus manos justo dentro de los escalones. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Comience doblando los codos para bajar el cuerpo, invirtiendo rápidamente la posición para empujar el cuerpo del suelo. Al levantarte del suelo, mueve las manos hacia los escalones, doblando los codos para absorber el impacto.
Repita el movimiento para volver a la posición inicial.

name: Inchworm
instructions: Stand with your feet close together. Keeping your legs straight, stretch down and put your hands on the floor directly in front of you. This will be your starting position.
Begin by walking your hands forward slowly, alternating your left and your right. As you do so, bend only at the hip, keeping your legs straight.
Keep going until your body is parallel to the ground in a pushup position.
Now, keep your hands in place and slowly take short steps with your feet, moving only a few inches at a time.
Continue walking until your feet are by hour hands, keeping your legs straight as you do so.

en: Stand with your feet close together. Keeping your legs straight, stretch down and put your hands on the floor directly in front of you. This will be your starting position.
Begin by walking your hands forward slowly, alternating your left and your right. As you do so, bend only at the hip, keeping your legs straight.
Keep going until your body is parallel to the ground in a pushup position.
Now, keep your hands in place and slowly take short steps with your feet, moving only a few inches at a time.
Continue walking until your feet are by hour hands, keeping your legs straight as you do so.
es: Párese con los pies muy juntos. Manteniendo las piernas rectas, estírate y coloca las manos en el suelo directamente frente a ti. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Comience caminando lentamente con las manos hacia adelante, alternando la izquierda y la derecha. Mientras lo hace, doble solo la cadera y mantenga las piernas rectas.
Continúe hasta que su cuerpo esté paralelo al suelo en una posición de flexión.
Ahora, mantenga las manos en su lugar y dé pasos cortos lentamente con los pies, moviéndose sólo unos centímetros a la vez.
Continúe caminando hasta que sus pies estén marcados con las manecillas de las horas, manteniendo las piernas rectas mientras lo hace.

name: Hurdle Hops
instructions: Set up a row of hurdles or other small barriers, placing them a few feet apart.
Stand in front of the first hurdle with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Begin by jumping with both feet over the first hurdle, swinging both arms as you jump.
Absorb the impact of landing by bending the knees, rebounding out of the first leap by jumping over the next hurdle. Continue until you have jumped over all of the hurdles.

en: Set up a row of hurdles or other small barriers, placing them a few feet apart.
Stand in front of the first hurdle with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Begin by jumping with both feet over the first hurdle, swinging both arms as you jump.
Absorb the impact of landing by bending the knees, rebounding out of the first leap by jumping over the next hurdle. Continue until you have jumped over all of the hurdles.
es: Coloque una fila de vallas u otras barreras pequeñas, colocándolas a unos metros de distancia.
Párese frente al primer obstáculo con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Comience saltando con ambos pies sobre el primer obstáculo, balanceando ambos brazos mientras salta.
Absorba el impacto del aterrizaje doblando las rodillas y rebotando en el primer salto saltando el siguiente obstáculo. Continúe hasta que haya saltado todos los obstáculos.

name: Handstand Push-Ups
instructions: Place your hands on the floor about shoulder-width apart, fingers spread, ~15–20 cm from the wall. Kick up into a handstand with your heels resting lightly against the wall.
Lock the body into a hollow line: ribs down, glutes squeezed, legs together and pointed. Eyes look at the floor between the hands.
Lower under control by bending the elbows at roughly 45° from the torso until the crown of the head lightly touches the floor. Maintain the line — do not let the hips collapse.
Press explosively through the hands, extending the elbows and pushing the floor away until the arms are locked overhead.
Repeat for the prescribed reps. Come down with control by stepping or pivoting one leg back to the floor.

en: Place your hands on the floor about shoulder-width apart, fingers spread, ~15–20 cm from the wall. Kick up into a handstand with your heels resting lightly against the wall.
Lock the body into a hollow line: ribs down, glutes squeezed, legs together and pointed. Eyes look at the floor between the hands.
Lower under control by bending the elbows at roughly 45° from the torso until the crown of the head lightly touches the floor. Maintain the line — do not let the hips collapse.
Press explosively through the hands, extending the elbows and pushing the floor away until the arms are locked overhead.
Repeat for the prescribed reps. Come down with control by stepping or pivoting one leg back to the floor.
es: Coloca las manos en el suelo a la anchura de los hombros, dedos abiertos, a unos 15–20 cm de la pared. Sube a pino con los talones apoyados ligeramente en la pared.
Bloquea el cuerpo en línea hueca (hollow): costillas hacia dentro, glúteos apretados, piernas juntas y estiradas. Mira al suelo entre las manos.
Baja con control flexionando los codos en ángulo de unos 45° respecto al torso hasta que la coronilla roce suavemente el suelo. Mantén la línea — no dejes caer la cadera.
Empuja con explosividad a través de las manos, extendiendo los codos hasta bloquear los brazos arriba.
Repite las repeticiones marcadas. Baja del pino con control apoyando una pierna en el suelo.

sourceClip.title: Handstand Push-up Secrets || HSPU tutorial - A different approach

name: Glute Ham Raise
instructions: Begin by adjusting the equipment to fit your body. Place your feet against the footplate in between the rollers as you lie facedown. Your knees should be just behind the pad.

Start from the bottom of the movement.  Keep your back arched as you begin the movement by flexing the knees. Drive your toes into the foot plate as you do so. Keep your upper body straight, and continue until your body is upright.
Return to the starting position, keeping your descent under control.

en: Begin by adjusting the equipment to fit your body. Place your feet against the footplate in between the rollers as you lie facedown. Your knees should be just behind the pad.

Start from the bottom of the movement.  Keep your back arched as you begin the movement by flexing the knees. Drive your toes into the foot plate as you do so. Keep your upper body straight, and continue until your body is upright.
Return to the starting position, keeping your descent under control.
es: Comience ajustando el equipo para que se ajuste a su cuerpo. Coloque los pies contra el reposapiés entre los rodillos mientras se acuesta boca abajo. Tus rodillas deben estar justo detrás de la almohadilla.

Comience desde la parte inferior del movimiento.  Mantenga la espalda arqueada mientras comienza el movimiento flexionando las rodillas. Introduzca los dedos de los pies en la plataforma para los pies mientras lo hace. Mantenga la parte superior de su cuerpo recta y continúe hasta que su cuerpo esté erguido.
