Regresa a la posición inicial manteniendo bajo control el descenso.

name: Front Leg Raises
instructions: Stand next to a chair or other support, holding on with one hand.
Swing your leg forward, keeping the leg straight. Continue with a downward swing, bringing the leg as far back as your flexibility allows. Repeat 5-10 times, and then switch legs.

en: Stand next to a chair or other support, holding on with one hand.
Swing your leg forward, keeping the leg straight. Continue with a downward swing, bringing the leg as far back as your flexibility allows. Repeat 5-10 times, and then switch legs.
es: Colócate junto a una silla u otro soporte, sujetándote con una mano.

Gire la pierna hacia adelante, manteniendo la pierna recta. Continúe con un balanceo hacia abajo, llevando la pierna hacia atrás tanto como su flexibilidad lo permita. Repita de 5 a 10 veces y luego cambie de pierna.

name: Front Cone Hops (or hurdle hops)
instructions: Set up a row of cones or other small barriers, placing them a few feet apart.
Stand in front of the first cone with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Begin by jumping with both feet over the first cone, swinging both arms as you jump.
Absorb the impact of landing by bending the knees, rebounding out of the first leap by jumping over the next cone.
Continue until you have jumped over all of the cones.

name.es: Saltos de cono frontal (o saltos de vallas)

en: Set up a row of cones or other small barriers, placing them a few feet apart.
Stand in front of the first cone with your feet shoulder width apart. This will be your starting position.
Begin by jumping with both feet over the first cone, swinging both arms as you jump.
Absorb the impact of landing by bending the knees, rebounding out of the first leap by jumping over the next cone.
Continue until you have jumped over all of the cones.
es: Coloque una fila de conos u otras barreras pequeñas, colocándolas a unos metros de distancia.
Párese frente al primer cono con los pies separados a la altura de los hombros. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Comienza saltando con ambos pies sobre el primer cono, balanceando ambos brazos mientras saltas.
Absorba el impacto del aterrizaje doblando las rodillas y rebotando en el primer salto saltando sobre el siguiente cono.
Continúe hasta que haya saltado todos los conos.

name: Frog Hops
instructions: Stand with your hands behind your head, and squat down keeping your torso upright and your head up. This will be your starting position.
Jump forward several feet, avoiding jumping unnecessarily high. As your feet contact the ground, absorb the impact through your legs, and jump again. Repeat this action 5-10 times.

en: Stand with your hands behind your head, and squat down keeping your torso upright and your head up. This will be your starting position.
Jump forward several feet, avoiding jumping unnecessarily high. As your feet contact the ground, absorb the impact through your legs, and jump again. Repeat this action 5-10 times.
es: Párese con las manos detrás de la cabeza y agáchese manteniendo el torso erguido y la cabeza erguida. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Salta varios metros hacia adelante, evitando saltar innecesariamente alto. Cuando tus pies entren en contacto con el suelo, absorbe el impacto a través de tus piernas y salta nuevamente. Repita esta acción de 5 a 10 veces.

name: Floor Glute-Ham Raise
instructions: You can use a partner for this exercise or brace your feet under something stable.
Begin on your knees with your upper legs and torso upright. If using a partner, they will firmly hold your feet to keep you in position. This will be your starting position.
Lower yourself by extending at the knee, taking care to NOT flex the hips as you go forward.

Place your hands in front of you as you reach the floor. This movement is very difficult and you may be unable to do it unaided. Use your arms to lightly push off the floor to aid your return to the starting position.

name.es: Elevación de glúteos y jamón en el suelo

en: You can use a partner for this exercise or brace your feet under something stable.
Begin on your knees with your upper legs and torso upright. If using a partner, they will firmly hold your feet to keep you in position. This will be your starting position.
Lower yourself by extending at the knee, taking care to NOT flex the hips as you go forward.

Place your hands in front of you as you reach the floor. This movement is very difficult and you may be unable to do it unaided. Use your arms to lightly push off the floor to aid your return to the starting position.
es: Puedes utilizar un compañero para este ejercicio o apoyar los pies debajo de algo estable.
Comience de rodillas con la parte superior de las piernas y el torso erguidos. Si usa un compañero, él sujetará firmemente sus pies para mantenerlo en posición. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Baje extendiendo la rodilla, teniendo cuidado de NO flexionar las caderas a medida que avanza.

Coloque sus manos frente a usted cuando llegue al piso. Este movimiento es muy difícil y es posible que no puedas realizarlo sin ayuda. Use sus brazos para empujar ligeramente el piso y ayudarlo a regresar a la posición inicial.

name: External Rotation
instructions: Lie sideways on a flat bench with one arm holding a dumbbell and the other hand on top of the bench folded so that you can rest your head on it.
Bend the elbows of the arm holding the dumbbell so that it creates a 90-degree angle between the upper arm and the forearm.  Tip: Keep the arm parallel to your torso.

Now bend the elbow while keeping the upper arm stationary.  In this manner, the forearm will be parallel to the floor and perpendicular to your torso (Tip: So the forearm will be directly in front of you).  The upper arm will be stationary by your torso and should be parallel to the floor (aligned with your torso at all times).  This will be your starting position.

As you breathe out, externally rotate your forearm so that the dumbbell is lifted up in a semicircle motion as you maintain the 90 degree angle bend between the upper arms and the forearm.  You will continue this external rotation until the forearm is perpendicular to the floor and the torso pointing towards the ceiling.  At this point you will hold the contraction for a second.
As you breathe in, slowly go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and then switch to the other arm.
Caution: There is no need to go heavy with this exercise.  Too much weight will cause rotator cuff injury.
Variations: You can perform this exercise standing and with cables.

en: Lie sideways on a flat bench with one arm holding a dumbbell and the other hand on top of the bench folded so that you can rest your head on it.
Bend the elbows of the arm holding the dumbbell so that it creates a 90-degree angle between the upper arm and the forearm.  Tip: Keep the arm parallel to your torso.

Now bend the elbow while keeping the upper arm stationary.  In this manner, the forearm will be parallel to the floor and perpendicular to your torso (Tip: So the forearm will be directly in front of you).  The upper arm will be stationary by your torso and should be parallel to the floor (aligned with your torso at all times).  This will be your starting position.

As you breathe out, externally rotate your forearm so that the dumbbell is lifted up in a semicircle motion as you maintain the 90 degree angle bend between the upper arms and the forearm.  You will continue this external rotation until the forearm is perpendicular to the floor and the torso pointing towards the ceiling.  At this point you will hold the contraction for a second.
As you breathe in, slowly go back to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and then switch to the other arm.
Caution: There is no need to go heavy with this exercise.  Too much weight will cause rotator cuff injury.
Variations: You can perform this exercise standing and with cables.
es: Acuéstese de lado en un banco plano con un brazo sosteniendo una mancuerna y la otra mano encima del banco doblada para que pueda apoyar la cabeza en él.
Doble los codos del brazo que sostiene la mancuerna para crear un ángulo de 90 grados entre la parte superior del brazo y el antebrazo.  Consejo: Mantenga el brazo paralelo a su torso.

Ahora doble el codo mientras mantiene inmóvil la parte superior del brazo.  De esta manera, el antebrazo quedará paralelo al suelo y perpendicular a tu torso (Consejo: Así el antebrazo quedará directamente frente a ti).  La parte superior del brazo estará estacionaria junto a su torso y debe estar paralela al piso (alineada con su torso en todo momento).  Esta será tu posición inicial.

Mientras exhala, gire externamente el antebrazo para que la mancuerna se levante en un movimiento semicírculo mientras mantiene la curvatura en ángulo de 90 grados entre la parte superior de los brazos y el antebrazo.  Continuarás esta rotación externa hasta que el antebrazo quede perpendicular al suelo y el torso apuntando hacia el techo.  En este punto mantendrás la contracción por un segundo.
Mientras inhala, regrese lentamente a la posición inicial.
Repita la número indicado de repeticiones y luego cambie al otro brazo.
Precaución: No es necesario hacer mucho ejercicio con este ejercicio.  Demasiado peso provocará lesiones en el manguito rotador.
Variaciones: Puedes realizar este ejercicio de pie y con cables.

name: Elbow Circles
instructions: Sit or stand with your feet slightly apart.
Place your hands on your shoulders with your elbows at shoulder level and pointing out.
Slowly make a circle with your elbows. Breathe out as you start the circle and breathe in as you complete the circle.

en: Sit or stand with your feet slightly apart.
Place your hands on your shoulders with your elbows at shoulder level and pointing out.
Slowly make a circle with your elbows. Breathe out as you start the circle and breathe in as you complete the circle.
es: Siéntate o párate con los pies ligeramente separados.
Coloque las manos sobre los hombros con los codos al nivel de los hombros y apuntando hacia afuera.
Lentamente haz un círculo con los codos. Exhale al comenzar el círculo e inhale al completar el círculo.

name: Drop Push
instructions: Position low boxes or other platforms 2-3 feet apart.
Move to a pushup position between them, supporting yourself by placing your hands on the boxes.
With good posture, drop from the platforms by pressing up and moving your hands to shoulder width, cushioning your landing by absorbing the impact through the arm.

en: Position low boxes or other platforms 2-3 feet apart.
Move to a pushup position between them, supporting yourself by placing your hands on the boxes.
With good posture, drop from the platforms by pressing up and moving your hands to shoulder width, cushioning your landing by absorbing the impact through the arm.
es: Coloque cajas bajas u otras plataformas a una distancia de 2 a 3 pies.
Muévete a una posición de flexión entre ellos, apoyándote colocando las manos sobre las cajas.
Con buena postura, déjate caer desde las plataformas presionando hacia arriba y moviendo las manos al ancho de los hombros, amortiguando tu aterrizaje absorbiendo el impacto a través del brazo.

name: Downward Facing Balance
instructions: Lie facedown on top of an exercise ball.
While resting on your stomach on the ball, walk your hands forward along the floor and lift your legs, extending your elbows and knees.

en: Lie facedown on top of an exercise ball.
While resting on your stomach on the ball, walk your hands forward along the floor and lift your legs, extending your elbows and knees.
es: Acuéstese boca abajo sobre una pelota de ejercicios.
Mientras descansa boca abajo sobre la pelota, camine con las manos hacia adelante por el suelo y levante las piernas, extendiendo los codos y las rodillas.

name: Double Leg Butt Kick
instructions: Begin standing with your knees slightly bent.
Quickly squat a short distance, flexing the hips and knees, and immediately extend to jump for maximum vertical height.
As you go up, tuck your heels by flexing the knees, attempting to touch the buttocks.
Finish the motion by landing with the knees only partially bent, using your legs to absorb the impact.

name.es: Patada a tope con doble pierna

en: Begin standing with your knees slightly bent.
Quickly squat a short distance, flexing the hips and knees, and immediately extend to jump for maximum vertical height.
As you go up, tuck your heels by flexing the knees, attempting to touch the buttocks.
Finish the motion by landing with the knees only partially bent, using your legs to absorb the impact.
es: Comience de pie con las rodillas ligeramente flexionadas.
Agáchese rápidamente una distancia corta, flexionando las caderas y las rodillas, y extiéndase inmediatamente para saltar hasta alcanzar la máxima altura vertical.
A medida que subes, mete los talones flexionando las rodillas, intentando tocar los glúteos.
Termine el movimiento aterrizando con las rodillas solo parcialmente dobladas, usando las piernas para absorber el impacto.

name: Dip Squat
instructions: This movement strengthens the dip portion of the jerk. Begin with the bar racked in the jerk position, with the shoulders forward to create a shelf and the bar lightly contacting the throat. The feet should be directly under the hips, with the feet turned out as is comfortable.

Keeping the torso vertical, dip by flexing the knees, allowing them to travel forward and without moving the hips to the rear. The dip should not be excessive. Return the weight to the starting position by driving forcefully though the feet.

en: This movement strengthens the dip portion of the jerk. Begin with the bar racked in the jerk position, with the shoulders forward to create a shelf and the bar lightly contacting the throat. The feet should be directly under the hips, with the feet turned out as is comfortable.

Keeping the torso vertical, dip by flexing the knees, allowing them to travel forward and without moving the hips to the rear. The dip should not be excessive. Return the weight to the starting position by driving forcefully though the feet.
es: Este movimiento fortalece la parte inclinada del tirón. Comience con la barra apoyada en la posición de tirón, con los hombros hacia adelante para crear un estante y la barra tocando ligeramente la garganta. Los pies deben estar directamente debajo de las caderas, con los pies hacia afuera como sea cómodo.

Manteniendo el torso vertical, baja flexionando las rodillas, permitiéndoles viajar hacia adelante y sin mover las caderas hacia atrás. El baño no debe ser excesivo. Regrese el peso a la posición inicial impulsando con fuerza a través de los pies.

name: Clock Push-Up
instructions: Move into a prone position on the floor, supporting your weight on your hands and toes.
Your arms should be fully extended with the hands around shoulder width. Keep your body straight throughout the movement. This will be your starting position.
Descend by flexing at the elbow, lowering your chest toward the ground.
At the bottom, reverse the motion by pushing yourself up through elbow extension as quickly as possible until you are air borne. Aim to “jump” 12-18 inches to one side.
As you accelerate up, move your outside foot away from your direction of travel. Leaving the ground, shift your body about 30 degrees for the next repetition.
Return to the starting position and repeat the exercise, working all the way around until you are back where you started.

en: Move into a prone position on the floor, supporting your weight on your hands and toes.
Your arms should be fully extended with the hands around shoulder width. Keep your body straight throughout the movement. This will be your starting position.
Descend by flexing at the elbow, lowering your chest toward the ground.
At the bottom, reverse the motion by pushing yourself up through elbow extension as quickly as possible until you are air borne. Aim to “jump” 12-18 inches to one side.
As you accelerate up, move your outside foot away from your direction of travel. Leaving the ground, shift your body about 30 degrees for the next repetition.
Return to the starting position and repeat the exercise, working all the way around until you are back where you started.
es: Colóquese en una posición boca abajo en el suelo, apoyando su peso en las manos y los dedos de los pies.
Tus brazos deben estar completamente extendidos con las manos a la altura de los hombros. Mantenga su cuerpo recto durante todo el movimiento. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Desciende flexionando el codo, bajando el pecho hacia el suelo.

En la parte inferior, invierta el movimiento empujándose hacia arriba mediante la extensión del codo lo más rápido posible hasta que esté en el aire. Trate de “saltar” de 12 a 18 pulgadas hacia un lado.
A medida que acelera, aleje el pie exterior de su dirección de viaje. Dejando el suelo, mueve tu cuerpo unos 30 grados para la siguiente repetición.
Regrese a la posición inicial y repita el ejercicio, trabajando en todos los sentidos hasta regresar a donde comenzó.

name: Chest Push from 3 point stance
instructions: Begin in a three point stance, squatted down with your back flat and one hand on the ground. Place the medicine ball directly in front of you.
To begin, take your first step as you pull the ball to your chest, positioning both hands to prepare for the throw.
As you execute the second step, explosively release the ball forward as hard as possible.

name.es: Empuje de pecho desde una postura de 3 puntos

en: Begin in a three point stance, squatted down with your back flat and one hand on the ground. Place the medicine ball directly in front of you.
To begin, take your first step as you pull the ball to your chest, positioning both hands to prepare for the throw.
As you execute the second step, explosively release the ball forward as hard as possible.
es: Comience en una postura de tres puntos, en cuclillas con la espalda recta y una mano en el suelo. Coloque el balón medicinal directamente frente a usted.
Para comenzar, da el primer paso mientras tiras la pelota hacia tu pecho, posicionando ambas manos para prepararte para el lanzamiento.
Mientras ejecutas el segundo paso, lanza explosivamente la pelota hacia adelante lo más fuerte posible.

name: Chest Push (single response)
instructions: Begin in a kneeling position holding the medicine ball with both hands tightly into the chest.
Execute the pass by exploding forward and outward with the hips while pushing the ball as far as possible.
Follow through by falling forward, catching yourself with your hands.

en: Begin in a kneeling position holding the medicine ball with both hands tightly into the chest.
Execute the pass by exploding forward and outward with the hips while pushing the ball as far as possible.
Follow through by falling forward, catching yourself with your hands.
es: Comience en posición de rodillas sosteniendo el balón medicinal con ambas manos firmemente contra el pecho.
Ejecute el pase explotando hacia adelante y hacia afuera con las caderas mientras empuja el balón lo más lejos posible.
Continúe cayendo hacia adelante y sosteniéndose con las manos.

name: Bodyweight Mid Row
instructions: Begin by taking a medium to wide grip on a pull-up apparatus with your palms facing away from you. From a hanging position, tuck your knees to your chest, leaning back and getting your legs over your side of the pull-up apparatus. This will be your starting position.
Beginning with your arms straight, flex the elbows and retract the shoulder blades to raise your body up until your legs contact the pull-up apparatus.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position.

en: Begin by taking a medium to wide grip on a pull-up apparatus with your palms facing away from you. From a hanging position, tuck your knees to your chest, leaning back and getting your legs over your side of the pull-up apparatus. This will be your starting position.
Beginning with your arms straight, flex the elbows and retract the shoulder blades to raise your body up until your legs contact the pull-up apparatus.
After a brief pause, return to the starting position.
es: Comience tomando un agarre medio a ancho de un aparato de dominadas con las palmas de las manos hacia usted. Desde una posición colgante, doble las rodillas hacia el pecho, inclínese hacia atrás y coloque las piernas sobre el costado del aparato de dominadas. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Comenzando con los brazos rectos, flexione los codos y retraiga los omóplatos para levantar el cuerpo hasta que las piernas entren en contacto con el aparato de dominadas.
Después de una breve pausa, regresa a la posición inicial.

name: Alternate Leg Diagonal Bound
instructions: Assume a comfortable stance with one foot slightly in front of the other.
Begin by pushing off with the front leg, driving the opposite knee forward and as high as possible before landing. Attempt to cover as much distance to each side with each bound.
It may help to use a line on the ground to guage distance from side to side.
Repeat the sequence with the other leg.

en: Assume a comfortable stance with one foot slightly in front of the other.
Begin by pushing off with the front leg, driving the opposite knee forward and as high as possible before landing. Attempt to cover as much distance to each side with each bound.
It may help to use a line on the ground to guage distance from side to side.
Repeat the sequence with the other leg.
es: Asuma una postura cómoda con un pie ligeramente delante del otro.

Comience empujando con la pierna delantera, impulsando la rodilla opuesta hacia adelante y lo más alto posible antes de aterrizar. Intente cubrir la mayor distancia posible a cada lado con cada salto.
Puede resultar útil utilizar una línea en el suelo para medir la distancia de un lado a otro.
Repite la secuencia con la otra pierna.

name: Stability Ball Pec Stretch
instructions: Adopt an 'all fours' position with a swiss ball next to your right elbow. Lift your right elbow up and on top of the swiss ball so that your forearm is supported by the ball too. This is your starting position.
Rotate your right shoulder towards the floor, creating a stretch in your right pectoral muscle.
Hold this position for the recommended amount of time before switching sides.

name.es: Estiramiento pectoral con pelota de estabilidad

en: Adopt an 'all fours' position with a swiss ball next to your right elbow. Lift your right elbow up and on top of the swiss ball so that your forearm is supported by the ball too. This is your starting position.
Rotate your right shoulder towards the floor, creating a stretch in your right pectoral muscle.
Hold this position for the recommended amount of time before switching sides.
es: Adopte una posición a cuatro patas con una pelota suiza junto a su codo derecho. Levante el codo derecho hacia arriba y encima de la pelota suiza para que su antebrazo también quede sostenido por la pelota. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Gire el hombro derecho hacia el suelo, creando un estiramiento en el músculo pectoral derecho.
Mantenga esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado antes de cambiar de lado.

name: Wrist Circles
instructions: Start by standing straight with your feet being shoulder width apart from each other.  Elevate your arms to the side of you until they are fully extended and parallel to the floor at a height that is evenly aligned with your shoulders.  Tip: Your torso and arms should form the letter "T:  Your palms should be facing down.  This is the starting position.

Keeping your entire body stationary except for the wrists, begin to rotate both wrists forward in a circular motion.  Tip: Pretend that you are trying to draw circles by using your hands as the brush.  Breathe normally as you perform this exercise.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation:  You can hold small weights to add resistance.

en: Start by standing straight with your feet being shoulder width apart from each other.  Elevate your arms to the side of you until they are fully extended and parallel to the floor at a height that is evenly aligned with your shoulders.  Tip: Your torso and arms should form the letter "T:  Your palms should be facing down.  This is the starting position.

Keeping your entire body stationary except for the wrists, begin to rotate both wrists forward in a circular motion.  Tip: Pretend that you are trying to draw circles by using your hands as the brush.  Breathe normally as you perform this exercise.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
Variation:  You can hold small weights to add resistance.
es: Comience parándose derecho con los pies separados al ancho de los hombros.  Eleve los brazos a los costados hasta que estén completamente extendidos y paralelos al piso a una altura que esté uniformemente alineada con sus hombros.  Consejo: Tu torso y brazos deben formar la letra "T: Tus palmas deben estar hacia abajo. Esta es la posición inicial.

Manteniendo todo el cuerpo inmóvil excepto las muñecas, comience a girar ambas muñecas hacia adelante con un movimiento circular.  Consejo: Imagina que estás intentando dibujar círculos usando tus manos como pincel.  Respire normalmente mientras realiza este ejercicio.
Repita hasta la número indicado de repeticiones.
Variación: puedes sostener pesas pequeñas para agregar resistencia.

name: Wind Sprints
instructions: Hang from a pull-up bar using a pronated grip. Your arms and legs should be extended. This will be your starting position.
Begin by quickly raising one knee as high as you can. Do not swing your body or your legs.
Immediately reverse the motion, returning that leg to the starting position. Simultaneously raise the opposite knee as high as possible.
Continue alternating between legs until the set is complete.

en: Hang from a pull-up bar using a pronated grip. Your arms and legs should be extended. This will be your starting position.
Begin by quickly raising one knee as high as you can. Do not swing your body or your legs.
Immediately reverse the motion, returning that leg to the starting position. Simultaneously raise the opposite knee as high as possible.
Continue alternating between legs until the set is complete.
es: Cuélguese de una barra de dominadas con un agarre en pronación. Tus brazos y piernas deben estar extendidos. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Comience levantando rápidamente una rodilla lo más alto que pueda. No balancee su cuerpo ni sus piernas.
Invierta inmediatamente el movimiento, regresando esa pierna a la posición inicial. Al mismo tiempo, levante la rodilla opuesta lo más alto posible.
Continúe alternando entre piernas hasta completar la serie.

name: Upward Stretch
instructions: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your arms extended directly above your head. Link your fingers together and push your palms up towards the ceiling.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.

en: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your arms extended directly above your head. Link your fingers together and push your palms up towards the ceiling.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.
es: Adopte una postura de pie, a la altura de los hombros, con los brazos extendidos directamente sobre la cabeza. Entrelaza los dedos y empuja las palmas hacia el techo.
Mantenga esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Standing Upper Back Stretch
instructions: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your arms extended out in front of you, fingers interlinked and your thumbs pointed towards the ground.
Round your shoulders and push your hands away from your body (keeping your arms straight).
Hold this position for the recommended duration.

name.es: Estiramiento de la parte superior de la espalda de pie

en: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your arms extended out in front of you, fingers interlinked and your thumbs pointed towards the ground.
Round your shoulders and push your hands away from your body (keeping your arms straight).
Hold this position for the recommended duration.
es: Adopte una postura de pie, a la altura de los hombros, con los brazos extendidos frente a usted, los dedos entrelazados y los pulgares apuntando hacia el suelo.
Redondea los hombros y aleja las manos del cuerpo (manteniendo los brazos rectos).
Mantenga esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado.

name: Upper Back Stretch - Lower Leg Grab
instructions: Take a seat on a mat with your legs extended out in front of you. Lean your torso forward and hug your upper legs.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.

name.en: Upper Back Stretch - Lower Leg Grab
name.es: Estiramiento de la parte superior de la espalda: agarre de la parte inferior de la pierna

en: Take a seat on a mat with your legs extended out in front of you. Lean your torso forward and hug your upper legs.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.
es: Siéntate sobre una colchoneta con las piernas extendidas frente a ti. Inclina tu torso hacia adelante y abraza la parte superior de tus piernas.
Mantenga esta posición durante el tiempo recomendado.

aliases: Upper Back Stretch - Lower Leg Grab

name: Standing Tricep Stretch
instructions: Extend your left arm directly upward towards the ceiling and bend at your elbow, placing your palm on the top of your back. Take hold of your left elbow with your right hand and gently pull towards your right side.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Extend your left arm directly upward towards the ceiling and bend at your elbow, placing your palm on the top of your back. Take hold of your left elbow with your right hand and gently pull towards your right side.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Extiende tu izquierdo brazo directamente arriba hacia el techo and flexiona at tu codo, placing tu palma on the parte superior of tu espalda. Agarra tu izquierdo codo con tu derecho mano and suavemente tira hacia tu derecho lado.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: The Straddle
instructions: Take a seat on a mat with your legs extended out in front of you in a 'V' shape.
Place your hands on the floor between your legs and lean your torso as far forward as you can.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.

en: Take a seat on a mat with your legs extended out in front of you in a 'V' shape.
Place your hands on the floor between your legs and lean your torso as far forward as you can.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.
es: Siéntate on a colchoneta con tu piernas extiendeed extendidas delante de in a 'V' forma.
Coloca tu manos on el suelo entre tu piernas and inclínate tu torso todo lo hacia delante as puedas.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado.

name: Standing Lateral Stretch
instructions: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your torso upright. Keep your left arm by your side and elevate your right arm up, so that your fingers are placed on the back of your head (allow your elbow to flare out wide).
Gently lean towards your left side, extending your right elbow towards the ceiling. Maintain a balanced stance with your weight evenly distributed through your stance.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your torso upright. Keep your left arm by your side and elevate your right arm up, so that your fingers are placed on the back of your head (allow your elbow to flare out wide).
Gently lean towards your left side, extending your right elbow towards the ceiling. Maintain a balanced stance with your weight evenly distributed through your stance.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Adopta una colócate de pieing, anchura de hombros postura con tu torso erguido. Mantén tu izquierdo brazo by tu lado and eleva tu derecho brazo up, so that tu dedos are colocad on la espalda of tu cabeza (permite tu codo to abrirse amplio).
Gently inclínate hacia tu izquierdo lado, extiendeing tu derecho codo hacia el techo. Mantén a equilibrada postura con tu peso repartido de forma uniforme through tu postura.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Standing Hip Flexors
instructions: To get into the starting position for this stretch, you need to drop to the bottom of a lunge position. So, take a big step to split your stance and descend so that your back knee is a couple of inches of the floor. This is your starting position.
Lean forward so that your bodyweight is being driven onto your front foot and towards the floor through the extension of your pelvis.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: To get into the starting position for this stretch, you need to drop to the bottom of a lunge position. So, take a big step to split your stance and descend so that your back knee is a couple of inches of the floor. This is your starting position.
Lean forward so that your bodyweight is being driven onto your front foot and towards the floor through the extension of your pelvis.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Para adoptar la posición inicial for this estiramiento, debes bajar a the parte baja of a zancada posición. Así que, da un paso largo to separar tu postura and desciende so that tu espalda rodilla is a unos centímetros of el suelo. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Inclínate hacia delante so that tu peso corporal is being driven onto tu delantero pie and hacia el suelo through the extensión of tu pelvis.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Standing Hamstring Stretch
instructions: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your torso upright.
Gently lean forwards from your waist whilst keeping your legs straight. Continue to lean forward until you can feel the stretch come through your hamstrings.
Hold for the recommended duration.

en: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your torso upright.
Gently lean forwards from your waist whilst keeping your legs straight. Continue to lean forward until you can feel the stretch come through your hamstrings.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Adopta una colócate de pieing, anchura de hombros postura con tu torso erguido.
Gently inclínate hacia delantes from tu waist mientras manténing tu piernas recto. Continúa to inclínate hacia delante hasta que can feel the estiramiento come through tu isquiosurales.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado.

name: Standing Hamstring and Calf Stretch
instructions: Adopt a standing, slightly split stance (one foot in front of the other) with your torso leaning forwards. Loop a band around the arch in your front foot and pull it tight, until you get the desired stretch in your hamstrings and calf.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: De pie isquiosurales y gemelo estiramiento

en: Adopt a standing, slightly split stance (one foot in front of the other) with your torso leaning forwards. Loop a band around the arch in your front foot and pull it tight, until you get the desired stretch in your hamstrings and calf.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Adopta una colócate de pieing, slightly separar postura (one pie delante de the other) con tu torso inclínateing hacia delantes. Loop a banda around the arch in tu delantero pie and tira it tight, hasta que get the deseado estiramiento in tu isquiosurales and gemelo.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Standing Gastrocnemius Calf Stretch
instructions: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your torso upright. Elevate your left leg (keeping it straight) and place it around knee height on a step/bench. Lean your torso forward and try to get your chest as close to your knee as possible by pulling downward with your hands.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your torso upright. Elevate your left leg (keeping it straight) and place it around knee height on a step/bench. Lean your torso forward and try to get your chest as close to your knee as possible by pulling downward with your hands.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Adopta una colócate de pieing, anchura de hombros postura con tu torso erguido. Eleva tu izquierdo pierna (manténing it recto) and coloca it around rodilla height on a step/banco. Inclínate tu torso hacia delante and try to get tu pecho as cerca de tu rodilla lo máximo posible by tiraing downward con tu manos.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Standing Biceps Stretch
instructions: Adopt a standing position with your hands (fingers) linked together behind your back.
Twist your forearms so that your palms are then facing away from you.
Gently lift your arms up towards the ceiling (behind your back) until you feel the desired stretch in your biceps.
Hold for the recommended duration.

en: Adopt a standing position with your hands (fingers) linked together behind your back.
Twist your forearms so that your palms are then facing away from you.
Gently lift your arms up towards the ceiling (behind your back) until you feel the desired stretch in your biceps.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Adopta una colócate de pieing posición con tu manos (dedos) linked together detrás de tu espalda.
Twist tu antebrazos so that tu palmas are then facing away from .
Gently eleva tu brazos up hacia el techo (detrás de tu espalda) hasta que feel the deseado estiramiento in tu bíceps.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado.

name: Spinal Stretch
instructions: Take a seat on a chair/bench and sit upright. Link your fingers together behind your head as your elbows flare out wide.
Keeping your pelvis static, gently start to bring your right elbow across your body, down towards your left knee by stretching the muscles in your back.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Take a seat on a chair/bench and sit upright. Link your fingers together behind your head as your elbows flare out wide.
Keeping your pelvis static, gently start to bring your right elbow across your body, down towards your left knee by stretching the muscles in your back.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Siéntate on a silla/banco and siéntate erguido. Link tu dedos together detrás de tu cabeza as tu codos abrirse amplio.
Manténing tu pelvis static, suavemente start to lleva tu derecho codo across tu cuerpo, down hacia tu izquierdo rodilla by estiramientoing the muscles in tu espalda.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Side Wrist Pull
instructions: In a standing position, bring your left arm in front of your body and take hold your your wrist with your right hand.
Bend your left wrist and pull it underneath your forearm so your palm is then pointing away from your body.
Once you are in this position, lift your left arm up and across your body towards your right shoulder.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: In a standing position, bring your left arm in front of your body and take hold your your wrist with your right hand.
Bend your left wrist and pull it underneath your forearm so your palm is then pointing away from your body.
Once you are in this position, lift your left arm up and across your body towards your right shoulder.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: In a colócate de pieing posición, lleva tu izquierdo brazo delante de tu cuerpo and take hold tu tu wrist con tu derecho mano.
Flexiona tu izquierdo wrist and tira it debajo de tu antebrazo so tu palma is then pointing away from tu cuerpo.
Once are in this posición, eleva tu izquierdo brazo up and across tu cuerpo hacia tu derecho hombro.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Side Neck Stretch
instructions: From a seated or standing position, lean your head across to your left shoulder.
To increase the stretch, take hold of your head with your left hand and gently pull downward towards your shoulder.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: From a seated or standing position, lean your head across to your left shoulder.
To increase the stretch, take hold of your head with your left hand and gently pull downward towards your shoulder.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: From a seated or colócate de pieing posición, inclínate tu cabeza across to tu izquierdo hombro.
To increase the estiramiento, agarra tu cabeza con tu izquierdo mano and suavemente tira downward hacia tu hombro.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Side Lying Groin Stretch
instructions: Lay on a mat (on your left side) and have your legs fully extended. Have your head supported by your left hand as rest your remaining bodyweight on your left upper arm.
Keeping your legs straight lift your right leg up towards the ceiling and take hold of it with your right hand.
Try to keep your hips stacked one on top of the other as you perform this movement.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Lay on a mat (on your left side) and have your legs fully extended. Have your head supported by your left hand as rest your remaining bodyweight on your left upper arm.
Keeping your legs straight lift your right leg up towards the ceiling and take hold of it with your right hand.
Try to keep your hips stacked one on top of the other as you perform this movement.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Túmbate on a colchoneta (on tu izquierdo lado) and have tu piernas completamente extiendeed. Have tu cabeza supported by tu izquierdo mano as rest tu remaining peso corporal on tu izquierdo upper brazo.
Manténing tu piernas recto eleva tu derecho pierna up hacia el techo and agarra it con tu derecho mano.
Intenta mantén tu caderas stacked one on parte superior of the other as perform this movimiento.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Side Lying Floor Stretch
instructions: Lay on a mat (on your left side) and have your body at full extension apart from your left leg which should be bent at a 90 degree angle and be supporting your body from falling over.

Your arms should be reaching out above your head as you take hold of your right wrist with your left hand, and pull it down/away from your right hip. You should feel a stretch down the whole right hand side of your body.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Lay on a mat (on your left side) and have your body at full extension apart from your left leg which should be bent at a 90 degree angle and be supporting your body from falling over.

Your arms should be reaching out above your head as you take hold of your right wrist with your left hand, and pull it down/away from your right hip. You should feel a stretch down the whole right hand side of your body.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Túmbate on a colchoneta (on tu izquierdo lado) and have tu cuerpo at full extensión excepto tu izquierdo pierna which should be bent at a 90 degree angle and be supporting tu cuerpo from falling over.

tu brazos should be reaching out por encima de tu cabeza as agarra tu derecho wrist con tu izquierdo mano, and tira it down/away from tu derecho cadera. should feel a estiramiento down the whole derecho mano lado of tu cuerpo.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Shoulder Stretch
instructions: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your left arm stretched across your body. Take hold of your left arm with your right and pull it in as close to your chest as you can.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your left arm stretched across your body. Take hold of your left arm with your right and pull it in as close to your chest as you can.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Adopta una colócate de pieing, anchura de hombros postura con tu izquierdo brazo estiramientoed across tu cuerpo. Agarra tu izquierdo brazo con tu derecho and tira it in as cerca de tu pecho as puedas.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Seated Overhead Stretch
instructions: Take a seat on a mat with the soles of your shoes gently touching each other, knees relaxed out wide with your right hand on the floor beside you.
Next, place your left hand behind your head and lean across to your right hand side. Try and get your elbow as high as you possibly can!
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Sentado por encima de la cabeza estiramiento

en: Take a seat on a mat with the soles of your shoes gently touching each other, knees relaxed out wide with your right hand on the floor beside you.
Next, place your left hand behind your head and lean across to your right hand side. Try and get your elbow as high as you possibly can!
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Siéntate on a colchoneta with the soles of tu shoes suavemente touching each other, rodillas relajado out amplio con tu derecho mano on el suelo belado .
A continuación, coloca tu izquierdo mano detrás de tu cabeza and inclínate across to tu derecho mano lado. Try and get tu codo as high as possibly can!
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Seated Hamstring and Calf Stretch
instructions: Take a seat on a mat. Have your legs straight out in front of you with a band looped over the bridge in your left shoe.
Relax your foot and gently pull the band until you create the desired amount of tension.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Take a seat on a mat. Have your legs straight out in front of you with a band looped over the bridge in your left shoe.
Relax your foot and gently pull the band until you create the desired amount of tension.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Siéntate on a colchoneta. Have tu piernas recto extendidas delante de with a banda looped over the bridge in tu izquierdo shoe.
Relax tu pie and suavemente tira the banda hasta que create the deseado cantidad of tensión.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Seated Hamstring
instructions: In a seated position with your legs extended, have your partner stand behind you. Now, lean forward as your partner braces your shoulders with their hands. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to push your torso back for 10-20 seconds, as your partner prevents any actual movement of your torso.
Now relax your muscles as your partner increases the stretch by gently pushing your torso forward for 10-20 seconds.

en: In a seated position with your legs extended, have your partner stand behind you. Now, lean forward as your partner braces your shoulders with their hands. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to push your torso back for 10-20 seconds, as your partner prevents any actual movement of your torso.
Now relax your muscles as your partner increases the stretch by gently pushing your torso forward for 10-20 seconds.
es: In a seated posición con tu piernas extiendeed, have tu partner colócate de pie detrás de . Now, inclínate hacia delante as tu partner braces tu hombros with their manos. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Attempt to empuja tu torso espalda for 10-20 segundos, as tu partner prevents any actual movimiento of tu torso.
Now relax tu muscles as tu partner increases the estiramiento by suavemente empujaing tu torso hacia delante for 10-20 segundos.

name: Seated Glute
instructions: In a seated position with your knees bent, cross one ankle over the opposite knee. Your partner will stand behind you. Now, lean forward as your partner braces your shoulders with their hands. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to push your torso back for 10-20 seconds, as your partner prevents any actual movement of your torso.
Now relax your muscles as your partner increases the stretch by gently pushing your torso forward for 10-20 seconds.

en: In a seated position with your knees bent, cross one ankle over the opposite knee. Your partner will stand behind you. Now, lean forward as your partner braces your shoulders with their hands. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to push your torso back for 10-20 seconds, as your partner prevents any actual movement of your torso.
Now relax your muscles as your partner increases the stretch by gently pushing your torso forward for 10-20 seconds.
es: In a seated posición con tu rodillas bent, cross one tobillo over the contrario rodilla. tu partner will colócate de pie detrás de . Now, inclínate hacia delante as tu partner braces tu hombros with their manos. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Attempt to empuja tu torso espalda for 10-20 segundos, as tu partner prevents any actual movimiento of tu torso.
Now relax tu muscles as tu partner increases the estiramiento by suavemente empujaing tu torso hacia delante for 10-20 segundos.

name: Seated Front Deltoid
instructions: Sit upright on the floor with your legs bent, your partner standing behind you. Stick your arms straight out to your sides, with your palms facing the ground. Attempt to move them as far behind you as possible, as your assistant holds your wrists. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your elbows straight, attempt to move your arms to the front, with your partner gently restraining you to prevent any actual movement for 10-20 seconds.
Now, relax your muscles and allow your partner to gently increase the stretch on the shoulders and chest. Hold for 10 to 20 seconds.

en: Sit upright on the floor with your legs bent, your partner standing behind you. Stick your arms straight out to your sides, with your palms facing the ground. Attempt to move them as far behind you as possible, as your assistant holds your wrists. This will be your starting position.
Keeping your elbows straight, attempt to move your arms to the front, with your partner gently restraining you to prevent any actual movement for 10-20 seconds.
Now, relax your muscles and allow your partner to gently increase the stretch on the shoulders and chest. Hold for 10 to 20 seconds.
es: Siéntate erguido on el suelo con tu piernas bent, tu partner colócate de pieing detrás de . Stick tu brazos recto out to tu lados, con tu palmas facing the ground. Attempt to move them todo lo detrás de lo máximo posible, as tu assistant holds tu wrists. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Manténing tu codos recto, attempt to move tu brazos to the delantero, con tu partner suavemente restraining to prevent any actual movimiento for 10-20 segundos.
Now, relax tu muscles and permite tu partner to suavemente increase the estiramiento on the hombros and pecho. Hold for 10 to 20 segundos.

name: Seated Floor Hamstring Stretch
instructions: Take a seat on a mat. Have your left leg out straight with your right knee bent and relaxed out wide with the sole of your shoe gently placed against the inside of your left knee.
Lean forward and take hold of the toes on your left foot. Pull them in towards your shin, this will create a stretch through your hamstrings and calf.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Take a seat on a mat. Have your left leg out straight with your right knee bent and relaxed out wide with the sole of your shoe gently placed against the inside of your left knee.
Lean forward and take hold of the toes on your left foot. Pull them in towards your shin, this will create a stretch through your hamstrings and calf.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Siéntate on a colchoneta. Have tu izquierdo pierna out recto con tu derecho rodilla bent and relajado out amplio with the sole of tu shoe suavemente colocad contra the inlado of tu izquierdo rodilla.
Inclínate hacia delante and agarra the toes on tu izquierdo pie. Tira them in hacia tu shin, this will create a estiramiento through tu isquiosurales and gemelo.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Seated Calf Stretch
instructions: Take a seat on a mat. Have your left leg out straight with your right knee bent and relaxed out wide with the sole of your shoe gently placed against the inside of your left knee.
Lean forward and take hold of the toes on your left foot. Pull them in towards your shin, this will create a stretch through your hamstrings and calf.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Take a seat on a mat. Have your left leg out straight with your right knee bent and relaxed out wide with the sole of your shoe gently placed against the inside of your left knee.
Lean forward and take hold of the toes on your left foot. Pull them in towards your shin, this will create a stretch through your hamstrings and calf.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Siéntate on a colchoneta. Have tu izquierdo pierna out recto con tu derecho rodilla bent and relajado out amplio with the sole of tu shoe suavemente colocad contra the inlado of tu izquierdo rodilla.
Inclínate hacia delante and agarra the toes on tu izquierdo pie. Tira them in hacia tu shin, this will create a estiramiento through tu isquiosurales and gemelo.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Runner's Stretch
instructions: Adopt a standing, slightly split stance (one foot in front of the other) with your torso leaning forwards. Try to get your chest as close to your knee as possible by pulling your torso downward with your hands, whilst keeping your front leg straight.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Adopt a standing, slightly split stance (one foot in front of the other) with your torso leaning forwards. Try to get your chest as close to your knee as possible by pulling your torso downward with your hands, whilst keeping your front leg straight.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Adopta una colócate de pieing, slightly separar postura (one pie delante de the other) con tu torso inclínateing hacia delantes. Intenta get tu pecho as cerca de tu rodilla lo máximo posible by tiraing tu torso downward con tu manos, mientras manténing tu delantero pierna recto.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Standing Supported Quad Stretch
instructions: Stand upright with a bench placed behind you. Bend at your left knee so that your toes are now on top of the bench.
Maintain a straight back and remain facing forwards. Push your left knee down towards the floor and your hips forward to emphasise this stretch.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Stand upright with a bench placed behind you. Bend at your left knee so that your toes are now on top of the bench.
Maintain a straight back and remain facing forwards. Push your left knee down towards the floor and your hips forward to emphasise this stretch.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Colócate de pie erguido with a banco colocad detrás de . Flexiona at tu izquierdo rodilla so that tu toes are now on parte superior of the banco.
Mantén a recto espalda and remain facing hacia delantes. Empuja tu izquierdo rodilla down hacia el suelo and tu caderas hacia delante to emphasise this estiramiento.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Exercise Ball Pyramid
instructions: Grab a swissball and lay over the top of it (face down) with your hips on top of the ball so they are the highest point of your body.
Relax your body and limbs so that you are supported by your feet and hands/forearms.
Hold for the recommended duration.

en: Grab a swissball and lay over the top of it (face down) with your hips on top of the ball so they are the highest point of your body.
Relax your body and limbs so that you are supported by your feet and hands/forearms.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Coge a swissball and lay over the parte superior of it (face down) con tu caderas on parte superior of the ball so they are the highest point of tu cuerpo.
Relax tu cuerpo and limbs so that are supported by tu pies and manos/antebrazos.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado.

name: Prone Manual Hamstring
instructions: You will need a partner for this exercise. Lay face down with your legs straight. Your assistant will place their hand on your heel.

To begin, flex the knee to curl your leg up. Your partner should provide resistance, starting light and increasing the pressure as the movement is completed. Communicate with your partner to monitor appropriate resistance levels.
Pause at the top, returning the leg to the starting position as your partner provides resistance going the other direction.

en: You will need a partner for this exercise. Lay face down with your legs straight. Your assistant will place their hand on your heel.

To begin, flex the knee to curl your leg up. Your partner should provide resistance, starting light and increasing the pressure as the movement is completed. Communicate with your partner to monitor appropriate resistance levels.
Pause at the top, returning the leg to the starting position as your partner provides resistance going the other direction.
es: will need a partner for this exercise. Túmbate face down con tu piernas recto. tu assistant will coloca their mano on tu talón.

To begin, flex the rodilla to curl tu pierna up. tu partner should provide resipostura, starting light and increasing the pressure as the movimiento is completed. Communicate con tu partner to monitor appropriate resipostura levels.
Haz una pausa at the parte superior, vuelveing the pierna to la posición inicial as tu partner provides resipostura going the other direction.

name: Pronated Hip Flexor Stretch
instructions: Your starting position will be on your hands and knees (in an 'all-fours' position). Lift your left leg up and off the mat and take hold of your ankle behind your body with your left hand.
At this point you should be feeling a stretch through your quadricep and hip flexors.
Push your hips towards the floor to emphasise the stretch.
Hold for the recommended time and switch sides.
Variations: Kneeling Hip Flexor or Kneeling Quad Stretch.

en: Your starting position will be on your hands and knees (in an 'all-fours' position). Lift your left leg up and off the mat and take hold of your ankle behind your body with your left hand.
At this point you should be feeling a stretch through your quadricep and hip flexors.
Push your hips towards the floor to emphasise the stretch.
Hold for the recommended time and switch sides.
Variations: Kneeling Hip Flexor or Kneeling Quad Stretch.
es: tu posición inicial will be on tu manos and rodillas (in an 'all-fours' posición). Eleva tu izquierdo pierna up and off the colchoneta and agarra tu tobillo detrás de tu cuerpo con tu izquierdo mano.
At this point should be feeling a estiramiento through tu quadricep and cadera flexors.
Empuja tu caderas hacia el suelo to emphasise the estiramiento.
Hold for the recommended time and switch lados.
Variaciones: Kneeling Hip Flexor or Kneeling Quad Estiramiento.

name: Posterior Tibialis Stretch
instructions: Lay on a mat with your legs out straight in front of you. Loop a band over your left foot and gently pull on the band until you create the desired stretch.
Make sure that when you pull the band tight, the outside of your foot is getting pulled outward.
Hold for the recommended duration.

en: Lay on a mat with your legs out straight in front of you. Loop a band over your left foot and gently pull on the band until you create the desired stretch.
Make sure that when you pull the band tight, the outside of your foot is getting pulled outward.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Túmbate on a colchoneta con tu piernas out recto delante de . Loop a banda over tu izquierdo pie and suavemente tira on the banda hasta que create the deseado estiramiento.
Make sure that when tira the banda tight, the outlado of tu pie is getting tiraed outward.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado.

name: PNF Hamstring Stretch
instructions: Lie on your back with your legs extended. Your partner should be kneeling beside you. Raise one leg up towards the ceiling and have your partner hold the ankle. Your partner can use their shoulder to brace your leg if necessary. This will be your starting position.
Have your partner push your leg toward your chest just far enough so you feel slight discomfort. Hold the stretch for 10 seconds.
After 10 seconds, actively push back against your partner's resistance for 6 seconds.

Then relax your leg, allowing your partner to gently push the leg towards your head. Be sure to inform your helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching. Switch sides once complete.

en: Lie on your back with your legs extended. Your partner should be kneeling beside you. Raise one leg up towards the ceiling and have your partner hold the ankle. Your partner can use their shoulder to brace your leg if necessary. This will be your starting position.
Have your partner push your leg toward your chest just far enough so you feel slight discomfort. Hold the stretch for 10 seconds.
After 10 seconds, actively push back against your partner's resistance for 6 seconds.

Then relax your leg, allowing your partner to gently push the leg towards your head. Be sure to inform your helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching. Switch sides once complete.
es: Túmbate on tu espalda con tu piernas extiendeed. tu partner should be rodillaling belado . Eleva one pierna up hacia el techo and have tu partner hold the tobillo. tu partner can use their hombro to brace tu pierna if necessary. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Have tu partner empuja tu pierna toward tu pecho just far enough so feel slight discomfort. Hold the estiramiento for 10 segundos.
After 10 segundos, actively empuja espalda contra tu partner's resipostura for 6 segundos.

Then relax tu pierna, permiteing tu partner to suavemente empuja the pierna hacia tu cabeza. Be sure to inform tu helper when the estiramiento is adequate to prevent injury or overestiramientoing. Switch lados once complete.

name: PNF Glute Stretch
instructions: Lie on your back with your partner kneeling beside you.

Flex the hip of one leg, raising it off of the floor. Rotate the leg so the foot is over the opposite hip, the lower leg perpendicular to your body. Your partner should hold the knee and ankle in place. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to push your leg towards your partner, who should be preventing any actual movement of the leg.

After 10-20 seconds, completely relax as your partner gently pushes the ankle and knee towards your chest. Be sure to inform your helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching.

en: Lie on your back with your partner kneeling beside you.

Flex the hip of one leg, raising it off of the floor. Rotate the leg so the foot is over the opposite hip, the lower leg perpendicular to your body. Your partner should hold the knee and ankle in place. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to push your leg towards your partner, who should be preventing any actual movement of the leg.

After 10-20 seconds, completely relax as your partner gently pushes the ankle and knee towards your chest. Be sure to inform your helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching.
es: Túmbate on tu espalda con tu partner rodillaling belado .

Flex the cadera of one pierna, raising it off of el suelo. Rota the pierna so the pie is over the contrario cadera, the baja pierna perpendicular to tu cuerpo. tu partner should hold the rodilla and tobillo in coloca. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Attempt to empuja tu pierna hacia tu partner, who should be preventing any actual movimiento of the pierna.

After 10-20 segundos, completely relax as tu partner suavemente empujaes the tobillo and rodilla hacia tu pecho. Be sure to inform tu helper when the estiramiento is adequate to prevent injury or overestiramientoing.

name: Exercise Ball Hip Bridge
instructions: Grab a Swiss Ball and take a seat on top of it. Walk your body down the ball until your shoulders and neck are supported by it, whilst your feet are shoulder width apart and supporting the rest of your bodyweight. Your knees should be at a 90 degree angle with your hips pushed up towards the ceiling through squeezing your glutes.
Hold for the recommended duration.

en: Grab a Swiss Ball and take a seat on top of it. Walk your body down the ball until your shoulders and neck are supported by it, whilst your feet are shoulder width apart and supporting the rest of your bodyweight. Your knees should be at a 90 degree angle with your hips pushed up towards the ceiling through squeezing your glutes.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Coge a fitball and take a seat on parte superior of it. Walk tu cuerpo down the ball hasta que tu hombros and cuello are supported by it, mientras tu pies are anchura de hombros apart and supporting the rest of tu peso corporal. tu rodillas should be at a 90 degree angle con tu caderas empujaed up hacia el techo through squeezing tu glúteos.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado.

name: Pelvic Tilt Into Bridge
instructions: Lay on a mat, on your back, with your knees bent to a 90 degree angle with your feet flat on the floor. Place your arms above your head flat on the floor.
Gently lift your pelvis up and off the floor by squeezing your glutes and extend your hips towards the ceiling.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.

en: Lay on a mat, on your back, with your knees bent to a 90 degree angle with your feet flat on the floor. Place your arms above your head flat on the floor.
Gently lift your pelvis up and off the floor by squeezing your glutes and extend your hips towards the ceiling.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.
es: Túmbate on a colchoneta, on tu espalda, con tu rodillas bent to a 90 degree angle con tu pies flat on el suelo. Coloca tu brazos por encima de tu cabeza flat on el suelo.
Gently eleva tu pelvis up and off el suelo by squeezing tu glúteos and extiende tu caderas hacia el techo.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado.

name: Overhead Lat Stretch
instructions: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your arms extended directly above your head. Link your fingers together and push your palms up towards the ceiling.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.

name.es: Por encima de la cabeza Lat estiramiento

en: Adopt a standing, shoulder width stance with your arms extended directly above your head. Link your fingers together and push your palms up towards the ceiling.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.
es: Adopta una colócate de pieing, anchura de hombros postura con tu brazos extiendeed directamente por encima de tu cabeza. Link tu dedos together and empuja tu palmas up hacia el techo.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado.

name: On Your Side Quad Stretch
instructions: Lay on a mat (on your left side) with your legs extended fully and your head being supported by your left hand as you rest your weight through your upper arm.
Bend your right knee (behind your body) and take hold of it with your right hand. Keep your knees together and push your hips forward to emphasise the stretch.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Lay on a mat (on your left side) with your legs extended fully and your head being supported by your left hand as you rest your weight through your upper arm.
Bend your right knee (behind your body) and take hold of it with your right hand. Keep your knees together and push your hips forward to emphasise the stretch.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Túmbate on a colchoneta (on tu izquierdo lado) con tu piernas extiendeed completamente and tu cabeza being supported by tu izquierdo mano as rest tu peso through tu upper brazo.
Flexiona tu derecho rodilla (detrás de tu cuerpo) and agarra it con tu derecho mano. Mantén tu rodillas together and empuja tu caderas hacia delante to emphasise the estiramiento.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: One Knee To Chest
instructions: Lay on the floor, on your back, with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.This will be your starting position.
Lift your right knee in towards your chest and take hold of it with your hands (allow your knee to bend).
Gently pull your knee in towards you chest so that your glutes and lower back can feel a stretch.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Lay on the floor, on your back, with your legs extended and your arms by your sides.This will be your starting position.
Lift your right knee in towards your chest and take hold of it with your hands (allow your knee to bend).
Gently pull your knee in towards you chest so that your glutes and lower back can feel a stretch.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Túmbate on el suelo, on tu espalda, con tu piernas extiendeed and tu brazos by tu lados.Esta será tu posición inicial.
Eleva tu derecho rodilla in hacia tu pecho and agarra it con tu manos (permite tu rodilla to flexiona).
Gently tira tu rodilla in hacia pecho so that tu glúteos and zona lumbar can feel a estiramiento.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: One Arm Against Wall
instructions: Stand with a shoulder width stance either next to a wall or doorway. Elevate one of your arms so your elbow is at 90 degrees and your forearm is vertical from the floor. Place your forearm against the upright surface. This is your starting position.
Gently lean your bodyweight forward until you feel the desired stretch come through your lats.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Stand with a shoulder width stance either next to a wall or doorway. Elevate one of your arms so your elbow is at 90 degrees and your forearm is vertical from the floor. Place your forearm against the upright surface. This is your starting position.
Gently lean your bodyweight forward until you feel the desired stretch come through your lats.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Colócate de pie with a anchura de hombros postura either next to a pared or doorway. Eleva one of tu brazos so tu codo is at 90 degrees and tu antebrazo is vertical from el suelo. Coloca tu antebrazo contra the erguido surface. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Gently inclínate tu peso corporal hacia delante hasta que feel the deseado estiramiento come through tu dorsales.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: On Your Back Quad Stretch
instructions: Lay on a bench, face up and have your knees bent to a 90 degree angle with your feet flat on the floor.
Lift your right foot up and off the floor and take hold of it with your right hand. Pull your ankle in towards your body (underneath the bench) without arching your lower back.
Continue to pull your ankle in towards your torso until you get the desired stretch through your thigh.
Hold for the recommened duration and swap sides.

en: Lay on a bench, face up and have your knees bent to a 90 degree angle with your feet flat on the floor.
Lift your right foot up and off the floor and take hold of it with your right hand. Pull your ankle in towards your body (underneath the bench) without arching your lower back.
Continue to pull your ankle in towards your torso until you get the desired stretch through your thigh.
Hold for the recommened duration and swap sides.
es: Túmbate on a banco, face up and have tu rodillas bent to a 90 degree angle con tu pies flat on el suelo.
Eleva tu derecho pie up and off el suelo and agarra it con tu derecho mano. Tira tu tobillo in hacia tu cuerpo (debajo de the banco) without arching tu zona lumbar.
Continúa to tira tu tobillo in hacia tu torso hasta que get the deseado estiramiento through tu thigh.
Hold for the recommened duration and swap lados.

name: Neck-SMR
instructions: Using a muscle roller or a rolling pin, place the roller behind your head and against your neck. Make sure that you do not place the roller directly against the spine, but turned slightly so that the roller is pressed against the muscles to either side of the spine. This will be your starting position.
Starting at the top of your neck, slowly roll down the muscles of your neck, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds.

en: Using a muscle roller or a rolling pin, place the roller behind your head and against your neck. Make sure that you do not place the roller directly against the spine, but turned slightly so that the roller is pressed against the muscles to either side of the spine. This will be your starting position.
Starting at the top of your neck, slowly roll down the muscles of your neck, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds.
es: Using a muscle roller or a rolling pin, coloca the roller detrás de tu cabeza and contra tu cuello. Make sure that do not coloca the roller directamente contra the spine, but turned slightly so that the roller is pressed contra the muscles to either lado of the spine. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Starting at the parte superior of tu cuello, lentamente roll down the muscles of tu cuello, pausing at points of tensión for 10-30 segundos.

name: Middle Back Stretch
instructions: Stand with a narrow stance with your hands placed on your hips. This will be your starting position.
Exhale and rotate through your core until you feel a stretch in your back.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Stand with a narrow stance with your hands placed on your hips. This will be your starting position.
Exhale and rotate through your core until you feel a stretch in your back.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Colócate de pie with a narrow postura con tu manos colocad on tu caderas. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Exhala and rota through tu core hasta que feel a estiramiento in tu espalda.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Lying Prone Quadriceps
instructions: Lay face down on the floor with your partner kneeling beside you. Flex one knee and raise that leg off the ground, attempting to touch your glutes with your foot.

Have your partner kneel on your right side and place one hand on your lower back or glutes. His/her other hand should grasp your ankle or knee and push your shin toward your butt. You should feel a stretch in your quadriceps.
After 10 seconds, try to push foot back toward the ground against your partner's resistance and hold for 6 seconds.
Following this 6-second contraction, relax and allow your partner to stretch your quads for another 30 seconds. (If you want, try contracting your hamstrings for greater ROM gains.)
Repeat with other leg.

en: Lay face down on the floor with your partner kneeling beside you. Flex one knee and raise that leg off the ground, attempting to touch your glutes with your foot.

Have your partner kneel on your right side and place one hand on your lower back or glutes. His/her other hand should grasp your ankle or knee and push your shin toward your butt. You should feel a stretch in your quadriceps.
After 10 seconds, try to push foot back toward the ground against your partner's resistance and hold for 6 seconds.
Following this 6-second contraction, relax and allow your partner to stretch your quads for another 30 seconds. (If you want, try contracting your hamstrings for greater ROM gains.)
Repeat with other leg.
es: Túmbate face down on el suelo con tu partner rodillaling belado . Flex one rodilla and eleva that pierna off the ground, attempting to touch tu glúteos con tu pie.

Have tu partner rodillal on tu derecho lado and coloca one mano on tu zona lumbar or glúteos. His/her other mano should grasp tu tobillo or rodilla and empuja tu shin toward tu butt. should feel a estiramiento in tu cuádriceps.
After 10 segundos, try to empuja pie espalda toward the ground contra tu partner's resipostura and hold for 6 segundos.
Following this 6-second contraction, relax and permite tu partner to estiramiento tu cuádriceps for another 30 segundos. (If want, try contracting tu isquiosurales for greater ROM gains.)
Repite with other pierna.

name: Lying Hamstring
instructions: Lie on your back with your legs extended. Your partner should be kneeling beside you. Raise one leg up towards the ceiling and have your partner hold the ankle. Your partner can use their shoulder to brace your leg if necessary. This will be your starting position.
Have your partner push your leg toward your chest just far enough so you feel slight discomfort. Hold the stretch for 10 seconds.
After 10 seconds, actively push back against your partner's resistance for 6 seconds.

Then relax your leg, allowing your partner to gently push the leg towards your head. Be sure to inform your helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching. Switch sides once complete.

en: Lie on your back with your legs extended. Your partner should be kneeling beside you. Raise one leg up towards the ceiling and have your partner hold the ankle. Your partner can use their shoulder to brace your leg if necessary. This will be your starting position.
Have your partner push your leg toward your chest just far enough so you feel slight discomfort. Hold the stretch for 10 seconds.
After 10 seconds, actively push back against your partner's resistance for 6 seconds.

Then relax your leg, allowing your partner to gently push the leg towards your head. Be sure to inform your helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching. Switch sides once complete.
es: Túmbate on tu espalda con tu piernas extiendeed. tu partner should be rodillaling belado . Eleva one pierna up hacia el techo and have tu partner hold the tobillo. tu partner can use their hombro to brace tu pierna if necessary. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Have tu partner empuja tu pierna toward tu pecho just far enough so feel slight discomfort. Hold the estiramiento for 10 segundos.
After 10 segundos, actively empuja espalda contra tu partner's resipostura for 6 segundos.

Then relax tu pierna, permiteing tu partner to suavemente empuja the pierna hacia tu cabeza. Be sure to inform tu helper when the estiramiento is adequate to prevent injury or overestiramientoing. Switch lados once complete.

name: Lying Glute
instructions: Lie on your back with your partner kneeling beside you.

Flex the hip of one leg, raising it off of the floor. Rotate the leg so the foot is over the opposite hip, the lower leg perpendicular to your body. Your partner should hold the knee and ankle in place. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to push your leg towards your partner, who should be preventing any actual movement of the leg.

After 10-20 seconds, completely relax as your partner gently pushes the ankle and knee towards your chest. Be sure to inform your helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching.

en: Lie on your back with your partner kneeling beside you.

Flex the hip of one leg, raising it off of the floor. Rotate the leg so the foot is over the opposite hip, the lower leg perpendicular to your body. Your partner should hold the knee and ankle in place. This will be your starting position.
