Attempt to push your leg towards your partner, who should be preventing any actual movement of the leg.

After 10-20 seconds, completely relax as your partner gently pushes the ankle and knee towards your chest. Be sure to inform your helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching.
es: Túmbate on tu espalda con tu partner rodillaling belado .

Flex the cadera of one pierna, raising it off of el suelo. Rota the pierna so the pie is over the contrario cadera, the baja pierna perpendicular to tu cuerpo. tu partner should hold the rodilla and tobillo in coloca. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Attempt to empuja tu pierna hacia tu partner, who should be preventing any actual movimiento of the pierna.

After 10-20 segundos, completely relax as tu partner suavemente empujaes the tobillo and rodilla hacia tu pecho. Be sure to inform tu helper when the estiramiento is adequate to prevent injury or overestiramientoing.

name: Lying Crossover
instructions: Lie on your back with your legs extended.

Cross one leg over your body with the knee bent, attempting to touch the knee to the ground. Your partner should kneel beside you, holding your shoulder down with one hand and controlling the crossed leg with the other. this will be your starting position.
Attempt to raise the bent knee off of the ground as your partner prevents any actual movement.
After 10-20 seconds, relax the leg as your partner gently presses the knee towards the floor. Repeat with the other side.

en: Lie on your back with your legs extended.

Cross one leg over your body with the knee bent, attempting to touch the knee to the ground. Your partner should kneel beside you, holding your shoulder down with one hand and controlling the crossed leg with the other. this will be your starting position.
Attempt to raise the bent knee off of the ground as your partner prevents any actual movement.
After 10-20 seconds, relax the leg as your partner gently presses the knee towards the floor. Repeat with the other side.
es: Túmbate on tu espalda con tu piernas extiendeed.

Cross one pierna over tu cuerpo with the rodilla bent, attempting to touch the rodilla to the ground. tu partner should rodillal belado , holding tu hombro down with one mano and controlling the crossed pierna with the other. this will be tu posición inicial.
Attempt to eleva the bent rodilla off of the ground as tu partner prevents any actual movimiento.
After 10-20 segundos, relax the pierna as tu partner suavemente presses the rodilla hacia el suelo. Repite with the other lado.

name: Seated Bent Leg Groin Stretch
instructions: Lie on your back with your knees bent and the soles of the feet pressed together. Have your partner hold your knees. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to squeeze your knees together, while your partner prevents any movement from occurring.
After 10-20 seconds, relax your muscles as your partner gently pushes your knees towards the floor. Be sure to inform your helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching.

en: Lie on your back with your knees bent and the soles of the feet pressed together. Have your partner hold your knees. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to squeeze your knees together, while your partner prevents any movement from occurring.
After 10-20 seconds, relax your muscles as your partner gently pushes your knees towards the floor. Be sure to inform your helper when the stretch is adequate to prevent injury or overstretching.
es: Túmbate on tu espalda con tu rodillas bent and the soles of the pies pressed together. Have tu partner hold tu rodillas. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Attempt to squeeze tu rodillas together, while tu partner prevents any movimiento from occurring.

After 10-20 segundos, relax tu muscles as tu partner suavemente empujaes tu rodillas hacia el suelo. Be sure to inform tu helper when the estiramiento is adequate to prevent injury or overestiramientoing.

name: Levator Myofascial Release
instructions: Using a muscle roller or a rolling pin, place the roller behind your head and against your neck. Make sure that you do not place the roller directly against the spine, but turned slightly so that the roller is pressed against the muscles to either side of the spine. This will be your starting position.
Starting at the top of your neck, slowly roll down the muscles of your neck, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds.

en: Using a muscle roller or a rolling pin, place the roller behind your head and against your neck. Make sure that you do not place the roller directly against the spine, but turned slightly so that the roller is pressed against the muscles to either side of the spine. This will be your starting position.
Starting at the top of your neck, slowly roll down the muscles of your neck, pausing at points of tension for 10-30 seconds.
es: Using a muscle roller or a rolling pin, coloca the roller detrás de tu cabeza and contra tu cuello. Make sure that do not coloca the roller directamente contra the spine, but turned slightly so that the roller is pressed contra the muscles to either lado of the spine. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Starting at the parte superior of tu cuello, lentamente roll down the muscles of tu cuello, pausing at points of tensión for 10-30 segundos.

name: Standing Hamstring Stretch (Elevated Leg)
instructions: Lay down, face up on a mat with your arms by your sides and legs flat on the floor.

Lift your left leg up so that your hip is at a 90 degree angle and your heel is extended directly upward towards the ceiling. Link your fingers together around the back of your upper left leg. This will be your starting position.
Gently exhale and pull your leg in towards you torso, ensure you are keeping your leg as straight as possible, until you feel the desired stretch.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Lay down, face up on a mat with your arms by your sides and legs flat on the floor.

Lift your left leg up so that your hip is at a 90 degree angle and your heel is extended directly upward towards the ceiling. Link your fingers together around the back of your upper left leg. This will be your starting position.
Gently exhale and pull your leg in towards you torso, ensure you are keeping your leg as straight as possible, until you feel the desired stretch.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Túmbate down, face up on a colchoneta con tu brazos by tu lados and piernas flat on el suelo.

Eleva tu izquierdo pierna up so that tu cadera is at a 90 degree angle and tu talón is extiendeed directamente arriba hacia el techo. Link tu dedos together around la espalda of tu upper izquierdo pierna. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Gently exhala and tira tu pierna in hacia torso, ensure are manténing tu pierna as recto lo máximo posible, hasta que feel the deseado estiramiento.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Lat Stretch
instructions: Stand with a shoulder width stance either next to a wall or doorway. Elevate one of your arms so your elbow is at 90 degrees and your forearm is vertical from the floor. Place your forearm against the upright surface. This is your starting position.
Gently lean your bodyweight forward until you feel the desired stretch come through your lats.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Stand with a shoulder width stance either next to a wall or doorway. Elevate one of your arms so your elbow is at 90 degrees and your forearm is vertical from the floor. Place your forearm against the upright surface. This is your starting position.
Gently lean your bodyweight forward until you feel the desired stretch come through your lats.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Colócate de pie with a anchura de hombros postura either next to a pared or doorway. Eleva one of tu brazos so tu codo is at 90 degrees and tu antebrazo is vertical from el suelo. Coloca tu antebrazo contra the erguido surface. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Gently inclínate tu peso corporal hacia delante hasta que feel the deseado estiramiento come through tu dorsales.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Kneeling Quad Stretch
instructions: Adopt a kneeling position on a mat with your knees and heels together.
Lean back until you feel the desired stretch within your thighs. Tip: to emphasise this stretch, look up at the ceiling, arch your lower back gently and pull your shoulders back.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.

en: Adopt a kneeling position on a mat with your knees and heels together.
Lean back until you feel the desired stretch within your thighs. Tip: to emphasise this stretch, look up at the ceiling, arch your lower back gently and pull your shoulders back.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.
es: Adopta una rodillaling posición on a colchoneta con tu rodillas and talones together.
Inclínate espalda hasta que feel the deseado estiramiento within tu thighs. Consejo: to emphasise this estiramiento, look up at el techo, arch tu zona lumbar suavemente and tira tu hombros espalda.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado.

name: Kneeling Hip Flexor Stretch
instructions: To get into the starting position for this stretch, you need to drop to the bottom of a lunge position. So, take a big step to split your stance and descend so that your back knee is now on the floor. Next, take a small step forward with your front foot. This is your starting position.
Lean forward so that your bodyweight is being driven onto your front foot and towards the floor through the extension of your pelvis.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: To get into the starting position for this stretch, you need to drop to the bottom of a lunge position. So, take a big step to split your stance and descend so that your back knee is now on the floor. Next, take a small step forward with your front foot. This is your starting position.
Lean forward so that your bodyweight is being driven onto your front foot and towards the floor through the extension of your pelvis.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Para adoptar la posición inicial for this estiramiento, debes bajar a the parte baja of a zancada posición. Así que, da un paso largo to separar tu postura and desciende so that tu espalda rodilla is now on el suelo. A continuación, take a small step hacia delante con tu delantero pie. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Inclínate hacia delante so that tu peso corporal is being driven onto tu delantero pie and hacia el suelo through the extensión of tu pelvis.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Kneeling Forearm Stretch
instructions: Adopt an 'all fours' position on a mat but have your fingers pointing your knees rather than away from your body. This will be your starting position.
Whilst maintaining a connection to the floor with your palms, gently lean your bodyweight backwards towards your heels until you create the desired stretch in your forearms.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.

en: Adopt an 'all fours' position on a mat but have your fingers pointing your knees rather than away from your body. This will be your starting position.
Whilst maintaining a connection to the floor with your palms, gently lean your bodyweight backwards towards your heels until you create the desired stretch in your forearms.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.
es: Adopta unan 'all fours' posición on a colchoneta but have tu dedos pointing tu rodillas rather than away from tu cuerpo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
mientras maintaining a connection to el suelo con tu palmas, suavemente inclínate tu peso corporal hacia atráss hacia tu talones hasta que create the deseado estiramiento in tu antebrazos.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado.

name: Kneeling Arm Drill
instructions: This drill helps increase arm efficiency during the run. Begin kneeling, left foot in front, right knee down. Apply pressure through the front heel to keep your glutes and hamstrings activated.
Begin by blocking the arms in long, pendulum like swings. Close the arm angle, blocking with the arms as you would when jogging, progressing to a run and finally a sprint.
As soon as your hands pass the hip, accelerate them forward during the sprinting motion to move them as quickly as possible.
Switch knees and repeat.

en: This drill helps increase arm efficiency during the run. Begin kneeling, left foot in front, right knee down. Apply pressure through the front heel to keep your glutes and hamstrings activated.
Begin by blocking the arms in long, pendulum like swings. Close the arm angle, blocking with the arms as you would when jogging, progressing to a run and finally a sprint.
As soon as your hands pass the hip, accelerate them forward during the sprinting motion to move them as quickly as possible.
Switch knees and repeat.
es: This drill helps increase brazo efficiency during the run. Begin rodillaling, izquierdo pie in delantero, derecho rodilla down. Apply pressure through the delantero talón to mantén tu glúteos and isquiosurales activated.
Begin by blocking the brazos in long, pendulum like swings. Close the brazo angle, blocking with the brazos as would when jogging, progressing to a run and finally a sprint.
As soon as tu manos pass the cadera, accelerate them hacia delante during the sprinting motion to move them as quickly lo máximo posible.
Switch rodillas and repeat.

name: Knee Circles
instructions: Stand with your legs together and hands by your waist.
Now move your knees in a circular motion as you breathe normally.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

en: Stand with your legs together and hands by your waist.
Now move your knees in a circular motion as you breathe normally.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.
es: Colócate de pie con tu piernas together and manos by tu waist.
Now move tu rodillas in a movimiento circular as breathe normally.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones.

name: Laying Knee Across The Body Stretch
instructions: Lay on a mat, on your back, with your legs extended on the floor and arms stretched out wide. Lift your left leg up to create a 90 degree bend at both your knee and hip. Take hold of your left knee with your right hand and pull it across your body towards the floor on your right hand side. Tip: to get a better stretch, turn your head the opposite way to which your knee is travelling and attempt to keep both shoulders on the mat.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.en: Laying Knee Across The Body Stretch
name.es: Tumbado rodilla Across The Body estiramiento

en: Lay on a mat, on your back, with your legs extended on the floor and arms stretched out wide. Lift your left leg up to create a 90 degree bend at both your knee and hip. Take hold of your left knee with your right hand and pull it across your body towards the floor on your right hand side. Tip: to get a better stretch, turn your head the opposite way to which your knee is travelling and attempt to keep both shoulders on the mat.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Túmbate on a colchoneta, on tu espalda, con tu piernas extiendeed on el suelo and brazos estiramientoed out amplio. Eleva tu izquierdo pierna up to create a 90 degree flexiona at both tu rodilla and cadera. Agarra tu izquierdo rodilla con tu derecho mano and tira it across tu cuerpo hacia el suelo on tu derecho mano lado. Consejo: to get a better estiramiento, turn tu cabeza the contrario way to which tu rodilla is travelling and attempt to mantén both hombros on the colchoneta.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

aliases: Laying Knee Across The Body Stretch

name: IT Band and Glute Stretch
instructions: Lay on a mat, on your back, with your legs extended on the floor. Loop a band over the arch in your right shoe and bring that leg over your body towards the opposite side (whilst keeping it stright). This will be your starting position.
Gradually, pull harder and harder on that band until you acheive the desired amount of tension so you can feel a stretch through you glute and outer thigh.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Lay on a mat, on your back, with your legs extended on the floor. Loop a band over the arch in your right shoe and bring that leg over your body towards the opposite side (whilst keeping it stright). This will be your starting position.
Gradually, pull harder and harder on that band until you acheive the desired amount of tension so you can feel a stretch through you glute and outer thigh.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Túmbate on a colchoneta, on tu espalda, con tu piernas extiendeed on el suelo. Loop a banda over the arch in tu derecho shoe and lleva that pierna over tu cuerpo hacia the contrario lado (mientras manténing it stderecho). Esta será tu posición inicial.
Gradually, tira harder and harder on that banda hasta que acheive the deseado cantidad of tensión so can feel a estiramiento through glute and outer thigh.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Isometric Neck Exercise - Sides
instructions: With your head and neck in a neutral position (normal position with head erect facing forward), place your left hand on the left side of your head.

Now gently push towards the left as you contract the left neck muscles but resisting any movement of your head.  Start with slow tension and increase slowly.  Keep breathing normally as you execute this contraction.
Hold for the recommended number of seconds.
Now release the tension slowly.
Rest for the recommended amount of time and repeat with your right hand placed on the right side of your head.
Variations: You can also do this exercise by placing your hands to the front and then to the back of your head.  First do one side and then the next.

en: With your head and neck in a neutral position (normal position with head erect facing forward), place your left hand on the left side of your head.

Now gently push towards the left as you contract the left neck muscles but resisting any movement of your head.  Start with slow tension and increase slowly.  Keep breathing normally as you execute this contraction.
Hold for the recommended number of seconds.
Now release the tension slowly.
Rest for the recommended amount of time and repeat with your right hand placed on the right side of your head.
Variations: You can also do this exercise by placing your hands to the front and then to the back of your head.  First do one side and then the next.
es: With tu cabeza and cuello in a neutral posición (normal posición with cabeza erect facing hacia delante), coloca tu izquierdo mano on the izquierdo lado of tu cabeza.

Now suavemente empuja hacia the izquierdo as contract the izquierdo cuello muscles but resisting any movimiento of tu cabeza. Start with lento tensión and increase lentamente. Mantén breathing normally as execute this contraction.
Hold for the recommended number of segundos.
Now release the tensión lentamente.
Rest for the recommended cantidad of time and repeat con tu derecho mano colocad on the derecho lado of tu cabeza.
Variaciones: can also do this exercise by placing tu manos to the delantero and then to la espalda of tu cabeza. First do one lado and then the next.

name: Isometric Neck Exercise - Front And Back
instructions: With your head and neck in a neutral position (normal position with head erect facing forward), place both of your hands on the front side of your head.

Now gently push forward as you contract the neck muscles but resisting any movement of your head.  Start with slow tension and increase slowly.  Keep breathing normally as you execute this contraction.
Hold for the recommended number of seconds.
Now release the tension slowly.
Rest for the recommended amount of time and repeat with your hands placed on the back side of your head.
Variations: You can also do this exercise by placing your hands on the sides of your head.  First do one side and then the next.

name.en: Isometric Neck Exercise - Front And Back
name.es: Isometric cuello Exercise - Front y espalda

en: With your head and neck in a neutral position (normal position with head erect facing forward), place both of your hands on the front side of your head.

Now gently push forward as you contract the neck muscles but resisting any movement of your head.  Start with slow tension and increase slowly.  Keep breathing normally as you execute this contraction.
Hold for the recommended number of seconds.
Now release the tension slowly.
Rest for the recommended amount of time and repeat with your hands placed on the back side of your head.
Variations: You can also do this exercise by placing your hands on the sides of your head.  First do one side and then the next.
es: With tu cabeza and cuello in a neutral posición (normal posición with cabeza erect facing hacia delante), coloca both of tu manos on the delantero lado of tu cabeza.

Now suavemente empuja hacia delante as contract the cuello muscles but resisting any movimiento of tu cabeza. Start with lento tensión and increase lentamente. Mantén breathing normally as execute this contraction.
Hold for the recommended number of segundos.
Now release the tensión lentamente.
Rest for the recommended cantidad of time and repeat con tu manos colocad on la espalda lado of tu cabeza.
Variaciones: can also do this exercise by placing tu manos on the lados of tu cabeza. First do one lado and then the next.

aliases: Isometric Neck Exercise - Front And Back

name: Isometric Chest Squeezes
instructions: Place your palms together in front of your body with your elbows bent at a 90 degree angle. Your fingers should run along side the corresponding opposite digit, pointing away from your body.
Gently squeeze your palms together by contracting your chest muscles (pectorals).
Gradually squeeze harder and harder until you get to the desired amount of tension.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.

en: Place your palms together in front of your body with your elbows bent at a 90 degree angle. Your fingers should run along side the corresponding opposite digit, pointing away from your body.
Gently squeeze your palms together by contracting your chest muscles (pectorals).
Gradually squeeze harder and harder until you get to the desired amount of tension.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.
es: Coloca tu palmas together delante de tu cuerpo con tu codos bent at a 90 degree angle. tu dedos should run along lado the corresponding contrario digit, pointing away from tu cuerpo.
Gently squeeze tu palmas together by contracting tu pecho muscles (pectorals).
Gradually squeeze harder and harder hasta que get to the deseado cantidad of tensión.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado.

name: Reverse Iron Cross Stretch
instructions: Lay on a mat, face down, with your arms extended out towards your sides with your palms facing the floor. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale, bend your left knee and bring your left leg across the back of your body towards the floor and your right hand.
Pause for a brief moment and return your left leg back along the same path back into the starting position. As soon as you get to the starting position, repeat the movement for your right leg.
Repeat for the recommened amount of repetitions.

en: Lay on a mat, face down, with your arms extended out towards your sides with your palms facing the floor. This will be your starting position.
To initiate the movement, exhale, bend your left knee and bring your left leg across the back of your body towards the floor and your right hand.
Pause for a brief moment and return your left leg back along the same path back into the starting position. As soon as you get to the starting position, repeat the movement for your right leg.
Repeat for the recommened amount of repetitions.
es: Túmbate on a colchoneta, face down, con tu brazos extiendeed out hacia tu lados con tu palmas facing el suelo. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Para iniciar el movimiento, exhala, flexiona tu izquierdo rodilla and lleva tu izquierdo pierna across la espalda of tu cuerpo hacia el suelo and tu derecho mano.

Haz una pausa for a brief moment and vuelve tu izquierdo pierna espalda along the same path espalda into la posición inicial. As soon as get to la posición inicial, repeat the movimiento for tu derecho pierna.
Repite for the recommened cantidad of repeticiones.

name: Intermediate Hip Flexor & Quad Stretch
instructions: Lay on a mat, face down, with your legs fully extended and flat on the floor. Take a band and loop it over your toes and gently pull it tight with both hands so that your knee bends and your hips are extended towards the floor, stretching your thigh and hip flexors.
Making sure that the band will not slip off your shoe, slowly pull harder on the band so that the stretch becomes greater until you create the desired amount of tension.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.es: Intermediate cadera Flexor y cuádriceps estiramiento

en: Lay on a mat, face down, with your legs fully extended and flat on the floor. Take a band and loop it over your toes and gently pull it tight with both hands so that your knee bends and your hips are extended towards the floor, stretching your thigh and hip flexors.
Making sure that the band will not slip off your shoe, slowly pull harder on the band so that the stretch becomes greater until you create the desired amount of tension.
Hold this position for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Túmbate on a colchoneta, face down, con tu piernas completamente extiendeed and flat on el suelo. Take a banda and loop it over tu toes and suavemente tira it tight with both manos so that tu rodilla flexionas and tu caderas are extiendeed hacia el suelo, estiramientoing tu thigh and cadera flexors.
Making sure that the banda will not slip off tu shoe, lentamente tira harder on the banda so that the estiramiento becomes greater hasta que create the deseado cantidad of tensión.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Intermediate Groin Stretch
instructions: Lay on a mat, on your back, with a band looped around the arch in one off your shoes. Both legs should be fully extended on the floor at this point. This will be your starting position.
Extend the leg with the band on out as wide as possible. From there, pull the band so that there is now the desired tension and hold to create a stretch through your groin and hamstrings.
Hold for the recemmended duration and swap sides.

en: Lay on a mat, on your back, with a band looped around the arch in one off your shoes. Both legs should be fully extended on the floor at this point. This will be your starting position.
Extend the leg with the band on out as wide as possible. From there, pull the band so that there is now the desired tension and hold to create a stretch through your groin and hamstrings.
Hold for the recemmended duration and swap sides.
es: Túmbate on a colchoneta, on tu espalda, with a banda looped around the arch in one off tu shoes. Both piernas should be completamente extiendeed on el suelo at this point. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Extiende the pierna with the banda on out as amplio lo máximo posible. From there, tira the banda so that there is now the deseado tensión and hold to create a estiramiento through tu groin and isquiosurales.
Hold for the recemmended duration and swap lados.

name: Hug Knees To Chest
instructions: Lay on the floor, on your back, with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. This will be your starting position.
Lift both your knees in towards your chest and take hold of them with your hands (allow your knee to bend).
Gently pull your knees in towards your chest so that your glutes and lower back can feel a stretch.
Hold for the recommended duration.

en: Lay on the floor, on your back, with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. This will be your starting position.
Lift both your knees in towards your chest and take hold of them with your hands (allow your knee to bend).
Gently pull your knees in towards your chest so that your glutes and lower back can feel a stretch.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Túmbate on el suelo, on tu espalda, con tu piernas extiendeed and tu brazos by tu lados. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Eleva both tu rodillas in hacia tu pecho and agarra them con tu manos (permite tu rodilla to flexiona).
Gently tira tu rodillas in hacia tu pecho so that tu glúteos and zona lumbar can feel a estiramiento.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado.

name: Laying Hamstring Stretch
instructions: Lay on the floor, on your back, with your right leg extended directly (or as close as you can) towards the ceiling whilst your left leg is bent at a 90 degree angle with your foot flat on the floor. Place a band over the arch in your right foot and pull gently towards the floor so the band has some tension. This will be your starting position.
Relax your right leg and pull the band tight so that you can feel the stretch in your hamstrings.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

en: Lay on the floor, on your back, with your right leg extended directly (or as close as you can) towards the ceiling whilst your left leg is bent at a 90 degree angle with your foot flat on the floor. Place a band over the arch in your right foot and pull gently towards the floor so the band has some tension. This will be your starting position.
Relax your right leg and pull the band tight so that you can feel the stretch in your hamstrings.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Túmbate on el suelo, on tu espalda, con tu derecho pierna extiendeed directamente (or as close as can) hacia el techo mientras tu izquierdo pierna is bent at a 90 degree angle con tu pie flat on el suelo. Coloca a banda over the arch in tu derecho pie and tira suavemente hacia el suelo so the banda has some tensión. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Relax tu derecho pierna and tira the banda tight so that can feel the estiramiento in tu isquiosurales.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

name: Groin PNF Stretch
instructions: Lie on your back with your feet raised towards the ceiling.
Have your partner hold your feet or ankles. Abduct your legs as far as you can. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to squeeze your legs together for 10 or more seconds, while your partner prevents you from doing so.

Now, relax the muscles in your legs as your partner pushes your feet apart, stretching as far as is comfortable for you. Be sure to let your partner know when the stretch is adequate to prevent overstretching or injury.

en: Lie on your back with your feet raised towards the ceiling.
Have your partner hold your feet or ankles. Abduct your legs as far as you can. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to squeeze your legs together for 10 or more seconds, while your partner prevents you from doing so.

Now, relax the muscles in your legs as your partner pushes your feet apart, stretching as far as is comfortable for you. Be sure to let your partner know when the stretch is adequate to prevent overstretching or injury.
es: Túmbate on tu espalda con tu pies elevad hacia el techo.
Have tu partner hold tu pies or tobillos. Abduct tu piernas todo lo as puedas. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Attempt to squeeze tu piernas together for 10 or more segundos, while tu partner prevents from doing so.

Now, relax the muscles in tu piernas as tu partner empujaes tu pies apart, estiramientoing todo lo as is comfortable for . Be sure to let tu partner know when the estiramiento is adequate to prevent overestiramientoing or injury.

name: Groin & Back Stretch
instructions: Take a seat on the floor, bend your knees and allow them to extend out wide whilst the soles of your shoes rest flat together. Interlink your fingers around the back of your head and gently pull your head (therefore chin) down towards your chest. This will be your starting position.
Curl your abdominals and pull down gently with your hands so that your elbows are placed against your knees, emphasising the stretch through your groin.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.

en: Take a seat on the floor, bend your knees and allow them to extend out wide whilst the soles of your shoes rest flat together. Interlink your fingers around the back of your head and gently pull your head (therefore chin) down towards your chest. This will be your starting position.
Curl your abdominals and pull down gently with your hands so that your elbows are placed against your knees, emphasising the stretch through your groin.
Hold this position for the recommended duration.
es: Siéntate on el suelo, flexiona tu rodillas and permite them to extiende out amplio mientras the soles of tu shoes rest flat together. Interlink tu dedos around la espalda of tu cabeza and suavemente tira tu cabeza (therefore chin) down hacia tu pecho. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Curl tu abdominales and tira down suavemente con tu manos so that tu codos are colocad contra tu rodillas, emphasising the estiramiento through tu groin.
Mantén esta posición durante el tiempo indicado.

name: Glute Stretch - One Knee To Chest
instructions: Lay on the floor, on your back, with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. This will be your starting position.
Lift your right knee in towards your chest and take hold of it with your hands (allow your knee to bend).
Gently pull your knee in towards your chest so that your glutes and lower back can feel a stretch.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.

name.en: Glute Stretch - One Knee To Chest
name.es: Glúteo estiramiento - una rodilla al pecho

en: Lay on the floor, on your back, with your legs extended and your arms by your sides. This will be your starting position.
Lift your right knee in towards your chest and take hold of it with your hands (allow your knee to bend).
Gently pull your knee in towards your chest so that your glutes and lower back can feel a stretch.
Hold for the recommended duration and swap sides.
es: Túmbate on el suelo, on tu espalda, con tu piernas extiendeed and tu brazos by tu lados. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Eleva tu derecho rodilla in hacia tu pecho and agarra it con tu manos (permite tu rodilla to flexiona).
Gently tira tu rodilla in hacia tu pecho so that tu glúteos and zona lumbar can feel a estiramiento.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado y cambia de lado.

aliases: Glute Stretch - One Knee To Chest

name: Cross-Body Back Stretch
instructions: Take a seat on the floor with your right leg extended out in front of you with your left leg bent at a 90 degree angle placed over the top of your right leg.
Place your right elbow (arm straight) on the outside of your left knee with your left hand on the floor behind you.
Rotate your torso anti clockwise. Tip: To emphasise this stretch put pressure through your right elbow into your left knee.
Hold for the recommended duration.

en: Take a seat on the floor with your right leg extended out in front of you with your left leg bent at a 90 degree angle placed over the top of your right leg.
Place your right elbow (arm straight) on the outside of your left knee with your left hand on the floor behind you.
Rotate your torso anti clockwise. Tip: To emphasise this stretch put pressure through your right elbow into your left knee.
Hold for the recommended duration.
es: Siéntate on el suelo con tu derecho pierna extiendeed extendidas delante de con tu izquierdo pierna bent at a 90 degree angle colocad over the parte superior of tu derecho pierna.
Coloca tu derecho codo (brazo recto) on the outlado of tu izquierdo rodilla con tu izquierdo mano on el suelo detrás de .
Rota tu torso anti clockwise. Consejo: To emphasise this estiramiento put pressure through tu derecho codo into tu izquierdo rodilla.
Mantén la posición durante el tiempo indicado.

name: Chin To Chest Stretch
instructions: Take a seat on the floor with your legs extended out in front of you.
Interlink your fingers behind your head and gently start to pull your head (and in turn your chin) down towards your chest.
Once your chin is in contact with your chest, hold the position for the recommended amount of time.

en: Take a seat on the floor with your legs extended out in front of you.
Interlink your fingers behind your head and gently start to pull your head (and in turn your chin) down towards your chest.
Once your chin is in contact with your chest, hold the position for the recommended amount of time.
es: Siéntate on el suelo con tu piernas extiendeed extendidas delante de .
Interlink tu dedos detrás de tu cabeza and suavemente start to tira tu cabeza (and in turn tu chin) down hacia tu pecho.
Once tu chin is in contact con tu pecho, hold la posición for the recommended cantidad of time.

name: Chest Stretch on Stability Ball
instructions: Adopt an 'all fours' position with a swiss ball next to your right elbow. Lift your right elbow up and on top of the swiss ball so that your forearm is supported by the ball too. This is your starting position.
Rotate your right shoulder towards the floor, creating a stretch in your right pectoral muscle.
Hold this position for the recommended amount of time before switching sides.

en: Adopt an 'all fours' position with a swiss ball next to your right elbow. Lift your right elbow up and on top of the swiss ball so that your forearm is supported by the ball too. This is your starting position.
Rotate your right shoulder towards the floor, creating a stretch in your right pectoral muscle.
Hold this position for the recommended amount of time before switching sides.
es: Adopta unan 'all fours' posición with a fitball next to tu derecho codo. Eleva tu derecho codo up and on parte superior of the fitball so that tu antebrazo is supported by the ball too. Esta es tu posición inicial.
Rota tu derecho hombro hacia el suelo, creating a estiramiento in tu derecho pectoral muscle.
Hold this posición for the recommended cantidad of time before switching lados.

name: Chair Upper Body Stretch
instructions: Take a seat on a chair (or bench) and lean your torso forward so that your chest is as close to your knees as possible.
Take hold of the rear chair legs (or bench) with straight arms and pull your torso towards the floor.
Hold this stretch for the recommended amount of time.

en: Take a seat on a chair (or bench) and lean your torso forward so that your chest is as close to your knees as possible.
Take hold of the rear chair legs (or bench) with straight arms and pull your torso towards the floor.
Hold this stretch for the recommended amount of time.
es: Siéntate on a silla (or banco) and inclínate tu torso hacia delante so that tu pecho is as cerca de tu rodillas lo máximo posible.
Agarra the rear silla piernas (or banco) with recto brazos and tira tu torso hacia el suelo.
Hold this estiramiento for the recommended cantidad of time.

name: Chair Lower Back Stretch
instructions: Take a seat in a chair with perfect posture and extend your right arm directly upward towards the ceiling.
Take hold of the chair with your left hand as you lean across to your left hand side.
Hold this stretch for the recommended amount of time and swap sides.

en: Take a seat in a chair with perfect posture and extend your right arm directly upward towards the ceiling.
Take hold of the chair with your left hand as you lean across to your left hand side.
Hold this stretch for the recommended amount of time and swap sides.
es: Siéntate in a silla with perfect posture and extiende tu derecho brazo directamente arriba hacia el techo.
Agarra the silla con tu izquierdo mano as inclínate across to tu izquierdo mano lado.
Hold this estiramiento for the recommended cantidad of time and swap lados.

name: Chair Leg Extended Stretch
instructions: Take a seat in a chair with perfect posture and grab hold of the sides with your hands.
Raise one leg up straight out in front of you with your toes pulled in towards your shin.
Exhale and slowly move that leg outward until you cannot go any further.
Inhale and return your leg back into the starting position along the same path.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.

en: Take a seat in a chair with perfect posture and grab hold of the sides with your hands.
Raise one leg up straight out in front of you with your toes pulled in towards your shin.
Exhale and slowly move that leg outward until you cannot go any further.
Inhale and return your leg back into the starting position along the same path.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions and swap sides.
es: Siéntate in a silla with perfect posture and coge hold of the lados con tu manos.
Eleva one pierna up recto extendidas delante de con tu toes tiraed in hacia tu shin.
Exhala and lentamente move that pierna outward hasta que cannot go any further.
Inhala and vuelve tu pierna espalda into la posición inicial along the same path.
Repite el número indicado de repeticiones and swap lados.

name: Cat Stretch
instructions: Your starting position will be on your hands and knees in an 'all-fours' position.

Once you are in this position, breathe normally and extend your upper back upward towards the ceiling. Tip: To emphasise the stretch, slowly start to walk your hands in towards you knees. Make sure your back is extended towards the ceiling as you do so, you should also feel a stretch through your forearms.
Hold this position for the recommended amount of time.

en: Your starting position will be on your hands and knees in an 'all-fours' position.

Once you are in this position, breathe normally and extend your upper back upward towards the ceiling. Tip: To emphasise the stretch, slowly start to walk your hands in towards you knees. Make sure your back is extended towards the ceiling as you do so, you should also feel a stretch through your forearms.
Hold this position for the recommended amount of time.
es: tu posición inicial will be on tu manos and rodillas in an 'all-fours' posición.

Once are in this posición, breathe normally and extiende tu upper espalda arriba hacia el techo. Consejo: To emphasise the estiramiento, lentamente start to walk tu manos in hacia rodillas. Make sure tu espalda is extiendeed hacia el techo as do so, should also feel a estiramiento through tu antebrazos.
Hold this posición for the recommended cantidad of time.

name: Carioca Quick Step
instructions: The carioca quick step simulates coming out of the lateral power motion.
Begin with your feet a few inches apart and your left arm up in a relaxed, athletic position.
With your right foot, quick step behind and pull the knee up.
Fire your arms back up when you pull the right knee, being sure that your knee goes straight up and down. Avoid turning your feet as you move and continue to look forward as you move to the side.

en: The carioca quick step simulates coming out of the lateral power motion.
Begin with your feet a few inches apart and your left arm up in a relaxed, athletic position.
With your right foot, quick step behind and pull the knee up.
Fire your arms back up when you pull the right knee, being sure that your knee goes straight up and down. Avoid turning your feet as you move and continue to look forward as you move to the side.
es: The carioca quick step simulates coming out of the lateral power motion.
Begin con tu pies a few inches apart and tu izquierdo brazo up in a relajado, athletic posición.
With tu derecho pie, quick step detrás de and tira the rodilla up.
Fire tu brazos espalda up when tira the derecho rodilla, being sure that tu rodilla goes recto up and down. Avoid turning tu pies as move and continue to look hacia delante as move to the lado.

name: Calf Stretch Hands Against Wall
instructions: Adopt a split stance (one foot in front of the other) a couple of feet away from a wall. Lean forward so that your heels remain flat on the floor with your hands supporting the majority of your weight against the wall. Tip: The further you stand away from the wall, the greater the stretch will be but remember to keep your heels as flat on the floor as possible. Push your hips forward to emphasise this stretch.
Hold for the recommended amount of time and swap sides.
Variations: Standing Calf Stretch or Calf Stretch Elbows Against Wall.

en: Adopt a split stance (one foot in front of the other) a couple of feet away from a wall. Lean forward so that your heels remain flat on the floor with your hands supporting the majority of your weight against the wall. Tip: The further you stand away from the wall, the greater the stretch will be but remember to keep your heels as flat on the floor as possible. Push your hips forward to emphasise this stretch.
Hold for the recommended amount of time and swap sides.
Variations: Standing Calf Stretch or Calf Stretch Elbows Against Wall.
es: Adopta una separar postura (one pie delante de the other) a couple of pies away from a pared. Inclínate hacia delante so that tu talones remain flat on el suelo con tu manos supporting the majority of tu peso contra the pared. Consejo: The further colócate de pie away from the pared, the greater the estiramiento will be but remember to mantén tu talones as flat on el suelo lo máximo posible. Empuja tu caderas hacia delante to emphasise this estiramiento.
Hold for the recommended cantidad of time and swap lados.
Variaciones: Colócate de pieing Calf Estiramiento or Calf Estiramiento Elbows Against Wall.

name: Calf Stretch Elbows Against Wall
instructions: Adopt a narrow standing stance a couple of feet away from a wall. Lean forward so that your heels remain flat on the floor with your forearms supporting the majority of your weight against the wall. Tip: The further you stand away from the wall, the greater the stretch will be but remember to keep your heels as flat on the floor as possible.
Hold for the recommended amount of time.
Variation: Standing Calf Stretch.

en: Adopt a narrow standing stance a couple of feet away from a wall. Lean forward so that your heels remain flat on the floor with your forearms supporting the majority of your weight against the wall. Tip: The further you stand away from the wall, the greater the stretch will be but remember to keep your heels as flat on the floor as possible.
Hold for the recommended amount of time.
Variation: Standing Calf Stretch.
es: Adopta una narrow colócate de pieing postura a couple of pies away from a pared. Inclínate hacia delante so that tu talones remain flat on el suelo con tu antebrazos supporting the majority of tu peso contra the pared. Consejo: The further colócate de pie away from the pared, the greater the estiramiento will be but remember to mantén tu talones as flat on el suelo lo máximo posible.
Hold for the recommended cantidad of time.
Variación: Colócate de pieing Calf Estiramiento.

name: Calf Stretch
instructions: Adopt a standing split stance with your legs a single step apart. Slightly bend both of your knees and whilst keeping your rear heel planted, exert pressure onto the front foot, therefore stretching your rear calf.
Hold this position for the recommended time and swap sides.
Variation: Calf Stretch Elbows Against Wall.

en: Adopt a standing split stance with your legs a single step apart. Slightly bend both of your knees and whilst keeping your rear heel planted, exert pressure onto the front foot, therefore stretching your rear calf.
Hold this position for the recommended time and swap sides.
Variation: Calf Stretch Elbows Against Wall.
es: Adopta una colócate de pieing separar postura con tu piernas a single step apart. Slightly flexiona both of tu rodillas and mientras manténing tu rear talón planted, exert pressure onto the delantero pie, therefore estiramientoing tu rear gemelo.
Hold this posición for the recommended time and swap lados.
Variación: Calf Estiramiento Elbows Against Wall.

name: Brachialis-SMR
instructions: Lie on your side, with your upper arm against the foam roller. The upper arm should be more or less aligned with your body, with the outside of the bicep pressed against the foam roller.
Raise your hips off of the floor, supporting your weight on your arm and on your feet. Hold for 10-30 seconds, and then switch sides.

en: Lie on your side, with your upper arm against the foam roller. The upper arm should be more or less aligned with your body, with the outside of the bicep pressed against the foam roller.
Raise your hips off of the floor, supporting your weight on your arm and on your feet. Hold for 10-30 seconds, and then switch sides.
es: Túmbate on tu lado, con tu upper brazo contra the foam roller. The upper brazo should be more or less aligned con tu cuerpo, with the outlado of the bicep pressed contra the foam roller.
Eleva tu caderas off of el suelo, supporting tu peso on tu brazo and on tu pies. Hold for 10-30 segundos, and then switch lados.

name: Bicep Stretch Against A Wall
instructions: Sit on the floor with your knees bent and your partner standing behind you. Extend your arms straight behind you with your palms facing each other. Your partner will hold your wrists for you. This will be the starting position.
Attempt to flex your elbows, while your partner prevents any actual movement.

After 10-20 seconds, relax your arms while your partner gently pulls your wrists up to stretch your biceps. Be sure to let your partner know when the stretch is appropriate to prevent injury or overstretching.

en: Sit on the floor with your knees bent and your partner standing behind you. Extend your arms straight behind you with your palms facing each other. Your partner will hold your wrists for you. This will be the starting position.
Attempt to flex your elbows, while your partner prevents any actual movement.

After 10-20 seconds, relax your arms while your partner gently pulls your wrists up to stretch your biceps. Be sure to let your partner know when the stretch is appropriate to prevent injury or overstretching.
es: Siéntate on el suelo con tu rodillas bent and tu partner colócate de pieing detrás de . Extiende tu brazos recto detrás de con tu palmaas enfrentadas. tu partner will hold tu wrists for . This will be la posición inicial.
Attempt to flex tu codos, while tu partner prevents any actual movimiento.

After 10-20 segundos, relax tu brazos while tu partner suavemente tiras tu wrists up to estiramiento tu bíceps. Be sure to let tu partner know when the estiramiento is appropriate to prevent injury or overestiramientoing.

name: Bicep Foam Roll
instructions: Lie on your side, with your upper arm against the foam roller. The upper arm should be more or less aligned with your body, with the outside of the bicep pressed against the foam roller.
Raise your hips off of the floor, supporting your weight on your arm and on your feet. Hold for 10-30 seconds, and then switch sides.

en: Lie on your side, with your upper arm against the foam roller. The upper arm should be more or less aligned with your body, with the outside of the bicep pressed against the foam roller.
Raise your hips off of the floor, supporting your weight on your arm and on your feet. Hold for 10-30 seconds, and then switch sides.
es: Túmbate on tu lado, con tu upper brazo contra the foam roller. The upper brazo should be more or less aligned con tu cuerpo, with the outlado of the bicep pressed contra the foam roller.
Eleva tu caderas off of el suelo, supporting tu peso on tu brazo and on tu pies. Hold for 10-30 segundos, and then switch lados.

name: Behind Head Chest Stretch
instructions: Sit on the floor with your legs comfortably in front of you. Your chest should be up and your back straight. Put your hands on the back of your head and interlace your fingers. This will be your starting position

Have your partner stand behind you and put his/her hands on the inside of your elbows. Allow them to pull back on your elbows until you feel a stretch in your chest and front delts. Hold for 10 seconds.
After 10 seconds, try to bring your elbows in against your partner's resistance. Hold that contraction for 6 seconds.
Now, relax your muscles and have your partner gently pull the elbows back as far as it comfortable for you for 30 seconds. (If you want, try contracting your upper back for greater ROM gains.)

en: Sit on the floor with your legs comfortably in front of you. Your chest should be up and your back straight. Put your hands on the back of your head and interlace your fingers. This will be your starting position

Have your partner stand behind you and put his/her hands on the inside of your elbows. Allow them to pull back on your elbows until you feel a stretch in your chest and front delts. Hold for 10 seconds.
After 10 seconds, try to bring your elbows in against your partner's resistance. Hold that contraction for 6 seconds.
Now, relax your muscles and have your partner gently pull the elbows back as far as it comfortable for you for 30 seconds. (If you want, try contracting your upper back for greater ROM gains.)
es: Siéntate on el suelo con tu piernas comfortably delante de . tu pecho should be up and tu espalda recto. Put tu manos on la espalda of tu cabeza and interlace tu dedos. This will be tu posición inicial

Have tu partner colócate de pie detrás de and put his/her manos on the inlado of tu codos. Allow them to tira espalda on tu codos hasta que feel a estiramiento in tu pecho and delantero delts. Hold for 10 segundos.
After 10 segundos, try to lleva tu codos in contra tu partner's resipostura. Hold that contraction for 6 segundos.
Now, relax tu muscles and have tu partner suavemente tira the codos espalda todo lo as it comfortable for for 30 segundos. (If want, try contracting tu upper espalda for greater ROM gains.)

name: Ankle On The Knee
instructions: Lay on your back with your knees bent to a 90 degre angle.
Once you have done this, lift your right foot up and place your ankle across your left knee.

Reach through the gap you have just created with your legs and pull your left thigh in towards your chest. Tip: Keep your shoulders and neck relaxed. Straighten your left leg if you wish to emphasise the movement or even stretch your left hamstring at the same time.
Hold for the recommended time and swap sides.
Variation: Foam Roll Glutes.

en: Lay on your back with your knees bent to a 90 degre angle.
Once you have done this, lift your right foot up and place your ankle across your left knee.

Reach through the gap you have just created with your legs and pull your left thigh in towards your chest. Tip: Keep your shoulders and neck relaxed. Straighten your left leg if you wish to emphasise the movement or even stretch your left hamstring at the same time.
Hold for the recommended time and swap sides.
Variation: Foam Roll Glutes.
es: Túmbate on tu espalda con tu rodillas bent to a 90 degre angle.
Once have done this, eleva tu derecho pie up and coloca tu tobillo across tu izquierdo rodilla.

Reach through the gap have just created con tu piernas and tira tu izquierdo thigh in hacia tu pecho. Consejo: Mantén tu hombros and cuello relajado. Straighten tu izquierdo pierna if wish to emphasise the movimiento or even estiramiento tu izquierdo hamstring at the same time.
Hold for the recommended time and swap lados.
Variación: Foam Roll Glutes.

name: All Fours Quad Stretch
instructions: Your starting position will be on your hands and knees (in an 'all-fours' position). Lift your left leg up and off the mat and take hold of your ankle behind your body with your left hand.
At this point you should be feeling a stretch through your quadricep and hip flexors.
Push your hips towards the floor to emphasise the stretch.
Hold for the recommended time and switch sides.
Variations: Kneeling Hip Flexor or Kneeling Quad Stretch.

en: Your starting position will be on your hands and knees (in an 'all-fours' position). Lift your left leg up and off the mat and take hold of your ankle behind your body with your left hand.
At this point you should be feeling a stretch through your quadricep and hip flexors.
Push your hips towards the floor to emphasise the stretch.
Hold for the recommended time and switch sides.
Variations: Kneeling Hip Flexor or Kneeling Quad Stretch.
es: tu posición inicial will be on tu manos and rodillas (in an 'all-fours' posición). Eleva tu izquierdo pierna up and off the colchoneta and agarra tu tobillo detrás de tu cuerpo con tu izquierdo mano.
At this point should be feeling a estiramiento through tu quadricep and cadera flexors.
Empuja tu caderas hacia el suelo to emphasise the estiramiento.
Hold for the recommended time and switch lados.
Variaciones: Kneeling Hip Flexor or Kneeling Quad Estiramiento.

name: Adductor Stretch
instructions: Lie on your back with your feet raised towards the ceiling.
Have your partner hold your feet or ankles. Abduct your legs as far as you can. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to squeeze your legs together for 10 or more seconds, while your partner prevents you from doing so.

Now, relax the muscles in your legs as your partner pushes your feet apart, stretching as far as is comfortable for you. Be sure to let your partner know when the stretch is adequate to prevent overstretching or injury.

en: Lie on your back with your feet raised towards the ceiling.
Have your partner hold your feet or ankles. Abduct your legs as far as you can. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to squeeze your legs together for 10 or more seconds, while your partner prevents you from doing so.

Now, relax the muscles in your legs as your partner pushes your feet apart, stretching as far as is comfortable for you. Be sure to let your partner know when the stretch is adequate to prevent overstretching or injury.

Have tu partner hold tu pies or tobillos. Abduct tu piernas todo lo as puedas. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Attempt to squeeze tu piernas together for 10 or more segundos, while tu partner prevents from doing so.

Now, relax the muscles in tu piernas as tu partner empujaes tu pies apart, estiramientoing todo lo as is comfortable for . Be sure to let tu partner know when the estiramiento is adequate to prevent overestiramientoing or injury.

name: Adductor PNF Stretch
instructions: Lie on your back with your feet raised towards the ceiling.
Have your partner hold your feet or ankles. Abduct your legs as far as you can. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to squeeze your legs together for 10 or more seconds, while your partner prevents you from doing so.

Now, relax the muscles in your legs as your partner pushes your feet apart, stretching as far as is comfortable for you. Be sure to let your partner know when the stretch is adequate to prevent overstretching or injury.

en: Lie on your back with your feet raised towards the ceiling.
Have your partner hold your feet or ankles. Abduct your legs as far as you can. This will be your starting position.
Attempt to squeeze your legs together for 10 or more seconds, while your partner prevents you from doing so.

Now, relax the muscles in your legs as your partner pushes your feet apart, stretching as far as is comfortable for you. Be sure to let your partner know when the stretch is adequate to prevent overstretching or injury.
es: Túmbate on tu espalda con tu pies elevad hacia el techo.
Have tu partner hold tu pies or tobillos. Abduct tu piernas todo lo as puedas. Esta será tu posición inicial.
Attempt to squeeze tu piernas together for 10 or more segundos, while tu partner prevents from doing so.

Now, relax the muscles in tu piernas as tu partner empujaes tu pies apart, estiramientoing todo lo as is comfortable for . Be sure to let tu partner know when the estiramiento is adequate to prevent overestiramientoing or injury.

name: Kettlebell Turkish Get-Up (Squat style)
instructions: Lie on your back on the  floor and press a kettlebell to the top position by extending the elbow. Bend the knee on the same side as the kettlebell.
Keeping the kettlebell locked out at all times, pivot to the opposite side and use your non- working arm to assist you in driving forward to the lunge position.

Using your free hand, push yourself to a seated position, then progressing to your feet. While looking up at the kettlebell, slowly stand up. Reverse the motion back to the starting position and repeat.

en: Lie on your back on the  floor and press a kettlebell to the top position by extending the elbow. Bend the knee on the same side as the kettlebell.
Keeping the kettlebell locked out at all times, pivot to the opposite side and use your non- working arm to assist you in driving forward to the lunge position.

Using your free hand, push yourself to a seated position, then progressing to your feet. While looking up at the kettlebell, slowly stand up. Reverse the motion back to the starting position and repeat.
es: Túmbate on tu espalda on el suelo and press a kettlebell to the parte superior posición by extiendeing the codo. Flexiona the rodilla on the same lado as the kettlebell.
Manténing the kettlebell locked out at all times, pivot to the contrario lado and use tu non- working brazo to assist in driving hacia delante to the zancada posición.

Using tu free mano, empuja yourself to a seated posición, then progressing to tu pies. While looking up at the kettlebell, lentamente colócate de pie up. Reverse the motion espalda to la posición inicial and repeat.

name: Kettlebell Pistol Squat
instructions: Stand holding a kettlebell at chest height by the horns (goblet position). Shift your weight to one leg and extend the other leg straight in front of you, off the floor.
Sit back and down on the working leg, pushing the hips back and bending the knee and ankle. The non-working leg stays extended forward without touching the floor.
Descend until the back of the thigh touches the calf, keeping the heel planted, the chest tall, and the kettlebell close to the body.
Drive through the whole foot to stand back up, finishing with the hips fully extended.
Complete the prescribed reps on one side, then switch legs.

en: Stand holding a kettlebell at chest height by the horns (goblet position). Shift your weight to one leg and extend the other leg straight in front of you, off the floor.
Sit back and down on the working leg, pushing the hips back and bending the knee and ankle. The non-working leg stays extended forward without touching the floor.
Descend until the back of the thigh touches the calf, keeping the heel planted, the chest tall, and the kettlebell close to the body.
Drive through the whole foot to stand back up, finishing with the hips fully extended.
Complete the prescribed reps on one side, then switch legs.
es: De pie, sujeta una kettlebell a la altura del pecho por los cuernos (posición goblet). Pasa el peso a una pierna y extiende la otra recta hacia delante, sin tocar el suelo.
Siéntate atrás y abajo sobre la pierna de trabajo, empujando la cadera atrás y flexionando rodilla y tobillo. La pierna libre se mantiene estirada delante sin apoyar.
Baja hasta que la parte posterior del muslo toque el gemelo, manteniendo el talón apoyado, el pecho alto y la kettlebell pegada al cuerpo.
Empuja con todo el pie para volver a subir, terminando con la cadera completamente extendida.
Completa las repeticiones marcadas a un lado y cambia de pierna.

name: Kettlebell One-Legged Squat
instructions: Pick up a kettlebell with two hands and hold it by the horns. Hold one leg off of the floor and squat down on the other.
Squat down by flexing the knee and sitting back with the hips, holding the kettlebell up in front of you.
Hold the bottom position for a second and then reverse the motion, driving through the heel and keeping your head and chest up.
Lower yourself again and repeat.

en: Pick up a kettlebell with two hands and hold it by the horns. Hold one leg off of the floor and squat down on the other.
Squat down by flexing the knee and sitting back with the hips, holding the kettlebell up in front of you.
Hold the bottom position for a second and then reverse the motion, driving through the heel and keeping your head and chest up.
Lower yourself again and repeat.
es: Pick up a kettlebell with two manos and hold it by the horns. Hold one pierna off of el suelo and squat down on the other.
Squat down by flexing the rodilla and siéntateting espalda with the caderas, holding the kettlebell up delante de .
Hold the parte baja posición for a second and then reverse the motion, driving through the talón and manténing tu cabeza and pecho up.
Baja yourself again and repeat.

name: Bottoms-Up Clean From The Hang Position
instructions: Initiate the exercise by standing upright with a kettlebell in one hand.
Swing the kettlebell back forcefully and then reverse the motion forcefully.
Crush the kettlebell handle as hard as possible and raise the kettlebell to your shoulder.

name: Bent Press
instructions: Clean a kettlebell to your shoulder.  Clean the kettlebell to your shoulders by extending through the legs and hips as you raise the kettlebell towards your shoulder. The wrist should rotate as you do so. This will be your starting position.

Begin my leaning to the side opposite the kettlebell, continuing until you are able to touch the ground with your free hand, keeping your eyes on the kettlebell.  As you do so, press the weight vertically be extending through the elbow, keeping your arm perpendicular to the ground.
Return to an upright position, with the kettlebell above your head. Return the kettlebell to the shoulder and repeat for the desired number of repetitions.

es: Cinclínate a kettlebell to tu hombro. Cinclínate the kettlebell to tu hombros by extiendeing through the piernas and caderas as eleva the kettlebell hacia tu hombro. The wrist should rota as do so. Esta será tu posición inicial.

Begin my inclínateing to the lado contrario the kettlebell, continuing hasta que are able to touch the ground con tu free mano, manténing tu eyes on the kettlebell. As do so, press the peso vertically be extiendeing through the codo, manténing tu brazo perpendicular to the ground.
Vuelve to an erguido posición, with the kettlebell por encima de tu cabeza. Vuelve the kettlebell to the hombro and repeat for the deseado number of repeticiones.

name: Balance Board
instructions: Note: This exercise is designed to increase balance.
Place a balance board in front of you.
Stand up on it and try to balance yourself.
Hold the balance for as long as desired.
Caution: If your balance is poor, start out with one of the less challenging boards.
Variations: You can perform this exercise using various types of balance boards.  Some are more challenging than others.

name: Janda Sit-Up
instructions: Note: This exercise was created by Czech exercise physiologist, Dr. Vladimir Janda and is one of the most challenging sit-up variations as it completely isolates the rectus abdominals by eliminating the hip flexors.

Position your body on the floor in the basic sit-up position; knees to a ninety degree angle with feet flat on the floor and arms either crossed over your chest or to the sides.  This will be your starting position.

As you strongly tighten your glutes and hamstrings, fill your lungs with air and in a slow (three to six second count) ascent, slowly exhale.  Tip: It is important to tighten the glutes and hamstrings as this will cause the hip flexors to be inactivated in a process called reciprocal inhibition, which basically means that opposite muscles to the contracted ones will relax.
As you inhale, slowly go back in a controlled manner to the starting position.
Repeat for the recommended amount of repetitions.

Variations: The exercise can be done using a dedicated abdominal bench apparatus, having a workout partner exert pulling pressure on your calves (while you maintain your feet on the ground) or wrapping your legs over barbell and pulling back.

As strongly tighten tu glúteos and isquiosurales, fill tu lungs with air and in a lento (three to six second count) ascent, lentamente exhala. name: Single-Leg High Box Squat
instructions: Position a box in a rack. Secure a band or rope in place above the box.
Standing in front of it, step onto the box to a full standing position, letting your other leg remain unsupported. Hold onto the band for balance
. Continue stepping up and down on the same leg before switching to the opposite side.

Standing in front of it, step onto the box to a full standing position, letting your other leg remain unsupported. Hold onto the band for balance
. Continue stepping up and down on the same leg before switching to the opposite side.
es: Posiéntateion a box in a rack. Secure a banda or rope in coloca por encima de the box.
Colócate de pieing delante de it, step onto the box to a full colócate de pieing posición, letting tu other pierna remain unsupported. Hold onto the banda for balance
. Continúa stepping up and down on the same pierna before switching to the contrario lado.

name: Reverse Band Sumo Deadlift
instructions: Begin with a bar loaded on the floor inside of a power rack. Attach bands to the top of the rack, using either pegs or the frame itself. Attach the other end to the barbell.

Approach the bar so that the bar intersects the middle of the feet. The feet should be set very wide, near the collars. Bend at the hips to grip the bar. The arms should be directly below the shoulders, inside the legs, and you can use a pronated grip, a mixed grip, or hook grip. Relax the shoulders, which in effect lengthens your arms.

Take a breath, and then lower your hips, looking forward with your head with your chest up. Drive through the floor, spreading your feet apart, with your weight on the back half of your feet. Extend through the hips and knees.
As the bar passes through the knees, lean back and drive the hips into the bar, pulling your shoulder blades together.
Return the weight to the ground by bending at the hips and controlling the weight on the way down.

es: Begin with a bar loaded on el suelo inlado of a power rack. Attach bandaas to the parte superior of the rack, using either pegs or the frame itself. Attach the other end to the barra.

Approach the bar so that the bar intersects the middle of the pies. The pies should be set very amplio, near the collars. Flexiona at the caderas to grip the bar. The brazos should be directamente below the hombros, inlado the piernas, and can use a agarre prono, a agarre mixto, or agarre hook. Relax the hombros, which in effect lengthens tu brazos.

Take a breath, and then baja tu caderas, looking hacia delante con tu cabeza con tu pecho up. Drive through el suelo, spreading tu pies apart, con tu peso on la espalda half of tu pies. Extiende through the caderas and rodillas.
As the bar passes through the rodillas, inclínate espalda and drive the caderas into the bar, tiraing tu hombro blades together.
Vuelve the peso to the ground by flexionaing at the caderas and controlling the peso on the way down.

name: Reverse Band Squat
instructions: Begin in a power rack with the pins and bar set at the appropriate height. After loading the bar, attach bands to the top of the rack, using either pegs or the frame itself. Attach the other end of the bands to the bar.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wide for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings.

Keep your head facing forward. With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips as much as possible. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Lower bar position necessitates a greater torso lean to keep the bar over the heels. Continue until you break parallel, which is defined as the crease of the hip being in line with the top of the knee.

Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe, until you have returned to the starting position.

Mantén tu cabeza facing hacia delante. With tu espalda, hombros, and core tight, empuja tu rodillas and butt out and begin tu descent. Siéntate espalda con tu caderas as much lo máximo posible. Ideally, tu shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Baja bar posición necessiéntateates a greater torso inclínate to mantén the bar over the talones. name: Reverse Band Deadlift
instructions: Set the bar up in a power rack. Attach bands to the top of the rack, using either bands pegs or the frame itself. Attach the other end of the bands to the bar.

Approach the bar so that it is centered over your feet. You feet should be about hip width apart. Bend at the hip to grip the bar at shoulder width, allowing your shoulder blades to protract. Typically, you would use an overhand grip or an over/under grip on heavier sets.

With your feet, and your grip set, take a big breath and then lower your hips and bend the knees until your shins contact the bar. Look forward with your head, keep your chest up and your back arched, and begin driving through the heels to move the weight upward.
After the bar passes the knees, aggressively pull the bar back, pulling your shoulder blades together as you drive your hips forward into the bar.
Lower the bar by bending at the hips and guiding it to the floor.

After the barra passes the rodillas, aggressively pull the barra espalda, pulling your hombro blades together as you drive your caderas forward into the barra.
Lower the barra by bending at the caderas and guiding it to the suelo.

name: Reverse Band Box Squat
instructions: Begin in a power rack with a box at the appropriate height behind you.  Set up the bands either on band pegs or attached to the top of the rack, ensuring they will be directly above the bar during the squat. Attach the other end to the bar.

Begin by stepping under the bar and placing it across the back of the shoulders. Squeeze your shoulder blades together and rotate your elbows forward, attempting to bend the bar across your shoulders. Remove the bar from the rack, creating a tight arch in your lower back, and step back into position. Place your feet wider for more emphasis on the back, glutes, adductors, and hamstrings, or closer together for more quad development. Keep your head facing forward.

With your back, shoulders, and core tight, push your knees and butt out and you begin your descent. Sit back with your hips until you are seated on the box. Ideally, your shins should be perpendicular to the ground. Pause when you reach the box, and relax the hip flexors. Never bounce off of a box.

Keeping the weight on your heels and pushing your feet and knees out, drive upward off of the box as you lead the movement with your head. Continue upward, maintaining tightness head to toe. Use care to return the barbell to the rack.

Manténing the peso on your talones and pushing your pies and rodillas out, drive upward off of the cajón as you lead the movimiento with your cabeza. Continue upward, maintaining tightness cabeza to toe. Use care to return the barrara to the rack.

name: Reverse Band Bench Press
instructions: Position a bench inside a power rack, with the bar set to the correct height. Begin by anchoring bands either to band pegs or to the top of the rack. Ensure that you will be position properly under the bands. Attach the other end to the barbell.

Lie on the bench,  tuck your feet underneath you and arch your back. Using the bar to help support your weight, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your feet to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement. However wide your grip, it should cover the ring on the bar.

Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting your shoulders. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart. Lower the bar to your lower chest or upper stomach. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times.
Pause when the barbell touches your torso, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.

name.es: Con banda de asistencia inversa press de banca

en: Position a bench inside a power rack, with the bar set to the correct height. Begin by anchoring bands either to band pegs or to the top of the rack. Ensure that you will be position properly under the bands. Attach the other end to the barbell.

Lie on the bench,  tuck your feet underneath you and arch your back. Using the bar to help support your weight, lift your shoulder off the bench and retract them, squeezing the shoulder blades together. Use your feet to drive your traps into the bench. Maintain this tight body position throughout the movement. However wide your grip, it should cover the ring on the bar.

Pull the bar out of the rack without protracting your shoulders. Focus on squeezing the bar and trying to pull it apart. Lower the bar to your lower chest or upper stomach. The bar, wrist, and elbow should stay in line at all times.
Pause when the barbell touches your torso, and then drive the bar up with as much force as possible. The elbows should be tucked in until lockout.
